Name: Vestas
Description:
Vestas is the energy industry’s global partner on sustainable energy solutions. We design, manufacture, install, and service wind turbines across the globe, and with +200 GW of wind turbines in 88 countries, we have installed more wind power than anyone else.

Through our industry-leading smart data capabilities and 159 GW of wind turbines under service, we use data to interpret, forecast, and exploit wind resources and deliver best-in-class wind power solutions. Together with our customers, Vestas’ more than 30,000 employees are bringing the world sustainable energy solutions to power a bright future.

Name: GE Renewable Energy
Description:
GE Renewable Energy, part of GE Vernova, harnesses the earth’s most abundant resources – the strength of the wind, the heat of the sun and the force of water – to power the world’s biggest economies and the most remote communities.

With an innovative spirit and an entrepreneurial mindset, we engineer energy products and digital services that create industry-leading value for our customers around the world. 

We see the promise of renewable energy everywhere we look. Our team has the courage, scale, passion, diversity and resourcefulness needed to deliver that promise wherever and however the world needs it.

Together with our customers, we’re proving that no one ever has to choose between affordable, reliable, or sustainable energy. 

We are unleashing limitless energy

Name: Huawei Digital Power
Description:
Huawei Digital Power covers several business domains: Smart PV, Smart Charging Network, DriveONE, Data Center Facility, and Site Power Facility. Huawei Digital Power serves more than three billion people across more than 170 countries and regions. Currently, It operates 12 R&D centers in China, Europe, and Asia Pacific, owning a total of 2,122 valid patents worldwide.

Huawei Digital Power is committed to integrating digital and power electronics technologies, developing clean power, and enabling energy digitalization to drive energy revolution for a better, greener future. In the clean power generation sector, we help create new power systems that primarily rely on renewable energy. In the mobility electrification sector, we enhance the consumer driving and charging experience in electric vehicles (EVs), accelerating green traveling. In the green ICT power infrastructure sector, we help build green, low-carbon, and intelligent data centers and communications networks. Huawei Digital Power continues innovating through open collaboration with global partners to promote carbon neutrality.

Name: Sungrow Power Supply Co., Ltd.
Description: Sungrow is a global leader in renewable energy technology with 740GW of power electronic converters installed worldwide as of Dec. 2024.

Name: Adani Solar
Description:
Adani Solar is one of India’s leading Tier-1 solar panel manufacturers, known for delivering high-efficiency and reliable solar solutions. We are building the world’s first fully integrated and comprehensive 10 GW solar manufacturing ecosystem, covering the entire value chain from polysilicon to modules, and we stand at the forefront of innovation, quality, and scale in renewable energy space.
 
We have an operational capacity of 4GW for cells and modules and proudly operate India’s only ingot + Wafer facility of 2GW. Our module capacity is expected to scale to 10 GW by December 2025 and cell capacity by December 2026, marking a significant leap in India’s renewable energy manufacturing landscape.
 
With a strong focus on innovation, quality, and sustainability, Adani Solar continues to power India’s clean energy transition and contribute meaningfully to global climate goals.
 
We are energizing tomorrow—one panel at a time.

Name: ENERCON
Description:
ENERCON: Pioneer in wind energy technology, partner in the energy transition and attractive employer in a future-orientated industry.

Thanks to innovative turbine technology, high quality standards and many years of experience, ENERCON is one of the leading manufacturers of onshore wind turbines. Dr Aloys Wobben founded ENERCON in Aurich (East Frisia) in 1984. With just a few employees, he developed the company's first wind turbines. The company was the first wind turbine manufacturer to use a gearless drive concept, which characterises all ENERCON wind turbines. ENERCON is also a pioneer in areas such as rotor blade design, control and grid connection technology, and continues to demonstrate its great innovative strength with a large number of new technological developments.

Today, ENERCON is active worldwide and is already present in over 35 countries with a decentralised service and sales network. This means that we not only offer our employees international career opportunities, but also very close cooperation with team colleagues abroad. We all share a common goal: energy for the world.

Shapers of the future wanted: Become part of our vision and bring a breath of fresh air to our team! ENERCON offers challenging career prospects in a wide range of areas such as Research & Development, IT, Project Management, Sales and in the Commercial Sector.

Apply now: https://www.enercon.de/karriere

Imprint: https://www.enercon.de/impressum

Data protection: https://www.enercon.de/de/datenschutz

Name: Nordex Group
Description:
The development, manufacture, project management and servicing of wind turbines in the onshore segment has been the core competence and passion of the Nordex Group and its more than 10,900 employees worldwide for 40 years. 
As one of the world's largest wind turbine manufacturers, the Nordex Group offers high-yield, cost-efficient wind turbines that enable long-term and economical power generation from wind energy in all geographical and climatic conditions. The focus is on turbines in the 3 to 7 MW class, and the Group’s comprehensive product portfolio offers individual solutions for both markets with limited space and regions with limited grid capacities. A global service network, of around 380 service points throughout 30 countries, delivers service quickly to keep our systems running smoothly. The Group covers the needs of all customer segments within the global wind market, from large energy suppliers to SMEs operating power plants. With more than 61 GW of installed capacity worldwide, Nordex Group systems deliver sustainable energy throughout more than 80 per cent of the world’s energy market (excluding China). 
Nordex SE is listed on the TecDAX and MDAX of the Frankfurt Stock Exchange (ISIN: DE000A0D6554). The headoffice of the company, with the Management Board and central corporate functions, is located in Hamburg, while the legal entity is registered in Rostock. At production facilities in Germany, Spain, Brazil, the US, and India, the Nordex Group produces nacelles, rotor blades and concrete towers. The Group also maintains offices and branches in more than 30 countries.

Name: Goldwind
Description:
As a reliable global strategic partner in clean energy, Goldwind is committed Driving a Renewable Future and centering its business on Ecology-Oriented Development+ENERGY industry model. Goldwind’s global business network covers more than 48 countries across 6 continents. We have approximately 11,000 employees worldwide, including more than 3,000 research and development (R&D) and technical personnel. With high quality clean energy products, solutions, devices, services, Goldwind supports cities and enterprises alike with comprehensive and sustainable economic, ecological, and social development. As of Q3 2025, Goldwind has delivered more than 56,800 wind turbines worldwide and boasts a global cumulative installed capacity exceeding 155GW. Goldwind also has operations and maintenance (O&M) service capacity that exceeds 115GW. 

Goldwind is Innovating for a Brighter Tomorrow.

Name: Solis
Description:
Established in 2005, Ginlong (Solis) Technologies（Stock code: 300763.SZ） today has one of the widest installed bases of string inverters globally with our inverters converting DC to AC power and interacting with utility grid in markets around the world, reducing the carbon footprint, and helping us enrich society around the world. Solis is the first publicly owned and listed company with a primary focus on string inverters and the first inverter manufacturer to complete PVEL's (Formerly part of DNV-GL) 3rd Party Inverter Reliability Testing.
Solis has been actively involved with national bodies in formulating 10+ national and industrial standards and has formulated two national standards in the name of the first drafting unit.
Solis has set up global offices and technical after-sales service centers in the United Kingdom, the United States, Australia, Brazil, South Africa, India, Mexico, Spain, Netherlands, Romania and other places. Solis products have been used in high-profile locations and projects around the world including the Shanghai Expo, (Shanghai, China) and the Eiffel Tower (Paris, France) along with other leading domestic and commercial projects.
The MPPT design with a precise MPPT algorithm developed by the company can break through 99.1% of the maximum conversion efficiency of products. Solis led the installation of the AFCI DC arc fault protection function in the cascade inverters, which can avoid up to 99% of the power stations' fire risk, in addition to other innovations that drive technical upgrades in the market today. Solis was ranked among the top 10 in the global string market, No.2 in global single-phase and. 4 in global three-phase string market share by shipments (MWac) 
Solis is committed to a global vision built on product-centered engineering, putting customers at the center of our most critical decisions, and ensuring that we play our role in the transition to clean energy by helping make it more efficient, safe, and dependable.

Name: SUN Mobility
Description:
Welcome to SUN Mobility, where we aim to make electric vehicles affordable and accessible to all. 

SUN Mobility is a joint venture between the Maini Group and SUN Group -co-founded by Chetan Maini, founder of India’s first electric car company, Reva, and Uday Khemka, Vice Chairman of the SUN Group. 

At SUN Mobility, we believe electric vehicles are the future of mobility, and we aim to accelerate the adoption of electric mobility with our innovative battery swapping technology. Our technology is designed to be universally interoperable across various vehicle platforms and form factors, making it future-proof, sustainable and highly scalable. 

With our state-of-the art Smart Batteries and vast network of IoT-enabled Swap Points, EV charging times and range anxiety are a thing of the past. Our unique approach of separating the batteries from vehicles through the battery subscription model addresses key issues such as high upfront cost, range anxiety and long charging times. 

Our battery swapping services are not only faster and more convenient than traditional EV charging, but they are also better for the planet.  With collaborations and partnerships spanning the best of the industry’s vehicle manufacturers, battery cell technology providers, fleet operators, ride-sharing players and last-mile transport operators, we are proud to be at the forefront of the EV revolution. 

Join us on our journey towards a clean, green, and sustainable future for us all.

Name: Envision Energy
Description:
Envision Energy is a world-leading green technology company that provides renewable energy solutions for global enterprises, governments, and institutions. Encompassing three major business sectors - Smart Wind Turbines, Energy Storage, and Green Hydrogen Solutions, Envision Energy collaboratively constructs comprehensive solutions for energy transformation. It also manages Envision-Hongshan Carbon-Neutral Fund and owns Envision Racing Formula E team, who conquered the Formula E Teams' Championship in 2023.

With its contribution to the global green energy transition, Envision Energy is listed as a “Green Giant” in TIME “2024Time 100 Most Influential Companies” list. Envision Energy has also received several accolades for its sustainability performance, including the EcoVadis Gold Medal and the CDP “A-List”. It was also recognized in Fortune's “Change the World” list and ranked among the top 10 smartest companies by the MIT Technology Review. 

Today, Envision Energy leverages its global network of R&D and engineering centers across China, the United States, UK, France, Germany, Denmark, etc. to continuously lead global green technology development. Envision Energy joined the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi) and committed to achieving the "Business Ambition for 1.5°C" in 2021. By the end of 2022, it had achieved carbon neutrality in its global operations, with a goal of reaching net-zero emissions by 2040.

Name: ACME Group
Description:
ACME Group is one of the leading global sustainable and renewable energy companies and a beacon of innovation in the sustainable energy landscape for the past 2 decades. Founded by Mr Manoj K. Upadhyay we are headquartered in Gurugram, Haryana, India. 
At ACME, we’re harnessing the power of nature to fuel a sustainable future. Our journey in renewable energy spans solar, wind, and the innovative realms of green hydrogen and ammonia. We’re not just about energy; we’re revolutionizing nutrition with our venture into protein superfoods, nourishing bodies and minds for a healthier world.
With ACME Solar, we are lighting up homes and industrial units in India. We have built a solar portfolio of over 6 GWp with over 1.5 GWp of capacity currently in operation and another 10 GWp under construction. The projects are spread across 13 states in India and Oman.
Through ACME GHC, we are set to replicate the success of our Bikaner Pilot Project for Green Hydrogen and Green Ammonia. After demonstrating our capabilities and credible experience at Bikaner, we are developing commercial-scale green fuel projects integrating multiple technologies across the Globe. 
With ACME Superfood, we have introduced Mycoprotein, a fermentation-derived, vegan, edible, fungi-based protein superfood with an excellent nutritional profile.
Our vision is clear: to ascend as a top global green energy provider by 2030. We’re collaborating with governments, partners, and visionaries across the globe to develop clean energy projects in diverse locales.
As catalysts for change, we’re committed to supporting new ventures that share our vision for a cleaner, greener planet. Join the ACME movement, where every step we take is a leap toward innovation, sustainability, and a luminous future.
Let’s build a brighter, more sustainable future together.

Name: LM Wind Power
Description:
LM Wind Power, part of GE Vernova, is a world leading designer and manufacturer of rotor blades for wind turbines, offering blade development, manufacturing, services, and logistics. Approximately one in five turbines installed around the world has LM Wind Power blades.

Headquartered in Kolding, Denmark, our global manufacturing footprint includes production facilities in or close to the major wind energy markets, with 12 production facilities on four continents. In addition, we have technology hubs in Denmark, The Netherlands, India, the US and UK. WE employ over 10,000 people worldwide.

Working in close collaboration with customers, we design and supply rotor solutions for wind turbine projects all over the world. Since 1978, LM Wind Power had produced more than 260,000 blades corresponding to a capacity of over 140 GW – each year effectively saving nature more than 300 million metric tons of CO2 emissions.

Name: EcoFlow
Description: EcoFlow is a leading eco-friendly energy solutions company with the vision to power a new world. Since its founding in 2017, EcoFlow aims to become a reliable and trusted energy companion for individuals and families across the world, providing accessible and renewable power solutions at home, outdoors, and in mobile spaces. Today, with operational headquarters located in the USA, Germany, and Japan, EcoFlow has empowered more than 2.5 million users in over 100 markets worldwide.

Name: Arctech
Description:
Arctech (SSE-STAR:688408) is the world-leading supplier of intelligent solar trackers, fixed-tilt structures, PV cleaning robot and energy storage solutions. Empowered by over 670 patents, Arctech products have been applied in the utility-scale and commercial solar PV projects since 2009. It was listed among the top 4 tracker suppliers by IHS Markit and Wood Mackenzie from 2017 to 2020. According to Wood Mackenzie's report, Arctech has surged to Top 2 globally in the solar tracker market with 16% market share.The company went public on China's Nasdaq-style STAR market in 2020. 

Arctech has a 6.4GW production capacity in China, 2.8GW production capacity in trial operation, a capacity of 7GW from the Indian manufacturing base, which has entered operation in August 2022, a capacity of 3GW from the Saudi factory as well as a Brazilian factory with the annual production capacity of 3GW. This results in a total annual production capacity exceeding 30GW. The company has also partnered with global OEMs to enhance its global supply chain diversification. 

Arctech is also the leading force in drafting and revising the International Electrotechnical Commission standard of the solar tracker. Having a TMP Lab of its own accredited by TÜV SÜD, the company is also the first photovoltaic company with its own wind tunnel laboratory. 

The company has five major products categories, including solar tracking systems, fixed-tilt structures, flexible PV mounting systems, PV cleaning robot and energy storage solutions. 

As of June of 2025, Arctech has supplied over 100 GW of tracking and racking systems to nearly 2000 PV plants in 40 countries. With a diversified workforce of over 2,000 employees, the company has established local offices in China, Japan, Vietnam, India, the U.S., Spain, Australia, UAE, Saudi Arabia, South Africa, Mexico, Chile, Brazil, Colombia, and Argentina.

Name: Agratas
Description:
Agratas is a global battery business within the Tata group.

The global energy transition is one of the biggest shifts in human history.

We’re here to do it in a way everyone can be proud of by putting people first, innovating with integrity, and working with all parts of the energy ecosystem to make sure our world benefits.

Name: HiTHIUM Energy Storage
Description: Founded in 2019, Hithium is a leading manufacturer of premium stationary energy storage products for utility-scale, commercial and industrial, and residential applications. With four distinct R&D centers and multiple “intelligent” production facilities, Hithium’s innovations include groundbreaking safety improvements to its lithium-ion batteries as well as increases in lifecycle.

Name: SolaX Power
Description:
At SolaX, we have been at the forefront of hybrid inverter technology for over 12 years, pioneering the first hybrid inverter in Asia. Since our public listing in 2024, we have established a presence in over 80 countries, earning trust and recognition worldwide. Our residential energy storage systems are ranked among the top three globally, renowned for their superior quality and advanced technology.

Innovation is the cornerstone of our success, with 30% of our workforce dedicated to research and development. This commitment has led to the launch of five generations of products and the acquisition of over 150 patents. We not only adhere to industry standards but set new benchmarks. Our storage inverters are certified to meet the most stringent standards, such as JET, consistently delivering exceptional performance.

Reliability is equally paramount. We have established a robust global network of sales and service, supported by over 200 dedicated staff, call centers, and repair teams, ensuring prompt and efficient assistance wherever needed.

At SolaX, we prioritize trust. Through cutting-edge technology and unparalleled support, we are committed to powering a sustainable future together.

Name: ANDRITZ Hydro
Description:
From the historic pioneers of technology to a modern global market leader

ANDRITZ Hydropower is one of the world's leading suppliers of electromechanical equipment and services for hydropower stations in the dynamically growing global renewable energy market. Based on 185 years of experience and a global installed capacity of 489 gigawatts, we offer innovative solutions for new and existing hydropower stations, from small hydropower to large-scale plants. State-of-the-art digital solutions, comprehensive services for the operation and maintenance of entire hydropower plants, and turbo generators for the thermal industry complete the portfolio.

#andritz # #Hydropower #RenewableEnergy #energy #sustainability #GreenTransition #CleanEnergy

Name: TCL SunPower Global
Description: TCL SunPower Global, a proud member of the TCL Group, stands at the forefront of pioneering solar energy solutions. As a brand trusted by millions of homeowners, businesses, and energy producers around the globe, we are committed to empowering a sustainable connected future and transforming the way our world is powered. Leveraging our 40 years of experience in solar, we are fast-tracking the transition to clean, renewable energy, ensuring a brighter tomorrow for all.

Name: Hoymiles
Description:
Hoymiles' mission is to become the leading choice for getting started with smart energy, making good technology more impactful by ensuring it's accessible to everyone, and bringing smart solar to the entire world with high-quality products.

Hoymiles is a global MLPE (Module Level Power Electronics) solution provider, specializing in solar and storage systems. With a vision of a clean, sustainable future, we strive to lead the smart energy industry through our rugged technology and reliable products.

With our driven engineer team, 1600+ global experts and distribution & service network spanning North America, South America, Europe, Asia, Africa and Oceania, Hoymiles has empowered homeowners and professionals in more than 190 countries and regions to join the journey to true open energy. Now we are favored by the market as a trustworthy partner to our investors, installers and end consumers.

Name: Nel Hydrogen
Description:
Nel has a history tracing back to 1927 and is today a leading pure play hydrogen electrolyser technology company with a global presence. The company specializes in Alkaline and PEM technology for production of renewable hydrogen. Nel's product offerings are key enablers for a green hydrogen economy, making it possible to decarbonize various industries such as transportation, refining, steel, and ammonia.
 
Welcome to Nel Hydrogen's social media platforms. We strive to maintain a positive and engaging community where we can share information, insights, and engage in meaningful discussions. To ensure a constructive environment, we have established the following guidelines applicable across all our social media channels:
 
Maintain a Respectful Tone: We encourage discussions that are constructive and respectful. Please engage with others in a manner that is polite and considerate. Disrespect towards fellow community members is not tolerated.
 
•	Content that will be removed: We will remove content that is offensive, defamatory, contains harsh language, personal attacks, spam (repetitive content and/or high frequency from the same user), and identical comments.
 
•	Encourage Constructive Debate: We welcome diverse opinions and criticism as long as they contribute to the conversation. However, keep the discussions relevant to the topic at hand.
 
•	No Fake or Anonymous Profiles: To foster a trustworthy community, participation through false or anonymous profiles is prohibited. Such profiles will be banned from our social media channels.
 
•	Focus on Relevant Discussions: Comments not related to the specific discussion thread will be deleted. 
 
•	No Disinformation: Sharing of false information will lead to its removal from our channels.
 
•	Link Sharing: When sharing links, provide context or a brief description. Links shared without accompanying information may be deleted.
 
Repeated violations of these guidelines may result in a suspension or permanent ban.

Name: Saatvik Solar
Description:
Founded in 2015, Saatvik Green Energy Limited is one of India’s leading solar energy companies, driving the nation’s transition toward a cleaner and more sustainable future. With a 4.8 GW manufacturing capacity at its state-of-the-art facility in Ambala, Haryana, Saatvik produces high-efficiency Monocrystalline, Bifacial, and NTOPCon solar modules that meet global standards like ALMM, BIS, IEC, and MNRE. The company also offers turnkey EPC services, solar pumps, battery energy storage systems (BESS), EPE Film and on-grid inverters under its expanding portfolio.
Saatvik continues to strengthen its leadership through innovation and expansion, with an upcoming new 4 GW module and 4.8 GW solar cell facility coming up in Odisha by FY26, reaffirming its commitment to powering a greener, energy-independent India.

Name: Rayzon Solar Limited
Description:
Rayzon Solar, founded in 2017, is a trailblazer in the solar technology industry. We are dedicated to transforming the photovoltaic (PV) sector with cutting-edge innovations. From day one, our mission has been to enhance the accessibility and impact of solar energy, aiming to create a more sustainable and vibrant future.

Operating from a state-of-the-art 6 GW production facility in Gujarat, India, Rayzon Solar excels in manufacturing high-quality Poly/Mono Crystalline Solar Modules. Our impressive growth is highlighted by a rapid manufacturing capacity expansion from 40 MW to 1500 MW within five years. We are on track to achieve 1000 MW of solar cells and 10,000 MW of solar modules by the end of 2025.

Our commitment to excellence is evident in our fully automated production plant, featuring the latest technology, including solar cell tabbers, stringers, laminators, and testers. We adhere to global standards such as ALMM, IEC, BIS, and MNRE, ensuring superior quality and reliability in our products.

Our extensive global network reflects Rayzon Solar’s focus on technological innovation and sustainable energy solutions. We serve clients in the USA, Canada, Europe, the Middle East, and South Africa. With a dedicated team of over 2,000 professionals, we are committed to advancing solar technology and fostering global sustainability.

Our vision goes beyond manufacturing; we are devoted to leading the renewable energy revolution through continuous innovation and a commitment to a cleaner, greener future

Name: Senvion India
Description:
Senvion India is one of the leading turbine manufacturers in the wind energy sector.
Wind energy is moving into a new phase, defined more than ever by one all-important question: how to generate a maximum of energy at the lowest possible LCOE? To answer this question, we work with passion and commitment to make wind energy competitive and profitable for our customers. We keep challenging ourselves to continuously improve the performance of our turbines and we never settle for less than outstanding service – it’s our way of making the wind work a little harder for our customers.
Our new distinctive look reflects this attitude, with bold, dynamic images that capture the power of the wind and a clear and concise language. Our new strapline sums it up in just four words: 'Senvion - We make wind perform'.

Disclaimer: RE Technologies GmbH, Germany and Senvion Wind Technology Pvt. Ltd., India together with all its affiliates in India have rights over trademark SENVION in India. Outside India, this trademark belongs to a third party.

Name: Deye New Energy
Description:
Deye, established in 2007, is a wholly-owned subsidiary of the publicly traded Deye Group (stock code: 605117.SH). Deye is dedicated to delivering reliable inverter solutions for residential and commercial photovoltaic power stations and energy storage systems, encompassing 1kW-136kW string grid-tied inverters, 3kW-80kW hybrid inverters, and 300W-2.2kW microinverters.

As a product-centric organization, Deye consistently strives to meet market demands, continuously iterating and enhancing existing products, while expediting the development of new offerings. Deye is committed to crafting advanced and efficient solutions for photovoltaic and energy storage systems, contributing to achieving global energy transformation objectives and providing reliable, affordable, and sustainable clean energy to users across various countries and regions.

Name: PowerCo
Description:
At PowerCo, we are shaping the battery future. Founded by the Volkswagen Group in 2022, PowerCo is a globally operating battery cell manufacturer with a strong commitment to sustainability. The company, headquartered in Salzgitter, is rooted in Europe and is responsible for the development and production of battery cells, as well as the vertical integration of the value chain. PowerCo is currently ramping-up three cell factories with a combined capacity of up to 200 gigawatt-hours per year: Salzgitter in Germany, Valencia in Spain, and St. Thomas in Canada.
Our company is dedicated to driving sustainable energy solutions that contribute to a greener future, leveraging our expertise and innovation to make a positive impact on the global energy landscape.

Name: ENGIE Energy Access (Africa)
Description:
Ignite Energy Access is an Abu Dhabi-based leader in distributed renewable energy solutions, dedicated to providing affordable, reliable, and sustainable electricity to underserved communities across Africa. 

Operating across 12 countries and serving over 15 million people, our portfolio spans solar home systems, productive use applications, hybrid inverters, solar-based internet access, mini-grids, commercial & industrial solutions.

Through innovative technology, scalable business models, and impact-driven financing, Ignite Power is transforming lives, fostering economic growth, and driving the continent’s clean energy transition.

Name: ATESS Power
Description:
Shenzhen ATESS Power Technology Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Growatt group, headquartered in GROWATT-ATESS Industrial Park, Shuitian 4th Industrial Zone, Bao'an District, Shenzhen. The park covers an area of 31600 m² and the manufacturing center covers an area of 25,000 m². It is a comprehensive smart industrial park integrating R&D, manufacturing, and sales of new energy products.

ATESS boasts an R&D team of over 100 highly experienced engineers. Our laboratory is fully equipped with advanced testing instruments to ensure top-notch product performance and quality, as well as customers' needs. We dedicate around 15% of our annual revenue to research and development each year to keep our products competitive.

Over the past years, ATESS has helped thousands of users and companies produce and consume green energy independently according to their individual needs, saving millions of tonnes of CO₂ emission. This motivates us to continually strive to create and innovate, on the universal carbon neutralization goal, and also a greener future energized by renewable energy technology.

Name: REPT BATTERO
Description:
Founded in 2017, REPT BATTERO Energy Co., Ltd. is the first enterprise established by Tsingshan Holding Group (a Fortune Global 500 company) in the new energy sector. Specializing in the R&D, production, and sales of lithium-ion batteries, the company provides solutions for new energy vehicle power systems and smart energy storage, collaborating with customers to accelerate the global green energy transition.

With R&D centers in Shanghai, Wenzhou, and Jiaxing, and production bases in Wenzhou, Jiaxing, Liuzhou, Foshan, Chongqing, and Indonesia, the company had a total production capacity of 74 GWh by the end of 2024. This is expected to exceed 90 GWh in 2025. In the first half of 2025, it ranked No.1 globally in the shipments of residential energy storage battery cells, and ranked second in China in the battery installation volume for new energy heavy-duty trucks.

Name: Array Technologies
Description: ARRAY Technologies (NASDAQ: ARRY) is a leading American company and global provider of utility-scale solar tracker technology. Engineered to withstand the harshest conditions on the planet, ARRAY’s high-quality solar trackers and sophisticated software maximize energy production, accelerating the adoption of cost-effective and sustainable energy. Founded and headquartered in the United States, ARRAY relies on its diversified global supply chain and customer-centric approach to deliver, commission and support solar energy developments around the world, lighting the way to a brighter, smarter future for clean energy. For more news and information on Array, please visit arraytechinc.com.

Name: Redwood Materials
Description: Redwood Materials is building the U.S. stockpile of critical materials and deploying large-scale energy storage. Founded by JB Straubel, the company produces lithium, nickel, cobalt, copper, and cathode active material at scale in the U.S., manufactures key components for advanced batteries, and deploys energy storage systems that power data centers and the nation’s grid. Redwood is expanding domestic capacity for next-generation energy storage and strengthening U.S. energy dominance.

Name: QuantumScape
Description: QuantumScape is on a mission to transform energy storage with solid-state lithium-metal battery technology. The company’s next-generation batteries are designed to enable greater energy density, faster charging and enhanced safety to support the transition away from legacy energy sources toward a lower-carbon future.

Name: Sunwoda Energy Technology Co., Ltd.
Description: As a wholly-owned subsidiary of Sunwoda Group (SZ300207), Sunwoda Energy Technology Co., Ltd. is a national high-tech enterprise, focusing on network energy, residential energy storage, utility energy storage, smart energy and other business fields with the purpose of meeting the diversified energy storage needs of different industry segments and customers. The company provides integrated products and solutions for energy storage and Source-Grid-Load-Storage-Cloud Integration, and builds a business model of sales, investment, construction and operation of the whole life cycle.

Name: PVH - PVHardware
Description:
At PV Hardware (PVH), we deliver state-of-the-art solar tracking solutions designed to maximize performance and flexibility. Our portfolio features single-row and two-row trackers integrated with advanced control software powered by AI and machine learning, ensuring minimal energy loss and optimal efficiency across a wide range of solar projects.
We take pride in designing, manufacturing, and supplying our own trackers, which grants us complete control over the value chain. This capability allows us to customize solutions to the unique demands of any project, seamlessly adapting to diverse terrains, soil types, and climates, while ensuring fast and reliable service without third-party dependencies.
With over 32GW of solar trackers supplied worldwide, we operate from advanced manufacturing hubs in Spain, Saudi Arabia, and the USA. Our new manufacturing headquarters in the USA significantly expands our capacity to meet the growing demand for local content solutions in record time. Our unwavering commitment to innovation, quality, and sustainability positions us at the forefront of the global transition to renewable energy.

Name: Log9 Materials
Description:
Standing at the forefront of fighting climate change, we at Log9, are furthering India’s transition to a revolutionary, clean, and sustainable mobility and energy storage ecosystem by offering batteries that can be charged 9x faster, last 9x longer, and offer 9x higher performance and safety.

A deep-tech start-up with the sole mission of Pioneering Responsible Energy, we are the only Indian company that holds in-house competencies in everything from electrode materials to cell fabrication to battery packs. Our portfolio of 80+ industry-defining patents further attests to our first principles thinking.

Log9 culture depicts transparency, inclusiveness, empowerment, courage, and humility, and it is with this foundation that we enable our employees to unleash their potential. 

A 300+ members tribe, we are strongly determined to push tech boundaries and make way for a sustainable and more liveable world. 

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d53pmPMvIuU

Name: EMO.energy
Description:
EMO is building an Energy Ecosystem for Mobility & Logistics by combining proprietary Batteries, Fast Chargers & Software to control the entire Energy flow from Grid to Warehouse to Wheels.

Nos especializamos en la ingeniería, fabricación e instalación de estructuras para paneles fotovoltaicos —tanto en suelo como en cubiertas y fachadas— y en sistemas avanzados como el SolarWall y soluciones agrovoltaicas. Nuestra propuesta de valor se basa en unir experiencia técnica, calidad certificada y una visión pionera del sector para aportar al mercado estructuras más resistentes, duraderas y optimizadas para cada proyecto.

Además, comercializamos y transformamos materias primas metálicas (perfiles, bobinas, chapas y componentes en acero galvanizado, Magnelis, corten, ZM310, S255JR, S275JR y S355JR), fabricando piezas a medida mediante corte láser, doblado, soldadura y montaje. Esta integración vertical nos permite reducir costes, controlar la calidad y garantizar entregas más rápidas y seguras.

Nuestra organización interna está orientada a la eficiencia: departamentos de ingeniería, arquitectura y diseño, producción, logística, instalación y almacén trabajan de manera coordinada, utilizando sistemas de control de versiones, checklists y trazabilidad digital para minimizar errores en planos, despieces y pedidos.

INTECSA SOLAR también es pionera en nuevas tecnologías para el sector agrícola español, con más de 25 años de garantía en nuestros sistemas estructurales y un compromiso firme con la sostenibilidad, la internacionalización y la innovación, INTECSA SOLAR se posiciona como uno de los actores más competitivos y confiables del mercado europeo, liderando la transición hacia una energía más limpia y un uso más inteligente de los recursos metálicos y solares.

Make green hydrogen affordable, accessible, and globally scalable — targeting $1/kg by 2030.

- Designed for steel, cement, refineries, ammonia, methanol, and distributed energy applications.

Skid-mounted or mobile hydrogen refuelling solutions optimized for:
- Public transport fleets
- 3-wheelers & light mobility
- Hydrogen corridors
- Industrial off-grid hydrogen applications

AGASTYA GEMS.AI — Green Energy Management System

An AI-powered platform optimizing the full hydrogen value chain:
- Electrolyzer performance
- Renewable electricity scheduling
- H2 storage & distribution
- Predictive maintenance
- Cost & carbon optimization

AGASTYA HYDROGEN MOBILITY: INDIA’S FIRST H2-POWERED 3-WHEELERS

Affordable, Made-in-India FCEV autos launching in 2026 to transform urban transportation and eliminate fossil fuel dependency.

Innovation – Preisträger

varmeco ist Pionier und Technologieführer. Unsere Entwicklungen sind richtungsweisend, unsere Technik führend im Markt. 
Den hohen Entwicklungs- und Innovationsstand von varmeco
belegen zahlreiche Auszeichnungen – darunter zwei Bundesinnovationspreise sowie der bayerische Innovationspreis.

Staatsministerium für Umwelt und Gesundheit würdigte die Vorreiterrolle unserer rationellen und regenerativen Heizungssystemtechnik mit hygienischer Trinkwassererwärmung mit der Urkunde für Verdienste um Umwelt und Gesundheit.

Name: Againity

Againity turns low-temperature heat into electric power.

Welcome to contact us and share the opportunities you see in your business!

Vi gör lågvärdig värme till el!

I Sverige fokuserar vi främst på att installera våra turbiner på värmeverk för att öka produktionen av lokal, förnybar och väderoberoende el.

Name: Neology
Description:
Neology brings a holistic solution of carbon-free energy solutions for mobile and stationary application, with a focus on commercial transportation, starting with heavy-duty transportation.

The proposed solution utilizes ammonia as an energy carrier, taking benefits from its inherent properties: carbon-free, high volumetric energy density, long-lasting storage capability, scalability factor, acceptance by the industrial sector, ease of deployment, and existing infrastructure.

Neology is developing a thermochemical ammonia cracking device transforming ammonia into hydrogen as feedstock for fuel cells, aiming at unlocking the full potential of ammonia to become a future carbon-free energy carrier.

 Our patented Fresnel lens technology uniquely harnesses solar energy to achieve unprecedented temperatures up to 4000°C.

Name: HydePoint
Description:
At HydePoint, we help make hydrogen production at sea technically feasible and commercially viable.

We’re an industrial startup, backed by strong owner companies Kongsberg Group, Moreld & Vergia a Swiss Life Assets Management Company with deep expertise in offshore energy infrastructure, renewables, and hydrogen technology. This gives us the agility of a startup combined with the industrial credibility needed to deliver at scale.

Our offering: scalable 20 MW building blocks, fully integrated with a control system and a dynamic simulator, specifically designed for hydrogen production at sea and optimized for variable renewable energy inputs like offshore wind.

We work with developers, investors, and policymakers to accelerate hydrogen projects—from concept development and technical design to LCOH optimization and bankable business cases. 

Whether it’s energy islands, bottom-fixed, floating, or barge-based units, we focus on minimizing CAPEX and delivering world class OPEX to make hydrogen production at sea commercially attractive.

Hydrogen production at sea comes with challenges: dynamic power supply, harsh marine environments, infrastructure interfaces, and regulatory uncertainties. HydePoint addresses these with smart system design, energy-efficient operations, and a digital system integration for operational optimization.

If you’re working to scale hydrogen production in costal areas—whether as a developer, investor, OEM, or policy leader—HydePoint is your partner in delivering cost-efficient, scalable, and technically robust hydrogen solutions at sea!

Ideal für Dächer mit Traglastbeschränkung oder statischen Einschränkungen.

- Vielseitig einsetzbar auf Flach-, Tonnendächern und Fassaden

Name: ENERIN AS
Description:
Founded in 2017 and headquartered in Asker, Norway, Enerin AS develops and manufactures HoegTemp high-temperature heat pumps (HTHP) based on the Stirling cycle. The system delivers up to 250°C steam or hot water with exceptional efficiency, temperature range and control enabling profitable decarbonisation of industrial heat and steam processes at scale.

Enerin’s HTHP captures waste energy from cooling, heating, the outside air, as well as other available sources, and converts it into temperatures up to 250°C for drying, distillation or rapid heating processes. The heat pump is able to use ambient source temperatures as low as -30°C.

Enerin sets itself apart from its competitors, in its IP, innovation and engineering, by providing heat and steam that is as flexible and effective as a fossil fuel boiler. Enerin’s solutions can save up to two-thirds of your energy bill, making it competitive with gas, particularly when combined with renewable energy sources and thermal energy storage.

At high-temperature lifts, the HoegTemp is currently the most efficient heat pump on the market, while at lower temperatures the Coefficient of Performance (COP) is higher than competitor solutions. The COP is the measurement of energy efficiency – for every unit of energy consumed to run the heat pump on electricity, several units of energy can be achieved.

As long as power and a steam line are available the HoegTemp can be installed and housed in two standardised containers on site, with minimal yearly maintenance. The heat pump delivers high-pressure steam directly to an existing steam line, bypassing much of the detail engineering that is normally required.

The HoegTemp offers competitive pricing and low operating cost yields making it the best-in-class total life-cycle cost. 

Enerin has three pilot installations at IVAR (biogas), GE Healthcare (chemicals) and Pelagia (seafood), Norway. Its first commercial installation is due to be implemented at Roche Switzerland in 2026.

Name: WATT Fuel Cell
Description:
WATT Fuel Cell (WATT) has developed and is manufacturing one of the first commercially viable Solid Oxide Fuel Cell (SOFC) systems on the market. WATT’s Fuel Cell Systems create power from readily available fuels, such as propane and natural gas, to provide environmentally responsible energy solutions to a range of power markets. WATT's Hybrid Power Management System integrates and manages renewable energy sources, such as wind and solar, and optimizes power storage to provide electricity from the most energy responsible source available at the time of need.

Founded in 2010 by a team of fuel cell industry veterans, WATT developed and patented their proprietary Additive Manufacturing Process (“AMP”). AMP utilizes 3D printing technologies to produce fuel cells, eliminating the legacy issues that have plagued the commercialization endeavors of the fuel cell industry. Coupled with WATT’s approach to the Balance of Plant (“BoP”) consisting of off-the-shelf mechanical components that have been time-tested and hardened, AMP enables WATT to produce cost effective, quality products for small-scale power applications from 500W to 10kW. WATT’s products are ideally suited for RVs and boats, residential homes, and industries such as oil & gas, rail and telecommunications.

WATT is manufacturing these breakthrough products in Western Pennsylvania, a hotbed of energy innovation for centuries and home of one of the world’s largest natural gas fields, the Marcellus Shale.

WATT is aggressively pursuing additional partnership opportunities and growing our team to meet demands of our backlog. To learn more about opportunities to work with WATT Fuel Cell visit our website: www.wattfuelcell.com.

Neology is developing a thermochemical ammonia cracking device transforming ammonia into hydrogen as feedstock for fuel cells, aiming at unlocking the full potential of ammonia to become a future carbon-free energy carrier.

Together with its plannable production capacity and best-in-class total efficiencies, the BTC plant will changes how on-demand renewable power is produced.

On-demmand renewable power

The energy transition will require more renewable power from all sources. Increased share of intermittent produciton will require more on-demand production that can accomodate for the variability and provide stable renewable energy 24/7/365.

OUR  VISION
Highly-efficient, plannable and profitable renewable power from biomass.

Description: Die KWpeak Solutions GmbH ist da, wo große Solarkraftwerke entstehen, in Freiland als auch Dach Montagen. Name: VulcanX
Description:
VulcanX is not your typical startup. We spun out from MéridaLabs at the University of British Columbia with a de-risked pilot plant. It all started in 2017 when we met with international partners to discuss methane pyrolysis. Since then, we have developed new systems that can produce hydrogen and solid carbon more efficiently and at a low cost.

We secured non-dilutive funding to de-risk and scale up the technology and build a pilot plant in Alberta, Canada.

VulcanX Energy Corp. was incorporated in October 2022. We are securing funding and investment to scale production to at least 1 tonne of hydrogen production per day by 2026.

Description:
Focal Line Solar (FLS) is a solar technology company with a long term vision; we understand that there are 3 precursors to solar energy becoming a dominate energy source: 1st) it has to be available 24 hours a day, 2nd) at the same time it has to be cheap, and 3rd) it must be reliable long term.  

Our technology: Hybrid Concentrated Solar Thermal (H-CST) naturally H-CSP is a direct application.  

Opportunities for solar thermal are endless.
Over 40'000 hours of design, engineering, modeling, research and testing have led to this unique design. The H-CST collector is designed as a low cost high reliability answer to the expensive traditional large scale thermal concentrators in the market.

Description: Glacies specializes in using water to provide efficient heating, cooling, and energy storage solutions. Our latest innovation, Spray Freeze Heating (SFH), combines water droplets with a cold airstream to create ice that warms the air with exceptional efficiency. This technology is designed to support decarbonization and energy storage, particularly for ventilation systems. Currently, Glacies is looking to apply SFH technology to improve the ventilation of underground mines in cold regions, offering a sustainable and practical solution for challenging environments.

Name: EVON
Description:
At EVON, we believe in a greener future, where mobility will be fully electrified. We’re already on the verge of this transition with the rapid growth of the EV market. We believe that urban infrastructure will have to adapt to this new type of mobility and therefore help develop a market that is increasingly open to the public and to any structural requirement. 

Our mission is to support the rapid growth of EV market; we have the core mission to facilitate people’s life by making EV infrastructure accessible to everyone.

As a Swiss Company started by students of EPFL and the University of Geneva, we embrace values that reflect our vision of a better world. That’s why our core values are Passion, Quality, Efficiency and Sustainability.

Name: ISOPLUS Finland & Sweden
Description:
ISOPLUS Finland & Sweden is a member in the ISOPLUS group which is the leading manufacturer and supplier of pre-insulated pipe systems, primarily for local and district energy supply. 
Our production is in Vaasa, Finland and was founded in 1976. The company has been known under different names over the years, each marking a new phase under different ownership structures.
Our manufacturing processes adhere strictly to established product standards. We operate under a certified integrated management system that complies with the requirements of ISO 9001 (quality management), ISO 14001 (environmental management), ISO 45001 (occupational health and safety), and ISO 50001 (energy management), ensuring excellence, sustainability, and safety at every stage.

ISOPLUS Group was founded in 1974, ISOPLUS has grown steadily over the past decades. Today, we produce pipes and accessories at the highest technical level in eight plants spread across Europe and sell them in more than 30 countries.
To guarantee and prove this long term, a consistent quality assurance applies. All ISOPLUS production plants are certified according to ISO 9001. In addition, we have several environmental certificates according to ISO 14001.
Around 1,600 employees of the Europe-wide ISOPLUS Group contribute to the implementation of the energy transition as suppliers to the energy supply and pipe service construction industries.

Name: Highstar Sodium Battery (Asia) Company Limited
Description:
Established in 1994, Highstar Battery is one of the earliest enterprises specializing in R&D, production and sales of Li-ion /Sodium-ion batteries in China and India.

With Core technology of whole supply chain covers Li-ion/ Sodium-ion battery cells, BMS, Battery Packs, Highstar offering professional battery solutions, and active in the telecom backup power field as the supplier of China’s and India’s Top 3 telecommunication operators.

From 2023, Highstar Sodium-ion Battery has successfully obtained series of certifications for its sodium-ion cells and battery packs, including UL certification, TTL, CNAS and IEC. Moreover, many of these product certificates have been honored as the first certificates in the world.

Name: BioSarthi
Description:
BioSarthi, a product by CGF Bioenergy, represents a pioneering platform that seamlessly integrates science and technology. It functions as a robust tool, providing transparency and trust in emission reduction data for both existing and emerging biogas plants. This platform also operates as a sophisticated marketplace, facilitating transactions between buyers and sellers in the green fuel sector, specifically focusing on the burgeoning market for biogas.

It is an innovative IoT product intricately connected to a comprehensive platform designed to capture methane capture from biogas plants. The system comprises intelligent sensors integrated into biogas facilities, seamlessly collecting and transmitting data to a centralized platform. This technology addresses a critical need for sustainable energy, particularly in monitoring and mitigating methane emissions, a potent greenhouse gas.

The data captured by BioSarthi serves multiple purposes. Firstly, it provides insights into the overall efficiency of the biogas plant operations, allowing for optimization and improved performance. Secondly, it plays a pivotal role in environmental stewardship by aiding in the reduction of methane emissions, contributing to greenhouse gas mitigation efforts. This data can also be crucial for compliance reporting, ensuring that biogas plants adhere to environmental regulations and sustainability standards.
Moreover, BioSarthi's data can be leveraged for research purposes, fostering a deeper understanding of biogas production dynamics and methane emission patterns. This valuable information contributes to the development of more effective strategies for sustainable energy production and environmental conservation.
In summary, BioSarthi not only helps in capturing data related to methane emission reduction but also enables informed decision-making for enhanced operational efficiency, regulatory compliance, and environmental sustainability in the realm of biogas production.

Name: Bitek Solar Private Limited
Description:
BITEK SOLAR PRIVATE LIMITED is a renewable energy product manufacturing company that specialises in producing lithium batteries, solar grid tie hybrid inverters, and utility scale Energy Storage Systems (ESS). Founded on the principles of innovation and sustainability, the company is dedicated to providing advanced technology products that help to reduce dependence on fossil fuels and promote the use of clean and renewable energy sources.

One of the key strengths of BITEK SOLAR PRIVATE LIMITED is its ability to produce high-quality products that meet the latest industry standards. The company's lithium batteries and inverters are designed to provide maximum efficiency and durability, while its utility scale ESS are engineered to ensure reliable and long-lasting performance.

Another advantage of BITEK SOLAR PRIVATE LIMITED is its focus on research and development. The company continuously invest in R&D to improve its products and stay ahead of the curve in terms of technology.

BITEK SOLAR PRIVATE LIMITED's customer-centric approach is another major strength of the company. The company understands the unique needs and challenges of its customers and works closely with them to provide tailored solutions that meet their specific requirements. Furthermore, the company's team of experts is always available to provide support and guidance throughout the entire process.

In addition to providing products and services, BITEK SOLAR PRIVATE LIMITED is also committed to promoting sustainable and environmentally-friendly practices. The company's solar energy solutions, for example, help to reduce the reliance on fossil fuels and promote the use of renewable energy sources.

In conclusion, BITEK SOLAR PRIVATE LIMITED is a company that is dedicated to providing advanced technology products that meet the ever-evolving needs of its customers.

Name: Powernice Intelligent Technology
Description:
Headquartered in Ningbo, China, Powervale Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd., trading as Powernice, is a pioneering tech enterprise specializing in the full-spectrum development, design, manufacturing, sales, and service of industrial-grade, high-precision intelligent electric actuators and dampers. Our products find versatile applications in fields like photovoltaic and solar thermal power generation, medical equipment, intelligent machinery, new energy logistics vehicles, and robotics. With strategic investments from Shanghai Jinpu Investment Management Co., Ltd., Zhonglü Fund, and the Ningbo Government Fund in 2021, we've expanded our footprint, establishing a global sales center in Shenzhen, an overseas factory in Vietnam, a subsidiary in Las Vegas, USA, and an office in Italy to better serve our global clientele.

Initially conceived in 2002 by forward-thinking individuals who introduced advanced electro-mechanical technologies to China, Powernice has flourished into an industry leader. Our 27,000-square-meter facilities are well-equipped for R&D, production, and office functions. We have comprehensive advanced facilities that make us one of the most well-equipped companies in our sector.

Our corporate ethos emphasizes intelligent manufacturing and tailored solutions for our diverse clientele. From R&D and prototyping to material management, bulk manufacturing, after-sales service, and iterative upgrades, we are committed to accompanying our customers throughout their growth trajectory, underpinned by a 'Quality First, Efficiency First' philosophy. This multi-faceted approach ensures our products and services meet the ever-evolving demands of various industries, contributing meaningfully to the global march toward Industry 4.0.

Name: Unitrove
Description:
Unitrove delivers zero-emission fuelling infrastructure for heavy-duty transport and industry supplying zero-carbon fuels including liquid hydrogen (LH2), compressed gaseous hydrogen (CGH2), and renewable electricity. Unitrove provides nano-scale, transportable, self-contained zero-emission fuelling infrastructure as a service. 

Unitrove is developing a novel Zero-Emission Multi-Fuel Station (ZEMFS) that is capable of fuelling zero-emission vehicles with three different types of fuels: liquid hydrogen, compressed gaseous hydrogen and renewable electricity. 

Designed to the latest standards, incorporating all the necessary safety features and digital innovations, ZEMFS in its smallest configuration is a portable fuelling module that can be forklifted into a truck for transportation to a remote site. Portable and compact unlike traditional largescale fixed fuelling infrastructure installations, it can be rapidly deployed or relocated within a matter of minutes, providing flexibility to users. 

Having delivered the world’s first LH2 bunkering facility, which was showcased at the UN COP 26 Climate Change conference in 2021, Unitrove will demonstrate its technology by fuelling an autonomous liquid hydrogen vessel at the Port of Aberdeen in by March 2025. 

Unitrove’s mission is to create a virtuous world powered by clean, affordable, reliable, sustainable, modern energy. The company aligns its vision in accordance with the UN Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs).


Twitter: @Unitrove 
Instagram: @UnitroveUK

Name: Solar Stack
Description:
At Solar Stack, we are committed to revolutionizing the renewable energy industry by providing cutting-edge solar solutions. 

Solar Stack is an innovative and damage-free solar panel mounting system that revolutionizes the way solar panels are installed on roofs. Unlike traditional methods that involve drilling holes and potentially causing damage to the roof, Solar Stack utilizes a spray polyurethane foam adhesive to securely bond the mounts to the roof surface.

By eliminating the need for drilling, Solar Stack ensures that roofs remain intact and free from any damage during the installation process. This feature sets it apart from other mounting systems in the solar industry.

Description:

Name: NAHwärmetechnologie & AnlagenTEChnik S.L.
Description:
NAHTEC ofrece una cobertura integral para proyectos de biogás y biometa, desde la captación de materia prima (Upstream) hasta la puesta en marcha y la transferencia de know-how operativo.
1. UPSTREAM (Aprovisionamiento y Pretratamiento)
Objetivo: garantizar un suministro continuo y optimizado de materia orgánica al digestor, maximizando el rendimiento y minimizando los riesgos operativos.

Caracterización de sustratos
Análisis de sólidos totales (ST) y sólidos volátiles (SV).
Determinación de poder calorífico (PCS/PCI), perfil de nutrientes (N-P-K) y potencial de producción de metano (BMP).
Diseño de instalaciones de recepción y almacenamiento
Silos y tolvas con revestimientos antiácido y sistemas de pesaje gravimétrico.
Tanques de homogeneización con agitadores dinámicos para evitar estratificación y sedimentación.
Sistemas avanzados de pretratamiento
Modelización de balances de masa y energía
 

2. INGENIERÍA (Diseño Conceptual, Básico y de Detalle)

Estudios de viabilidad y análisis de riesgos
Planificación 3D en SolidWorks y entrega de modelos en formato .STP
Ingeniería básica y de detalle con foco en operatividad, seguridad y respeto medioambiental
Estudios de modularización y constructibilidad
3. PROCURA Y SUMINISTROS
Consultoría en términos contractuales, financieros y regulatorios

Aprovisionamiento y aprobación de proveedores (FAT/SAT y control de calidad)
Selección de equipos clave: digestores, desulfuradoras, sistemas de upgrading 
4. CONSTRUCCIÓN
Ejecución “llave en mano” con recursos propios o subcontratistas homologados.
Supervisión de montaje mecánico, eléctrico e instrumentación
Gestión de calidad (ISO) y coordinación HSE
Elaboración de documentación As-Built
5. PUESTA EN MARCHA
Precomisionamiento, comisionamiento y arranque de la planta
Protocolos de pruebas FAT/SAT y ajustes de parámetros operativos
Formación y acompañamiento técnico al equipo de planta
Transferencia de know-how para maximizar fiabilidad y disponibilidad desde el primer día.
Location: San Sebastián de los Reyes, Madrid

L’équipe ECOLOGENE conçoit sur-mesure et installe clé en main partout en France des générateurs autonomes de production d’énergie électrique.
Vertueux pour la santé et l’environnement, ECOLOGENE n’émet, en fonctionnement, aucun polluant, aucune émanation toxique, ni aucune nuisance sonore et olfactive.
Fixes ou mobiles, faciles à transporter, prêts à brancher, capables de fournir de 0,5 à 180 kVA (de 1 à 360 kW en puissance maximale) en courant monophasé ou triphasé selon le générateur, ECOLOGENE Mini, Compact, Performance, PowerMax et Ultra se caractérisent par leur performance, fiabilité, qualité et sécurité d’utilisation.

Depuis plus de 10 ans, nous concevons des solutions de générateurs autonomes. Forts de notre expertise et avec plus de 140 Ecologènes en fonctionnement, nous offrons également des services de conseil en tant qu'experts dans le domaine.

Name: dPoint Humidifiers
Description:
dPoint Technologies began in 2005 with a goal to develop membrane-based humidification components for the hydrogen fuel cell industry. In 2008 dPoint expanded its vision and product line to applying the technology developed for the fuel cell industry to manufacture Energy Recovery Ventilator (ERV) membrane and cores for the HVAC industry.

dPoint has become a recognized global leader in research, development, and manufacturing of membranes and heat and humidity exchangers for energy recovery in buildings.

In 2018, dPoint Humidifiers became a subsidiary of CORE Energy Recovery Solutions, focusing on continuing to develop and manufacture hydrogen fuel cell humidifiers. The company has an innovative team of material scientists, mechanical engineers and manufacturing experts who come from respected high-tech firms developing high-performance membrane-based humidity transport products.

dPoint Humidifiers have been used in 1000’s of fuel cell systems worldwide. We continue to build on our technology platform, to provide humidification solutions for fuel cell system designers and integrators.

Name: Capybara Energy
Description:
Developing the world's most environmentally sound long-duration energy solution for grid resilience.

Our cutting-edge technology harnesses the power of aqueous supercapacitors, pushing the boundaries of grid modernization in an approach that outperforms traditional methods.

Name: ABC-Techniek B.V.
Description:
We started our activities in 1990. Over a period of three decades we became a well- known and established system integrator for customers around the world.

Work together to find the best solution and a no-nonsense mentality are important factors that contribute to the growth of our company. Besides this our technical know-how, high internal standards of quality and the passionate drive for our areas of expertise are indispensable. Therefore we can call ourselves an innovative player in the field of engineering, fabrication and renovating of control systems and electrical and instrumentation (E&I) installations.

ABC-Techniek is an ISO-9001 certified organisation with a proven knowledge along with experience in the design as well as delivery of control- and distribution panels for a power supply up to 690VAC and 3200A. Furthermore an extensive experience in wiring of electrical and instrumentation installations and finally an expertise in explosion protection.

Our professional knowledge offers you an integral approach from the design process to realization, commissioning, maintenance and services.

ABC-Techniek provides products and services for the oil & gas and renewable energy industry, petrochemical and process industry (ATEX/IECEx).

Name: FIRN energy
Description:
Introducing FIRN Energy, an exciting newcomer in the energy landscape. Our core mission is clear: we aim to reduce your energy bill. Whether you're an individual, involved in the agricultural sector, or operating in the industry, we offer tailored solutions that meet your needs.

Behind FIRN Energy are two entrepreneurial minds: Frank Degezelle and Nico Ramacker. They have thrown their weight behind this fantastic project and are the driving forces behind our mission with their complementary experience and deep knowledge.

At FIRN Energy, we believe in total integration. We take the lead by seamlessly managing solar panels, wind energy, charging stations, and other energy consumers. By intelligently responding to dynamic electricity rates (hourly rates), combined with the energy storage capabilities of your battery, we can reduce your energy costs to an absolute minimum.

Not only do we consider the projected yields of solar panels and wind energy, but our advanced artificial intelligence also continuously learns from your consumption patterns. This allows us to refine and optimize our services continually.

And as if that weren't enough, we also add the integration of charging stations to our expertise. This achieves an even higher level of efficiency and cost savings. In short, at FIRN Energy, we aim for a future where your energy needs are effortlessly met while keeping your costs to a minimum. With Frank Degezelle and Nico Ramacker at the helm, you can count on an innovative and goal-oriented approach that will transform the world of energy.

Name: refuel.green consulting & technologies GmbH
Description:
We want to make a decisive contribution to a CO2-neutral global economy.

For this we take action in the Power-to-X (PtX) industry to replace oil products with e.g. e-fuels (which are CO2-neutral & renewable).

Specifically, we develop, build & soon market our innovative plasma catalysis reactors - which will allow the mass production of e-fuels for €1/liter.

Name: Perma-trade Italia
Description:
L’innovazione sostenibile è il cavallo di battaglia di Perma-trade. Siamo considerati pionieri nel campo del trattamento dell’ acqua, attraverso metodi rispettosi dell’ambiente. 
Con numerosi brevetti, un reparto di ricerca altamente innovativo e un forte senso di responsabilità verso l’acqua, abbiamo sviluppato negli anni una gamma di prodotti completa e versatile.
Che si tratti di protezione anticalcare, ottimizzazione dell’acqua potabile tramite filtri e sistemi di visualizzazione oppure trattamento dell’acqua di riscaldamento per una massima efficienza energetica, Perma-trade  offre una soluzione semplice e sostenibile per tutte le esigenze. 

Perché i prodotti Perma-trade sono così speciali?
Perché nascono da una responsabilità sociale e ambientale. Quindi non attribuiamo grande importanza solo alla qualità “Made in Germany”,  facendo produrre esclusivamente in Germania, ma dal 2002, manteniamo una stretta collaborazione con l’associazione per disabili “Atrio”, che può essere considerata esemplare.
In Atrio produciamo ora oltre il 90% dei nostri prodotti e la  responsabilità sociale è uno dei pilastri aziendali. 
Per questo, Perma-trade ha ricevuto il premio SME per la responsabilità sociale.

Il fondatore e amministratore delegato Michael Sautter è stato premiato per il suo impegno sociale con la medaglia all’economia della regione del Baden-Württemberg.

Name: ET Energies
Description: ET Energies specializes in cost-effective, clean energy storage, green hydrogen-ready, modular, and highly efficient PEM electrolyzer systems.

Description:
BIOP Green Gas, a subsidiary of the BIOGEST-Group, specializes in developing, constructing, and operating biogas and biomethane plants as an active shareholder globally. BIOP is committed to sustainability and innovative engineering and is dedicated to driving the energy transition towards a sustainable future. Join us in unlocking the potential of green gas to be part of the sustainable energy transition today.
Visit www.biop-greengas.com

Name: Power Solution
ACT-ion
Description: ACT-ion Battery Technologies utilizes a high-throughput continuous manufacturing process with lower waste/emission to produce high-performance and low-cost single crystal cathode active materials.

Name: Gotion Digital Energy
Description:
Gotion, as the earliest private enterprise in power battery industry to enter the capital market, was listed in May 2015, specializing in power battery for new energy vehicles, energy storage application, power transmission and distribution equipment, etc.
Gotion High-Tech is a technology-based company, which focus on power battery technology research and development and innovation. It is a national torch program project unit, a national enterprise technology center, a high-tech enterprise, a winner of Anhui Provincial Government Quality Award, and a unit undertaking three national "863" major projects.  The related patented technologies have covered the whole battery industry chain technology, including four main materials of cell, cell structural design, BMS, PACK, testing and evaluation, dismantling and recycling, and energy storage, etc.
Gotion High-Tech is a dedicated company. It is one of the earliest enterprises engaged in the independent research and development, production and sales of new energy vehicle power lithium-ion batteries in China.Its main products are lithium iron phosphate materials and batteries, ternary batteries, power battery packs, battery management systems and energy storage batteries.The products are widely used in new energy vehicles such as pure electric passenger cars, commercial vehicles, special vehicles and hybrid electric vehicles,providing system solutions for energy storage power plant, communication base stations, etc. 
Gotion High-Tech is an international company. Global R&D centers were established in Hefei, Shanghai, Silicon Valley, Cleveland, Tsukuba, Singapore, Europe, Germany and other places.  Volkswagen (China) invested about 1.1 billion euros to become a shareholder of Gotion Hi-Tech on May 28, 2020.

Name: Microgreen Solar
Description:
Microgreen - Powering Innovation in Sustainable Energy Solutions

At Microgreen, we are at the forefront of driving innovation in sustainable energy solutions. As an Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) specializing in lithium batteries, our impact is felt across diverse sectors, including telecom broadband, marine, and RVs.

Our Expertise:
Microgreen takes pride in supplying key products that play a pivotal role in constructing small-scale off-grid solar generation and energy storage systems. With a focus on mobile and portable applications, we bring forth a versatile range of solutions to power various environments.

Tailored Solutions:
Understanding the unique needs of our clients, we offer both customized solutions and Do-It-Yourself (DIY) kits. Whether you are embarking on a specialized project or looking for a hands-on approach to energy solutions, Microgreen is your trusted partner.

Innovation and Research:
Microgreen is not just a supplier; we are committed to driving progress through Research and Development (R&D). Our dedicated team engages in custom design work, ensuring that our products align with the latest advancements in the industry.

Customer-Centric Approach:
Our commitment extends beyond the point of sale. Microgreen takes pride in offering comprehensive warranty and after-sales services for all our products in Canada. We believe in fostering long-term relationships with our clients by ensuring the reliability and performance of our solutions.

Beyond Energy Storage Systems (BESS):
Microgreen recognizes the evolving needs of the Commercial and Industrial (C&I) sectors. As a testament to our commitment to comprehensive energy solutions, we offer Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) tailored for C&I applications.

At Microgreen, we are not just a company; we are pioneers in empowering sustainable energy choices. Join us on the journey towards a greener and more energy-efficient future.

Name: Omnia Solar

Omnia Solar nasce da un affiatato team di imprenditori con esperienza ultradecennale nel mondo delle rinnovabili dando vita alla prima iniziativa privata italiana per la produzione di moduli fotovoltaici 100% Made in Italy.

QAES’s innovative, technology-driven Energy Storage System (ESS) solutions and comprehensive services cater to a diverse clientele, spanning commercial, industrial, and residential sectors.

QAES is the first and leading company in Chongqing focused on integrated energy storage systems and its security. We have completed the self-developing and manufacturing of the core components and integrated systems of energy storage, and is concentrating on applications of comprehensive-dimensions, from the generation side, to grid and user side. We also have an intensive and profound research in battery system security, power electronics, distributed power generation, and energy management.

Our Mission: Make power storage secure and clean energy omnipresent
Our Vision: Leading the secure utilization of clean energy
Our Value: Integrity, Commitment, Innovation, Refinement

Name: HalioGen Power
Description:
HalioGen Power enables the world’s decarbonisation by providing a resilient, sustainable and affordable technology to make renewable energy accessible anywhere, anytime, and for anyone.

Our long-duration batteries solve the intermittency of renewable energy across industries, cities, and remote locations. 

We have reimagined the traditional redox flow battery by developing a cutting-edge membraneless alternative.

Our batteries remove the need for costly, non-recyclable membranes and instead rely on abundant raw materials, resulting in more sustainable, operationally efficient, affordable, and non-flammable long-term energy storage solution.

Name: Kohlbach Group
Description: We are an Austrian company that manufactures biomass energy systems for the international market. With our work we bear an economic, environmental and social responsibility for present and future generations. We stand for Good People Good Energy.

 Fabricante y Distribuidor Exclusivo de Cleaver Brooks en México (Calderas industriales de alta eficiencia)  Distribuidor Preferencial de Generac en Latinoamérica (Plantas eléctricas de vanguardia)  Distribuidor Exclusivo de Tecval en México (Válvulas industriales de máxima confiabilidad)  Aliado de Grundfos en Latinoamérica (Bombas de agua de alto rendimiento)

Description:

Especialista em Equipamentos e Sistemas Integrados de Climatização e A.Q.S., para Energias Renováveis, de alta qualidade, garante o máximo conforto e a poupança energética.
Os produtos SOLIUS são reconhecidos pela excelência em durabilidade, eficiência energética e construção elegante. Contamos com uma equipa de profissionais experientes e bem preparados para dar resposta às suas necessidades. 

Ganhou PRÉMIO INOVAÇÃO - Construção 2018, na Categoria de Energias Renováveis, com o SOLIUS MANAGER.

O SOLIUS MANAGER interliga os vários dispositivos e equipamentos de aquecimento e/ou climatização para energias renováveis da marca SOLIUS, optimizando o funcionamento geral da instalação. Os resultados traduzem-se num menor consumo de energia e garantia de máximo conforto, dada a combinação eficiente de fontes de calor renováveis, interligadas a sistemas de difusão de baixa temperatura.
Este produto assegura, de uma forma simples e intuitiva, o controlo online dos Equipamentos e Sistemas de Climatização de energias renováveis da marca SOLIUS. 

Os milhares de Sistemas Solares SOLIUS já instalados em Portugal proporcionam poupanças significativas no aquecimento de águas sanitárias, no apoio ao aquecimento ambiente e no aumento da temporada de utilização de piscinas exteriores.

Name: SunSaviour
Description:
SunSaviour is more than a brand; it's a movement towards a brighter, more sustainable Pakistan.
Through innovation, commitment, and a deep understanding of the local landscape, we are
ready to make a significant impact on the nation's energy scenario, economic development, and
environmental health.                                                                                                                                                                                               
Specially Designed for the Pakistani Grid:
At SunSaviour, we understand the unique challenges faced by the Pakistani power grid. Our
products are specifically designed to thrive in this environment, ensuring compatibility and
efficiency. Every SunSaviour inverter integrates seamlessly with the existing infrastructure,
stabilizing power delivery and reducing dependency on erratic grid electricity. This specialization
not only enhances the performance but also maximizes the reliability of your energy systems in
local conditions.
Advanced 2-way Safety Features:
Safety is paramount in the design of our products. SunSaviour inverters are equipped with a
robust 2-Way Safety or Double Safety Protection System. This system safeguards against
common electrical hazards such as overloads, short circuits, and voltage fluctuations, ensuring
that your home and business are protected at all times. This dual-layer protection is crucial for
maintaining system integrity and prolonging the life of your solar investment.
