Name: autarkize
Description:
autarkize scales a market-ready system technology with which a high-quality gas made of methane and hydrogen is obtained decentrally from residues (wood residues, fermentation residues, sewage sludge, ...), which contains 3-4x more energy density than previous processes. 

This gas is suitable as a replacement for natural gas or green hydrogen for almost all common processes for generating electricity and heat. 

At the same time, the plants produce biochar - a valuable soil conditioner for agriculture and a permanent CO2 sink.

The reachable climate impact exceeds 500 mt/a of GHG reduction and carbon dioxide removal.

Name: Deye Service ME
Description:
Ningbo Deye Inverter Technology Co., Ltd. founded in 2007 with registered capital 300 million RMB, is one of the China’s high-tech enterprises and a subsidiary of Deye Group. With a plant area over 15,000㎡ and complete production and testing equipment, Deye has become a major player in the global solar inverter market.

Ningbo Deye Inverter Technology Co., Ltd. is dedicated to providing complete photovoltaic power system solutions, including residential and commercial power plants solutions. Also, Deye offers the right device for each application: for all module types, for grid-connection and stand-alone grids as well hybrid inverter system, for small house systems and commercial systems in the Megawatt range. Among them, PV grid-connected inverter power range from 1.5-110kW, Hybrid inverter 3kW-50kW, and microinverter 300W-2000W.

Deye Service ME is a daughter company established in Lebanon to handle the maintenance and after sales for all Deye products imported to Lebanon through authorized channels to further support the brand vision.

Name: Avrii
Description:
We are one of the leaders in the distribution of photovoltaic equipment in Poland. We closely cooperate with Bruk-Bet Fotowoltaika, the largest manufacturer of photovoltaic modules in Poland, as well as well-known global brands in the field of inverters, energy storage, heat pumps, and electromobility. Our proposed photovoltaic solutions meet international quality standards.

When choosing our partners, we focus primarily on the quality of the offered products, their safety of use, and the position of the manufacturer on the market. All products included in our offer meet European standards and undergo testing by our Technical Department.

We are an authorized distributor of the largest Polish manufacturer of PV modules, operating in the market since 2011 - the Bruk-Bet Fotwoltaika brand, as well as well-known global brands including Huawei, GoodWe, KACO, Fronius, Helukabel, Metrel, Tigo.

Our mission is to provide comprehensive solutions for photovoltaic installations. Therefore, we offer our Clients and Partners numerous training courses conducted both on-site and online through the Polish Photovoltaic Academy, of which we are the main creator and initiator. Our experts provide product and technical knowledge covering a wide range of issues related to PV installation components, device servicing, and good installation practices.

We also provide a B2B Sales Platform, which allows for a quick calculation of PV installation costs as well as access to special offers and discounts.

Name: Valtor Energy A/S
Description:
Valtor A/S is a company specializing in the provision of  valves, actuators, and process-related equipment tailored for the energy industry. Our commitment to excellence is reflected in the delivery of high-quality, fully certified products available in one of the largest stock inventories within the EU.

With an unwavering dedication to client satisfaction, we seamlessly manage projects of all scales, ensuring swift and reliable deliveries. Our strategic collaboration with reputable and established suppliers worldwide, cultivated over years of partnership, enables us to tap into their extensive stocks. This capability empowers us to offer expedited solutions, ultimately aiding our clients in minimizing downtime to an absolute minimum.

Name: Star Energia
Description:
Star Energia is a photovoltaic power plant design company, established in 2007, before the Conto Energia regulatory scenario, in order to build stand-alone photovoltaic power plants for the use of electricity in remote areas.
The company achieves its purpose through the integration of all the needed processes to achieve the first grid parallel - which means the feeding of the first kwh of energy into the electrical grid: from the identification of the potential site, to the environmental and electrical design, as well as the permitting activity and finally the relationship with all the host territorial entities.

The different professional skills in the company and the long trajectory of a specific know-how, allow the creation of tailor-made projects that adapt to regulatory, technological changes, being able to overcome, frequently, the resistance of the local host community. Photovoltaics, agrivoltaics, photovoltaics integrated with agriculture, stand alone storage systems, bi-directional storage systems are some of the design developments which have taken place in recent years.

Name: Airius
Description: Installer des destratificateurs thermiques dans des bâtiments permet d'homogénéiser la température intérieure et de réaliser d'importantes économies (plus de 20%) sur vos dépenses de chauffage. Installation facile, retour sur investissement très rapide et possibilité de percevoir une prime relative aux certificats d'économie d'énergie (cette prime finance en moyenne la moitié de l'investissement).

Name: KKSD Group of Industries
Description: KKSD Group of Industries is one of the leading companies in the field of Solar Panel Mounting Structure.

Name: Engineering Procurement & Construction for H2 (EPC LLC)
Description:
EPC - Is the premier hydrogen infrastructure design, procurement, construction, and fabrication company leading the charge towards a sustainable hydrogen future.  

The company can help with just about any Hydrogen project from large scale plant design to pressure testing hydrogen fueling station equipment.  

We have designed and built hydrogen infrastructure within refineries, on pipelines, H2 fueling stations for buses, MHE, light duty vehicles, and containerized complete hydrogen generation, compression and distribution systems.

Name: EcoQuip Australia
Description:
EcoQuip is a customer-focused Australian OEM that manufactures and supplies the award-winning EcoQuip Solar Lighting, Communications and Surveillance Tower solutions.

Developed with US-domiciled design, electronics and software partners over 4 years, EcoQuip solutions incorporate US military build quality and the proprietary EcoQuip technology platform comprising a high-performance solar / BESS power management solution, live data analytics and remote system management capabilities.

Decarbonising industrial and resource sector equipment is an important component of the “Net Zero” energy transition journey. EcoQuip solutions will help you get there.

Name: CLEVINNO
Description:
CLEVINNO is a "Research and Development" Organization and we provide "Clean Drinking Water" and "Clean Electricity" to resource tribal communities to build a strong nation

"Provide Water" - "Protect Earth" an Initiative by CLEVINNO WATER FOUNDATION


JUST SHOW US WATER, AND WE WILL MAKE IT INTO CLEAN DRINKING WATER  !"

Name: ANATECO s.a.
Description:
Anateco S.A. is a Greece based EPCI Contractor specializing in offshore, marine, energy and defense projects, consistently delivering results that produce satisfied customers worldwide. Our unparalleled commitment to quality, safety and client success has earned us being chosen as the trusted partner of key industry players, as well as industry recognition year after year. 

Offshore and marine contractors, energy systems companies, public corporations and shipyards rely on Anateco for large-scale and mid-term projects that require innovative and cost-effective engineering solutions, skilled labor and resourceful project management. 

Our  engineering  team is  formed by naval architects,  marine,  and mechanical  engineers  who are working in concert with Anateco  production  department, operating  in our privately  owned  heavy-duty  manufacturing plant.
By introducing manufacturing know-how and cutting edge fabrication technologies in the early design phase, we make sure that delivery performance is maximized and project timelines are met.

We welcome you to our official Linkedin page and invite you to follow us in order to stay tuned on our latest news and projects.

Name: Compact Syngas Solutions Limited
Description: Compact Syngas Solutions supply modular gasification technology for the production of hydrogen, power, heat and carbon credits

Name: ANDRITZ Hydropower América Central y del Sur
Description:
De pioneros históricos de la tecnología a líderes modernos del mercado mundial

ANDRITZ Hydropower es uno de los principales proveedores mundiales de equipos electromecánicos y servicios para centrales hidroeléctricas en el dinámico mercado mundial de las energías renovables. Con 185 años de experiencia y una capacidad instalada global de 489 gigavatios, ofrecemos soluciones innovadoras para centrales hidroeléctricas nuevas y existentes, desde pequeñas centrales hidroeléctricas hasta plantas a gran escala. Soluciones digitales de última generación, servicios integrales para la operación y el mantenimiento de centrales hidroeléctricas completas y turbogeneradores para la industria térmica completan la cartera.

#andritz #Hydropower #RenewableEnergy #energy #sustainability #GreenTransition #CleanEnergy

Name: Makinex Renewables
Description: Makinex Renewables now lives within the Makinex LinkedIn channel.  For hybrid power, HPS, BESS and renewable solutions, please follow Makinex and visit makinex.com.au.

Name: Viver CleanTech
Description: The objective of Viver CleanTech is the application of technologies for the generation of green energy compatible with a 100% de-fossilization future.

Name: Innovative Bioenergy
Description:
At Innovative Bioenergy, we turn waste into eco-friendly and cost-effective fuel. Our biomass pellets offer businesses a clean and affordable alternative to traditional fuels, helping reduce costs and lower pollution. We are committed to sustainability, innovation, and reliability. 

Our ESG-compliant bioenergy products are designed for industrial use, providing a steady and efficient fuel supply while supporting a greener future. By choosing Innovative Bioenergy, you’re not just saving money, you’re also helping the planet.

Name: Catator AB
Description: Based in Lund, Sweden, Catator is a world-leading contract development partner for commercialization of hydrogen. Together with industry leaders and a growing list of customers in the hydrogen sector worldwide, Catator continues to develop the world’s most efficient and compact catalytic systems.

Name: Fiegl & Spielberger
Description:
Mit einem Jahresumsatz von 90 Mio. Euro, 500 Mitarbeitern, davon 84 Lehrlingen, ist Fiegl+Speilberger westösterreichischer Marktführer in Sachen Elektrotechnik und bietet innovative Gesamtlösungen rund um das Thema Strom an. Karriere mit Lehre ist gelebter Alltag, denn das Unternehmen zählt auch zu den größten privaten Ausbildungsbetrieben Westösterreichs. 

Die Stärke ist die Vielseitigkeit, denn Fiegl+Spielberger liefert Komplettlösungen für sämtliche Branchen: Alarmanlagen und Überwachungssysteme, Audio- und Videotechnik, Automatiktüren, Brandmeldetechnik, Telekommunikation, Elektroinstallationen, Photovoltaik, E-Mobilitätslösungen, Hotel-EDV und Keycards, Kassen- und Schanksysteme. 

Gewerkübergreifend von Automatik-Türen bis zur Zutrittskontrolle hat der Bauherr nur einen Ansprechpartner und somit keine Koordinations- und Schnittstellenproblematik. 

Zum Unternehmen gehören neben der Zentrale in Innsbruck Niederlassungen in Ischgl, Galtür, Längenfeld, Hohenems (Vorarlberg), Thalgau (Salzburg), Appenzell (Schweiz), Krailling (München, Deutschland), sowie das Tochterunternehmen Fiegl+Spielberger Solution GmbH in Brunn am Gebirge und Graz. Auch das Unternehmen da emobil, welches sich auf E-Mobilität spezialisiert hat, ist eine gemeinsame Tochter von Fiegl+Spielberger und Gutmann Gesellschaft m.b.H.

Name: MPP Sverige AB
Description:
About MPP

RELIABLE ENERGY SOLUTIONS FOR CRITICAL ENVIRONMENTS

We develop and produce mobile and stationary fuel and energy solutions for critical environments in defense and preparedness, backup power, and fuel logistics. 

Our future-proof solutions are reliable, robust, user-friendly, and can be customized to your needs in close collaboration with our dedicated team.

WHEN RELIABILITY TRULY MATTERS
In critical environments, systems cannot fail.
That’s why our solutions are built to deliver stable performance, day after day — no matter the external conditions. 

Feel free to contact us on +46300521930 or kontakt@mpp.se

Name: NantG Power
Description:
NantG Power is developing a radical new approach to design and manufacture batteries with improved performance, price, and environmental stewardship. 
Unlike incumbent lithium-ion batteries that are currently limited to 750 Wh/L and charging times of 15 minutes or longer, our batteries are poised to reach 2X improvement in performance, i.e. energy densities of greater than 1,500 Wh/L and improved charging times over state of the art. Our approach is based on a technology platform that integrates novel anode/cathode materials, advanced 3D ionically/electronically conductive scaffolds enabling higher active material loadings, next-generation electrolyte/interphase technologies, improved manufacturing methods, and enhanced analytics.

Name: Polar ESS UK
Description:
We’re the affordable energy storage people.

We don’t think it’s right that so many billpayers are priced out of the benefits of battery storage. There’s a climate crisis AND a cost of living crisis, for crying out loud.

So, we’ve formed Polar ESS as a scrappy challenger brand.
 
We’re the battery storage brand for workers. For families. For retirees. For young couples. For everyone.

And we’d love to help you claim your energy freedom.

https://polar-ess.co.uk/

Name: GeoSmart Energy Inc.
Description: GeoSmart Energy is a well know brand of geothermal heat pumps. With product manufacturing in North America and in Europe, we are well positioned to grow and support a global transformation to clean energy. We go to market through a wholesale dealer direct sales channel, providing our dealers with expert training, marketing, sales, and technical support.

Name: Qcells France
Description:
Hanwha Q CELLS GmbH (Q CELLS) is the German subsidiary of Hanwha Solutions, one of the world's leading companies for clean energy solutions infused with solar DNA and is part of the Hanwha Group, a FORTUNE Global 500 company and one of the seven largest companies in South Korea. In Germany and Europe, Q CELLS has locations in Thalheim (Saxony-Anhalt) and Berlin, as well as sales offices in Italy, France, Spain, Benelux, Great Britain and Poland, and employs more than 500 people.

Hanwha Q CELLS GmbH, with its renowned R&D centre for innovation, technology and quality in Germany forms the technological backbone of Q CELLS' global solar business. Around 200 highly qualified employees in research, development and quality management develop solar cells and modules, PV systems and energy solutions that are "Engineered in Germany". Through these efforts, Q CELLS makes a decisive contribution to expanding the technological and quality leadership that sets us apart from the competition worldwide.

The locations in Germany also form the central hub for all sales activities of Q CELLS in Europe, one of the most important solar markets. In addition, the company designs and develops business models for the future from its German hub. In Germany and Europe, Q CELLS has evolved from a leading provider of solar solutions to a one-stop shop for clean energy solutions for municipalities, companies and private customers.

Today, the company offers a full range of clean energy products, from solar modules and PV systems to electrical storage solutions, power cloud solutions and clean energy contracts for private customers.

From its Berlin location, Q CELLS also manages the steadily growing Downstream Business Unit as one of the most experienced partners in the development, construction and financing of large solar power plants. Q CELLS is your partner for all photovoltaic products and services.

www.q-cells.fr
www.q-cells.com/en
linkedin.com/company/qcells
bit.ly/HQC-YouTube

Name: Elemental Energy
Description: Elemental Energy capitalises on the advantages of solar, battery, wind and grid (if available) whilst replacing the short-comings, usually solved by diesel, with the addition of hydrogen as an effective long-term storage medium.

Name: Zenfinity Energy
Description:
Zenfinity Energy is on a mission to be India’s most trusted innovator in advanced battery solutions, driving the nation’s transition to sustainable mobility and clean energy independence. We design and manufacture high-performance lithium-ion batteries tailored to India’s unique climate and mobility needs, ensuring superior safety, reliability, and longevity.

Through continuous innovation in battery chemistry, battery pack design,  thermal management, and IoT-enabled systems, we deliver cutting-edge solutions that reduce the total cost of ownership for fleet operators while contributing to India’s green mobility goals. Our vision is to transform India into a global leader in energy storage innovation by redefining how energy is stored, utilized, and sustained for generations to come.

Name: Caplyzer
Description: A patented electrolyzer technology that makes green hydrogen production safer, cheaper and scalable.

Name: AGRO Forst & Energietechnik
Description:
With over forty years’ experience within the renewable energy production industry, including the lumber & wood processing sector for on-site and municipal heating provisions, Agro is regarded as a one of the market leaders in both Austria and Europe alike.

Agro is focused on the production of cutting-edge technology for energy production from renewable resources such as tree bark, sawdust, wood shavings, wood chips and both scrap & recycled wood and straw.

Our highly qualified equipment manufacturers and thermodynamic engineers bring a huge amount of experience and expertise to the field of wood firing technology. This incorporates starter projects to produce brand new equipment all the way through to optimisation, renovation and repair of existing furnaces of various makes and brands.

Name: Soletrax
Description: SOLETRAX is an innovative and revolutionary start-up with Spanish capital whose mission is to become the leading global provider of tracker solutions and fixed structures for large-scale Photovoltaic Plants (utility scale).

Name: TheStorage
Description:
TheStorage is a Finnish climate-tech company developing scalable, sand-based thermal energy storage systems. With our unique Sand-in-Motion technology, heat can be flexibly produced from renewable energy to meet industrial needs, helping to cut both costs and emissions.

Founded in Tampere in 2023 by experts in steam and boiler technologies, TheStorage combines deep industry expertise with bold innovation. Our mission is to eliminate emissions from the world’s single largest source, industrial heat, and to enable fossil-free growth.

Name: Cobalt Mounting Systems
Description:
Cobalt Mounting Systems is a Dutch supplier of mounting systems for solar panels on flat and pitched roofs.

Our in-house design team has extensive experience in the solar market, is familiar with modern production methods, and works closely with installers.
The result? A modern, complete and competitively priced product range for virtually all roof types.

All our systems are wind tunnel tested and comply with the latest industry standards.

 Ready to experience smarter mounting?
Get to know Cobalt Mounting Systems and contact us to explore the possibilities!

Name: APsystems Brasil
Description:
O microinversor multimódulo mais vendido no mundo!

A APsystems é líder global em soluções MLPE multiplataforma, oferecendo microinversores, soluções de armazenamento de energia e dispositivos de desligamento rápido para a indústria solar fotovoltaica global.

Os microinversores APsystems são seguros, confiáveis e inovadores!

Com mais de 10 anos de experiência no Brasil, a APsystems é referência, líder e pioneira em tecnologia MLPE no país, oferecendo soluções ideais para o mercado brasileiro.

Name: V STAR SOLAR ENERGY
Description:
Who We Are

Founded in 2016, V STAR SOLAR ENERGY is a trusted name in the solar industry, known for its engineering precision, durable designs, and scalable solar structures. We specialize in manufacturing high-performance solar mounting structures and providing complete solar solutions tailored to meet the growing demand for clean, renewable energy—across India and beyond.

From residential rooftops to large-scale industrial solar farms, V Star Solar is committed to making solar energy reliable, affordable, and accessible..

 Our Core Offerings

 Solar Mounting Structures
Custom-engineered designs for C, Z, L, W, HAT profiles and more—crafted to withstand varied climates and terrain.

 Turnkey EPC Services
From site survey and structural design to installation and after-sales support—we do it all.

 Hot-Dip Galvanizing Services
In-house galvanization plant ensures unmatched quality and long-lasting corrosion protection.

 Specialized Solar Structures
Including rooftop, ground-mount, aluminum structures, and solar water pump frames.

 Projects Across Borders
Proven track record with installations pan-India (J&K to Tamil Nadu) and exports to Gulf and European countries.

 Our Vision
To be a global leader in indigenous solar mounting innovation—empowering communities, industries, and nations to transition to clean energy.

 Our Mission

Deliver engineered products that exceed expectations

Promote sustainable practices in every solution

Empower our clients with best-in-class service and support

Continuously innovate to stay ahead in the renewable energy space

 Why Partner with V Star Solar?
 In-house R&D and design team
 ISO-standard quality manufacturing
 PAN India delivery & installation
 Fast turnaround times
 Customer-first approach
 Competitive pricing without compromising quality

 At V STAR SOLAR, we don’t just build solar structures – we build a sustainable future.

Name: Spotlight Solar
Description:
Spotlight Solar makes beautiful solar structures -- solar shelters and solar trees. Spotlight makes solar visually appealing and experiential, using solar to provide shade, clean power where people need it, and aesthetic benefit. Spotlight products normally complement a larger solar system, or other  environmental projects, showing advocacy for clean energy. 

We work to accelerate the adoption of solar energy by making it more visible and engaging.

Name: Aplos Ventures Private Limited
Description:
Aplos Ventures Private Limited, abbreviated as AVPL or Aplos, is a team of leading renewable energy experts working on new requirements and challenges to provide cost effective and reliable cleaning solutions, having its headquarters in Navi Mumbai. 

Aplos has recently been funded by EverSource. a joint venture between the Everstone Group, one of India’s premier investment manager and Lightsource bp, a global leader in development and management of solar energy projects.

We have developed a new age fully autonomous robot, the ease-i, that aims to maximum energy generation, increase plant efficiency, and reduce O&M costof utility-scale PV sites.

Our mission is to revolutionize the way solar panels are maintained, ensuring peak performance and longevity while contributing to a cleaner, more sustainable energy future by optimizing the number of robotic systems in a plant, automate cleaning to the maximum extent possible and reduce the overall cost of cleaning. 

An example of our commitment to automating cleaning and reducing cleaning costs is our development of a one-of-a-kind Mobile Docking Station (MDS) that can clean multiple arrays using a single robot and track system, thus not only enabling the option of automatic cleaning for even shorter arrays, but also replace multiple robotic cleaning systems via a single MDS system. Reduction on initial Capex by almost 60% can be achieved via this solution.

Visit our website or reach out to us to know more about our products!

Name: Viridis PowerPRO
Description: As an award-winning solar energy company, Viridis is proud to celebrate our 10th anniversary. Since 2014, we have been dedicated to fighting global warming with innovative solar energy solutions. Viridis PowerPRO is the South's largest flagship distributor, offering complete solar solutions. We distribute solar PV modules and inverters, manufacture solar module mounting structures, and supply solar earthing and BOS components. Additionally, we provide solar cleaning kits and rooftop safety equipment. Our mission is clear: The Future is Green.

Name: Canadian Solar South East Asia
Description:
At Canadian Solar Southeast Asia, we bring cutting-edge solar energy solutions to power homes, businesses, and communities across the nation. As part of Canadian Solar Inc., one of the world’s largest and most reputable solar technology companies, we combine global expertise with local market insights to deliver high-performance solar panels, energy storage systems, and sustainable solutions tailored to Southeast Asia region's unique needs.

 With over two decades of experience in the renewable energy sector, we are committed to driving the transition to a cleaner, more sustainable future. Our innovative products include solar modules, inverters and a comprehensive range of residential and commercial energy storage solutions. We also prioritise exceptional customer support and robust partnerships with installers, distributors, and EPCs across the region. 

Follow this page for the latest updates, product launches, and insights into solar energy solutions tailored for SEA region.

Name: Lightswing Solar
Description:
Lightswing développe et commercialise des supports innovants pour panneaux photovoltaïques bifaciaux verticaux.

Grâce à un balancement passif et maîtrisé en cas de tempête, il est désormais possible de profiter des multiples avantages du photovoltaïque bifacial vertical* en s'accommodant de son principal inconvénient : la prise au vent.

Cette innovation crée de nouvelles opportunités de synergies entre production photovoltaïque et autres usages sur une même surface, notamment en permettant l’installation de panneaux bifaciaux verticaux en hauteur ou en altitude.

*Quelques avantages du photovoltaïque bifacial vertical : potentiel de conciliation d’usages, faible emprise au sol, peu d’encrassement, absence d'obstruction par la neige, productible hivernal élevé, courbe de production journalière en « M » avec des pics de production en début et fin de journée, maximisation du taux d'autoconsommation etc.

Pour plus d’informations, contactez-nous à info@lightswingsolar.ch

Name: Vow ASA
Description:
Vow and its subsidiaries Scanship, C.H. Evensen and ETIA are passionate about preventing pollution. The company’s world leading solutions convert biomass and waste into valuable resources and generate clean energy for a wide range of industries.

Advanced technologies and solutions from Vow enable industry decarbonisation and material recovery. Biomass, sewage sludge, plastic waste and end-of-life tyres can be converted into clean energy, low carbon fuels and renewable carbon that replace natural gas, petroleum products and fossil carbon. The solutions are scalable, standardised, patented, and thoroughly documented, and the company’s capability to deliver is well proven.

The company is a cruise market leader in wastewater purification and valorisation of waste. It provides technology and solutions which enable industries to transition towards a fossil-free future by converting biomass and waste into valuable resources and clean energy. The company also has strong niche positions in food safety and in heat-intensive industries with a strong decarbonising agenda.

Located in Oslo, the parent company Vow ASA is listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange (ticker VOW).

Name: AM Batteries
Description:
AM Batteries is an innovator in the electro-chemical energy storage industry, focusing on transforming the manufacturing processes & performance of Li-ion batteries for EVs, grid storage, consumer electronics, and more. 

AM Batteries is working to industrialize a solvent free electrode manufacturing technology for Li-ion batteries and beyond. In this technology, the dry mixed powder will be directly coated onto the current collectors. This revolutionary technology can substantially reduce the energy footprint, hazardous material usage, & capital costs for Li-ion battery manufacturers.

Name: ANDRITZ Hydropower DACH-Region
Description:
Die Wasserkraftsparte der ANDRITZ GRUPPE ist ein
globaler Anbieter für elektromechanische Ausrüstungen
und Serviceleistungen “from water-to-wire” für
Wasserkraftwerke und einer der weltweit größten
Anbieter im Markt für hydraulische Stromerzeugung.
Mit mehr als 175 Jahren Erfahrung in der Turbinentechnologie
und über 120 Jahre in der Elektrotechnik
bieten wir ein umfassendes Portfolio. Den Grundstein
legten die Turbinen- und Generatorpioniere in Europa
und Nordamerika im 19. Jahrhundert. Wachstum,
Fusionen und Kooperationen haben über die Zeit ein
modernes, state-of-the-art Technologieunternehmen
mit über 7.200 Mitarbeitern geschaffen.

Die Wurzeln des Ravensburger Standortes reichen bis
in die erste Hälfte des 19. Jahrhunderts zurück. Heute
haben viele unserer mehr als 400 Mitarbeiter unterschiedlichste
Nationalitäten und „sprechen somit die Sprache
unserer internationalen Kunden“.
Unsere Dienstleistungen und Produkte leisten einen
wichtigen Beitrag zur umweltverträglichen,
regenerativen Energieerzeugung. Im Service erweisen
sich ökologische Modernisierungskonzepte in Verbindung
mit umfassend dokumentierter Erfahrung der in
über 160 Jahren gebauten Anlagen nutzbringend für
unsere Kunden.

Name: Nordex Group Nordic
Description: The Nordex Group’s Nordic Region includes three primary markets: Sweden, Norway and Finland. The Nordics is one of the areas in Europe with highest share of renewables in electricity generation. The region’s ambitious targets for renewable energy, especially with regards to wind power, makes the Nordic Region a steadily growing market with wind power energy production estimated to double by 2030. Nordex has been represented in the region since the establishment of the Swedish subsidiary in 2006, with the Finnish branch office following in 2011. The Nordex Group has contracted over 1.7 GW in Sweden, 2.8 GW in Finland and 600 MW in Norway. This amounts to annual energy production equivalent to the electricity consumption of around 3.9 million households in the Nordic region. With the goal to provide renewable energy to even more communities and companies, the Nordex Group aims to continue to contribute to the growth within the Nordic markets by continuing to be one of the main suppliers of wind turbines to the region.

Name: ANDRITZ Hydropower North America
Description:
Le siège social d’ANDRITZ Hydroélectricité au Canada est situé à Pointe-Claire, Québec et aux États-Unis à Charlotte, Caroline du Nord. Nous fournissons des services de R&D, de conception, de gestion de projet, d'approvisionnement, de fabrication, de livraison, d'installation et de mise en service pour l'équipement de centrale hydroélectrique, y compris les vannes de prise d'eau et d'aspirateur, les turbines, les alternateurs, les régulateurs de vitesse, les excitatrices et plusieurs systèmes auxiliaires. L'entreprise est l'un des principaux fournisseurs d'équipements et de services électromécaniques pour les centrales hydroélectriques au Canada et aux États-Unis.

ANDRITZ Hydroélectricité fournit des solutions sur mesure « de la prise d’eau à la sortie électrique »

ANDRITZ Hydropower has its Canadian Headquarter in Pointe-Claire, Quebec and Charlotte, North Carolina for the United States. We are offering R&D, design, project management, procurement, manufacturing, delivery, installation and commissioning services for hydroelectric generating station equipment, including turbines, generators, governors, exciters, automation, all types of gates and several auxiliary systems.  The company is one of the leading suppliers of electro-mechanical equipment and services for hydropower plants in Canada and the United States.

ANDRITZ Hydropower provides custom-tailored solutions “from water-to-wire”.

Name: EnergoBit
Description:
We are a competitive, strong and trustworthy company in the sector of major electrical energy players. Our company developed its activity driven by responsibility, top level performance, elegance and professional values and ethics. After almost three decades, EnergoBit has remained an elite business partner, highly appreciated by customers, suppliers and the community.

EnergoBit represents the story behind electricity, proposing and offering a full range of services such as energy audit and technical design, production of electrical equipment (low and medium voltage), general contracting, maintenance and operation services. The company develops projects in the energy services market, in Romania and abroad, delivering innovative and sustainable energy solutions, designed to meet customers` specific needs.

We have national coverage, ensuring our presence in some of the country`s largest cities. We now operate in two production units, in Cluj-Napoca and Jibou, having 16 offices throughout the country and over 700 employees, out of which 250 engineers.

Our business is also mirrored through other six companies: ELM Electromontaj Cluj, EnergoBit Control Systems, EnergoBitTavrida, Energolux, EnergoBit Transformers, Enex that cover several activities in the energy field.

The people behind the company are EnergoBit`s most valuable asset. We are a team of highly trained professionals, with an open minded attitude and the will to find the best solution in electricity. We respect, trust and value our employees because they make the difference. In a challenging global market, with a constantly growth trend, our ability to innovate, our agility and flexibility are compulsory.

With an impressive experience in the energy field, we have become more proficient, more involved and more determined to offer the best energy solutions for all our customers. For us, every successful project becomes a part of who we are.

Name: Gridscape Solutions
Description:
Gridscape is one of the largest renewable energy systems providers with a focus on deploying state of the art Microgrid and EV charging solutions aimed at reducing greenhouse emissions in California by using locally generated green energy. Our product-centric, modular microgrids are powered by a cloud-based software management platform that uses state-of-the-art data analytics, combining real-time energy usage, market data and utility tariffs that feeds into an AI-based machine learning optimization engine to provide maximum energy savings. We currently have 50+ microgrids deployed and operational in CA and other states.

Our team has extensive and proven experience in deploying highly efficient, integrated software solutions for smart grid for various clients from utilities to manufacturers. Our energy management consultants are subject matter experts who can provide real-world advice on implementing industry best practices. We are experts in designing and deploying low-risk, low-cost software solutions that result in efficient operations, energy conservation and new revenue opportunities.

Name: Big Ass Battery
Description:
Onze batterijen zijn dé oplossing voor de actuele uitdagingen zoals een overvol stroomnet, capaciteitsproblemen door wachtlijsten bij netbeheerders en verduurzaming in het bedrijfsleven. Onze batterijen zorgen voor een duurzame energie opslag en combineert een hoog vermogen met een kleine footprint. Daarnaast is een Big Ass Battery uitstootvrij, geluidloos en voorziet je overal van krachtstroom op batterijen. 

Een Big Ass Battery kan op verschillende locaties worden geplaatst. Bij een bouwplaats, in de weg- en waterbouw om graafmachines of andere elektrische gereedschap op te laden. De containers kunnen worden ingezet bij een event locatie of bij een bedrijf voor het laden van elektrische auto’s. Ook kan je een verdienmodel koppelen aan het gebruik van de Big Ass Battery.  

Op naar een uitstootvrije generatie met schone mobiele batterijstroom en energieopslag.

Name: PXL SEALS
Description:
PXL SEALS specializes in sealing systems for hydropower and renewable energy sectors where performance, downtime, technical and economic considerations play a large role. 

For more than 20 years, we supply sealing solutions for hydroelectric plants worldwide. In addition to designing and manufacturing, we offer expertise from diagnosis all the way through to on-site installation services.

The PXL On-Site Team operates at the plant location and offers sealing evaluation, expertise, maintenance and installation services. The patented MD WAY technology is a method of joining that allows the installation of high performance seals of unlimited diameter without dismantling the equipment.

PXL SEALS provides sealing for equipment such as :

HYDRO AND RENEWABLE ENERGY:
    * Hydoelectric plants : Sealing for Turbine Groups (Pelton, Francis, Kaplan, Bulb, Pump-turbine for PSPS station) , Gates, Expansion rings, Control servomotors, Penstocks
    * Wind generators : Sealing for Blade, Bearing and alternators
    * Sealing used on offshore platforms (Swivels)

LARGE BEARINGS : Sealing for any bearing from large to very large diameter (we have the specificity of being able to create unlimited diameter seals, as solid as standard seals) : tanks, construction vehicles, etc.

Name: TESLA Group a.s.
Description:
TESLA Group is a swiftly expanding provider of Modular Energy Storage Systems. Our mission is to empower people with sustainable energy through innovative concepts. With our diverse range of products and solutions, we actively contribute to the advancement of renewable energy sources. Our focus extends beyond mere provision; we aim to facilitate the decentralization of energy, enabling individuals to reduce dependence on centralized distribution and transmission systems. Simultaneously, we strengthen and stabilize these systems, ensuring a reliable and sustainable energy future.


Home to our manufacturing prowess is TESLA Liptovský Hrádok in Slovakia, established in 1950 with a rich legacy in electronic device manufacturing. Anticipating the growing demand for our solutions, we're proud to announce the establishment of a new manufacturing facility in Braila, Romania, scheduled to commence operations in 2025. This expansion underscores our commitment to meeting the evolving needs of our clientele.


We embody a unique blend of heritage and modern culture. Our journey, which began in 1946, is a testament to our enduring commitment to excellence. Fueled by the desire to build a better tomorrow for our clients and employees, we offer abundant opportunities for ambitious development. We foster a dynamic and inclusive environment that encourages innovation and continuous growth. 

Powering People, Protecting Planet.

Name: Cactos
Description: Cactos develops distributed energy storage systems based on batteries.

Name: Fronius UK
Description:
About Fronius UK
Based in Milton Keynes, Fronius UK is one of 38 international subsidiaries of global, family-owned company Fronius International, originating in Austria in the 1940s.

Fronius creates new technologies and solutions for monitoring and controlling energy -for battery charging systems, welding technology and solar electronics. By its own efforts, with a great sense of family and without having to depend on external funding, Fronius has over the years built up an impressive pool of knowledge and know-how. Continuous progress and technical innovations are the result of patient research work, diligence and personal commitment. With its innovative products and services and over 1300 active patents, Fronius is a world technology leader.

Battery Charging Solutions
We started a technological revolution with Active Inverter Technology and are now the know-how leaders in battery charging technology. We are driven by the aim of providing intelligent energy management systems that ensure maximum energy efficiency and battery life in intralogistics together with total safety and top performance in the vehicle workshop.

Welding Solutions
We develop welding technologies, such as entire systems for arc and resistance spot welding, and have set ourselves the task of making impossible weld joints possible. Our aim is to decode the »arc welding’s DNA«. We are the technology leader worldwide and the market leader in Europe.

Solar Energy
The greatest challenge of our time is to make the leap to a regenerative energy supply. Our vision is to use renewable energy to achieve energy independence. With our grid-connected inverters and products for monitoring photovoltaic systems, we are now one of the leading suppliers in solar electronics.

Name: FTXT Energy Technology
Description:
FTXT Energy Technology Co., Ltd. is committed to promoting the low-carbon sustainable future and is mainly engaged in the development, production and sales of fuel cell and hydrogen storage systems and components. 

At present, FTXT has deployed five R&D centers in Shanghai, Baoding, Canada, Japan, and Germany, forming a multicultural and technologically advanced R&D team, and strictly following the V model development process to create vehicle-level fuel cell power systems and components. Our main products include fuel cell engines, stacks, 35MPa/70MPa on-board hydrogen storage systems, on-tank valves and pressure regulators. Our products are to a large extent based on components produced in-house.

FTXT Energy is poised to build the most competitive products around the core technologies of hydrogen fuel cells: high-performing MEA, high-power density stacks, high-efficiency fuel cell engines, safe and highly-integrated  on-board hydrogen storage systems, etc. The team at FTXT is committed to providing customers with the most cost-effective hydrogen and fuel cell solutions.

Name: Sion Power Corporation
Description:
Sion Power Corp. is a 35-year-old, vertically integrated battery technology company with full design, build, test, and validation capabilities. Headquartered in Tucson, Arizona, we are advancing the future of energy storage with our proprietary, patented Licerion technology.

Licerion tackles the biggest barriers to mass EV adoption: range, cost, and charge time. We do this by minimizing dendrite formation by solving the primary failure mode of lithium-metal batteries. Our breakthrough approach unlocks the true potential of lithium metal, delivering twice the energy density of traditional lithium-ion and leapfrogging graphite and silicon anode solutions.

Sion Power holds nearly 500 patents issued and pending, with over 90 employees focused on bringing Licerion to volume production by 2028.

Name: Brenmiller Energy
Description:
Brenmiller Energy enables industrial electrification and decarbonization. Our patented bGen thermal energy storage (TES) system converts renewable electricity into clean, zero-emission heat, providing a sustainable alternative to traditional fossil fuel boilers.
Brenmiller is a public company, share symbol: BNRG

The most experienced thermal battery developer on the market, Brenmiller operates the world’s only gigafactory for thermal battery production and is trusted by leading multinational energy companies. 
Brenmiller is a Nasdaq listed company ($BNRG)

Name: AQUABATTERY
Description:
AQUABATTERY is a flow-type long duration energy storage (LDES) solution. We have developed an innovative product that stores renewable electricity by using water and table salt. This revolutionary LDES is relying on abundant, environmentally friendly and cheap materials, table salt and water, which create the world's most sustainable, safe and scalable long duration battery.

Email: info@aquabattery.com
Website: http://aquabattery.com/
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=J-ATCYNa25E
Twitter: #AquaBattery
Location: Alphen aan den Rijn, South Holland

Name: VoltR
Description:
VoltR is a French manufacturer of eco-designed lithium batteries. Thanks to a rigorous industrial process and cutting-edge technology, VoltR recovers battery cells at the end of their first life cycle and reallocates them into new batteries suited to their residual performance. Thus, VoltR is able to offer eco-designed, made-in-France batteries that are as efficient as conventional batteries.

VoltR est un fabricant français de batteries lithium éco-conçues. Grâce un processus industriel rigoureux et sa technologie de pointe, VoltR récupère les cellules de batteries en fin de première vie, pour les réaffecter dans de nouvelles batteries adaptée à leur performance résiduelle. VoltR est ainsi en mesure de proposer des batteries made in France, éco-conçues et aussi performante que des batteries classiques.
Location: Verrière en anjou, Pays de la Loire

Name: Xbattery
Description: Xbattery is building next-generation battery management system (BMS) platform for energy storage and EVs

Name: Deepak International Limited
Description:
Deepak International Limited is a diverse group established in 1950 and engaged in the Manufacturing and Export of a wide range of batteries for the Energy and Automotive sector.  Our product portfolio entails a wide range of Automotive Batteries (Motorcycle, Car & Heavy Duty vehicles), Home Inverter Batteries and other Power storage products.

Our strong presence in the industry, and our commitment to produce quality products, coupled with our experience and technical know-how has helped us built a wide-reaching eminence as a global manufacturing & exporting partner.

With a nationwide Sales & Service network in place, we are not only known for Quality batteries, but also for Aftermarket knowledge, Customer sales support and Marketing expertise.

Name: Hi Tech Agro Energy Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
We specialize in the field of biomass and municipal solid waste processing, providing plant solutions for industrial energy applications.

With over 30 years of experience and 500+ integrated plants, we help industries convert all types of agro-waste and biomass into clean, affordable, and reliable fuel, reducing dependence on fossil fuels and supporting sustainable manufacturing.

Our solutions are engineered to handle large capacities, different raw materials, and demanding industrial conditions, with a strong focus on operational stability, output, and long-term performance.

Name: QC Solar Corporation
Description: QC Solar, founded in March 2005 and headquartered at No.31,Xinfa Road, SIP, Suzhou, China, is a high-tech enterprise specializing in the field of new energy electrical protection and connection of PV modules and power plants, main products include PV junction boxes, PV connectors, and energy storage connectors. Currently QC Solar has four factories respectively in Suzhou, Huai'an and Bac Giang Vietnam, with a total area of about 66,000 square meters. Over the years, QC Solar has obtained many qualifications and honors such as “Nationally Accredited CNAS Laboratory”,“Jiangsu Engineering and Technology Research Center”,“National Specialized and New little Giant Enterprises”. The main customers are Trina solar, JA solar, TW solar, Canadian Solar, Risen Energy, DAS Solar, Jolywood, AUO, Adani, Hansol, Solarwatt and other TOP PV module manufacturers at home and abroad.

Name: Finike Lithium
Description:
We are in a journey of our times to democratize the evolving needs of Energy Access in India & beyond.

FINIKE is an ecosystem of highly talented & supremely skilled professional Engineers with enterprising minds meeting with constantly evolving & rapidly changing technologies in the Emerging Storage Energy sector. And our scope of work ranges from Solar to 2W/3W in Mobility Sector to MHE Applications to Residential Energy Products / Projects & to Large Scale Industrial Energy requirements in the scale of Micro Grids.

Our mission is to make Energy Storage being fundamentally accessed by all as per their needs to promote a cleaner & greener Earth. We partner with the Technology Leaders to deliver the best products/solutions to the industry & we constantly strive to work in the rapidly evolving dynamics of the Energy Industry to always bring out the ‘Best Cost Effective Solutions’ with sustainable & durable Life Cycle.

Name: Prime Batteries
Description:
Prime Batteries designs, manufactures and markets Lithium-ion batteries and tailor-made battery packs. We serve a wide variety of industries, including automotive, marine, industrial & material handling, energy storage.

In cooperation with strategic partners, Prime Batteries produces batteries for significantly less cost using the concept of smart factory, innovative manufacturing, reduction of waste, and the simple optimization of locating most manufacturing process under one roof. We expect to lower our battery cells production cost with more than 20 percent.

Name: Voltage Energy
Description: Founded in 2015, Voltage is a premier global solutions provider of electrical balance of systems (eBOS) for PV solar utility-scale projects. Headquartered in Chapel Hill, North Carolina, with subsidiaries in Europe and APAC, Voltage continues to see its output increase annually, establishing the company as a top player in the PV solar industry. Dedicated to delivering exceptional value, Voltage's service offerings include value-engineered designs, supported by pre-construction 3D stills and videos of products in situ, 360-degree walk-throughs, and virtual reality installation previews. Voltage's key products, such as LYNX ALEX and IBEX, along with high-quality MV and DC feeder cables meet the unique needs of many loyal customers.

Name: ANDRITZ Hydro Canada
Description:
Le siège social d’ANDRITZ au Canada est situé à Pointe-Claire, Québec. Nous fournissons des services de R&D, de conception, de gestion de projet, d'approvisionnement, de fabrication, de livraison, d'installation et de mise en service pour l'équipement de centrale hydroélectrique, y compris les vannes de prise d'eau et d'aspirateur, les turbines, les alternateurs, les régulateurs de vitesse, les excitatrices et plusieurs systèmes auxiliaires. L'entreprise est l'un des principaux fournisseurs d'équipements et de services électromécaniques pour les centrales hydroélectriques au Canada.

ANDRITZ Hydro fournit des solutions sur mesure « de la prise d’eau à la sortie électrique »

ANDRITZ Hydro has its Canadian Headquarter in Pointe-Claire, Quebec. We are offering R&D, design, project management, procurement, manufacturing, delivery, installation and commissioning services for hydroelectric generating station equipment, including turbines, generators, governors, exciters, automation, all types of gates and several auxiliary systems.  The company is one of the leading suppliers of electro-mechanical equipment and services for hydropower plants in Canada.

ANDRITZ Hydro provides custom-tailored solutions “from water-to-wire”.

Name: CS WIND TURKEY
Description: CS Wind Turkey not only enters into wind tower market in Turkey with many opportunities for future growth but also will be the strategic bridgehead for strenghening the supply chain all over the world, securing production base to European market.

Name: CLOU ESS
Description:
Shenzhen CLOU Electronics Co., Ltd. (SHE: 002121), founded in 1996, is a BNEF Tier 1 energy-storage manufacturer and PCS/inverter company under the Midea Group, a Fortune Global 500 enterprise.

CLOU has nearly 30 years of experience in the power industry, with businesses focused on two core sectors: smart grids and battery energy storage. Leveraging deep power-system expertise, CLOU helped pioneer China’s intelligent metering and grid-automation terminals.

In energy storage, CLOU entered the market in 2009. We built China’s first MWh-level containerized ESS and obtained the first 3 MW PCS certified by the China Quality Certification Center. Our BESS holds UL 9540 certification issued by TÜV Rheinland, and our PCS is ETL-listed by Intertek. In 2023, all nine sites of our TX10 portfolio in Texas ranked in ERCOT’s Top 30 for market revenue, with around US$196k/MW annual revenue as reported by Modo Energy.

CLOU’s current storage portfolio spans utility-scale and C&I applications, including the 6.88MWh Aqua C3.0 Pro liquid-cooled system, 5 MWh+ Aqua-C2.5 liquid-cooled system, the Aqua-E233 C&I ESS, Battery Management Systems (BMS), Power Conversion Systems (PCS), Energy Management Systems (EMS), and high-performance battery modules.

Name: PVblink Technology Pvt Ltd
Description:
PVblink Technology Pvt Ltd is a technology-driven company dedicated to advancing renewable energy solutions in India. With a highly qualified R&D team, the company focuses on developing innovative, reliable, and efficient products tailored for the Indian market. Its core vision is to contribute to India’s energy independence by consistently offering self-reliant products, aligning with the government’s ‘Make in India’ campaign.

PVblink’s extensive product portfolio includes Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS), Hybrid Inverters, All-in-One Series solutions, Off-Grid Inverters, and On-Grid Inverters. These offerings are designed to cater to diverse needs, from residential to commercial and utility-scale applications, ensuring seamless energy management and sustainability.

The company emphasizes indigenous manufacturing, ensuring all products are MADE IN INDIA, supporting local industries and creating employment opportunities. Its commitment to innovation and quality is reinforced through continuous R&D efforts, utilizing the latest technologies to improve product performance and durability.

PVblink’s mission is to empower India with cutting-edge, cost-effective renewable energy solutions, driving the nation towards a greener, more sustainable future. By focusing on self-reliance, technological excellence, and local manufacturing, PVblink aims to be a leading name in India’s renewable energy sector, contributing significantly to the country's energy security and environmental goals.

Name: Kseng Solar
Description:
Kseng, a national high-tech enterprise specializes in providing solar racking and tracking systems for residential, commercial, and utility-scale solar applications.

Headquartered in Xiamen, China, it owns two production bases in Xiamen and Zhangzhou, Fujian with an annual production capacity of up to 12GW. It integrates five production lines covering aluminum/carbon solar racking, tile roof hook, solar tracker and ground screw, aiming at building a solar racking manufacturing enterprise with a whole industrial chain through vertical integration production.

Driven by the mission of “Empowering our world with clean energy ”, Kseng Solar has increased its global presence with branches in Netherlands, South Korea, Japan, Australia, Malaysia, Vietnam, Saudi Arabia, Hong Kong S.A.R, and other countries and regions. 

Since the inception of 2015, Kseng Solar has a proven track record as the ideal racking brand for its strong engineering, manufacturing, and customer service capability. With its own manufacturing base to conduct strict quality control and numerous international standards accreditations, Kseng Solar has accomplished nearly 25GW of solar racking shipments by the end of 2025. Its market share ranked No.1 in Japan & Korean aluminum solar racking market, and keeps No.1 growth rate in the European & Chinese aluminum solar racking market.

Name: Earthfit Solutions Pvt Ltd.
Description: We are into the design of Carbon Offset projects using Clean Cooking Solutions across the globe. All of this are with digital devices to give complete transparency to our partners & deliver a high quality Carbon with a huge social impact on the ground.

Name: Triple Solar Ltd
Description:
Triple Solar is a leading Solar Distributor in the United Kingdom, dedicated to providing streamlined solutions for households, commercial enterprises, and solar installers nationwide. Our mission is to empower customers on their sustainability journey from beginning to end. We have the largest solar-specific warehouse with a whooping 180000 sq.ft of products to handle all your needs.

We offer a comprehensive range of products for solar installations, including PV panels, inverters, battery storage, mounting systems, cables, connectors, and other electrical components, all sourced from renowned solar companies. Our warehouse is home to a vast selection of premier products from renowned solar brands such as Aiko, Hyundai, JA Solar, Ulica Solar, Jinko Growatt, Goodwe, Solaredge, Solis, Solax, Hexing Clenergy Sigenergy and Pylontech.

We understand that transitioning to solar power is a pivotal step toward creating a cleaner and greener future for our planet. Therefore, we are committed to reducing carbon footprints and driving sustainability. 

As a highly esteemed company, Triple Solar has gained recognition as one of the top solar distributor in the UK. Building on our success in the UK market, we are expanding into the European market. With strategically located warehouses across the UK, Triple Solar has played a vital role in transforming the nation into a cleaner and more sustainable country.

Our objective is to continue our mission and provide solutions to households across the UK. Through our environmentally friendly products, we empower customers to embrace greener alternatives. Additionally, we aim to create more opportunities for solar installers to grow their businesses, thereby making a significant difference for both ourselves and our planet.

 What are you waiting for? Powered by Triple Solar! Come and talk to us about your needs.

Name: FHE Group
Description:
Leader français de la gestion des énergies du foyer basé à Perpignan, FHE Group offre aux professionnels et particuliers une solution 100% intégrée pour piloter l’ensemble des vecteurs énergétiques du bâtiment. 
Sites internet : https://fhe-france.com et https://fhe-pro.com

Name: Allye
Description: Intelligent energy management that transforms how businesses and communities store, share, and optimise electricity. We're creating "energy banking" that combines battery storage with AI-powered software to make clean energy more accessible, affordable, and flexible. By installing batteries at businesses and alongside legacy grid infrastructure, Allye Energy is building a network of distributed energy storage assets that solve local grid constraints, stabilise networks, and reduce energy costs. Our energy banking model makes energy storage 100 times more affordable for all consumers, providing the flexibility to deposit and withdraw electricity from shared batteries across our network. This revolutionary approach empowers local communities, creates a smarter grid, and accelerates the transition to renewable energy.

Name: SEATURNS
Description:
Founded in Bordeaux, France, in 2015, SEATURNS has developed an innovative, and cost-effective wave energy solution to meet the urgent global demand for sustainable and renewable energy in the ocean power sector.
SEATURNS wave energy technology is centered around an innovative floating cylinder that converts wave motion into electricity. This patented technology delivers optimal performance while simplifying offshore operations and reducing costs.
With full-scale testing scheduled for 2025, SEATURNS is entering a new phase of development aimed at accelerating the industrial rollout of its technology, with the first pilot farms planned as a key milestone toward broader commercial deployment.
The global wave energy market is expected to experience rapid growth, with projections estimating 10 GW of installed capacity by 2030 and up to 180 GW by 2050.
SEATURNS provides equipment for off-grid or microgrid solutions and utility-scale wave energy farms, producing renewable power for national grids and heavy industries such as data centers, green hydrogen production, and desalination.
With its advanced power solution, SEATURNS targets Small Island Developing States (SIDS) in urgent need of affordable and clean energy, European nations as well as leading countries like Canada, Australia, South Africa, Chile all committed to reducing global electrical carbon intensity.

Name: EV Battery Solutions by Cox Automotive
Description: EV Battery Solutions by Cox Automotive is a leading innovator of end-to-end EV battery solutions. We support OEMs with storage, distribution & logistics, first life extension and recycling services that extend the first life of EV batteries. We’re laser focused on the entire battery life cycle, maximizing cost savings and minimizing waste, while safely promoting and preserving our shared electric future.

Name: TCL Photovoltaic Technology
Description:
TCL Photovoltaic Technology is a green energy full-lifecycle smart service provider under TCL Industries.
In line with the global trend of green and digital integration, TCL Photovoltaic Technology leverages the advantages of TCL's research and development, supply chain, warehousing and logistics, and channel networks to focus on the new energy photovoltaic field. 
The company offers one-stop solutions that integrate development, manufacturing, and energy management, and is committed to establishing the TCL Smart Energy Management System, creating an intelligent clean energy platform, and gradually developing into a leader in the clean energy industry.

Name: HYDGEN
Description: HYDGEN is a spin-off of the National University of Singapore, driving breakthrough innovation in green hydrogen technologies. Our advanced electrolyzers leverage proprietary catalysts, membrane, and stack designs to offer unparalleled power efficiency and cost-effectiveness. With this, we can generate green hydrogen at the lowest unit costs, unlocking the full potential of green hydrogen to decarbonize many industries and create a cleaner future.

Name: Wavepiston
Description:
Wavepiston is a revolutionary technology that harnesses wave energy to produce clean electricity and desalinated water. We believe that wave energy will play a crucial role in replacing fossil fuels and ensuring clean drinking water.

The ocean energy potential is vast. Wave energy allows for a stable and predictable source, that can complement wind and solar energy. We have tested our technology extensively through several stages and our full-scale system is now being tested and demonstrated in the Atlantic Ocean off the coast of Gran Canaria.

Unlock a sustainable future with Wavepiston, by harnessing the energy of waves!

Name: iNVERGY
Description:
Invergy is bringing the solar industry to new heights with product developments and an optimized energy-cost ratio using advanced technologies. Innovation and sustainability are two core values of Invergy.
Invergy is a pioneer in the development of OFF-GRID Inverter, Hybrid ESS Inverter, Micro Inverter, EV Charger and energy storage solutions

Name: HyET Hydrogen B.V.
Description: HyET Hydrogen is a leading SME in the field of electrochemical hydrogen compression, founded in 2009. We specialize in the development and commercialization of Electrochemical Hydrogen Compressors and Purifiers (EHC/Ps), offering a reliable, flexible, and cost-effective solution for hydrogen compression and purification. Unlike traditional mechanical compressors, HyET Hydrogen's EHC/P technology utilizes multiple Hydrogen Compression Stacks (HCSs) operating in parallel. This innovative design eliminates moving parts, significantly reducing wear and tear, vibration, and noise, while also minimizing maintenance requirements. The modular nature of the EHC/P system allows for scalable solutions, accommodating a wide range of hydrogen compression capacities, from small-scale recovery to large-scale industrial applications. Furthermore, the electrochemical process offers inherent purification capabilities, enhancing the value of the recovered hydrogen.

Name: EENOVANCE
Description:
Shenzhen EEnovance Energy Technology CO., Ltd is an innovative technology company focusing on the research and development, production, sales, and service of energy storage systems for residential and commercial & industrial applications. EEnovance follows "product is life" as the brand value proposition, and is dedicated to providing efficient, safe, and reliable energy storage products and solutions to clients across the globe.
The main products include a residential energy storage system from 5kWh to 25kWh, multiple parallel systems up to 100kWh, and a C&I energy storage system from 50kWh to 5MWh. Our core products hold authoritative certifications such as UN38.3, CE-EMC, CE-LVD, CB, and UKCA. They find wide usage across Europe, North America, Africa, Asia-Pacific, and beyond.

Contact us: info@eenovance.com

Name: Fox ESS Australia
Description: We are a manufacturer of inverter solutions and energy storage systems. We have a strong focus on research and development with our own R&D centre.

Name: Dajin Heavy Industry Co.,Ltd
Description:
Dajin Heavy Industry Co., Ltd, founded in 2000 and publicly listed in 2010, the first one among all the like-companies in China, is the largest private Chinese offshore wind fabricator of monopiles, transition pieces, and offshore towers. In addition, Dajin is developing jackets and floating foundations.

With ongoing development of Panjin Facility in Liaoning Province, Dajin capability can reach up to max diameter 16m with 5000T per monopile. This is where we are destinated and how we are prepared for the XXL products tomorrow.

With our own port operations, we are loading with efficiency for vessels loading at Dajin Port. It is with this advantage that enables us fulfill the delivery to our Clients’ satisfaction.

Name: Medeiros Galvão Solutions
Description:
Tudo pra quem FAZ, PRODUZ e TRANSFORMA!

A Medeiros Galvão Solutions é uma distribuidora de suprimentos industriais, com foco especializado no atendimento à matriz energética renovável e a setores industriais essenciais, como energia, petróleo e gás, mineração, telecomunicações, construção e infraestrutura. Atuamos para garantir disponibilidade, qualidade e suporte técnico em materiais e equipamentos MRO que sustentam a operação, manutenção e expansão dos principais ativos industriais do nordeste brasileiro.

Com presença nacional, estrutura própria e uma operação ágil, somos parceiros de manutenção para empresas que não podem parar.

 Suprimentos MRO sob medida
  Logística integrada
  Estoque dedicado e gestão de contratos
  Atendimento em todo o Brasil
Location: João Câmara, Rio Grande do Norte

Name: JA Solar Middle East
Description:
تأسست جي أيه سولار في عام 2005، وهي شركة مصنعة للمنتجات الكهروضوئية عالية الأداء.
تغطي أعمال الشركة رقائق السيليكون والخلايا والألواح ومحطات الطاقة الكهروضوئية. وبفضل الجهود التي يبذلها أكثر من 50,000 موظف، حافظت جي أيه سولار على مكانها ضمن أفضل 4 مُصنّعين للألواح الكهروضوئية على مر السنين، وتتوفر منتجاتها في 165 بلد ومنطقة ، وتستحوذ على حصة سوقية عالمية تبلغ 16٪

اعتباراً من الربع الثالث من عام 2023، بلغت الشحنة التراكمية لشركة جي أيه سولار 166 جيجاواط، ومن المخطط أن تصل السعة الإنتاجية لحوالي 110 جيجاواط بحلول نهاية عام 2024.
تتمتع جي ايه سولار بحضور قوي في سوق الشرق الأوسط، مما يكسبها ثقة العملاء المحليين.
وقد تمكنت جي أيه سولار، المعترف بها من قبل
 EUPD Research
كأفضل علامة تجارية للطاقة الكهروضوئية في مناطق الشرق الأوسط وشمال إفريقيا، من تأمين ألواح للعديد من المشاريع المؤثرة بما في ذلك محطة توليد الطاقة الكهروضوئية باستطاعة 875 ميجاواط في قطر، و405 ميجاواط في الإمارات العربية المتحدة، و560 ميجاواط في مصر، و300 ميجاواط في الأردن.

Name: Supercritical
Description: The world's first high pressure, ultra-efficient electrolyser for the lowest cost of pressurised green hydrogen.

Name: Baltic Towers
Description:
Wind energy is the future and hope of the upcoming generations, as well as a long-term and secure investment. Offshore wind energy is currently one of the fastest-growing branches of the energy industry in Europe, especially in Poland. The Polish wind energy sector is actively working to transform the energy landscape in which we live. 

Our company, Baltic Towers, is guided by the need for change, modernization, and above all, active participation in this process with benefit for the growth of the Polish economy and local society. It is particularly important to us, that together with our esteemed partnership company from Spain, we can jointly, share knowledge and skills, to create a project that will change the Polish energy sector landscape. 

At Baltic Towers we envision a future where we can be proud of taking a part in clean energy generation and sharing it with the rest of the world. 

Baltic Towers was established in 2023 as a result of cooperation between the polish Industrial Development Agency and the Spanish company GRI Renewable Industries.

This joint project aims to build the largest and most advanced offshore wind towers factory in Europe. The investment is located on Ostrów Island in Gdańsk, in the very center of the Pomeranian Industrial Region, located near the Baltic Sea. The factory with access to the port will allow for the creation of a production hall where towers for wind turbines with a capacity of 15 MW and more will be manufactured.

The plant will have sufficient production capacity to produce over 150 towers per year. The investment will contribute to the creation of 500 new, specialized jobs, which will have a significant impact on the local community. 

Baltic Towers factory is an important and key element in strengthening the Polish supply chain for offshore wind energy.

 Our Competitive Edge

Name: Photon Energy
Description:
Photon Energy specialises in the design, supply, installation and maintenance of solar PV and battery storage systems.  Photon Energy is a successful award winning, accredited, renewable energy organisation. Established in 2006, we have become one of the UK’s leading independent installers of solar PV systems.

With our headquarters in Reading we have an office in Poole along with warehouses in Dartford and Huddersfield, we have a strong presence throughout the UK. 

Specialising in roof-mounted solar, we have installed 100 MW of roof-mounted PV on:

• Council offices, care homes, ambulance centres, A&E hospitals, fire stations and prisons 
• Airports (including working airside) 
• Residential property (new build and retrofit) 
• Schools, colleges and universities 
• Supermarkets, warehouses and distribution centres 
• Industrial premises such as food processing and waste recycling facilities 
• Agricultural buildings

Our services Photon Energy offer are energy storage, ground mounted solar, maintenance of Solar PV systems, and rehabilitation services. 

As a certified installer under the Microgeneration Certification Scheme, we are committed to delivering a high quality, value for money service to our clients. 

Some of our certifications include: Solar Trade Association, Construction Registered, MCS, NICEIC Approved Contractor, CHAS, SMAS, Living Wage Employer, BS EN ISO14001:2015, BS EN ISO90001, RISQS, RECC, Safe Contractor. 

Testament from our Clients: “It was a pleasure to work with Photon Energy, their project managers and site team were very professional throughout the design and installation process. We’re very happy with the quality of the end result and I wouldn’t hesitate to work with them again on future projects.”

Name: Nordex Electrolyzers
Description: Nordex Electrolyzers S.L. is a joint venture between two experienced partners. The Nordex Group, one of the world’s largest wind turbine manufacturers with over 35 years’ experience, and Sodena, a public company of the Government of Navarre, Spain, that has been investing in innovative projects for over 40 years, have joined forces to manufacture and supply alkaline electrolyzers. Our goal is to unlock the potential of remote sites with exceptional renewable energy capacity factors for the production of green hydrogen, a sustainable energy vector obtained from the electrolysis of water, using renewable energy, like wind. After production, green hydrogen can be stored and transported to be used to decarbonize hard-to-abate sectors, such as aviation, maritime or steel industries, driving the green energy transition forward. The demand for hydrogen is projected to experience a remarkable surge of approximately 700 per cent in the next three decades. Electrolyzers are crucial components for producing green hydrogen and to serve as a vital energy vector for storing electrical energy.

Name: EOLINK
Description:

Founded in 2015, the company has patented a unique solution based on a pyramidal configuration that will make floating wind energy more competitive. The pyramid better distributes the mechanical stresses and leads to a lighter solution compared to market standards. That means a lower carbon footprint and a cheaper solution.
Eolink is providing a unique floating wind turbine concept, set to unlock the full potential of offshore wind energy.

contact@eolink.fr

Name: Rongke Power
Description:
Rongke Power (RKP) is a global leader in vanadium flow batteries (VFBs) and a prominent provider of advanced energy storage solutions.

Founded in 2008 by a team of visionary scientists, RKP has reached significant milestones, secured over 500 patented technologies, and deployed more than 3.5 GWh of utility-scale batteries in strategic projects worldwide.

RKP’s batteries are recognized for their unmatched safety, with a water-based electrolyte that eliminates the risk of thermal runaway. Engineered for durability, RKP batteries are designed to maintain 100% capacity for over 25 years.

RKP’s innovative energy storage solutions are integral to critical applications such as grid services, renewable energy integration, microgrids, and electricity market arbitrage, enabling the transition to a sustainable, decarbonized energy future.

Description:
Endua is an Australian company developing advanced hydrogen electrolysis technologies. Endua’s solutions are engineered and built at our South East Queensland facility and enable the rapid deployment of safe hydrogen technologies.

Description:
Orient Solar, is a leading player in India’s solar energy sector, committed to delivering high-quality, reliable, and affordable solar energy solutions. With a mission to empower a sustainable future, Orient Solar aims to make clean energy accessible to diverse segments, from rural households to large industrial facilities, aligning with India’s clean energy goals, including initiatives like the PM Surya Ghar Yojana to electrify one million households.

Our 800 MW fully automated solar PV module manufacturing facility is located in Faridabad, Haryana and spans over 20 acres of Land Area. The facility is equipped with cutting-edge, hi-tech automated machinery and procures A1-quality Bill of Materials (BOM) from Tier-1 suppliers. We Are Further planning for backward integration, targeting 4.8 GW expansion (2.4 GW N-Type TOPCon modules and 2.4 GW cell manufacturing).

We have diverse portfolio of Mono PERC and N-Type TOPCon PV modules available in both bifacial and mono facial categor that are ideal choice for residential , utility-scale, commercial & industrial (C&I), floating solar, and agricultural projects.

Our 55+ stringent in-house quality checks and in-house laboratory for tests like Hi-Pot, Wet Leakage, Gel, Pull, Ground Bound, Impact, and Mechanical Load Tests ensures superior quality PV Modules. Orient solar is a brand of ADM Solar which is an ALMM-enlisted manufacturer with BIS and IEC certifications.

We are driven by innovation, quality, and a vision for a cleaner tomorrow, Orient Solar focuses on reducing dependence on non-renewable energy, lowering carbon emissions, and fostering economic prosperity through sustainable energy. The brand emphasizes trust, performance, and service excellence to create long-term value for stakeholders.

The company integrates R&D, production, sales, installation, operation and maintenance, and warehousing. The company has its own robot processing plant of 5,000 square meters, steel and wind power products processing plant of 5,025 square meters, office building of 6,000 square meters.
