Name: TVP SOLAR SA
Description:
TVP Solar is a Swiss company providing carbon-free solutions to one of the world’s most pressing energy challenges: decarbonization of large-scale heat consumption.

Our value proposition is based on 3 pillars:
 Save OPEX, on energy spend
 Cut CO2 emissions, supplying carbon-free heat
 Energy security, stabilizing the supply and cost volatility vs fuel for 25 years

Our Product:
MT-Power is our flagship product, the high-vacuum solar thermal flat plate with both Solar Keymark and SRCC certification on performance above 180°C. TVP also supplies ISO 9001 manufacturing and EPC processes and practices.

Our Activity:
 Design, development and manufacturing of our own high-vacuum solar thermal panels based on proprietary, patented technology
 Sale of turnkey solar thermal decarbonization plants either via capex or heat purchase agreements

Our History:
Established in 2008, TVP has received over CHF 100’000’000 investment to develop, engineer, patent, and certify our core high-vacuum insulation technology, our flagship MT-Power solar thermal panel and our first volume manufacturing plant, in addition to funding an international go-to-market strategy.
With an active sales team across France, Germany, Brazil, China, and Switzerland, TVP also owns an Italian subsidiary acting as OEM of our technology, as well as the EPC arm for self-developed projects. A separate subsidiary is dedicated to renewable heat infrastructure investments. 
Overall, TVP employs over 160 personnel worldwide.

Our Clients:
TVP has 10 years of experience in deploying turnkey solar thermal plants, with 21 references sold across 11 different countries, mainly serving industrial and district heat applications. 
 Multinationals: PepsiCo (BR) and Martini & Rossi (IT); Emmi (CH); Larnaudie (FR); Saudi Aramco (SA) and TotalEnergies (FR); and Agility Logistics (KW)
 District heat network operators: A2A (IT), CCIAG (FR), SIG (CH), Sondershausen Stadtwerke (DE), and Warmtestad (NL)

Name: Optimum Tracker
Description:
Experts in the optimization of utility-scale solar power plants

Since 2009, Optimum Tracker excels as a visionary, forward-thinking company in the field of solar tracking technologies. Truly engaged in the renewable energy transition, we specialize in the conception, manufacturing, maintenance and supply of patented solar tracking systems for ground-mounted utility-scale solar power-plants. Providing innovative products, services covering all client needs, competitive prices and engineering expertise, we endeavor to make solar electricity always more affordable through cost reduction and substantial yield improvement of the solar PV and CPV plants.

The company currently has 2 ranges of easy-to-install, reliable and performance-driven products:

• The single-axis horizontal trackers for the classic module technology
• The agrivoltaism system for plant cultivating beneath the trackers

All our patented solar trackers benefit from various algorithms and innovations:

Opti-SkyControl : a real-time optimization of the tracking following the sky’s brightness variations
Opti-Access: Easy circulation in the solar fields
Opti-Monitoring : remote control of plant’s data from any connected device in real time.

Name: Jolt Activated Electrodes
Description:
No Electrodes - No Electrolysis !  No Green Electrodes - No Green Chemicals !

At Jolt, we understand that companies using catalytic coated electrodes (manufacturers & users of electrolysis systems across multiple sectors) need to gain a competitive edge in order to scale quickly. The stable & fast supply of low cost, greener, more efficient electrodes can give them this edge. Our SPARKFUZE process introduces a 21st century standard for catalytic coatings, unlocking a number of important sectors, especially green hydrogen, & decarbonizing industry.  Jolt electrodes are easy to integrate in existing industrial designs, yet Jolt´s patented SPARKFUZE process is transformative in terms of scaling, cost effectiveness, durability and energy efficiency. Catalysis is the invisible core at the heart of much of the energy and industry sectors - yet it remains a last century technology. We believe that by focusing on this overlooked fundamental “core”, we can generate transformative economic, social and climate impact. Jolt Solutions is the largest spinoff of ICIQ, a prestigious global research institute ranked amongst the world’s top five, and one of the few focused on catalysis, electrolysis and Solar to X. Our pioneering PhD team of chemists, material scientists and physicists are supported by leading Climate funds and public bodies. Our process is moving from lab to fab at speed – in the emerging hydrogen sector we have scaled from TLR 3 to TLR9 in only 2 years, with our first clean 4 GW factory already operating and supplying customers since June 2024.  We are now pushing fast into the traditional electrolysis sectors:  electrochlorination (swimming pools, marine, chlorine & hypochlorite production from seawater/brine), water treatment (drinking water & wastewater), HOCl generation, chloralkali, cathodic protection, electrowinning & electroplating.

Name: EVO Power Pty Ltd
Description:
EVO Power is an Australian leader in advanced Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS), delivering turnkey solutions for commercial, industrial, and utility-scale applications.
We design, engineer, and manufacture our systems locally to meet the demands of Australian conditions — backed by genuine local support and a team committed to accelerating the clean energy transition. Power Your Way reflects our commitment to giving customers control, flexibility, and confidence in their energy future.
Our portfolio includes:
 FLEX Series — AC-coupled C&I BESS from 100 kW / 205 kWh to 1 MW / 2 MWh, featuring LFP liquid-cooled batteries, integrated fire suppression, UL 9540A testing, NFPA 855 compliance, and seamless VPP integration via the EVO API.
 AMP Series — Utility-scale, grid-connected BESS designed for large-format energy storage, supporting FCAS, energy arbitrage, and renewable integration.
 CONNECT — A DC-coupled configuration platform for utility PV plants, enabling scalable, high-efficiency storage across multi-container systems.
From early feasibility and engineering through to installation, commissioning, and lifecycle maintenance, EVO Power provides end-to-end BESS expertise. We also offer comprehensive technical training, energy market integration support, grid-connection guidance, and ongoing customer success services.
With each project — from commercial energy optimisation to Australia’s first Very Fast FCAS — we’re helping build a safer, smarter, and more resilient energy future.
EVO Power — Power Your Way.

Name: CEGASA Energía, S.L.U
Description:
CEGASA Energía, founded in 1934, is the European leader in designing and manufacturing energy storage solutions.
As a company, we combine our 90 years of experience in the market with an innovative spirit that leads us to reinvent ourselves to respond to the new energy challenges of the future.
We are leaders in the design and manufacture of lithium batteries in Europe. We offer highly scalable, modular energy storage solutions based on lithium-ion batteries with control and management electronics.
We are also market leaders for zinc-air batteries worldwide, thanks to our energy solutions for low-intensity applications requiring a very long lifespan without maintenance or supervision.
We are committed to teamwork. That’s why we work with the main manufacturers of photovoltaic inverters, thus facilitating the deployment of our solutions.
At CEGASA Energía we are European, but we are present around the world.
We offer a high-quality service to the markets we serve, in terms of time, price, and support before and after installation.
Our sales offices are located in Spain, Germany, Australia, and the US, and we have a wide distributor network spread across Europe, Australia, and the US.
In addition, we promote energy transition by reconciling economic performance with social responsibility. We bring our clean energy solutions to developing regions
because we believe that transformation must be universal and want to participate in the change actively.
Click here ( https://www.cegasa.com/en/success-stories) to learn more about some of the projects we have led in recent years in Germany, Ghana, Bolivia, Slovakia, Burundi, and many more. 
You can trust CEGASA Energy. Energy you can trust.

Name: Morrow Energy
Description:
Morrow Energy is the backbone of American RNG. With more than 50 renewable natural gas projects representing over 200,000 SCFM of treating capacity, we deliver clean energy solutions engineered to perform.

From our 90,000 sq. ft. fabrication shop and 150,000 sq. ft. assembly yard in Midland, Texas, we design and build gas treating facilities to the same exacting standards demanded by our own operations teams. The six facilities we own and operate consistently achieve 97% uptime, proof that our technology isn’t just built to last, it’s built to run.

Since 1987, our founder has sold and operated hundreds of gas treating and processing plants across the United States and abroad. In 2000, Morrow Energy built its first renewable facility and has since delivered more than fifteen others. With more than 20 years of experience in LFG gathering, compression, treating, and marketing, along with expertise in NSPS compliance, Morrow is one of the most active and successful RNG developers in the industry.

Our fully integrated approach, covering engineering, fabrication, construction, and operations, gives partners a single proven source for reliable RNG plants. American-made manufacturing, unmatched runtime, and decades of experience set us apart as the most trusted name in renewable gas treating.

Built in America. Trusted Everywhere.

Name: ATAL SOLAR PVT LTD
Description:
Atal Solar Pvt. Ltd. | Powering India’s Renewable Future.

Atal Solar Pvt. Ltd. is a forward-thinking solar technology company based in Rajkot, Gujarat, committed to accelerating India's clean energy transition. With an investment of ₹125 crore, Atal Solar is establishing a state-of-the-art 1 GW fully-automated TOPCon solar module manufacturing facility, scheduled to begin operations in December 2025.

Our factory is designed with the latest automation, robotics, IoT-based monitoring, and MES systems, ensuring world-class quality, efficiency, and scalability. Strategically aligned with India’s renewable energy mission, our plant is also future-ready for HJT and back-contact technologies.

We aim to be a key contributor to the “Make in India” and “Atmanirbhar Bharat” initiatives, focusing on high-efficiency, reliable, and sustainable solar modules for both domestic and international markets.

 Key Highlights:

 Based in Rajkot, Gujarat, India
 1 GW fully-automated TOPCon module line
 Upgrade-ready for HJT & Back Contact technologies
 Equipped with robotics, AI-based inspection, and MES
 Supporting India’s goal of 500 GW non-fossil capacity by 2030
 Focused on quality, sustainability, and innovation


 Our Vision : 
To lead India's solar manufacturing ecosystem with technology, transparency, and trust — making clean energy affordable and accessible for all.

Name: Biogasclean A/S
Description:

Name: Ankur Scientific Energy Technologies Pvt Ltd
Description:
Ankur Scientific Energy Technologies Pvt. Ltd., a globally renowned organization, stands at the forefront of innovation in renewable energy and sustainable development. Founded in 1986 by Dr. B.C. Jain, Ankur Scientific has emerged as a leader in designing, manufacturing, and delivering advanced gasification technologies. The company’s unwavering commitment to sustainability and environmental stewardship has made it a trusted name across continents.

The company has extensive design, development, project management and manufacturing facilities. Its team of more than 250+ people who are committed to bringing the best technologies to the market at a viable cost.

Ankur has patents for various technical features in its systems and it has also won numerous awards from various central and state Governments, trade bodies etc. for its technology as well business vision and execution.

The company has a Government of India, DSIR approved lab and the company is now ISO 9001, 14001 and OHSAS 18001 certified. Its products are CE Certified.

We have accomplished over 1000 projects. Our products are marketed in more than 35 countries the world over. The indigenously developed technology has been sold not only to developing country markets but also to developed country markets.

The mission of Ankur Scientific is to provide cutting-edge solutions for renewable energy generation while contributing to a greener, more sustainable future. The company specializes in biomass gasifiers and waste-to-energy technologies that offer environmentally friendly alternatives to fossil fuels. By harnessing the power of biomass, agricultural residues, municipal solid waste, fecal sludge and industrial by-products, Ankur Scientific aims to revolutionize energy generation for diverse industries and communities worldwide.

Name: Huawei Digital Power Italia
Description:

Huawei Digital Power serve più di tre miliardi di persone in oltre 170 Paesi e regioni. Attualmente gestisce 12 centri di ricerca e sviluppo in Cina, Europa e Asia Pacifico e possiede un totale di 2.122 brevetti validi in tutto il mondo.

Huawei Digital Power è impegnata nell'integrazione delle tecnologie digitali e dell'elettronica di potenza, nello sviluppo di energia pulita e nella digitalizzazione dell'energia per guidare la rivoluzione energetica per un futuro migliore e più verde. Nel settore della generazione di energia pulita, contribuiamo a creare nuovi sistemi energetici basati principalmente sulle energie rinnovabili. Nel settore dell'elettrificazione della mobilità, miglioriamo l'esperienza di guida e di ricarica dei veicoli elettrici (EV). Nel settore delle infrastrutture energetiche per l'ICT, contribuiamo a costruire data center e reti di comunicazione verdi, a basse emissioni di carbonio e intelligenti. Name: Powervault
Description:
At Powervault, we are on a mission to pioneer a sustainable energy future. We provide the most intelligent, economic and sustainable energy storage systems for homes and businesses. Our products store solar energy and affordable electricity from the grid, helping save you money while you help protect the environment. We design and manufacture Powervault here in the UK.

In its initial market application the product stores ‘free’ electricity generated by solar panels during the day, then releases the stored energy during the evening when household demand peaks, delivering a 50% reduction on electricity bills. The initial addressable UK market of 1m solar PV owners is about to expand rapidly as regulation drives the roll out of smart meters enabling ‘smart tariffs’. This will allow any of the 26m UK homes to benefit from storing electricity when it is cheap to use at expensive ‘peak’ times.

Name: Nadji.Bi Group
Description:
Nadji.Bi Senegal, at the forefront of agricultural innovation, harnesses technology and solar energy to empower farmers and promote sustainable practices.  Join us in this venture to cultivate a future where smart agriculture meets environmental preservation. Our commitment is rooted in integrating advanced technological solutions to optimize agricultural processes in West African farms.

Through solar energy, electronics, and the power of digital, we enhance agricultural yields and foster sustainable resource management. With Nadji.Bi Senegal, we redefine the agricultural landscape by promoting the adoption of intelligent tools and environmentally friendly practices while increasing productivity.

We firmly believe that technology can positively transform agriculture and, by extension, the lives of farming communities. From collecting agricultural data to implementing intelligent irrigation solutions, we integrate cutting-edge technologies to overcome challenges faced by farmers in an ever-evolving world.

We encourage the exchange of knowledge and best practices, and our commitment to sustainability goes beyond technological innovation. We strive to be a positive catalyst for our ecosystem; hence, we have launched QualiSolaire Senegal, a training and incubation center in solar energy, a true driver of excellence, of entrepreneurship, and of local employment creation.

Join Nadji.Bi Senegal in this exciting adventure towards intelligent, sustainable, and inclusive solar agriculture. Together, let's cultivate a future where technology and agriculture converge to positively transform our world.  

#SmartFarming #Sustainability #SolarEnergy #NadjiBiSenegal

Name: Est Industries
Description:
Fondée en 1986, Est Industries est un acteur industriel reconnu dans la conception, la fabrication, l’installation et la maintenance de chaudières industrielles et systèmes thermiques sur mesure, destinés notamment aux secteurs de la valorisation énergétique des déchets, de la production de chaleur, et des procédés industriels.

L’entreprise est dotée d’un site industriel en France à Sarralbe (57) de 14 600 m² couverts sur 90 000 m² de terrain, comprenant ateliers de chaudronnerie, de montage et de contrôle, ainsi qu’un bureau d’études intégré pour la conception d’équipements sous pression, de charpentes, de gaines et de tuyauteries.

Est Industries emploie plus de 190 salariés sous contrat direct, auxquels s’ajoutent environ 80 à 100 collaborateurs extérieurs, mobilisées sur les chantiers et en ateliers.
L’entreprise dispose de quatre certifications majeures attestant de son haut niveau de qualité et de sécurité : ISO9001, ISO45001, ISO3834-2 et H1-DESP.

Est Industries intervient en France et en Europe, notamment dans la rénovation ou la construction d’installations de valorisation énergétique.
Est Industries est ainsi un acteur industriel intégré maîtrisant l’ensemble de la chaîne de valeur, du design à la mise en service des chaudières industrielles, et s’appuyant sur une expertise de plus de 35 ans.

Son ancrage territorial avec 3 agences, sa capacité de production, son expérience de la maintenance lourde et son partenariat étroit avec KANADEVIA INVOVA AG font d’Est Industries un partenaire idéal pour vos projets.

Name: RECHARGE – European Association of the Advanced Rechargeable & Lithium Batteries Value Chain
Description:
RECHARGE is a non-profit association representing the multifold interests of the advanced rechargeable and lithium battery industry in Europe.

Founded in 1998, it is our mission to promote advanced rechargeable batteries as a technology that will contribute to a more sustainable society, a resource and energy efficient policy and to the achievement of a green circular economy.

RECHARGE’s unique membership covers all aspects of the advanced rechargeable batteries value chain in Europe: from suppliers of primary and secondary raw materials to the battery industry, rechargeable battery manufactures, to original equipment manufacturers (OEMs), logistic partners and battery recyclers.

Rechargeable battery manufacturers for sustainable products
Original equipment manufacturers for electrical energy usage
Battery recyclers supporting the European Resource Efficiency policy
Active materials manufacturers involved in the EU’s Raw Materials Initiative

An expert partner for all technical and legislative topics pertaining to advanced rechargeable and lithium batteries, RECHARGE works closely with other battery associations as well as related laboratories and institutes in Europe and at international scale.

Name: ATAG Verwarming

Innovatie aan de basis

Al ruim 75 jaar worden in het Gelderse Lichtenvoorde prijswinnende verwarmingsproducten gemaakt. Gedegen vakmanschap en Achterhoekse nuchterheid staan hierbij centraal. We zijn trots op onze 200 medewerkers. Medewerkers met een grote passie voor comfort, warmtetechniek en duurzame producten.
Naast ons specialisme, Hoog Rendementstechniek voor CV-ketels, ligt onze focus steeds meer op duurzaamheid en het verminderen van de wereldwijde CO2-uitstoot. Hierbij hebben wij één doel: het bieden van nieuwe en vernieuwende warmteoplossingen, die een duurzame bijdrage leveren aan milieu en samenleving.
ATAG is onderdeel van de Ariston Group. Ariston is een wereldspeler op gebied van verwarming en warmwaterbereiding. In 2022 werd een omzet behaald van € 3,1 miljard. Wereldwijd – in meer dan 150 landen – zijn 8,2 miljoen producten verkocht; Ariston heeft meer dan 10.000 medewerkers, kent vertegenwoordigingen in 43 landen, 28 productielocaties en 30 R&D vestigingen in 5 continenten. Sinds november 2021 is de Ariston Group een beursgenoteerd bedrijf aan de Euronext in Milaan.
De Ariston Group onderschiedt zich door voortdurende investeringen in technologische innovatie, digitalisering en geavanceerde connectiviteitssystemen. Het complete productaanbod wordt aangeboden onder de wereldwijde merknamen Ariston, ELCO en Wolf. Daarnaast voert het ook de iconische merknamen zoals Calorex, NTI, http, Chaffoteaux, ATAG, Brink, Chromagen, Racold, Thermowatt en Ecoflam.

Description:

By 2050, CO2 emissions from air conditioning power use will reach nearly 10% of the global output - more than the entire aviation industry or passenger vehicles.

We're starting with breakthrough HVAC retrofit devices that bring unmatched efficiency and energy savings to existing air conditioning units (RTU, DOAS). By removing moisture from outside air before entering the main system, our devices can supply outside air more cost effectively than any other solution. With many incentives and tax credits available, the Helix products may cost $0 out-of-pocket making our devices an easy and obvious addition to rooftop HVAC systems.

Overview

Hydrogenera is a hydrogen technology company committed to producing, storing, and distributing hydrogen from renewable energy sources. 

Our journey began in 2016 in a neighbourhood of Sofia, Bulgaria, where our founders, two maverick engineers, dared to challenge convention and explore innovation in hydrogen energy. 

Steadfastly, we embrace this journey fueled by our commitment to complete the task, no matter the challenges. We’ve completed 82+ meticulously crafted hydrogen projects—each a testament to our contribution to pioneering change in Europe's energy landscape.

Our ethos revolves around pushing boundaries, constantly seeking improvement, and nurturing growth. We thrive on the humility of childlike curiosity, and every step is infused with the spirit of challenging norms and exceeding expectations. 

Mission

At Hydrogenera, we aim to harness the transformative power of hydrogen technology to drive a global wave of change. We are pushing the boundaries, rewriting the rules, and redefining what's possible in sustainable energy. With a relentless pursuit of innovation, we aim to create a more optimistic future by delivering cutting-edge solutions that empower industries, communities, and individuals to embrace a more energy-efficient tomorrow.


Impact and Recognition

Hydrogenera has authored eleven projects for green energy, each listed and prioritised on the European hydrogen map.
 As a member of the Hydrogen Global Initiative, we collaborate with global partners to accelerate the adoption of hydrogen solutions.


Contact

Name: Create Energy
Description:
Create is redefining the future of energy with bold, innovative solutions that empower IPPs, developers, utilities, communities, and businesses to achieve true energy independence and resiliency. From advanced solar and battery storage to cutting-edge EV charging systems, Create delivers high-performance technology designed to disrupt the status quo and accelerate the energy transition.

At the heart of this approach is OnTrack—a complete, one-stop-shop solution that allows customers to purchase everything they need directly from Create. By streamlining design, procurement, and installation, OnTrack eliminates unnecessary complexity and delivers a fully integrated path from panel to power. With OnTrack, customers gain simplicity, reliability, and cost savings in a single package—backed by Create’s engineering expertise and long-term support.

Headquartered in Portland, TN, and founded by visionary CEO and President Dean Solon, Create combines technical excellence with a fearless approach to problem-solving—pushing past conventional limits to design systems that are simpler, safer, and more resilient. Every solution is built with the customer in mind: easy to deploy, dependable in performance, and crafted to unlock lasting value.

At Create, we believe energy should be abundant, affordable, and sustainable for all. Our mission is clear: to create a world powered by possibility.

Name: IFBOT Technology
Description:
IFBOT Technology was founded in 2018 with a mission to liberate humans from repetitive and dangerous work. Although IFBOT X3 is our flagship product, it wasn’t the product we initially started with. Three years before the formation of IFBOT, we aimed to create a window cleaning robot that is equipped with a drone and is able to autonomously fly to and clean  windows. In such way, no human will need to hang themselves hundred meters above the ground with little protection to clean windows, reducing the risk of fatalities due to falls.  

Our unique experience has shaped the unique design of IFBOT. It is exceptionally lightweight - 80% lighter than its closest competitor - and fully intelligent, guided by an embedded AI algorithm without the need for pre-installed rails or remote control devices. This unique design not only gives it superior adaptability to various scenarios, but also offers users a hands-free experience with high affordability. Furthermore, the design serves as a continuation of our initial vision: a robot light enough to integrate with a drone, ultimately achieving a fully autonomous solution.

Name: Amp Nova New Energy Co.,Ltd
Description:
Welcome to the LinkedIn page of Amp Nova, where we specialize in cutting-edge energy storage solutions for sustainable power sources. Our company is dedicated to providing reliable and efficient products that empower you to embrace renewable energy and reduce your environmental impact. Here's a concise overview of our product offerings, including low-voltage batteries, high-voltage batteries, and inverters:

Low-voltage batteries: Our advanced low-voltage battery solutions are specifically designed to store and deliver energy efficiently. With high-capacity and long-lasting performance, these batteries enable seamless integration with solar power systems, allowing you to maximize your energy utilization and minimize grid dependency.

High-voltage batteries: Amp Nova proudly offers high-voltage batteries that redefine energy storage capabilities. These cutting-edge batteries are engineered to store massive amounts of electricity efficiently, providing you with a reliable and scalable solution for larger-scale renewable energy projects. Our high-voltage batteries ensure optimal power management and enable smooth energy distribution when and where you need it most.

Inverters: As part of our comprehensive energy storage solutions, we provide state-of-the-art inverters. Our inverters seamlessly convert DC power from solar panels or batteries into AC power for use in your homes, businesses, or off-grid applications. With advanced features and intelligent monitoring, our inverters guarantee efficient energy conversion and help you optimize your overall power consumption.

By choosing Amp Nova's innovative energy storage solutions, you can unlock the full potential of renewable energy sources, reduce your reliance on traditional power grids, and contribute to a greener and more sustainable future. Connect with us to explore how our products can revolutionize your energy needs.

At Wic-power, we are passionate about making a difference in the world through sustainable energy solutions. Join us in our mission to build a cleaner, greener future, and let's work together to create a brighter tomorrow for generations to come.

Our attractive prismatic shaped solar collectors are European certified and Made in Britain. SolarisKit solar collectors can be used from heating water for showering, bathing, clothes laundering, to heating hot tubs and swimming pools.

Name: Caldera
Description:
Caldera is here to make zero-carbon heat the norm. We’re a pioneering start-up developing technologies that pave the way for a faster & smoother energy transition.

Our systems turn sunshine and wind into heat on demand. They achieve best-in-class efficiency and are cheaper than battery storage. Consequently, they make it feasible to rely entirely on renewable energy to provide 24/7 clean heat. In addition, they improve safety and cut maintenance costs – eliminating emissions for good.

We’re a small, highly experienced team adept at developing new products – and the manufacturing processes to build them at scale. With a diverse set of skills, interests, and backgrounds, we’re connected by our passion to find viable climate solutions.

We’re always on the lookout for new partnerships to promote the widespread adoption of our technologies for global impact. So, if you’re a prospective industrial customer with potential use cases for our product – we want to hear from you. Get in touch to have a conversation to help shape the development of our products to fit your needs. And discover how we can work together to achieve your decarbonisation goals.

Name: Oscilla Power, Inc.
Description:
Oscilla Power, Inc. (OPI) is developing advanced technology to harness electricity from ocean waves. Oscilla Power is a privately held company based in Seattle, WA.

The Oscilla Power Triton Wave Energy Converter (WEC) enables low cost, survivable and high reliability conversion of ocean waves into grid-scale, utility-grade power. The Triton architecture is a two-body point absorber with a surface floating hull and a submerged reaction structure. Waves acting on the surface impart relative motion which can be extracted through a proprietary hybrid hydraulic-electric drivetrain.

Oscilla's technology has been validated externally through a number of independent sources including the US department of energy (Wave Energy Prize) and the European Marine Energy Center (EMEC). This validation is emphasized by the fact that Oscilla Power has received more than $20M in competitive grant funding to progress the technology development, supported by private equity and matching funds from the state of Washington.

Name: ProofX MMS Module Mounting Systems and Roof Anchor Technologies
Description:
Provides innovative membrane roofing solutions, solar module mounting systems, carports and waterproof fastener technologies.

Establishment in 2020, 50+ employees, 6M EUR Revenue, over 200 MWp installations.

HQ in Turkey, expanding business into Germany, Romania, Bulgaria and UAE.

Manufacturing in Turkey.

Complimentary static engineering and reporting thanks to strong design team continues to do research studies in universities.

Name: CENTROTEC SE
Description: CENTROTEC SE is a listed company active in more than 50 countries specialized in energy-efficient building technology. With our well-engineered products and integrated system solutions in the areas of air conditioning, heating and ventilation, we help to save energy and increase living comfort. We are one of the leading suppliers in this field and offer all technologies and system solutions relevant to the global CO2-discussion for modern building energy saving technology. CENTROTEC SE - with about 3000 employees who work together daily for the success of the company. Our goal is to find efficient and customized solutions for our customers worldwide. Our first and foremost focus is the sustainability of our products, both economically, ecologically and socially. To achieve this, we need employees who are committed to our corporate goals with their expertise and full commitment, and who develop innovative solutions. In return, we offer you a dynamic work environment with diverse development

Name: Angile Energy
Description:
At Angile Energy, we are at the forefront of innovative 3S (PCS, EMS, BMS) and VPP technologies. Our core offerings include residential all-in-one energy storage systems, commercial and industrial (C&I) energy storage solutions, utility-scale energy storage containers, electric vehicle charging stations, and intelligent energy management systems. 

Our commitment to quality and reliability is demonstrated through a range of certifications from TÜV Rheinland, CE, VDE, UN38.3, MSDS, RoHS, REACH, and other industry-recognized standards. These credentials demonstrate our commitment to providing top-quality, compliant energy solutions that meet the highest safety and performance standards.

Name: Constructions Métalliques et Electriques
Description:
CME est une entreprise spécialisée dans la construction métallique et l’électricité générale et photovoltaïque.

CME conseille, conçoit, installe et assure la maintenance des centrales photovoltaïques en injection, autoconsommation ou mixte.

Name: Arkeale
Description:
BioCapsule is a hyperlocal energy conversion solution of urban food waste (biowaste) into renewable gas and organic fertiliser.

Biomimicking ruminant digestion process, Arkeale has developed a new biological reactor technology specially designed to ease urban integration and with cost effective operation.

Name: POwR Group
Description:
Une organisation qui s’emploie à accélérer la transition énergétique.

POwR Group est l’une des principales entités dans la distribution et la chaîne d’approvisionnement industrielle des matériaux pour l’énergie solaire.

Nous sommes spécialisés dans les secteurs commercial et industriel (C&I), ainsi que sur le segment du marché résidentiel avec une présence significative en France et en Belgique.

Aujourd'hui, POwR Group est composé de 5 filiales en France et en Belgique:
POwR Connect, Eklor, Enr'deal, Domos et Powerdeal.

Name: Solarise Semicon Energy
Description:
Solarise Semicon Energy earlier known as Chartered Engineers is one of the fastest growing Start-up in the energy sector with a growth of
around 5 times in its gross turnover as compared to the previous year. In a short span of 1.5 years, we
have designed, installed and commissioned more than 1MWp Off-Grid Rooftop Solar PV Projects in
far off unelectrified villages across 3 states.
Through continuous R&D and innovation we have developed Solar Illumination systems which have
been installed in around 100 villages impacting more than 100,000 individuals and 100 small
enterprises.

Name: DMEGC Solar LATAM
Description:
A DMEGC Solar é um dos maiores fabricantes de células solares monocristalinas de alta eficiência e módulos solares na China. Somos o fornecedor de células de escolha para vários fabricantes conhecidos de módulos solares desde 2009. Nossos módulos padrão e de alta eficiência estão entre os mais poderosos e econômicos na indústria de energia fotovoltaica e são amplamente utilizados em geração de energia residencial, comercial e em grande escala em todo o mundo. Isso é resultado direto da confiabilidade de nossos produtos, que tem sido nossa missão desde o início e ainda impulsiona nossos mercados globais hoje.

Como uma empresa solar "pura", impulsionada pela alta qualidade e desempenho do produto, buscamos ajudar nossos clientes a fazer a diferença e agregar valor aos seus objetivos de energia renovável. Não cortamos custos, e por isso atraímos o segmento de mercado com padrões e critérios semelhantes, o que forma a base para relacionamentos de longo prazo e garantias correspondentes. Mantenha-se envolvido e conectado conosco por meio de várias plataformas para conhecer os últimos desenvolvimentos e melhorias na indústria de energia solar.

A DMEGC Solar faz parte da Hengdian Group DMEGC Magnetics Co., Ltd.

Name: Safelink
Description:
Safelink is a Norwegian engineering company that supplies hardware, software and engineering solutions for offshore lifting operations. Our main products are heave compensators and shock absorbers for sale and rental. Our solutions improve operational safety and reduce weather dependency and downtime caused by unpredictable weather conditions and wave actions. 

Our self-contained, hook-based active heave compensator (AHC) and passive heave compensator (PHC) solutions are applicable to all marine lifting operations – from oil & gas, offshore wind, to salvage operations.

Our team has more than 20 years of experience in the design, manufacturing, testing and analysis of heave compensation solutions.

Name: Energetic
Description:
Energetic is a leading Egyptian renewable energy start-up founded by young innovators.Energetic aims to address Egypt's pollution and energy issues by developing innovative renewable energy solutions, including solar and wind energy, as well as green hydrogen production.
Energetic focuses on creating integrated hybrid systems that combine various renewable energy sources to maximize efficiency and minimize environmental impact. The company's primary goal is to provide sustainable, cost-effective, and reliable energy solutions for homes, farms, highways, hotels, and electric vehicles. Energetic also emphasizes the importance of developing complementary technologies such as battery storage and advanced monitoring systems.
With a commitment to sustainability and innovation, Energetic is dedicated to reducing carbon footprints, supporting the adoption of electric vehicles, and contributing to the overall energy independence of Egypt.

إينرجيتيك هي شركة مصرية رائدة في مجال الطاقة المتجددة، تأسست بواسطة مجموعة من الشباب المبتكرين. تهدف إينرجيتيك إلى معالجة قضايا التلوث والطاقة في مصر من خلال تطوير حلول مبتكرة للطاقة المتجددة، بما في ذلك الطاقة الشمسية وطاقة الرياح، بالإضافة إلى إنتاج الهيدروجين الأخضر.

تركز إينرجيتيك على إنشاء أنظمة هجينة متكاملة تجمع بين مختلف مصادر الطاقة المتجددة لتحقيق أقصى قدر من الكفاءة وتقليل الأثر البيئي. الهدف الرئيسي للشركة هو توفير حلول طاقة مستدامة وفعالة من حيث التكلفة وموثوقة للمنازل والمزارع والطرق السريعة والفنادق والمركبات الكهربائية. كما تركز إينرجيتيك على تطوير تقنيات مكملة مثل تخزين البطاريات وأنظمة المراقبة المتقدمة.

من خلال التزامها بالاستدامة والابتكار، تسعى إينرجيتيك إلى تقليل البصمة الكربونية، ودعم اعتماد المركبات الكهربائية، والمساهمة في استقلالية الطاقة في مصر.

Name: Fox ESS France
Description: Fox ESS est le leader mondial dans le domaine du développement d’onduleurs et de solutions de stockage d’énergie. Nos produits sont conçus par nos experts reconnus dans le domaine des onduleurs et des batteries. Ils allient innovation, performances exceptionnelles et fiabilité inégalée pour offrir à nos clients les fonctionnalités les plus avancées possibles.

Name: EDEN, Ecosystème Durable & Energies Naturelles
Description: L’ambition d’œuvrer au développement de nouvelles filières industrielles pour la transition énergétique

Name: RYCTEL
Description: Somos una Empresa dedicada a fabricar productos para el sector eléctrico y de telecomunicaciones. Nos enfocamos en dar soluciones a nuestros clientes para sus proyectos. Contamos con la experiencia, la tecnología, el capital humano, una constante innovación y crecimiento continuo basados en la calidad, capacidad técnica y de gestión que garantiza el éxito en nuestros proyectos.

Name: Chomp
Description:
Chomp turns would-be food waste into valuable resources. Uneaten food goes into a self-contained vessel called an anaerobic digester. Fuel and biofertilizer come out—and nothing gets wasted in the process. At a local level, we help communities generate their own energy and be better environmental stewards. At a global level, we’re leading the way to a sustainable future. Chomp is bringing balance back to earth, powered by food.

To learn more about how we can help you meet your ESG goals, visit https://www.chomp.energy.

Name: Labkarts India Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Labkarts India Pvt. Ltd. is a leading indigenous provider of turnkey solutions and consultation services for the battery manufacturing industry.

We specialize in designing, supplying, and commissioning complete lithium-ion cell and battery pack manufacturing lines, offering both equipment solutions and strategic consultation to help organizations set up and scale their manufacturing plants efficiently.

With a strong foundation in engineering, automation, and process integration, Labkarts supports every stage of the value chain from lab-scale R&D setups to full-scale Gigafactory deployment.

Name: Hgen
Description: Clean hydrogen for heavy industry

Name: UFI HYDROGEN
Description:
UFI HYDROGEN is the Italian company, within UFI Filters Group, fully focused on the Hydrogen business value chain. Since 2017 UFI Filters Group started R&D activities using Hydrogen technologies, which resulted with the foundation in 2023 of the NewCo dedicated to the research and development, implementation and industrialization of MEAs – Membranes Electrode Assembly – for PEM – Proton Exchange Membranes – Water Electrolysis, suitable for the green hydrogen production, as well as for PEM Fuel Cells, for green hydrogen utilization in the zero-emission mobility and also for Electrochemical Compressors applications. UFI HYDROGEN’s R&D based in the north of Italy has the purpose to be the first Italian research centre and producer of green hydrogen technologies taking an active part in the decarbonization process to net-zero.  
UFI HYDROGEN has developed a wide international network with the most relevant R&D Hydrogen centres, Universities, innovative Startups, research Labs, and PHDs at a global level that has enabled the R&D of the company to achieve a very innovative and competitive MEA solution that ensure the highest market KPIs parameters, competitivity and durability.
UFI HYDROGEN counts on the active support of Provincia Autonoma di Trento and FBK (Fondazione Bruno Kessler) for innovation projects on MEA for water electrolysers and Provincia Autonoma di Trento for the development of the new production site in the North of Italy. UFI HYDROGEN counts on 4 million euros investments for MEAs water electrolysers from Provincia di Trento and 26,5 million euros for MEAs fuel cells from IPCEI Hy2Move Wave. Indeed, the NewCo plays an important role in the IPCEI (Important Project of Common European Interest) Hydrogen Program in the Hy2Move Wave, with the Project Roll-to-Roll Production of innovative MEA, along with other important European partners.

Name: eLuminaGlobal
Description:
Welcome to eLumina, an Australian company with a global presence. 

At eLumina, we're committed to continuous innovation in cutting-edge technology, precisely tailored to meet the demands of the Australian market. Our solutions eliminate the need for expanded power capacity, significantly reducing installation barriers.

We insist on maintaining our unwavering commitment to technology through in-house research. Since day one, our innovative technology has positioned us at the forefront of the Australian market, offering exceptional build quality for outdoor tough environments.

At eLumina, we go beyond offering devices. We ensure worry-free experiences for our clients by transforming turnkey solutions into seamless outcomes. Our proficiency in deep manufacturing and supply chain management enables the rapid delivery of intricate projects.

What sets us apart is our collaborative approach with partners. Together, we energize the revolution. We take pride in fostering strong partnerships and delivering solutions that drive innovation and impact.

Name: IGLU TECH
Description: As heat pumps and EV charging station manufacturer, we design and produce high-quality devices that provide innovative comfort for residential, commercial and industrial settings.

Name: ProfEC Ventus GmbH
Description:
ProfEC Ventus is an internationally recognized, accredited (ISO 17025 as per ilac-MRA) Testing and Calibration Laboratory and measurement institute as per MEASNET, highly specialized in wind and solar energy solutions as well as meteorological measurements. We offer a comprehensive suite of services tailored towards end-to-end project planning in the wind energy sector. From meticulous wind resource assessments and energy yield prognoses to cutting-edge power curve measurements and performance verification, our global expertise spans across site selection, measurement system calibration, data evaluation & validation, wind project design optimisations and due diligences. 

Together we are dedicated to developing real-time critical data analytics that support project developers, OEMs, investors, banks, energy traders and providers and project operators in financing and constructing profitable successful wind farms and solar plants. To learn more about our products and services, please visit www.profec-ventus.com as well as shop.profec-ventus.com

Name: Gold In Sun
Description:
Founded in 2013 and based in Dubai, Gold In Sun Solutions is a leading solar energy company. They supply high-quality solar products to the Middle East and Africa, catering to residential and commercial needs. With a focus on sustainability, their reliable and innovative solutions empower customers with clean energy.
 Gold In Sun Solutions prioritizes quality and customer satisfaction, offering comprehensive support from consultation to installation. Through strategic partnerships and an expanding distribution network, they are driving the transition to a greener future in the region.

Name: SteelHy
Description:
ACS – SIGEDI est une chaudronnerie familiale iséroise. Sociétés du groupe Albatros (partenaire stratégique du nucléaire français), nous accompagnons nos clients depuis 23 ans tant dans la partie étude, R&D, fabrication (chaudronnerie, tuyauterie, appareils soumis à DESP, enceintes sous vide, SKID complets, tôlerie) et chantiers. que ce soit dans le domaine de nucléaire, l'hydroélectricité, l'hydrogène et bien d'autres comme le naval, la chimie, l’industrie... nous sommes à l'écoute de vos besoins.
Grâce à nos 5 000 m² d'ateliers, dont un atelier blanc dédié aux projets sensibles, nous vous garantissons des réalisations de haute qualité.

Nos maîtres mots :
réactivité et adaptabilité, afin de conseiller le plus justement possible nos clients exigeants et les accompagner dans la réalisation de leurs projets, en respectant leur cahier des charges et leurs impératifs de qualité et de délais.

Name: Wattnova Energy
Description:
Wattnova is a pioneering provider of Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS), dedicated to transforming the European energy landscape. With decades of combined experience in EV charging, solar energy (PV), energy distribution networks, and financing, we bring expertise and innovation to every project.

Collaborating with trusted partners and suppliers, we go beyond storage solutions—we deliver comprehensive energy ecosystems tailored to our clients’ needs. Whether optimizing grid stability, enabling renewable integration, or enhancing energy independence, Wattnova empowers businesses and communities with cutting-edge storage technology and strategic partnerships.

Join us in shaping a smarter, more sustainable energy future.

Name: InnoVent Renewables
Description:
Driving Renewable Energy Forward

InnoVent Renewables is a technology and operations company with a proprietary continuous pyrolysis technology that converts waste tires, plastics, and biomass into valuable fuels and chemicals.

With over 1 billion tires laying in landfills globally, InnoVent Renewables will convert this waste in high value products used in a range of industries including tire production, while leveraging a completely emissions-free process.

We have assembled a team of world class executives each with more than 25 years of energy and chemical industry experience, supported by a diverse team of senior advisors. We currently have operations in Houston, USA, Pune, India, and Monterrey, Mexico.

Each year more than 1 billion tires are disposed of that end up in landfills globally, and North America alone disposes of 100+ million tires annually.  At InnoVent Renewables, we will dramatically reduce waste tire landfills by converting them into high value industrial products.

Name: GreenWatts
Description:
GreenWatts is at the vanguard of solar energy innovation, operating from the United States with a robust manufacturing network spanning South America, Europe, and Asia. Our strategic global positioning allows us to leverage cross-continental expertise and advanced technological practices to deliver solar solutions that epitomize excellence in the renewable energy sector.

We are committed to advancing the accessibility and practicality of solar energy across a spectrum of applications, ensuring our portfolio of solar products meets the nuanced demands of residential, commercial, and utility projects. With a relentless focus on quality, reliability, and efficiency, our offerings are designed to not only align with but also elevate current industry standards.

Our corporate ethos is grounded in the pioneering spirit of American enterprise, enriched by the synergistic benefits of our international operations. Each solar module we craft is a testament to our unwavering dedication to craftsmanship and technological innovation, fulfilling our promise to exceed market expectations.

GreenWatts represents more than a solar entity; we are a strategic ally in the global transition towards sustainable energy practices. Our mission extends beyond mere product provision to encompass the facilitation of comprehensive solar adoption. We invite enterprises, institutions, and individuals alike to join us in this endeavor to actualize a more sustainable and cleaner energy landscape for future generation.

Name: EC POWER
Description:
For 25 years our XRGI small-scale Combined Heat and Power Plants (CHPs) have been developed and manufactured at our facility in the vicinity of Aarhus, Denmark’s second largest city. Today, 100 skilled and dedicated employees drive innovation, engineering and outstanding craftsmanship at EC POWER.

We think globally and act locally to meet the high requirements of today’s fast-changing energy market. Making us the leading manufacturer of residential and commercial combined heat and power plants all over Europe and North America.
 
Today’s demanding energy market forces us to rethink co-generation technology on a daily basis. For a good reason.
There is no Planet B. We want to be pioneers in supporting renewable energies, protecting the climate and contributing to energy efficiency. And we are. Last year we saved 25,100,000 kg CO2.
 
How? With our XRGI CHPs. Available with electrical outputs of 6, 9, 15 and 20 kW. Adding extra units, you can even go beyond 80 kW. 25 patents are building our strong foundation, giving you the benefits of high efficiency, long maintenance intervals, low noise levels, compactness, high partial load efficiency levels, ready-to-connect operating strategies and IT security.
 
Hydraulic solutions guarantee problem-free interaction between CHPs, heat pumps and boilers. Add-ons such as the Flow Master and its CHP runtime extension ability increases cost-effectiveness, environmental benefits and climate protection. Through Modbus and VPP gateway integrations, you can even operate our CHPs in virtual power plants.

Name: Paulmichl GmbH
Description:
For the construction and expansion of biogas plants, we are a reliable supplier of components and offer extensive agitator, pumping and final storage technology. Sight glasses as well as special separators in various designs for separating the individual liquid components complete this product range. The greatest possible factory prefabrication guarantees fast and absolutely reliable installation on site by our trained specialist fitters. The use of two company-owned crane vehicles as well as a 24-hour service hotline guarantees a high degree of operational safety for the operator even after many years of use of the respective machines.

In the field of liquid manure technology, we offer innovative agitating and pumping technology with unsurpassed performance and economy. Storage systems for different requirements with the corresponding technical equipment, as well as the adaptation to existing or newly built plants with our wide range of products also distinguish our company. In the construction of steel tanks, slurry slurry storage tanks, sewage sludge storage tanks, water storage tanks, fire-fighting ponds and sprinkling tanks, we offer our extensive technical know-how, based on our many years of experience, right from the start of the planning phase through to final commissioning. Specially developed technical equipment, matched to each individual plant, complements our storage systems. We attach great importance to cost design and user-friendliness.

You too can benefit from our 111 years of experience.

Name: Greenleaf Green Solutions
Description:
Greenleaf Green Solutions offers specialized energy transition and  energy efficiency engineering solutions to different industrial sectors. With the global focus shifting to sustainable and responsible development, Greenleaf recognizes the need for sustainability-centric energy projects and ventures and delivers unique strategies specifically designed to suit individual organizations technological, financial and in- house objective requirements. 

Conventional fossil fuels  are widely used in manufacturing industries. Conventional combustion using fossil fuels are highly inefficient and cause a lot of harm to the environment. Greenleaf energy transition solutions help manufacturing industry adopt sustainable sources of energy for thermal energy generation and electricity generation.

Name: Aroma Solar Energy
Description: At Aroma Solar, we believe the future belongs to clean energy. Founded with a vision to make solar power accessible, affordable, and sustainable, we are not just building modules,  we are building a brighter, greener tomorrow.

Name: Energy America
Description:
Energy America is a US-based solar module manufacturer and EPC contractor, taking into consideration of our products and customers’ demand we have set up various manufacturing facilities around the globe that produces only the highest of quality which meets all global standards and modules made and tested for all climatic conditions.

Our Manufacturing factory locations include the United States of America, Germany, India, Taiwan, Japan, Turkey, Vietnam, and Cambodia.

Name: Pradecon
Description: Pradecon is a leading industry fully focused in the design and manufacture of PV Mounting Systems, having today a a track record of 6 GW in EU, Middle-East, Africa and America.

Name: Eltronic PtX
Description:
We design and develop modular Test-rigs and Balance of Plant systems for OEMs within electrolysis, synthesis, pyrolysis, and more

We partner with manufacturers of core power-to-x technologies such electrolysis to provide expertise and solutions which help standardize and industrialize the applications to drive down cost and improve our customers competitiveness.

Technological know-how is the DNA of Eltronic PtX and as part of Eltronic Group, we have served the automation and process industry globally for more than 20 years.

We are equipped to scale and act globally to reach our goal. Combining know-how, technology, and determination is our recipe to take part in accelerating the green transition.

Name: WegscheidEntrenco GmbH
Description:
WegscheidEntrenco develops solutions for sustainable energy supply from biogenic residues for electricity, heating and cooling.

Our biomass cogeneration plants use solid, renewable fuels such as wood pellets, briquettes or wood chips. This saves you energy costs, makes you independent of fossil fuels, and makes an important contribution to climate protection through the use of renewable raw materials - around the clock.


Why a biomass cogeneration plant is the right solution for your company:

1.	Independence from fossil fuels

By using biomass, you make your company independent of fossil fuels. Thus, you simultaneously reduce risks of your energy supply and increase sustainability.

2.	Lower energy costs

By switching to biomass cogeneration plants, you escape the trend of rising fossil energy costs. With our biomass cogeneration plants, you can save up to 30 percent on energy costs.

3.	Contribution to climate protection

By using wood as biomass, the raw material cycle is CO2-neutral. In addition, we use residual and waste wood. Due to the high efficiency of up to 85 percent, our CHP units have a lower fuel requirement.


OUR PRODUCTS:
+ HVG 135 wood chips, briquettes (135kW el / 266 kW th)
+ E4 wood pellets (50 kW el / 120 kW th)
+ E5 wood chips (50 kW el / 120 kW th)

Name: Miscanthus Türkiye
Description: Miscanthus Türkiye

Name: 2P
Description:
A 2P surgiu com a missão de oferecer produtos de alta qualidade que hoje estão presentes nas instalações fotovoltaicas mais exigentes em todo o mundo. 

Oferecemos uma linha completa de estruturas para fixação de painéis fotovoltaicos em alumínio e aço inoxidável, conferindo facilidade na montagem, acabamento superior e durabilidade.

  Nossos parceiros assim como nós, buscam constantemente a inovação e satisfação do cliente final

Name: Weco - the Wave Energy Collective
Description:
Safeguarding our beautiful planet for future generations and pushing boundaries of technology are at the core of our business. At Weco, we develop innovative solutions to produce electricity from ocean waves. By harvesting the energy in waves around the world, we will be able to produce power equal to the needs of more than 3 billion households. 

Wave energy is currently a significantly underused form of renewable energy. By developing a novel wave energy converter, we will close this gap in the energy transition and contribute to a more sustainable future.

Join us in transforming waves to watts!

Name: NovaMea
Description: Our company's mission is the development of technologies, services and products for the storage and conversion of energy, in particular by electrochemical processes, as well as the production, storage, sale and delivery of these products and their components, and the provision of all services in these fields, in particular consulting. Currently we focus on critical materials such as membranes and catalysts for anion exchange membrane electrolyzers, which is a most promising technology to produce green hydrogen at large scale and low cost.

Name: Factiun
Description:
Factiun is a Spanish company specializing in photovoltaic solutions, created by professionals with more than 20 years of experience and more than 20 GW in solar projects worldwide. Pioneers in the development of the dual-row tracker, we have redefined efficiency standards in the industry.

The FACTIUN TRX dual-row tracker is designed to maximize performance on any terrain, especially in complex locations, with easy integration of large modules. It features advanced 3D backtracking technology and diffuse irradiation optimization that guarantees superior production, even in challenging conditions. In addition, its robust structure offers high resilience to extreme weather events.
For projects requiring a fixed solution, FACTIUN FIX provides an optimized structure that can be adapted to any environment. Our engineering team analyzes each site to develop the best configuration, ensuring stability, durability, and efficiency.

At Factiun, we combine innovation, technology, and experience to drive the future of solar energy.

Name: Neamine
Description: At Neamine, we believe that harnessing concentrated solar thermal energy is the key to revolutionizing energy efficiency in industry. Our technology aims to replace or partially substitute conventional energy sources in processes requiring high temperatures.

Name: Pile Driver UK - Machinery for Solar Farm Construction & Guardrail Installation
Description:
Pile Driver UK supply MGI solar and guardrail machinery to installers in the UK, Ireland, North America, Australia & New Zealand. 

Since 2018 Pile Driver UK, MGI & Tea Tek Group have been working closely to ensure contractors around the world are supplied the highest standard of Italian built machinery at sensible prices. All rigs are UKCA, CE & Internationally certified. 

Pile Driver UK will only commit to selling the very best Italian machines the industry has to offer. They strongly believe that Italian manufacturers MGI are leading the way when it comes to producing innovative machinery installers can rely on.

Name: Zhejiang Power Import&Export Co.,Ltd
Description:
FlashCharge, a Leading Clean Energy Expert in China, is an internationally oriented company strategically focused on technological innovation and global market presence.

With years of dedicated expertise in research, design, operations, and manufacturing of energy-related assets, we specialize in Energy IoT platforms, Energy Asset Management SaaS platforms, and Standardized Operating Procedures (SOP) networks. We provide users with advanced distributed photovoltaic, energy storage, wind power, and charging station products, along with intelligent energy management solutions. Simultaneously, we're committed to comprehensive energy investments in photovoltaic power stations, energy storage, charging stations, grid sales, microgrids, multi-energy complementarity, and onshore and offshore wind power.

FlashCharge, driven by high-quality energy products, efficient systems, and professional services, aims to offer global customers cutting-edge, innovative experiences with comprehensive energy products. These encompass integrated DC fast chargers, DC fast charging modules, AC charging stations, and intelligent flexible charging systems. Our solutions include group charging control, smart detection, various charging modes, and plug-and-play capabilities.

Connecting the world through energy, we empower a future filled with vitality. FlashCharge is poised to continuously make strides in the clean energy sector, contributing significantly to creating a green energy ecosystem and a brighter human future. Our strength lies in providing customized services and a comprehensive engineering support system for our clients.

Name: FB Group
Description:
At FB Group, we specialize in delivering skid-mounted process units to support the Global Energy Transition. We are a dynamic organization driven by enthusiasm, resilience, and a commitment to excellence, guided by a straightforward, ‘no-nonsense’ approach. Our highly skilled and experienced team ensures we deliver innovative, high-quality solutions tailored to clients needs. 

Our packaged unit design philosophy enables us to turn complex challenges into customized, high-performing products. From design and engineering to fabrication, we transform clients requirements into fully integrated skid-mounted process units. 

At FB Group, shared responsibility drives ownership of the project. By proactively understanding their needs, we become an extension of the vision to help they succeed.
The office and workshops are located near open water facilities in Heijningen, The Netherlands between Rotterdam and Antwerpen.

Name: Revolty
Description:
Every year, millions of lithium-ion batteries still full of potential are set aside. At the same time, hundreds of thousands of solar households in France lose up to 60% of the energy they produce, simply because they can’t store it.

At Revolty, we bring these two worlds together.
We give a second life to batteries from electric mobility and stationary storage, turning them into residential solar batteries that are local, sustainable, and affordable.

 Don’t let your energy slip away.

Name: SolaX Power Maghreb
Description: The SolaX vision is to be a world leader in the development, production, and distribution of solar inverters. The product range incorporates the very latest in solar innovation thanks to the continued focus on R&D and unceasing commitment to pushing back the boundaries of what is possible – a journey that has led to the launch of the ground-breaking X-Hybrid battery storage system.

Name: EnerCube GmbH
Description:
Wir entwickeln und produzieren vorgefertigte Wärmepumpenmodule für den seriellen Heizungstausch von mehrgeschossigen Wohngebäuden, weg von Öl und Gas.

Die Produkte beinhalten alle Komponenten, die man für einen Heizungstausch benötigt. 

Angefangen von den Propan-Luftwärmepumpen, bis hin zu den Wärmespeichern, der Warmwasserbereitung, Umwälzpumpen, Druckausdehnung, Elektrik, Regelungstechnik und Schalldämpfer - zu 100 % vorgefertigt in einer Einhausung, Plug & Heat.

Name: DUNEKO Polska
Description: Słuchając polskich rodzin, dzielimy się ciepłem. DUNEKO Jest w top 3 instalatorów pomp ciepła w Polsce a także posiadamy 100 % skuteczności uzyskiwania dofinansowań. Dzięki własnej produkcji buforów i zasobników najgrubszej termoizolacji w linii Thermos-eko do pomp ciepła, oferujemy jakość ponad skalą. Nasz dział badań i rozwoju, tworzy Profesor zwyczajny Andrzej J. Nowak mianowany przez Prezydenta RP z Zakładu Technik Ciepła i Energetyki Jądrowej. Jako jedyna firma w Polsce, opracowaliśmy własny algorytm doboru pomp ciepła, który objęto zgłoszeniem patentowym w Urzędzie patentowym RP. Odkryj z nami, dlaczego pompy ciepła to dzisiaj najkorzystniejsza forma ogrzewania dla użytkowników indywidualnych oraz dołącz do zespołu dedykowanych pracowników, którzy przemierzają zawsze kilometr dalej, w trosce o dobro i bezpieczeństwo naszych klientów.

Name: Rebound Technologies Inc.
Description:
Rebound has developed a freeze point suppression cycle that offers a 3-in-1 solution, combining agile freezing, unprecedented humidity control and demand response capabilities for frozen food processors and cold chain logistics companies. Rebound’s IcePoint meets varying cooling demands while simultaneously optimizing moisture levels equating to improved system performance, increased productivity, lower demand charges and excellent return on investment.

Rebound’s IcePoint thermal storage capability has already proven to be the cheapest battery on the planet and will support decarbonization of the grid via year-round thermal storage and flexible demand. IcePoint thermal storage capability is supported via the Inflation Reduction Act and utility rebate programs. Rebound Technologies has received funding from the National Science Foundation, The U.S. Department of Energy, Clean Energy Ventures, Skyview Ventures, and others.

Rebound commissioned its first full-scale commercial installation in 2023 and has demonstrated excellent performance with the world’s largest cold chain warehouse and distribution center, owner/operator – Lineage Logistics.

Name: Serra Verde Group
Description:
Founded and backed by leading natural resources investors, Serra Verde is engaged in the production and sale of Rare Earth Elements (REEs) from its world class and wholly owned Pela Ema deposit in Brazil. 
Serra Verde is the only large scale producer outside Asia of all four critical magnetic REEs used in the manufacture of permanent magnets for the energy, automotive and electronics sectors. In addition, we provide a secure supply of REEs for defence, aerospace, nuclear and other critical industries. We have ambitious plans to increase capacity through plant optimisation and our large, defined resource could facilitate a doubling of run-of-mine production before the end of this decade. 
We aim to be the world’s most responsible REE producer and a partner of choice for critical industries by applying world class standards to the superior credentials of our operations. 
Serra Verde is a strategic asset within emerging global permanent magnet-production value chains and we aim to use this position to help create new partnerships essential to world’s evolving energy needs.

Name: Flow-nano
Description:
We’re an Italian start-up developing proprietary nanostructured electrodes that enable efficient, scalable, and cost-effective integration of renewable energy into industrial applications.

We’re a spin-off of the Istituto Italiano di Tecnologia (IIT) and backed by CDP Tech4Planet. Our chemistry-agnostic platform tackles the major energy challenges: long-duration storage with flow batteries, hydrogen production, water treatment, and CO₂ conversion. For example, in flow battery systems, our electrodes maximize active surface area, boost power density, and significantly cut stack costs—offering concrete solutions to raw material constraints and tangible benefits for the grid.

We don’t do hype: we do the flow. That’s why Flownano is a spark for energy tech.

Name: Versolsolar
Description:
Founded in 2009, Versolsolar is headquartered in Hangzhou, China, and spans 60 acres. The company operates three major production bases, encompassing nearly 50,000 square meters of production area. Its main business includes various photovoltaic fixed ground mounting structure, distributed mounting structure, tracking photovoltaic mounting structure, building mounting structure, and distributed power station development, etc. It is one of the largest professional manufacturers of photovoltaic brackets in China and the Asia-Pacific region. As a global leader in photovoltaic mounting structure product manufacturing and system solutions, Versolsolar is committed to becoming a global leader of  high-end equipment and intelligent services in new energy industry.

Versolsolar has obtained more than 200 authorized patents, including 15 invention patents. It is the first Asia-Pacific enterprise to pass the assessment and certification of North American tracking mounting structure system BV, UL, ETL, PE STAMP, CPP, SBP,TÜV etc.; and is widely used in the China,United States, Japan, Middle East and Southeast Asia PV mounting structure market. Products global application reference projects exceeds 35 GW.

Facebook: www.facebook.com/versolsolar
Twitter: @Versolsolar_inc

Name: European Solar PV Industry Alliance
Description:
Launched by the European Commission in 2022, EIT InnoEnergy is leading the European Solar PV Industry Alliance as Secretariat and joined by SolarPower Europe and the European Solar Manufacturing Council on the alliance’s steering committee. 
The Alliance facilitates innovation-led expansion of a resilient industrial solar value chain in the EU, in particular in the PV manufacturing sector. It supports the growth of a European industry that is developing and commercialising breakthrough technologies along the whole value chain, leading to more innovative, efficient, circular and sustainable products, and making the EU’s climate and energy objectives more attainable.
Scaling up the production of solar PV panels and value chain components in Europe will contribute to the EU’s competitiveness and job creation and complement import diversification strategies to better protect against risks of supply disruption. The ESIA aims to create the right conditions for investment in large-scale PV manufacturing capacity in Europe, across the solar PV value chain, by de-risking and accelerating industrial projects, by supporting the diversification efforts and by further promoting the competitive technological advantages.
The Alliance brings together businesses and other stakeholders interested in supporting European solutions to increase EU production capacity of PV panels and components and to diversify supply sources for products, components and raw materials. It will implement relevant actions facilitating investment, notably identifying and unlocking synergies across EU and Member States investment programmes in the area of innovative solar PV. This will contribute to creating the momentum for European industry to grow and strengthen the EU’s position on the next generation of solar PV technologies. Participation in the Alliance also serves to assist industrial actors to overcome difficulties and scale up to a level to compete effectively on the market.

Name: StarCharge BESS
Description: StarCharge is a global leader in smart energy solutions and one of the world's largest EV charging solution providers. In addition to its expertise in charging technology, StarCharge has established a highly advanced energy storage division, specializing in BESS for various applications. It operates an intelligent manufacturing facility with over 90% automation and an annual production capacity of 10GWh for LFP battery energy storage. The company offers a full range of energy storage solutions for residential, commercial, industrial, and utility-scale applications. As a leading aggregator in China’s Virtual Power Plant (VPP) market, StarCharge is recognized for its exceptional response time and precision and serves as a key BESS supplier for the world’s largest 1C energy storage projects.

Name: BX Energy Systems
Description:

We focus on delivering technically advanced, scalable storage platforms that support real-world energy demands including backup power, peak shaving, grid services, and microgrid operations.

Our systems integrate high-performance LFP battery technology, liquid cooling, and active fire protection to ensure maximum safety, reliability, and operational efficiency across all environments.
Built for flexible deployment, they are designed to meet the requirements of today’s energy infrastructure and adapt to the needs of tomorrow.

At BX Energy Systems, we combine technical depth, manufacturing expertise, and project-driven engineering to deliver storage solutions that perform at every scale under real-world conditions without compromise.

Name: GivEnergy South Africa

GivEnergy – No. 1 for energy storage solutions in the United Kingdom, and growing worldwide.

Our mission is: “Empowering energy freedom for all.” To that end, our services allow customers to take control of – and save money on – their energy spend end-to-end.

starkstromtechnische Anlagen sowie

Name: Scanship
Description:

Name: I-MAXIMUM
Description:
I-MAXIMUM is an engineering company that provides energy solutions for industrial LPG systems, such as synthetic natural gas (SNG). Offers gas installation technologies for enriching biogas and biomethane. Provides alternative systems for industrial customers to replace natural gas, coal, or heating oil. We specialize in implementing SNG gas supply systems based on a mixture of LPG and air with a controlled calorific value.

Our technologies qualify for subsidy and grant programs related to improving energy efficiency in enterprises, which have the potential to reduce greenhouse gas emissions. 
 
We are a Polish manufacturer of gas blenders and can equip heating plants, factories, sugar mills, etc., with alternative energy systems (including clean energy). On-site at the customer, we construct systems for blending synthetic gas SNG (LPG + air), which serves as an alternative to natural gas (NG) and LNG regasification systems, coal, and heating oil. We also provide alternative fuel for boilers, burners, and cogeneration systems. Additionally, we implement enrichment mixers at customers' sites, which combine propane with biomethane, biogas, hydrogen, and other gases.

Name: e-On Batteries
Description: Founded in Dallas, Texas in 2015, e-On Batteries is a leader in lithium-based Battery Energy Storage solutions. We specialize in designing, assembling, and integrating Smart Battery Energy Storage Systems (SmartBESS) that prioritize long-term reliability and safety across the United States and internationally. Our systems feature an advanced, proprietary Battery Management System (BMS) and UL1973-certified, 9540A-tested LiFePo4 modules, designed for scalability and networking. Our applications span from behind-the-meter microgrids, EV charging, and load shifting to front-of-meter utility-scale energy storage. From 9.8kWh residential Genesis units to our scalable 8.5 MWh MegaBlock utility solutions, e-On Batteries delivers dependable energy storage to meet diverse demands.

Name: Groupe Auraliance
Description:
Acteur majeur et national de la transition énergétique depuis plus de 15 ans, le groupe Auraliance s’est développé en misant sur les énergies renouvelables (énergie solaire) et la rénovation énergétique. C’est à l’initiative de Benjamin Martineau et de Cyril Oliveira, les 2 associés d’Isowatt (Lyon) que le groupe a été créé en misant sur des expertises métiers d’avenir et en faisant l’acquisition d’entreprises françaises à forte valeur ajoutée. Auraliance, c’est en 2023 plus de 150 employés et 28 millions d’euros de CA.
Les métiers et entreprises du groupe Auraliance :
Le groupe Auraliance a construit sa notoriété sur 2 grands pôles d’expertise :
- Le photovoltaïque avec tous les métiers liés à la production d’électricité verte : l’installation de centrale solaire domestique (toit solaire, installation au sol, pergola solaire, carport solaire), ombrière photovoltaïque de parking, installation au sol (champ solaire, agrivoltaïsme), toiture solaire.
- La rénovation énergétique avec les métiers liés aux nouveaux systèmes de chauffage économique, à l’isolation thermique, à la mobilité électrique et au diagnostic de performance énergétique.
Résolument tourné vers l’avenir, le groupe s’est forgé une solide réputation et fait partie des entreprises influentes engagées pour un futur plus vert, elle a intégré les réseaux :
- BPI Excellence et Accélérateur (son expertise dans les énergies renouvelables)
- Entreprise Coq Vert (entrepreneurs engagés dans la lutte contre le réchauffement climatique)
- French Tech (écosystème de start-up)
- Bancaires (partenaire de la Banque de la Transition Énergétique, Banque de Savoie, Crédit Agricole)

Vous voulez rejoindre un groupe ambitieux et leader ? Faites valoir vos compétences auprès de notre service RH par mail à rh@auraliance.com 
Vous êtes une entreprise française au savoir-faire indéniable dans le secteur des énergies renouvelables et vous souhaitez rejoindre un groupe en pleine croissance ? Contactez-nous à contact@auraliance.com

We design and build our own products and also work with partners to build complete solutions. Our solutions cover a wide range of products, including solar panels, inverters, battery packs, storage cabinets, charging piles, and heat pumps.

Description:

Emtel’s approach goes beyond hardware. We integrate system architecture, sourcing, documentation, deployment, and lifecycle support into a unified solution—reducing friction during permitting, inspection, and operation.

By designing with Authorities Having Jurisdiction (AHJs), inspectors, installers, and end users in mind from the start, we help projects move faster, operate more safely, and remain supportable over time.

What we focus on:
• Non-lithium energy storage for occupied and sensitive environments
• AHJ-aligned system design and documentation
• Predictable, stable performance under all operating conditions
• Long-term serviceability and operational confidence

Emtel Energy USA exists to make energy storage safer, clearer, and easier to approve—without compromising performance.
