Name: WONTAI Power
Description:
WONTAI Power is a high-tech pioneer in the "Vanadium Redox Flow Battery (VRFB)" energy storage sector with principle of innovation-driven, and dedicate to build an integrated industry chain.

In the vanadium industry, we have filed a total of 169 patent applications related to vanadium technology, including 74 invention patents (some pending). Our key technologies, such as the composite bipolar plate and precise contact resistance measurement, have been granted national invention patents. We deepen industry-university-research collaboration, partnering with top universities to establish R&D platforms and accelerate the industrialization of cutting-edge technologies. We have independently developed 4 Smart Energy Management Systems.

We established 3 core production bases: our High-Purity Vanadium Raw Material Production Base (Qingyang, Gansu Province) boasts an annual capacity of 3,000 tons High-Purity Vanadium Pentoxide (purity up to 99.0% and 99.5%); our Electrolyte Production Base (Jiuquan, Gansu) has an annual capacity of 20,000 cubic meters electrolyte ranging from 1.6 to 1.8 mol/L; and our Stack & System Integration Equipment Production Base (Guazhou, Gansu) features an annual capacity of 400MW include 4 major series—125kW, 500kW, 750kW and 834KW—designed to meet the application needs of commercial & industrial distributed energy storage, generation-side energy storage, and grid-side peak-shaving energy storage. Our products are engineered to withstand extreme environments ranging from -35℃ to 45℃, making them suitable for complex scenarios.

Embracing synergies, we also build benchmark projects with more than 10 VFB projects (200MWh+ capacity) reference. We are expanding into top potential long-duration energy storage markets such as Australia, Saudi Arabia, Indonesia, Romania, Japan, and USA. Our mission is to contribute our strength to the global transition towards green and low-carbon energy.

Name: Hyrex AS
Description:
Hyrex is a hydrogen technology company offering big ideas and bold claims in the push for a sustainable future. We focus on vertical integration, though sometimes it feels more like vertical confusion.

As a system integrator, we mostly provide hydrogen-based drivelines or range extenders for small vessels between 8 and 25 meters. Our solutions are made to fit customer needs, or at least get close enough that they work most of the time.

We also offer complete turnkey solutions, including vessels and filling systems, or just engineering services for those who want a more hands-on experience with troubleshooting.

At Hyrex, the vision is to lead the transformation of maritime transport towards a sustainable and emission-free future. We aim to be a global pioneer in zero-emission systems for pleasure boats and small commercial vessels, setting new standards in responsibility, performance, and customer satisfaction. While others focus on results, we focus on trying really hard. Our commitment to clean and efficient marine solutions keeps us pushing forward, creating a world where voyages are eco-friendly, waters stay pristine, and technology mostly does what it’s supposed to.

We customize systems based on user needs and the chosen platform. Every component is sized to ensure some level of performance. Our network of partners supplies key parts, while Hyrex puts them together the best way we know how.

We have fuel cells from 30 to 300kW, and if more power is needed, we stack them into mW solutions, because bigger numbers sound better.
Hydrogen storage is adjusted to the available space and range, which means it fits wherever we can make it fit.
Battery packages are made as small as possible since weight-to-power ratio is apparently important.
Inboard or outboard drives are available based on preference and space, assuming we can squeeze them in.

WEST’s largely electrostatic technology offers better performance than electrochemical alternatives, and our systems are backed by a proprietary software platform (EZPower) that enables us to expertly design solutions, and then monitor performance over time. WEST’s optimized supercap systems are the building blocks for robust, modular, extremely reliable, safe, user-friendly storage systems. Contact us to learn more….the future of the grid depends on the WRIGHT energy.

We are currently undergoing testing of the world’s first offshore charging station, the Oasis Power Buoy. Initially aimed at charging wind farm crew transfer vessels (CTVs), The Oasis Power Buoy will allow the latest generation of hybrid and all-electric vessels to recharge their batteries from a renewable energy source fed directly from the wind turbine. This greatly boosts the viability of such vessels and will contribute to major reductions in emissions from the current diesel-powered alternative.  

To further bolster our transition to a net-zero economy, hydrogen is emerging as a key fuel of the future.  To advance this potential, we are developing the Oasis Hydrogen Buoy - an efficient and safe Hydrogen Offshore Transfer System.

Description:
From the historic pioneers of technology to a modern global market leader.

ANDRITZ Hydropower is one of the world's leading suppliers of electromechanical equipment and services for hydropower stations in the dynamically growing global renewable energy market. Based on over 185 years of experience and a global installed capacity of 489 gigawatts, we offer innovative solutions for new and existing hydropower stations, from small hydropower to large-scale plants. State-of-the-art digital solutions, comprehensive services for the operation and maintenance of entire hydropower plants, and turbo generators for the thermal industry complete the portfolio.

Part of the ANDRITZ Group with over 30,000 employees representing more than 90 nationalities across 80 countries, we bring together a wide range of cultures, regions, and perspectives. 

#ANDRITZHydro #ANDRITZ #EngineeredSuccess #hydropower #RenewableEnergy #australianrenewables #growththatmatters #1ANDRITZway

https://getcamber.com/

Name: AgriPV-Solutions GmbH
Description: We are one of the leading companies in Germany in the planning, construction and commissioning of agri-photovoltaic plants. Three projects at Lake Constance and in the Rheingau region, which have been completed or are in the process of being completed, speak for our competence to realize tailor-made solutions. We attach great importance to the optimal coordination of all components, from the appropriate substructure and the right modules to the optimal electrical connection of the system to the grid. Our passion is to take precautions now to reduce the incalculable effects of climate change on fruit crops, and at the same time to produce added value through valuable eco-electricity. In this way, together with our partner network, we can make a valuable contribution to meeting the major challenges of our present and future. Everything hangs, now more obvious than ever, on a chain, from the protection of bees to the protection of your berries, apples or grapes! The preservation of our precious food from nature needs tailored solutions, and we offer them from A to Z from a single source. With our partner network of scientists, environmental researchers, technicians and structural engineers, we always develop customer-focused best solutions based on protection and added value for future-oriented action.

Name: Stadt.Energie.Speicher GmbH
Description:
Die Stadt.Energie.Speicher GmbH entwickelt, baut und betreibt als Contractor innovative Heizzentralen und Wärmenetze für Quartiere, Kommunen und Stadtwerke. Unser Fokus liegt in der Entwicklung und Umsetzung nachhaltiger Energieversorgungskonzepte mit einem Schwerpunkt auf Groß-Wärmepumpen, Speichern und innovativem Lastmanagement.

Aktuell errichten und betrieben wir am Standort Bremen für das 15ha große Quartier der Überseeinsel GmbH, eine der innovativsten Heizzentralen Deutschlands. Bestehend aus einer stromgeführten 4 MW-Flusswasser-Wärmepumpe mit Großwärmespeicher, einem Eisbreierzeuger und Speicher, Power-To-Heat-Modul sowie einem Nahwärme- und Kältenetz, setzen wir neue Maßstäbe, was die Integration von erneuerbaren Energien im Wärmesektor angeht.

Name: 833SOLAR RACKING SYSTEMS

Name: RECOUP WWHRS
Description:
Recoup is the UK market-leader for Waste Water Heat Recovery systems for Showers (WWHRS). 

We produce a portfolio of SAP-listed, highly efficient WWHRS products which extract waste heat energy from used shower water in order to pre-heat the incoming cold feed - recycling waste heat energy back into the DHW system. This simple solution offers one of the best ‘pound for points’ ratios of any SAP measure and is a true ‘fit and forget’ product, and ultimately can save up to 67% of the energy cost each time a shower is used (regardless of heat source). 

For new-build construction WWHRS can simply be used with a 'Fabric-first' approach, often in place of other more expensive SAP measures such as MVHR, Solar thermal, ASHP, PV or triple glazing, but for a fraction of the cost. It is an ideal option for residential housing, modular build designs, as well as student accommodation builds, hotels or leisure facilities.

Furthermore, it requires no complex installation or commissioning; no ongoing or planned maintenance; no end-user interaction; and has no moving or mechanical parts - Just on-demand, passive energy savings with every shower. 

We supply to many UK National housebuilders in England, Scotland and Wales, and have recently extended our Sole-Supplier Agreement with Barratt/DWH & Bovis Homes for the UK, and also extended our UK Supply Agreement with Redrow Homes for the 6th consecutive year in a row. 

As well as being specified by some of the largest house builders in the UK, we also work closely with housing associations; commercial and leisure projects; SAP assessors; and architects and homeowners to help make savings whilst also meeting strict building regulations and legislation.

New products are currently in development, with a number of new products due for release across 2017 & 2018.

**Look out for the new EASYFIT+**
A stand-alone WWHRS system designed to fit directly under a Bath - Ideal for new-build apartments & retrofit application

Name: Qkera
Description:
Qkera is developing battery tech with no compromise on performance, manufacturability and cost - truly unlocking next-generation batteries for mass market applications. 

We are pioneering next-generation solid-state batteries with the development of advanced solid electrolytes. Our mission is to overcome the barriers to mass commercialization by providing innovative, cost-effective, and scalable solutions. Name: HELIOPLANT energy
Description:
Im Hochgebirge entstand eine wegweisende Entwicklung, die technische Innovation im Einklang mit der Natur sicherstellt.
Ein Team von Experten in Geologie, Naturgefahren, Wind & Schneemechanik, Konstruktion, Photovoltaik und Elektrotechnik begann eine innovative Reise, welche die Zukunft der erneuerbaren Energiegewinnung im Hochgebirge jetzt bereits revolutioniert.

Aufbauend auf unseren ersten Erfahrungen aus der damals höchsten Photovoltaikkraftwerk Europas am Wildkogl im Jahr 2009 (Seehöhe 2100m) haben wir in den Folgejahren das Kraftwerk am Pitztaler Gletscher (Seehöhe 2900m) konzipiert und 2015 umgesetzt.

Die damaligen Linien- oder Tischkonzepte erfordern für das Hochgebirge unverhältnismäßig hohe Aufwände, die zu einer Entwicklung von HELIOPLANT geführt haben.
Mit den ersten HELIOPLANT Anlagen wird bereits im Herbst 2023 in Österreich (Gletscherskigebiete Sölden, Pitztal und Kaunertal) sowie in der Schweiz (Gondosolar) begonnen.
HELIOPLANT WIPO International Registration Number: DM/229799

Name: PvPilot
Description:
PvPilot : La solution pour optimiser votre énergie solaire et booster vos économies

L'optimisation de l'autoconsommation photovoltaïque devient votre meilleure alliée lorsque vous produisez de l'énergie solaire. 

𝗚𝗿𝗮̂𝗰𝗲 𝗮̀ 𝗣𝗩𝗣𝗶𝗹𝗼𝘁, 𝘃𝗼𝘂𝘀 𝗽𝗼𝘂𝘃𝗲𝘇 𝗺𝗮𝘅𝗶𝗺𝗶𝘀𝗲𝗿 𝗹'𝘂𝘁𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘀𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗱𝗲 𝘃𝗼𝘁𝗿𝗲 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝘀𝗼𝗹𝗮𝗶𝗿𝗲 𝘀𝗮𝗻𝘀 𝗴𝗮𝘀𝗽𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗿, 𝗲𝗻 𝗽𝗶𝗹𝗼𝘁𝗮𝗻𝘁 𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗹𝗹𝗶𝗴𝗲𝗺𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝘃𝗼𝘀 𝗮𝗽𝗽𝗮𝗿𝗲𝗶𝗹𝘀 𝗲𝗻 𝗳𝗼𝗻𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗱𝗲 𝗹'𝗲́𝗻𝗲𝗿𝗴𝗶𝗲 𝘀𝗼𝗹𝗮𝗶𝗿𝗲 𝗱𝗶𝘀𝗽𝗼𝗻𝗶𝗯𝗹𝗲.

Contrairement aux solutions qui nécessitent des batteries de stockage, souvent nuisibles à l'environnement, notre technologie vous offre une alternative écologique et durable. Avec PVPilot, amplifiez votre impact positif sur la planète.

       Monitoring en temps réel 
       Contrôle à distance
       Pilotage manuel ou automatique intelligent
       Des économies substantielles

PVPilot gère efficacement votre surplus d'énergie solaire en le redirigeant vers vos appareils électriques, tels que votre chauffe-eau, votre véhicule électrique ou votre piscine.

Optimisez votre consommation d'énergie solaire et réduisez vos factures d'électricité. 
En cas de baisse de production solaire, par exemple lors du passage de nuages, PVPilot réagit instantanément en coupant ou en ajustant l'alimentation des appareils pilotés. Cela vous évite d'acheter de l'électricité au réseau.

En renforçant votre taux d’autoconsommation, vous augmentez significativement votre indépendance énergétique.

Un réseau d'experts à vos côtés ! 
Nos installateurs partenaires, spécialistes des systèmes solaires, sauront vous guider et répondre à vos besoins. Leur expertise locale leur permet également de vous informer sur les aides disponibles dans votre région.

Vous êtes installateur ? Devenez partenaire !
Rejoignez notre réseau et devenez un artisan du changement en proposant une solution innovante et écologique à vos clients.

Name: TUM - Lehrstuhl für Energiesysteme

Name: US Modules

Name: Hydrovolt Energy

Name: SAVEIONS LTD
Description:
Advancing Green Hydrogen for the Net-Zero Transition

SAVEIONS LTD is a global hydrogen technology company accelerating decarbonisation through innovation in Smart Energy Engineering (SEE), Smart Hydrogen Engineering (SHE), and Smart Electrochemical Engineering. We design and integrate green hydrogen and electrochemical solutions—covering electrolysers, fuel cells, hydrogen safety, Power-to-X (PtX), e-fuels, and energy storage—to enable a resilient, low-carbon energy system.

Our Mission
Engineer scalable, high-efficiency energy technologies that speed the energy transition to a cleaner, smarter, and more sustainable world.

Why SAVEIONS LTD

Engineering excellence: High-performance electrochemical systems optimised for reliability, safety, and cost.

System integration: End-to-end design—from materials to balance-of-plant, digital monitoring, and grid integration.

Impact at scale: Solutions that reduce LCOH, cut Scope 1–3 emissions, and future-proof assets against evolving net-zero pathways.

Let’s power the world smarter, cleaner, and better—through hydrogen.

#Hydrogen #GreenHydrogen #NetZero #EnergyTransition #Decarbonisation #Electrolysers #FuelCells #HydrogenSafety #Electrochemistry #PowerToX #EFuels #EnergyStorage #CleanTech #SustainableEnergy #CO2Utilisation

Explore partnerships and pilot deployments by writing to us at  info@saveions.co.uk

Name: Future Solar
Description:
Future Solar: Powering a Brighter & Cleaner Tomorrow

Future Solar stands at the forefront of renewable energy innovation, committed to making sustainable and affordable solar energy accessible to all. With a vision of driving the solar revolution, we combine technological excellence with a deep responsibility toward environmental sustainability and economic growth.
By mid-2026, our upcoming facility in Karjan, Gujarat, will house 4.8 GW solar PV module manufacturing and 2 GW cell manufacturing capacity. Spanning 20 acres, this state-of-the-art, fully automated plant integrates advanced technologies from globally renowned providers, including ATW Auto Stringer, SC Solar, and Jinchen Automation. This enables us to produce high-efficiency N-type Topcon M10R-G12R bifacial all-weather panels that set new standards in performance and reliability.
Our presence extends across India through a strong sales network and nine strategically located warehouses, ensuring timely delivery even in the most remote regions. With a dedicated director based in the United States, we are also actively expanding into international markets, positioning Future Solar as a global clean energy leader.
Aligned with the vision of our Prime Minister Shri. Narendra Modi, we are on a transformative journey toward a cleaner, greener, and brighter future. At Future Solar, we invite you to join us in shaping the future of energy through innovation, scalability, and global collaboration.

Name: ANDRITZ Hydro Brasil
Description: ANDRITZ Hydro in Brazil is a multinational company of Austrian origin, part of the ANDRITZ GROUP, which runs operations in 34 countries such as Austria, Germany, and the United States, among others.

Name: nexos
Description:
A new breed of engineering, procurement and construction (EPC) provider that is turning next-gen energy into operational reality, through innovative solutions, partnerships and problem solving. 

As the most fully integrated and most digitally enabled EPC service provider to UK energy infrastructures, nexos is an agile and forward-thinking EPC services provider for the UK energy sector. We bridge the gap between traditional energy systems and a sustainable future, combining technical excellence with a collaborative approach to deliver effective and resilient infrastructure solutions to maintain, modify and modularise energy infrastructure for today and tomorrow.

We inject fresh thinking, agility, and flexibility to enable our customers to deliver better project outcomes.

Globally, we face a dual challenge: to provide affordable and reliable energy, while reducing emissions. At nexos, our ability to accelerate innovative operational solutions is the key to bridging the gap between current and future energy systems.

Next-gen energy is about enhancing and decarbonising existing oil and gas assets, while also building infrastructure for new energy sources. Our innovative operational solutions maintain, modify and modularise energy infrastructure for today and tomorrow.

We inject fresh thinking, agility, and flexibility to enable our customers to deliver better project outcomes.

Name: CHINT PVSTAR
Description:
CHINT PVSTAR （GLOBAL FULL-STACK RESIDENTIAL PHOTOVOLTAIC SOLUTIONS PROVIDER）is the subsidiary company of CHINT ANNENG, with a strong presence in Europe and Africa. 

In Europe, CHINT PVSTAR is headquartered in Germany, specialises in supporting and empowering rising installers and aims to be their best growth partner. Installers can enjoy comprehensive support and exclusive services by joining the Chint PVSTAR membership program, boosting business efficiency and achieving sustainable growth.

CHINT ANNENG (CHINA'S TOP 1 RESIDENTIAL PHOTOVOLTAIC SOLUTIONS PROVIDER) is the parent company of CHINT PVSTAR, which is the premier rooftop PV company under the CHINT Group. Founded in 2015, with a registered capital of 2.438 billion RMB, CHINT ANNENG focuses on providing end-users with all-in-one solutions, including rooftop PV systems co-development, purchase, and leasing, covering the full range of design, installation, and after-sales operation and maintenance. Up to now, CHINT ANNENG’s end-users have exceeded 1.6 million, with a market share of over 30% in China.

CHINT GROUP (GLOBALLY RENOWNED SMART ENERGY SYSTEM SOLUTIONS PROVIDER) is the parent company of CHINT ANNENG, founded in 1984, is strategically focused on Green Energy, Intelligent Electrical Solutions, and Smart Low-carbon Solutions. It operates via CHINT Global and Sci-Tech Innovation Incubation platforms. With a presence in 140+ countries, 50,000+ employees, 30+ manufacturing bases, and $25B revenue (2024), CHINT drives its "One Cloud & Two Networks" strategy. This leverages CHINT Cloud to pioneer the Energy Internet of Things (EIoT) and Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT), delivering integrated "Green Energy, Smart Network, Load Reduction, New Storage" solutions for industrial, commercial, and public sector energy transition and decarbonization.

Name: PIXON
Description:
PIXON Green Energy Private limited is a Solar Energy Company envisioned by the promoters of Marwadi Group to foray into clean and environment-friendly solar energy headquartered at Rajkot, Gujarat.

PIXON manifests into Manufacturing of Solar Modules & EVA Film and Providing turnkey EPC Solutions globally. The organization imbibes a state-of-the-art Solar Module manufacturing capacity of 1 GW and houses a cleanroom environment facility to a 1 GW manufacturing line for EVA films for backend Integration.

Pixon Energy offers a strategic and unique proposition to spearhead growth in the upcoming new energy avenues while keeping intact its core business values of Marwadi Group.

Name: Greenlane Renewables Inc.
Description: Greenlane is driving change: accelerating the energy transition. We are cleaning up two of the largest and most difficult to decarbonize sectors of the global energy system: the natural gas grid and commercial transportation. As a pioneer and leading specialist in biogas desulfurization and upgrading, we have been actively contributing to the decarbonization of our planet for over 35 years with more than 355 systems supplied into 28 countries. We transform biogas generated from organic waste into high-value grid-ready renewable natural gas (“RNG”) from a wide range of sources such as landfills, sugar mills, dairy farms, wastewater, and food waste. Greenlane is transforming energy production and creating new, sustainable revenue streams for its customers - all while dramatically reducing carbon emissions.

Name: CS WIND Offshore
Description:
CS WIND Offshore, based in Aalborg, Denmark in Northern Europe, specializes in the production of premium offshore wind foundations, utilizing decades of industry expertise.

CS WIND Offshore operates as an independent business unit in the CS WIND Corporation, a global leader in the wind industry that originated in South Korea. CS WIND Corporation has multiple factories in Asia, Europe and North America to supply clients with offshore wind turbine foundations, wind turbine towers, and other components for both onshore and offshore wind farms. 

CS WIND Corporation began producing wind towers in Vietnam in 2003 and now employs approximately 4,500 people worldwide. Over the last twenty years, CS WIND Corporation has delivered over 13,000 wind towers to major global wind turbine manufacturers.

In 2023, CS WIND Corporation completed the acquisition of Bladt Industries and rebranded it as CS WIND Offshore. This strategic move broadened the company's portfolio from wind tower production to include offshore wind substructures.

CS WIND Offshore’s headquarters in Aalborg offers substantial production capacity, with a focus on Transition Piece manufacturing in recent years. This facility has direct access to quay infrastructure, enabling efficient transportation and logistics operations. Our strategic location near the North Sea and Baltic Sea provides optimal access to key European offshore wind markets. This is demonstrated by our successful project deliveries in the United Kingdom, Germany, the Netherlands, Belgium, Poland and Denmark.

Founded in 1965 as Bladt Industries, we have completed more than 50 wind farm projects and supplied over 3,200 foundations around the globe.

Our goal is to maintain our standards of excellence, reliability, and safety while supplying high-quality offshore wind foundations to clients globally.

Name: IDE Technologies
Description:
A world leader in water treatment solutions, IDE specializes in the development, engineering, construction and operation of enhanced desalination and industrial water treatment plants.

IDE believes in partnership with customers. Partnership is about applying nearly 60 years of ground-breaking advances in water treatment technologies to serve your needs. Partnership is about delivering projects on schedule, within budget and above specifications, while adhering to strict health, safety and environmental regulations. Partnership is about bringing added value in technological innovation by highly committed people. IDE works with our partners to deliver full satisfaction.

Name: Sineng Electric
Description:
Sineng Electric is the global leading supplier of a comprehensive product portfolio including PV inverters, energy storage inverters, and power quality products. 

By establishing four R&D centers and leveraging top-notch resources, Sineng's unwavering commitment to technological innovation has enabled more people to access cost-effective, reliable, and sustainable energy. Known for the engineering excellence, rigorous testing standards, and consistent quality, Sineng ranks among the top four in global PV inverter market share and is recognized as a BloombergNEF Tier 1 PV inverter manufacturer.

Name: Electric Hydrogen
Description: Electric Hydrogen manufactures, delivers and commissions the world’s most powerful electrolyzers to make clean hydrogen projects economically viable today. The company’s complete HYPRPlant includes all system components required to turn water and electricity into the lowest cost clean hydrogen. Electric Hydrogen has a team of more than 300 people in the United States and Europe.

Name: Rubicon
Description: Rubicon provides world-class products and expert services in lighting, energy, and electric vehicle charging. We provide end-to-end solutions that include system design, engineering support, supplying products, software integration, and technical implementation. Our portfolio covers high quality lighting solutions, grid-tied and off-grid solar systems, smart energy management solutions, industrial-grade backup power systems, and EV charging infrastructure – powered by local and global brands. With a strong focus on excellent customer service, technical expertise, and long-term performance, Rubicon simplifies the transition to cleaner, more efficient technologies.

Name: VYNCKE
Description:
VYNCKE is a fourth-generation family business founded in 1912, with deep roots in Flanders, Belgium. We specialize in designing and building green and clean energy plants that convert biomass and industrial waste into thermal energy and electrical power. Our solutions range from 1 to 100 MWth for thermal energy and 0.5 to 20 MWe for electrical power, delivered as steam, hot water, thermal oil, or hot gas.

With over 4,400 references worldwide, VYNCKE is a global leader in sustainable energy solutions. Our team of over 430 dedicated Vynckeneers operates from 10 locations across the globe, ensuring we are always close to our clients. We serve a diverse range of industries, including food and agriculture, wood processing, and recovered fuels, turning waste into valuable energy.

Check out our vacancies here : https://www.careers.vyncke.com/

Name: Alpex Solar Ltd.
Description:
Alpex Solar Limited, a global powerhouse in the manufacturing of highly specialized high-power photovoltaic modules, stands as a beacon of innovation and excellence in the renewable energy industry. Since its inception in 1997 as an international trading company, the organization has undergone a remarkable evolution, transitioning into a world-class manufacturer with cutting-edge technology.

At the heart of Alpex's success lies its state-of-the-art facilities, boasting fully automated plants and a workforce characterized by highly skilled 250+ individuals. This formidable combination positions the company at the forefront of the industry, with a clear ambition to be recognized as the best. The current manufacturing capacity of 450 MW, expandable to an impressive 2 GW, underscores Alpex's commitment to scalable and sustainable growth.

Quality is paramount at Alpex, evident in the stringent quality control systems implemented throughout the manufacturing process. Coupled with the utilization of a world-class ERP system, the company ensures that its photovoltaic modules meet and exceed the highest industry standards, cementing its reputation for reliability and excellence.

From its roots as an international trading company, Alpex has diversified its portfolio to specialize in products that embody sustainable technology. The company's agility and commitment to exploring new business horizons and pioneering technologies have propelled it to a leadership position in highly competitive markets.

Name: Thornova Solar
Description:
Thornova Solar is a global manufacturers focused on energy solutions and the design and manufacture of renewable energy components such as photovoltaic modules and inverters.

Our R&D team is focused on the ongoing development of innovative solar technology for the residential rooftop distributed generation and C&I and utility-scale ground-mounted solar markets.

With our state-of-the-art automated production facilities, we deliver the reliability and performance you and your customers expect. Our local warehousing capacity and support around the world ensures that your projects are always installed on time. Learn more at ThornovaSolar.com.

Name: Nxu, Inc.
Description: Nxu, Inc., formerly known as Atlis Motor Vehicles, is a US-owned technology company manufacturing innovative battery cells and battery packs, for use in advanced energy storage systems and megawatt charging stations. Atlis will rebrand as Nxu, Inc. (pronounced: “new”), to more closely align with the Company’s focus on developing technology to make electrification viable for mobility and infrastructure.

Name: Huawei Digital Power Sub-Saharan Africa
Description: Huawei Digital Power's business domains include Smart PV, FusionCharge, DriveONE, Data Center Facility, and Site Power Facility. It operates 12 R&D centers in regions including China, Europe, and Asia Pacific and possesses more than 1700 patents (by the end of 2022). With approximately 10,000 employees, 60% of whom are focused on R&D, Huawei Digital Power serves over 3 billion people across more than 170 countries and regions.

Name: Pylontech
Description: Pylontech is a dedicated BESS (battery energy storage system) provider, consolidating expertise in electrochemistry, power electronics, and system integration to deliver reliable BESS  solutions globally. With its continuous and rapid growth, it has become a leading supplier of lithium battery energy storage systems worldwide.

Name: PEC
Description:
Founded in 1984, PEC is celebrating its 40th anniversary.
PEC is now headquartered in Hungary with R&D, manufacturing and support facilities in Belgium, Germany, Hungary, the United States, Malaysia, China and Japan.  

PEC helps battery cell producers in the development and scale up of their GIGA factories. 

We provide the technology and equipment for the complete cell activation, including RAPID Single-Step Electrolyte Filling, soaking, charging, final degassing and sealing, formation, ageing and testing. 

We have a clear focus to the Total Cost of Ownership. The PEC technology reduces energy consumption and improves cell performance and yield.

For more information please check out our website    www.peccorp.com

Name: Ceres
Description:
Ceres is a leading developer of clean energy technology; fuel cells for power generation and electrolysers for green hydrogen. Its licensing model has seen it establish partnerships with some of the world's most progressive companies, such as Doosan, Shell, Denso, Weichai and Thermax to develop clean energy systems and products at the scale and pace needed to address climate change for power generation, transportation, industry, and everyday living. 

If you’re interested in working for us, find us online:

Website: www.ceres.tech
Twitter: @CeresPower
Email: info@cerespower.com

Name: Northvolt Germany
Description:
Hej! Welcome to Northvolt in Germany. With our main office in Hamburg, all eyes are on the city of Heide and the Dithmarschen region in Schleswig-Holstein where we are planning to build Northvolt Drei — one of the largest battery gigafactories in Europe. 

Powered by the most sustainable, low-carbon energy grid in Germany thanks to local wind power, our goal is to supply automotive customers with 60 gigawatt hours of sustainable, high-quality battery cells every year.

Northvolt was founded in 2016 to enable the transition to a decarbonized future by establishing a sustainable battery industry. To do this, we’re pioneering a new approach to battery manufacturing rooted in a commitment to fossil-free energy, sustainable sourcing of raw materials and recycling.  

Today, Northvolt has grown to over 5,500 people from over 120 different nationalities, and has secured over $55 billion worth of contracts from key customers, including BMW, Fluence, Scania, Volkswagen, Volvo and Polestar.

Name: KORE Power
Description:
KORE Power, Inc. (KORE) is headquartered in Coeur d’Alene, Idaho, with operations in Waterbury, Vermont, and Buckeye, Arizona. KORE is the leading U.S.-based developer of battery cell technology for the clean energy industry. With clients in energy storage, e-mobility, utility, industrial and mission-critical markets, KORE Power provides the backbone for decarbonization across the globe. As the first U.S.-based, American-owned, and fully integrated provider of cells, batteries, and solutions, KORE is uniquely positioned to serve these markets. Through the construction and operations of its large-scale battery cell manufacturing facility in the U.S., KORE is positioned to operate at 12 GWh per year capacity. The facility (the “KOREPlex”) will operate with net-zero carbon emissions through strategic partnerships and solar and storage co-generation.

KORE Power’s differentiated approach provides customers with direct access, unparalleled service, superior technology, and Tier 1 product availability. Focused on building sustainable communities, clean energy jobs, and green economic expansion, KORE Power is proud to offer a functional solution to real-world problems and fulfill market demand to deliver a zero-carbon future. The KOREPlex is expected to come to Buckeye, Arizona, and be the anchor to the development of the Sustainable Valley by the end of 2024. For more information, visit www.korepower.com. 

Our differentiated approach provides customers with direct access to superior technology and unparalleled service in the renewable energy space. We’re passionate about building resilient, sustainable communities, clean energy jobs, and green economic expansion. KORE is proud to offer functional decarbonization solutions that fulfill the growing market demand for a zero-carbon future.

Name: NIBE
Description:
NIBE is a global group that develops and manufactures intelligent, energy-efficient indoor comfort solutions for all types of properties. This allows our clients to reduce their energy consumption and their impact on the environment. NIBE also supplies components and solutions for intelligent heating and control for industry and infrastructure. 

NIBE has been listed on Nasdaq Stockholm's Large Cap list under the name NIBE Industrier since 1997, and has had a secondary listing on SIX Swiss Exchange since 2011.
 
The company has three different business areas: NIBE Climate Solutions, NIBE Element and NIBE Stoves.

Name: Elogen
Description:
ELOGEN is a technology provider specialized in the design, the manufacturing and the maintenance of Hydrogen generators using water electrolysis, based on Proton Exchange Membrane (PEM) technology.

We offer a wide range of hydrogen generators, integrating on one platform all auxiliaries required to run our electrolysers.

Our equipments meet the highest safety standards of European and International regulations, as well as technical and safety requirements of leading gas distribution companies.

ELOGEN serves the market of hydrogen generation for industrial purposes, and is committed to support its customers on the rapidly growing multi-MW hydrogen mobility and renewable energy storage markets.

Name: Array (BR)
Description: A ARRAY Technologies (NASDAQ: ARRY) é uma empresa líder global em energia renovável e fornecedora de tecnologia de rastreamento solar em grande escala. Projetados para suportar as condições mais adversas do planeta, os rastreadores solares de alta qualidade e o software sofisticado da ARRAY maximizam a produção de energia, acelerando a adoção de energia econômica e sustentável. Fundada e sediada nos Estados Unidos, a ARRAY conta com sua cadeia de suprimentos global diversificada e abordagem centrada no cliente para fornecer, comissionar e apoiar desenvolvimentos de energia solar em todo o mundo, iluminando o caminho para um futuro mais brilhante e inteligente para energia limpa. Para mais notícias e informações sobre o ARRAY, visite arraytechinc.com.

Name: LuxpowerTek
Description:
LuxpowerTek was founded in 2017 by a group of engineers, who are dedicated to offering the most advanced inverter technology in the carbon-neutral era, to integrators, installers, and users.

Over time, Luxpower has grown into a team with R&D over 70% of the company, being recognized as one of the most high-tech suppliers in the solar industry. 

Today, more than 300,000 Luxpower systems are installed worldwide in various scenarios, including hybrid, off-grid, AC coupling and DC coupling, and the list is growing. Our self-developed platform offers the most accessible monitoring to all roles from the chain, products ranging from residential to commercial, and service is always our priority.

We are committed to making our users benefit from the sun and enjoy life.

Name: Jinko ESS Europe
Description:
Jinko ESS, is a strategic arm of JinkoSolar, and aims to become one of the world's leading energy storage solutions providers, specifically designed for commercial, industrial and utility applications.

Renowned for vertical integration capacity, Jinko ESS solutions exhibit seamless compatibility with various renewable sources, including Solar PV systems. Our state-of-the-art designs feature advanced liquid-cooling technology and multi-layer safety protection, leading to achieving energy security and catalyzing decarbonisation efforts. With technological innovation at the operational forefront, Jinko ESS stands to power a sustainable world.

Name: Gamesa Electric
Description:
Gamesa Electric is a worldwide reference point in the electrical equipment sector (design and manufacturing) for markets such as photovoltaic, hydroelectric, nuclear, oil & gas, gen sets, electrical traction, marine propulsion and wind power.

The company has accumulated 25 years of experience in developing their own power electronics technologies, making it a pioneer in the market, and more than 90 years of experience manufacturing motors and electrical generators. 

Gamesa Electric provides complete, flexible solutions with state-of-the-art manufacturing systems ('lean manufacturing') - whether produced in series or answers custom-built for the particular needs of clients from across the globe.  

The company takes advantage of the technological and production capabilities from parent company Gamesa, a leading group in the technology industry. It also operates through its network of maintenance services in 36 countries and 5 continents, responding with flexibility and the optimal solution for the needs of their customers in various sectors. 

Gamesa Electric's production centres hold the ISO 9001, ISO 14001 and OHSAS 18001 certificates.

Name: Sungrow MENA & Central Asia
Description:
Sungrow, a global leader in renewable energy technology, has pioneered sustainable power solutions for over 28 years. 

As of June 2025, Sungrow has installed 870 GW of power electronic converters worldwide. The Company is recognized as the world's most bankable PV inverter and energy storage company (BloombergNEF). Its innovations power clean energy projects across the globe, supported by a network of 520 service outlets guaranteeing excellent customer experience.

At Sungrow, we're committed to bridging to a sustainable future through cutting-edge technology and unparalleled service.

Name: GAF Energy
Description: The GAF Energy LinkedIn page has merged with GAF. Follow GAF to stay up to date on jobs and all things GAF Energy.

Name: SPAN
Description: Enabling electrification for all

Name: Liftra
Description:
Liftra specializes in designing, engineering, and manufacturing tailor-made solutions for onshore and offshore wind turbine installation, maintenance, and transportation. With extensive experience, world-class engineering, agile mindset and a passion for a sustainable future, our technology is developed to provide the wind energy industry with solutions that support efficient installation and maintenance of current and new-generation wind turbines.

With 8 global locations, over 600 talented employees, we collaborate and partner with industry leading clients, and supply our services and equipment to 30+ countries all over the world. Our solutions and services, such as the proven Liftra Self-Hoisting Crane, the upcoming LT1500 Turbine Installation Crane and Blade Yokes unlock a cost-efficient approach to operations in remote and complex locations, reducing CO2 levels created during turbine installation and maintenance.

Name: A123 Systems
Description:
A123 Systems, LLC develops and manufactures advanced Nanophosphate lithium iron phosphate batteries and energy storage systems that deliver high power, maximize usable energy, and provide long life, all with excellent safety performance.

Founded in 2001, A123's proprietary Nanophosphate technology is built on novel nanoscale materials initially developed at the Massachusetts Institute of Technology. Today, A123 Systems is headquartered in Livonia, MI and employs more than 2,000 people worldwide.

A123 Systems is a TS-16949 and ISO9001 certified supplier of advanced lithium ion cells and systems designed to help customers quickly and cost-effectively take engineering breakthroughs from conception to commercialization.

Why A123?

Game-changing Technology
From breakthrough Nanophosphate chemistry to innovations in battery systems management and complete system design, A123 Systems provides game-changing energy storage solutions that deliver a new combination of high power, excellent safety and long life. 

Complete Solutions
A123 Systems partners with customers to provide complete energy storage solutions that enable the rapid development and delivery of innovative products that meet demand in both existing and emerging markets. 

Commitment to Operational Excellence
At A123, we are dedicated to operational excellence from design and development to production and delivery.  Our vertically integrated, state-of-the-art global manufacturing facilities produce high-quality electrodes, cells and battery systems to meet evolving customer requirements for innovative technologies. 

Field Proven
With battery systems operating in vehicles ranging from passenger cars to commercial transit buses around the world, our experienced engineering teams have the expertise to integrate advanced battery systems that deliver premium performance in the field.

Name: Sif Group
Description:
With a company history dating back to 1948 and with more than 2400 monopiles produced, Sif Group is leading in offshore foundations for wind turbines and oil & gas platforms. Continuous investments in production equipment and in enlarging our production capacity enable us to produce XL monopiles up to 11 meters in diameter, supporting our customers in our common goal to lower the cost of energy. Today Sif employs over 600 people (approximately 50% of whom are on the payroll) at two manufacturing sites in the Netherlands: Roermond and Maasvlakte 2, near Rotterdam. Sif is listed on Euronext Amsterdam since May 2016.

Our mission
We want to be the best monopile solution provider through innovation, engineering and excellent manufacturing with a commitment to the environment and our employees’ well-being, all as confirmed by our customers.

Job opportunities at Sif
Our employees are driven and focused on quality. Through teamwork, decisiveness and imagination, we ensure that we make an impact together. Is this you as well, and do you want to work for Sif? You can find our latest job opportunities at www.sifcareers.com/.

Name: Polar Racking Inc.
Description: Polar Racking Inc. is a North American leader in the design, engineering and manufacturing of PV mounting systems. We are at the forefront of PV innovation, leading the industry in cutting edge design with a focus on continuous innovation. Our vision is to deliver the highest value to our clients at the lowest cost per kWh. To support this, the company specializes in utility-scale and commercial ground-mount solutions, along with a wide variety of solar foundation solutions. This, coupled with our unique suite of engineering collaboration tools, technical services and installation support allow us to deliver turnkey solutions that are modular, lighter and quicker to install. We support our North American clients from our many locations across Canada and USA.

Name: Quest One
Description:
As a technological pioneer, Quest One develops and produces innovative PEM electrolyzers and electrolyzer stacks. The company provides the key technology for the economical, efficient, and reliable production of green hydrogen. As part of Everllence and the Volkswagen Group, Quest One can also draw on extensive expertise in the realization of large-scale projects in heavy industry and automotive mass production. Founded in 1997 as a scientific project, Quest One has been active in the hydrogen industry for over 25 years and is based in Augsburg and Hamburg, Germany. The U.S. branch near Houston, Texas opened in 2024.

Name: Green Power
Description:
[EN] Green Power  is a global provider of solar PV, energy management and e-mobility solutions, a value-added partner (VAP) of Huawei, leader in Europe and Africa.    

Engaged into the energy transition, our mission is to accelerate the distribution and adoption of innovative, secured and sustainable energy and mobility solutions through a range of products and high-value services for businesses and consumers.  

Green Power Technologie is developing close partnerships with more than 200 customers for a capacity of more than 4.5GW deployed across its markets: developers, EPCs, design offices, distributors and installers.   

Green Power Technologie's strength is its unique and recognized expertise in the field of energy, our close relationship with our customers and partners, the power and agility of our logistics and our experience in developing new markets.   
-------

[FR] Green Power Technologie est fournisseur global de solutions photovoltaïques, de gestion de l’énergie et d’e-mobility, partenaire à valeur ajoutée (VAP) de Huawei, leader en Europe et en Afrique. 

Engagé dans la transition énergétique, notre mission est d’accélérer la distribution et l'adoption de solutions d'énergie et de mobilité innovantes, sécurisées et durables à travers une offre de produits et de services à forte valeur ajoutée pour les entreprises et les particuliers. 

En très forte croissance, Green Power Technologie développe des partenariats de proximité avec plus de 200 clientspour une capacité de plus de 4.5GW déployées à travers ses marchés : développeurs, EPC, bureaux d’études, distributeurs et installateurs.  

La force de Green Power Technologie est son expertise unique, reconnue dans le domaine de l’énergie, notre relation étroite avec nos clients et partenaires, la puissance et l’agilité de notre logistique ainsi que notre expérience dans le développement de nouveaux marchés.

Name: K2 Systems GmbH
Description:
We connect strengths: innovative mounting systems, digital technology and people with energy and know-how to create long-lasting solutions for solar installations. With around 500 employees at locations in 10 countries worldwide, K2 Systems is driving solar energy production
with intuitive mounting systems, cutting-edge digital services and exceptional customer service.

Further distinguishing K2 is its commitment to sustainability, as evidenced by its strategic sourcing approach and the regional manufacturing of its systems primarily in Europe. Since its formation in 2004, K2 has been supporting photovoltaic systems
worldwide.

 ES & PT: https://www.linkedin.com/company/k2-systems-es
 FR: https://www.linkedin.com/company/k2-systems-fr 
 IT: https://www.linkedin.com/company/k2-systems-it/

Name: FranklinWH Energy Storage Inc.
Description:
FranklinWH Energy Storage Inc. is a start-up company invested by Sequoia Capital, founded by a group of experts in power electronics, BMS, and EMS. We aim to be the leader in the Residential ESS industry. 

FranklinWH has 20+ storage patents pending, and 150+ Team patents in UPS, storage, BMS & related.

Franklin Home Power offered by FranklinWH, is an all-in-one home energy solution based on AC battery and AI-integrated technologies to give everyone maximum comfort, control, and energy security.

With FHP, you will enjoy peace of mind with energy freedom.

Name: Lithion Technologies
Description:
Lithion Technologies has developed a sustainable, robust, and cost-effective solution to produce strategic materials from end-of-life lithium-ion batteries and non-compliant components. These batteries are found in everyday items such as electric cars, rechargeable tools, and electronic equipment.  

Our technologies enable the recovery of up to 95% of the components of these batteries so that they can be reused to make new ones. We offer a concrete way to close the loop on battery life-cycle by creating a secondary source of strategic materials (lithium, nickel, cobalt). 

Lithion Technologies aims for a worldwide deployment of its technology, which began with the construction of a pilot plant in 2019, and continues today with the construction of our first commercial critical minerals extraction plant near Montreal, Canada.

Lithion's processes drastically reduce the ecological debt of lithium-ion batteries and electric vehicles. We make the energy transition truly sustainable!

Name: 远东股份 Far East Smart Energy
Description:
Far East Smart Energy Co., Ltd. (abbreviated as "Far East Energy Co., Ltd.", stock code: 600869) is a listed company under Far East Holding Group Co., Ltd. It focuses on three major industries: Smart Cable & Wire Network, Smart Battery, and Smart Airport, and is a global service provider of smart energy and digital intelligent cities.
Founded in 1985, the company has been recognized as one of the "Top 500 Chinese Enterprises", "Top 500 Chinese Private Enterprises" and "China's Best Employer Enterprises".
The company always upholds its mission of "Creating Value and Serving Society", takes "Jointly Building and Sharing a Safe, Green and Better Life" as its vision, and adheres to the core values of "Customer Orientation, Striving for Contribution, Dream and Passion, Integrity and Pragmatism, Innovative Excellence, Self-Criticism, and Harmonious Win-Win".
1. Smart Cable & Wire Network
As a leading enterprise in the global cable and wire industry, the company maintains a leading market position in fields such as wind power, nuclear power, photovoltaic power, UHV (Ultra-High Voltage), and charging pile cables.
2. Smart Battery
Its main business covers energy storage, light-duty power, power tools, smart home and other fields. It has fully deployed a diversified matrix of products and solutions including power generation-side energy storage, industrial and commercial energy storage, household energy storage systems, and portable power stations to cater to the needs of multi-scenario applications.
3. Smart Airport
The company holds first-class qualifications in civil aviation specialties such as airport visual aids engineering, air traffic control engineering, and weak current system engineering. As a leading enterprise in the field of professional technical construction of airports, it has undertaken nearly 700 projects in more than 170 airports at home and abroad.

Name: Lunar Energy
Description:
Lunar exists to power homes around the world with endless clean energy. We believe that, provided with the right tools, a clean energy future is within reach. And to give people those tools, we’re building an ecosystem of all-electric products starting with a next-generation home battery system. Our Lunar System is a solar and battery product brilliantly designed to let you capture, store and use every ray of sunshine — day, night, and even during an outage.

Every Lunar System comes with our AI-powered Gridshare software built in. This leading energy management platform controls any type of distributed energy resources (such as home batteries and EV chargers) to help homeowners maximize the value of their energy and optimize the wider power system.

Recognizing our commitment and accomplishments, Forbes has named us one of America's Best Startup Employers for 2023. Want to help us shape the future of clean energy? We’re looking for passionate and talented candidates to join our team.

Name: Adani Wind
Description:
At Adani Wind, we are the dedicated Wind Turbine Generator (WTG) manufacturing arm of the esteemed Adani Group. Our vision propels us to become a leading global manufacturer and supplier of cutting-edge Blades, Nacelle, and Hub, driving the transformation towards a cleaner, greener future. Our unwavering commitment lies in delivering sustainable energy solutions through advanced technology and unmatched expertise. We believe in making a positive impact on the renewable energy landscape, embracing innovation to foster growth and environmental stewardship.
Adani Wind is at the forefront of the global transition towards a cleaner future. Our goal is to provide innovative, reliable, and high-quality Wind Turbine Generators, becoming a driving force in renewable energy worldwide. With an eye on the future, we are diligently working to expand our portfolio and ramp up the existing facility located in Mundra, India, aiming to reach an impressive 5GW capacity in the near  Recently, Adani Wind achieved a significant milestone by developing India's largest Wind Turbine Generator rated at 5.2 MW, featuring an impressive rotor diameter of 160m.
Join us in our mission to create a cleaner, sustainable tomorrow. Together, we can power the world with renewable energy and make a lasting difference.

Name: Ateş Wind Power
Description:
Ateş Wind Power manufactured her first Wind Towers in 2013 with her vast experience throughout last 30 years in the steel structures industry. The Wind Turbine Generator facility is built in Ateş Wind Power Plant, manufacturing and delivering direct drive generators since 2019.  

Our Mission
Proud to be a part of the Wind Energy sector, we work hard for a sustainable world, focus on our clients’ success through provision of our innovative and integrated solutions.

Our Vision
Being the most recognized and preferred company in the Wind Energy sector.

Name: Envision Energy India Private Limited
Description:
Envision Energy is a world-leading green technology company that provides renewable energy solutions for global enterprises, governments, and institutions. Encompassing three major business sectors - Smart Wind Turbines, Energy Storage, and Green Hydrogen Solutions, Envision Energy collaboratively constructs comprehensive solutions for energy transformation. It also manages Envision-Hongshan Carbon-Neutral Fund and owns Envision Racing Formula E team, who conquered the Formula E Teams' Championship in 2023.

With its contribution to the global green energy transition, Envision Energy is listed as a “Green Giant” in TIME “2024Time 100 Most Influential Companies” list. Envision Energy has also received several accolades for its sustainability performance, including the EcoVadis Gold Medal and the CDP “A-List”. It was also recognized in Fortune's “Change the World” list and ranked among the top 10 smartest companies by the MIT Technology Review. 

Today, Envision Energy leverages its global network of R&D and engineering centers across China, the United States, UK, France, Germany, Denmark, etc. to continuously lead global green technology development. Envision Energy joined the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi) and committed to achieving the "Business Ambition for 1.5°C" in 2021. It has achieved carbon neutrality across its global operations by 2022 and will achieve carbon neutrality throughout its value chain by 2028.

Name: ADIWATT
Description:
AdiWatt conçoit, fabrique et installe avec ses équipes de pose des structures métalliques et systèmes d'intégration pour centrales solaires : ombrières, toitures, centrales au sol. Nos solutions dédiées aux professionnels du photovoltaïque s'adaptent à tous les projets, même les plus spécifiques. Nos 4 usines en France, Espagne, Allemagne et Pologne nous permettent une réactivité accrue pour vous apporter satisfaction.
Depuis sa création en 2009, AdiWatt a généré plus de 3.6 GW de production d’énergie solaire à travers le monde, faisant de la société un acteur majeur et reconnu dans l’industrie en offrant à ses clients et partenaires des solutions reconnues pour leur qualité et leur durabilité.

AdiWatt designs, manufactures and installs metal structures and integration systems for solar power plants: carports, rooftop systems, ground-mounted systems. Our solutions for photovoltaic professionals can be adapted to suit even the most specific projects. Our 4 factories in France, Spain, Germany and Poland enable us to react quickly to meet your needs.
Since its creation in 2009, AdiWatt has generated more than 3.6 GW of solar power worldwide, making the company a major and recognized player in the industry by offering its customers and partners solutions recognized for their quality and sustainability.

Name: Intelligent Energy
Description:
Powering the hydrogen future with our outstanding fuel cells and service.

Intelligent Energy is a world leading fuel cell engineering company focused on the development, manufacture and commercialisation of its Proton Exchange Membrane (PEM) fuel cell products, for customers in the automotive, aerospace, material handling, Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV), stationary power and portable power sectors. Fuel cells are used in multiple applications, where clean, lightweight, high efficiency and cost-effective power is required.  

The company is headquartered and manufactures in Loughborough in the UK, with representation in the US, Japan, South Korea and China.

Name: AUXSOL
Description: Ningbo AUX Solar Technology Co., Ltd.（AUXSOL）, a distinguished subsidiary of Ningbo AUX Group（https://www.auxgroup.com/）, was founded in 1986, ranked China’s top 500 enterprises, covers 6 industries: Real State, Investment, Medical Service, Home Appliances, Electrical Equipment and New Energy. AUX focuses on New Energy as the key increasing business for next 20 years. At the forefront of cutting-edge solar solutions, AUXSOL（https://auxsol.com/index） leads in PCB’s R&D capabilities with a staggering annual capacity. Our specialization encompasses on-grid inverters, hybrid inverters, battery packs, and comprehensive ALL-IN-ONE energy storage systems. AUXSOL stands as a prominent figure in the global solar market, with a diverse presence across industries. Our commitment to innovation and sustainability is mirrored in strategically located Research and Development centers in Ningbo and Shenzhen. In addition, our service centers are strategically located across key regions such as Europe (Poland, Germany, Spain, Greece) and the Americas (Brazil). Nansen Solar（https://www.nansensolar.com.br/）, the brand of AUXSOL in Brazil, offers comprehensive solutions in electric energy measurement, focusing on Smart Grids, electric mobility infrastructure, and solar power generation. In harmony with global sustainability objectives, AUXSOL actively integrates Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) principles into our operations. Embark on the journey into the future of energy with AUXSOL – your reliable partner in pioneering solar technologies and sustainable solutions. For further inquiries, please feel free to contact us：info@auxsol .com

Name: Osbit
Description:
Osbit’s vision is to unlock a clean energy future by creating smarter technology. We are focused on designing and building cutting-edge engineering systems to overcome the offshore challenges of today and tomorrow. 

Our equipment enables a range of key operations including subsea burial, cable installation, foundation installation, and access. Osbit is a proud member of Venterra Company, a dedicated wind services company, helping wind power grow.

Name: Jackery
Description:
Founded in California in 2012, Jackery is a leading provider of innovative solar generator and sustainable power solutions, driven by its mission to provide "Sustainable power for your life." In 2016, Jackery launched its first portable power stations, followed by the introduction of solar generators in 2018. Expanding its offerings, the company began producing solar generators tailored for essential home backup in 2020, ensuring critical appliances stay powered during outages and emergencies. 

Powered by a direct sales model that seamlessly integrates R&D, production, branding, retail, and service, Jackery has built a global presence. Headquartered in California with offices in Silicon Valley, Tokyo, Düsseldorf, and Melbourne, its products are now available in over 50 countries. Through 60+ independent websites, leading e-commerce platforms, and a network of over 10,000 retail stores—including major retailers like Home Depot, Costco, Target, Best Buy, Walmart, and Bic Camera—Jackery is making clean energy more accessible than ever.

To date, Jackery has sold over 6 million units worldwide, secured 765 patents, and received over 100 international awards. With over 150,000 five-star reviews, Jackery has earned the trust of customers globally. Jackery's products have generated an estimated 1,070 million kWh of renewable energy, reducing carbon emissions by 1.069 million tons and contributing to a greener, more resilient future for individuals and communities. Committed to innovation, reliability, and sustainability, Jackery strives to create the most innovative, user-friendly, reliable, and sustainable solar generators, delivering peace of mind and energy independence for households, outdoor enthusiasts, and professionals alike.

Name: Sungrow Hydrogen
Description:
As a subsidiary of Sungrow (Stock Code: 300274), Sungrow Hydrogen specializes in water electrolysis technology for hydrogen production. Its main products include ALK electrolyzers, PEM electrolyzers, PWM hydrogen production power supplies, gas-liquid separation equipment, hydrogen purification equipment, and intelligent hydrogen management system. Sungrow Hydrogen is committed to providing "efficient, intelligent, safe" flexible green hydrogen production system solutions. 

Sungrow Hydrogen has cultivated a professional R&D team with rich experience and strong independent innovation capabilities. The company has applied for more than 650 patents and copyright certificates, participated in the drafting of numerous industry standards, and mastered core technologies for flexible green hydrogen production. The company has established a 30MW Water Electrolysis Hydrogen Production Empirical Platform, Key Materials Research Center, and Product Research Center in China, as well as the Sungrow European Research Institute Hydrogen Technology Laboratory in Germany. Additionally, it owns the world's leading hydrogen production equipment manufacturing plant, with a total production capacity of 3GW.

The company's core products have passed tests and certifications from international authoritative institutions such as Bureau Veritas and TÜV Rheinland, and have been widely used in multiple large-scale wind/solar powered hydrogen production projects both domestically and internationally, helping to accelerate the process of decarbonization in the fields of power, industry and transportation. 

Sungrow Hydrogen adheres to the value proposition of "Bridge to the ultimate energy," continuously leading in flexible green hydrogen production and electro-hydrogen integrated technologies, and creating greater value for global clients.

Powerfoyle can enhance products with extended or even eternal battery life, putting the power of cutting-edge solar technology directly into the hands of consumers. By revolutionizing the perception of available energy, Exeger makes products both smarter and more sustainable – with the vision to touch the lives of a billion people by 2030.

EVLO designs, delivers and operates energy storage systems with advanced safety and sustainability features to power a brighter future for our world. Our patented, eco-friendly battery chemistry is the culmination of 40 years of research by our parent company’s advanced innovation lab.

Stockage d’énergie EVLO inc. (EVLO Energy storage Inc.) is a subsidiary of Hydro-Québec, North America’s largest renewable energy producer.

Name: NEM Energy Group
Description:
NEM is a global player in the power generation sector, committed to making a tangible impact on creating a better world. Our product range is designed not only to be innovative and competitive but also aligns with the principles of socially responsible entrepreneurship. By combining our knowledge and years of international experience with proven operational excellence, NEM aims to become the partner of choice within our industry.

Headquartered in Zoeterwoude, the Netherlands, NEM Energy Group stands as a world leader in heat transfer technology. Functioning as both an Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) and a dedicated aftermarket service provider, our focus lies on maintaining a high standard of quality and fostering innovation. We offer comprehensive solutions, from the design and production of new steam and heat exchange equipment to reliable aftermarket services. Our expertise extends across various industries, including power generation, oil & gas, and the geothermal market.

Operating through four major business units, NEM covers a broad spectrum of services. The Heat Recovery Solutions unit specializes in providing Heat Recovery Steam Generators (HRSG) behind gas turbines, with installations on six continents. The Exhaust and Diverter Solutions unit, headquartered in Recklinghausen, Germany, caters to the entire range of gas turbine applications, from industrial aero-derivative to large frame heavy-duty machines. The NEM - Balcke-Dürr Heat Exchanger Solutions unit, based in Dusseldorf with over 130 years of experience, offers a diverse range of heat exchangers, including condensers and feedwater heaters. Lastly, our Aftermarket Services department ensures the global servicing of installations, providing spare parts, replacements, complete revamps, and lifetime extensions.

Name: Livoltek Brasil
Description: Livoltek is a global leading technology company that energizes the transformation of society and industry to achieve a more productive, sustainable future. By connecting the smart cloud system to its PV inverter, battery inverter, off-grid inverter, and IoT communication, Livoltek pushes the boundaries of technology to drive performance to new levels.

Name: H2Pro
Description:
H2Pro is on a mission to enable affordable green hydrogen at scale by providing the world with the leading next generation electrolyzer. 
 
Green hydrogen is the missing piece in the puzzle for achieving net zero, but faces two critical challenges: economic viability and compatibility with renewables. H2Pro is reinventing green hydrogen production to overcome these barriers and deliver the lowest Levelized Cost of Hydrogen (LCOH). 
 
H2Pro’s breakthrough electrolysis technology solves the key challenges of traditional electrolysis by decoupling hydrogen and oxygen generation (producing hydrogen and oxygen at separate times). This decoupled process significantly cuts down both capital and operating costs via a streamlined membrane-less reactor design, economical materials, and highly efficient energy usage. H2Pro’s technology is also designed from day one for direct renewable integration, making it the first fit-for-green electrolyzer. 
 
Headquartered in Caesarea, Israel, H2Pro was founded in 2019 based on years of research conducted at the Technion. H2Pro has raised over 100 Million USD. It is backed by leading investors and strategic partners, including Bill Gates-founded Breakthrough Energy Ventures, Temasek Holdings, Horizons Ventures, ArcelorMittal, Yara Growth Ventures, OurCrowd, COPEC, Hyundai, Sumitomo Corporation, Extantia, Bazan, Doral and New Fortress Energy. Today, we are a team of 100 people working every day to make green hydrogen affordable at scale. The future of our planet may depend on it.

Nature Articles on H2Pro's Decoupled Water Electrolysis (DWE) technology:
Technologies and prospects for decoupled and membraneless water electrolysis: https://rdcu.be/elIbi

Decoupled hydrogen and oxygen evolution by a two-step electrochemical–chemical cycle for efficient overall water splitting:
https://www.nature.com/articles/s41560-019-0462-7.epdf?author_access_token=rI0

Name: LESSO Solar
Description:
LESSO Group is a Hong Kong-listed (2128.HK) manufacturer of building materials with an annual revenue of over USD4.5 billion from its global operations.

LESSO Solar, a flagship division of the Group, specialises in making solar panels, inverters, and energy storage systems, and providing new-energy solutions.

Founded in 2022, LESSO Solar has been growing with spectacular pace. We have a production capacity of 7GW for solar panels in early 2023, and expect a global capacity of over 15GW by the end of 2023.

We are rapidly expanding our global team. We welcome aspiring professionals from around the world to join us for this bright and exciting journey of building a solar-powered world.

Name: Genvia
Description:
Today, and for decades, global warming is a reality. Together, and individually, we must act and activate all possible levers to reduce CO2 emissions on a global scale. Decarbonated hydrogen is a key element of the energy transition for many countries aiming for carbon neutrality by 2050. At Genvia, we are convinced that it is a sustainable and virtuous solution for our planet and for future generations.

Genvia aims to industrialize the manufacture of high-temperature electrolyzers (EHT) to mass-produce carbon-free hydrogen - a first in France - and thus contribute to achieving carbon neutrality by 2050, particularly for industry. At Genvia, our mission is therefore to support industrial sites that emit CO2, yet are essential to the development of our society, in the energy transition to help achieve decarbonization targets on a global scale. 

Founded in 2021, Genvia is a joint venture created by industrialist SLB, CEA, as well as Vicat, Vinci and the Occitanie / Midi-Pyrénées Region via ARIS. This strong alliance between partners with complementary expertise is essential to industrialize this innovative electrolysis technology developed by the CEA.

Name: mylight150
Description:
mylight150 : leader de la transition énergétique en Europe
Fondée en 2014 à Lyon par Ondine et Virgile Suavet, mylight150 est un acteur clé de la transition énergétique, avec l'ambition de faire du solaire la première source d'énergie en Europe. Nous nous engageons à réduire de moitié les factures d'électricité grâce à nos solutions innovantes d'autoconsommation solaire et de gestion d'énergie pour les maisons.
Notre gamme de produits inclut des panneaux solaires, la batterie virtuelle MySmartBattery et un système de gestion de l'énergie avancé, soutenus par 22 brevets. Avec plus de 30 000 maisons équipées à travers la France, l'Espagne, la Roumanie et la Suisse, nous continuons à étendre notre impact.
Employant 260 salariés, dont 70 en R&D, mylight150 a levé 100 millions d’euros fin 2023 et a récemment été reconnue par le French Tech 120 pour son excellence et son innovation. 
Rejoignez-nous pour façonner un avenir énergétique durable.
 
mylight150 : leading energy transition in Europe
Founded in 2014 in Lyon by siblings Ondine and Virgile Suavet, mylight150 is a key player in the energy transition, with the ambition to make solar the primary source of energy in Europe. We are committed to cutting household electricity bills by half through our innovative solutions for solar self-consumption and our cutting-edge energy management system.
Our product range includes solar panels, the virtual battery : MySmartBattery, and an advanced energy management system, supported by 22 patents. With over 30,000 homes equipped across France, Spain, Romania, and Switzerland, we continue to accelerate our expansion.
With a team of 260 employees, including 70 in R&D, mylight150 raised €100 million in late 2023 and was recently recognized by the French Tech 120 for its excellence and innovation. 
Join us in shaping a sustainable energy future.

Name: Stargate Hydrogen
Description:
Stargate Hydrogen was founded in 2021 to make green hydrogen affordable for hard-to-decarbonise industries like steel, fertilisers, and chemicals. Our focus: improving electrolyser efficiency and cutting costs using novel ceramic catalysts and patented stack design. 

Tested by renowned independent research institutes such as ZSW and Fraunhofer, our electrolysers are reliable and cost-effective. With €50M+ in funding from strong investors and IPCEI status we’re scaling production to 140 MW annually. 

Our customers include Fortum, Utilitas, ABB, Rockfin, and others across Europe, Turkey, and India. They all receive extensive engineering support while integrating our products into their operations. We deliver real results through efficient and scalable hydrogen solutions. 

Together, we enable the industry of tomorrow.

First Mode develops and manufactures decarbonization solutions for heavy industry partners dedicated to the clean energy future. 

With a product mix of vehicle retrofits that enable diesel hybrid, battery electric, and hydrogen fuel cell systems, we accelerate mining and rail fleets on their Path to Zero emissions.

Description:
As a sub-brand of Topband(www.topband.com), Ecosolex leverages Topband's decades of technological excellence to deliver advanced photovoltaic, charging system, and energy storage solutions tailored for residential, commercial, and industrial applications. With over 2,000 research professionals and more than 3,200 patents, Ecosolex harnesses Topband's robust R&D capabilities to provide reliable, safe, and sustainable energy solutions that ensure significant returns on investment.   

Our global footprint, encompassing 14 production and R&D bases and a team of over 9,300 professionals worldwide, enables Ecosolex to offer seamless, cutting-edge energy storage solutions backed by unparalleled expertise and support. 

Committed to innovation, quality, and customer satisfaction, Ecosolex stands at the forefront of the renewable energy industry, empowering our customers to achieve energy independence and contribute to a greener, more sustainable future.

Description:
Integrated Batteries has been serving in the power conditioning industry for past 30+ years now. With our valuable experience of serving the power needs of the industry for many years in year 2013 we opened a new vertical dealing in solar energy.

Integrated Batteries India has the vision to make solar energy as the nation's mainstream power supply. We help to create a world completely independent from fossil fuels by helping people understand the importance of environmental protection, realize the advantages of solar power systems, and promote the incentives and rebates from governmental renewable energy policies. In year 2015, with the aim of making Solar energy more affordable to our customers we set up our own Solar Panels manufacturing line and introduced the models range with the brand name: “IB Solar”. Our Solar Panels manufacturing line- a strategically located, state-of-the-art, ISO 9001:2008 ISO 14001 facility based in Noida, U.P with the total production capacity of 90MW. Our module sizes range from 3wp Wp to 340 Wp and are IEC/MNRE approved suitable for Indian markets.

We are also engaged in the manufacturing and distribution of Solar based LED Lighting solutions. With the support of our strong Technical team with engineering background we have got in-house designed and developed Microcontroller LED Drivers for Street lights, Solar Home Lights, Solar Lanterns. We are working closely with our associated distributors/ Channel partners and leading EPC players based in Delhi-NCR, Haryana, U.P., Punjab, J&K, Uttarakhand, M.P., Rajasthan, Jharkhand and exploring other areas for expanding our distribution base of Solar Products. In addition we are maintaining good tie-ups with Government/ Public sector bodies for Solar projects such as -Installation and commissioning of Solar Street Lights, Solar Home Lights, Solar Power Plants.

Name: Battolyser Systems
Description: We develop a 100% flexible pressurized alkaline electrolyser to produce the lowest cost green hydrogen. Our technology can switch on and off following intermittent renewable energy, procuring hydrogen when power prices are low and selling electricity when prices are high.

Name: AESC US
Description: AESC, founded in Japan in 2007, is a global leader in the development and manufacturing of high-performance batteries for zero-emission electric vehicles and energy storage systems. AESC is expanding its footprint in the United States with gigafactories in Kentucky, South Carolina, and Tennessee to meet the growing demand for EV and BESS batteries and strengthen its presence in the North American market. AESC's Tennessee gigafactory in Smyrna, which has been operational and supplying electric vehicle batteries for the Nissan LEAF since 2012, was retooled in 2025 and now produces batteries for Energy Storage Systems. The South Carolina gigafactory in Florence will supply next generation cells for BMW starting in 2026. The Kentucky gigafactory in Bowling Green will supply high-performance batteries and components for other OEMs. AESC is committed to our local communities where it is making its investments, creating jobs, and supporting local charities.
