Name: EODev
Description:
EODev is a French industrial company specializing in zero-emission power generation and energy solutions solutions. From hydrogen-powered generators to advanced battery systems, EODev develops reliable, clean, and scalable technologies that support the decarbonization of high-impact sectors, including infrastructure, transport, industry and energy – from construction and mining to maritime, mobility, data centers and entertainment. Its product range includes the GEH2 hydrogen-powered generator, the REXH2 type-approved marine fuel cell system, and the BESSTIE battery energy storage system. With the recent acquisition of EVE System – a French expert in battery modules, embedded electronics, and battery management software – EODev combines deep in-house expertise in both hardware and software, ensuring optimal performance, safety, and sustainability.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------

EODev est une entreprise industrielle française spécialisée dans la production d'électricité sans émission et les solutions énergétiques. Des générateurs à hydrogène aux systèmes de batteries avancés, EODev développe des technologies fiables, propres et évolutives qui soutiennent la décarbonisation des secteurs à fort impact, notamment les infrastructures, les transports, l'industrie et l'énergie - de la construction et de l'exploitation minière au maritime, à la mobilité, aux centres de données et aux divertissements. Sa gamme de produits comprend le générateur à hydrogène GEH2, le système de pile à combustible marine homologué REXH2 et le système de stockage d'énergie par batterie BESSTIE. 

Avec l'acquisition récente d'EVE System - un expert français des modules de batterie, de l'électronique embarquée et des logiciels de gestion de batterie - EODev combine une expertise interne approfondie à la fois dans le matériel et le logiciel, garantissant des performances optimales, la sécurité et la durabilité.

Name: HoSt Group
Description:
Empowering sustainability ambitions. 

HoSt Group, a large and fast-growing family company founded in 1991, is committed to be at the forefront of a circular decarbonized economy by deeply investing in technology. HoSt specializes in the generation of renewable energy and valuable end-products from residual streams through high-tech systems with efficient and clean conversion technology. 

In the light of technological synergy, HoSt’s core portfolio is a set of carbon-neutral and carbon-negative clean energy technologies for decentralized renewable gas, renewable heat, and renewable power generation, including carbon capture technology.

With a team of over 600 employees across seven offices in various countries including in the US, France, Latvia, Poland, and the UK, we are leading and promoting the essential progress of renewable energy expansion and implementation globally. We are very keen to welcome many new employees and interns to the HoSt family every year.

HoSt was founded by Herman Klein Teeselink. In 2020, the second generation of the family joined the board of directors as Herman handed over the baton to son and current CEO Jelle Klein Teeselink.

Name: LEDAX Energia
Description:
A LEDAX é uma indústria que fornece soluções de eficiência energética B2B através de iluminação LED, geração de energia fotovoltaica (placas solares),  monitoramento de consumo de energia, eletromobilidade (carregadores para carros elétricos) e serviços de migração e gestão de contratos para o Mercado Livre de Energia.

Name: Sunamp
Description:
Sunamp’s space-saving thermal energy storage uses patented phase change materials to make homes and buildings more energy-efficient and sustainable. 

Our innovation has resulted in a uniquely successful formula which is transforming how we use energy and provide heating and cooling around the World.

Our thermal batteries can be charged with large amounts of energy from renewable and other sources, and released to deliver hot water, cooling, and space heating on demand across a wide range of temperatures, and for a wide range of residential and industrial applications. Our product range for the residential market provides a low carbon, reliable, space-saving alternative to traditional hot water cylinders.

Name: Azelio
Description: Azelio is a Swedish company with a unique thermal energy storage solution for dispatchable electricity and heat. The system has a storage capacity of 13 hours production at nominal power, and is scalable and already cost-effective for smaller installations. The initial target market is between 0.5 – 20 MW, expanding into 100kW to 100MW - a segment that lacks cost-effective and sustainable alternatives today. Azelio's solution adds value on a broad base to optimize for microgrid systems as load shift, distributed sustainable baseload, or as an off-grid solar system with long-duration energy storage.

Name: Envision ESS

Description:

We have our specialties in INDUSTRIAL AUTOMATION & GREEN ENERGY MANAGEMENT.
We have been dedicated to providing you with stable and innovative products, as well as sustainable power solutions in the past decades.
We are greater than just a manufacturer: we are an innovator, a solution provider, and an alliance.

Name: Mars Renewable
Description:
Mars Renewable: Shaping the Future of Energy

At Mars Renewable, we specialize in BESS project development and offer a comprehensive BESS product family designed to meet the diverse demands of C&I and utility-scale applications across various energy scenarios.

Our unique approach combines in-depth battery asset insights with leading BESS product integration R&D and economically optimized application solutions, enabling high-value smart energy management, grid stability, and ESG performance.

We help our customers unlock the full potential of battery storage — whether it’s reducing OPEX, maximizing self-consumption, or supporting grid services.

By integrating our project development capabilities with cutting-edge hardware and software solutions, we optimize and maximize value for every client — from project development and R&D to application deployment.

Backed by world-class investors Sequoia China and CDH Investment, Mars Renewable is built to lead in the new energy era.

Name: NIBE Energy Systems Limited
Description:
NIBE Energy Systems Limited is a subsidiary of NIBE AB, a global group based in Sweden. NIBE is one of Europe's leading manufacturers in the domestic heating sector, specialising in heat pumps.

We supply homes with products that provide domestic hot water and ensure a comfortable indoor climate. We offer high-tech solutions for heating, ventilation, cooling and heat recovery that reflect today's demand for sustainable construction.

Name: HydrogenPro
Description:
HydrogenPro aims to become a world leading designer and supplier of alkaline electrolyser technology and systems to meet the highest standard for safety, reliability and long lifetime.

Our main target is to produce green hydrogen at a cost which is competitive with fossil hydrogen! We deliver customized turn-key plants for large scale production of green hydrogen to large industrial clients. Modular and compact in design, our advanced hydrogen production plants offer efficient, renewable green hydrogen tailored to your needs.

The company was established in 2013 by individuals with background from the electrolysis industry which was established in Telemark, Norway by Norsk Hydro in 1927. Our organisation comprises an experienced engineering team of leading industry experts, drawing upon unparalleled experience and expertise within the hydrogen and renewable sectors. By combining our in-depth knowledge with innovative design, we continuously aspire to pioneer game-changing ideas and solutions to realise and maximise new opportunities in a smarter, sustainable, hydrogen powered future.

Name: Rimac Energy
Description:
Pushing boundaries is in our DNA. When we made the world’s fastest electric car we changed perceptions of electric vehicles, now we’re changing the way we power our planet with next generation stationary Energy Storage Systems (ESS). 

We’ve approached energy storage from a new perspective – we designed a novel battery architecture, enabling greater efficiency, cycle life, and availability at lower system footprint and reduced installation effort. Our systems are developed fully in-house and produced in Europe.

Name: BSLBATT - SOLAR
Description:
At BSLBATT, we're dedicated to providing high-quality lithium solar battery solutions for a sustainable future.

BSLBATT is a globally renowned lithium solar battery manufacturer headquartered in Huizhou City, Guangdong Province, China with offices and service centers in the Netherlands, South Africa, Mexico, the United States and many other countries. Since our establishment in 2011, we have been focusing on providing high quality lithium solar battery products to our customers around the world, following the industry's cutting-edge technology with our development philosophy of innovation, quality and reliability.

At present, BSLBATT covers a full range of products such as residential ESS, C&I ESS, UPS, portable battery Supply, etc., and uses the core technologies of "long cycle", "high safety", "low temperature resistance", and "anti-thermal runaway" to "break through" the pain points of energy storage technology development, and is committed to becoming a leader in helping renewable energy transformation and the development of lithium battery energy storage.

For many years, BSLBATT has insisted on technological innovation, constantly exploring the deep needs of customers, and providing solutions from lithium iron phosphate battery to module energy storage systems for different customers. This coincides with the vision of "the best lithium battery solution".

As BSLBATT, we see market demand and user needs as our challenge, and insists on being based in the energy storage industry with leading technology and products. We adhere to long-termism, continuously refine our technology, standardize our products, and systematize our production, driving rapid development in multiple fields with renewable energy solutions that are extremely safe, extremely reliable, extremely performant, and extremely user-friendly.

Supporting Service: OEM/ODM.

Name: GenCell Energy
Description: GenCell Energy (TASE: GNCL) develops total green power solutions based on reliable, zero-emission alkaline fuel cells, hydrogen and green ammonia-to-energy technologies which deliver uninterrupted power to help the world #SayNoToDiesel and transition to clean energy.  The ability to produce not only clean power from GenCell’s fuel cells, but also the green fuel on which the fuel cells run, sets GenCell in a far superior position as a well-to-wheel total green energy solution provider. GenCell delivers resilient, robust and weather-resistant backup power for utilities, telecom, EV charging and other mission-critical applications which have been deployed in 22 countries. Our ammonia-based hydrogen-on-demand solution provides primary power for off-grid and poor-grid sites, as well as for rural electrification. GenCell Energy numbers some 150 employees, including veterans of space and submarine projects. The Company is headquartered in Israel with a worldwide distribution and support network and retains unique intellectual property that includes patents, trade secrets and know-how.

Name: Indosol Solar Private Limited
Description:
Indosol Solar Pvt. Ltd. is the solar PV manufacturing arm of Shirdi Sai Electricals Limited (SSEL), one of India’s fastest-growing and most trusted power equipment manufacturers. As a strategic expansion of SSEL, India’s largest transformer manufacturing company, Indosol leverages decades of expertise in transformers, EPC services, electrification, substation construction, and grid infrastructure to drive growth in advanced solar technologies.

Indosol is spearheading India’s renewable energy mission by developing a state-of-the-art, 100% vertically integrated giga-scale solar PV manufacturing ecosystem, spanning the entire value chain from quartz to high-efficiency photovoltaic modules.

The company commenced operations with a 500 MW module manufacturing facility at Ramayapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, and is rapidly scaling up. By 2027, Indosol aims to achieve 10 GW of integrated solar PV manufacturing capacity, encompassing metallurgical-grade silicon, polysilicon, ingots, wafers, cells, and modules, along with ancillary production. Recognized as an awardee under the Production Linked Incentive (PLI) scheme, Indosol is committed to strengthening domestic solar manufacturing and reducing India’s reliance on imports.

Looking ahead, by 2028, Indosol targets a landmark manufacturing ecosystem comprising 30 GW of polysilicon, 20 GW of wafer-cell-module capacity, and 3,600 TPD of solar glass production. With this scale, adoption of advanced technologies such as TOPCon and HJT, and the synergistic strengths of SSEL, Indosol Solar is uniquely positioned to transform India’s solar landscape and establish the nation as a global hub for integrated solar manufacturing.

Name: Green Power Technologies (GPT Renewables)
Description:
At GPT Renewables, we’re powering the shift to cleaner, smarter energy—wherever it's needed most. Operating across the Africa, Middle East, and UK, we design and deliver cutting-edge off-grid and hybrid energy systems that replace traditional diesel reliance with clean, efficient, and scalable solutions.

Our flagship plug-and-play innovations—PowerBox, JuiceBox, VoltBox, Telco Tower Box, and Power Hub—combine solar energy, high-capacity battery storage, and optional diesel integration. From telecom towers to mining operations, agriculture, NGO deployments, disaster relief, and remote infrastructure, our systems cut diesel use by up to 75%, reduce emissions, and deliver substantial cost savings.

Whether you're a business aiming for energy independence, a government agency pursuing climate goals, or a developer of infrastructure in hard-to-reach areas, Green Power Technologies (GPT) is your trusted partner for energy transformation. We don’t just deliver technology—we build strategic partnerships with resellers, distributors, and installers, enabling shared growth and sustainability impact.

With real-time monitoring, scalable architecture, and rugged design, our solutions are engineered to thrive in even the most challenging environments—safely, silently, and sustainably.

Join us in redefining what's possible in renewable energy.

Visit us at www.gpt-renewables.com

Name: Proton Motor Fuel Cell GmbH
Description:
Proton Motor is a German GmbH which is owned a 100% by the holding Proton Motor Power Systems Plc
Proton Motor Power Systems Plc is listed at the London Stock Exchange (AIM market)
WKN: A0LC22
ISIN: GN00B140Y116

Proton Motor is an expert in industrial fuel cells and fuel cell hybrid systems that started the development in 1994 within the company Magnet Motor. Based in Puchheim near Munich Proton Motor offers complete fuel cell and hybrid systems from a single source (Made in Germany)– from the development and production through the implementation of customized solutions. The focus of Proton Motor Fuel Cell GmbH is on back-to-base, for example, for mobile, maritime and stationary solutions applications. 
Focused on liquid cooled fuel cells the power levels range from 2 kW up into the multiple MW.

The product portfolio consists of base-fuel cell systems, standard complete systems, as well as customized systems. Besides fuel cell systems Proton Motor offers uninterruptible power supply systems and solar battery storage systems. Proton Motor is a wholly owned subsidiary of Proton Power Systems plc. The company is quoted on the AIM market of the London Stock Exchange since October 2006 (code: PPS).

Name: NRG Systems
Description: NRG Systems is the global leader in wind and solar resource measurement and intelligence. Their hardware, software, and related services empower many of the world’s largest developers to make informed decisions and improve efficiency at all stages of project development. With over 40 years of experience, NRG’s heritage of innovation and deep understanding of data collection, management, and analysis drives the advancement of their signature turnkey solutions. A subsidiary of ESCO Technologies Inc. (NYSE: ESE), NRG Systems has offices in North America, Europe, and Asia and has shipped products to over 170 countries. To learn more about NRG’s products, LEED Gold manufacturing facility, workplace best practices, and more, please visit www.nrgsystems.com.

Name: Voltfang
Description: We requalify electrical vehicle batteries after their first life in the EV into storage systems, which can store renewable energies in a sustainable way. The batteries do not need new resources & solve commercial and industrial energy needs. We are thriving to achieve a future worth living. For that, we decentralize the grid by building sustainable storage systems and making them smart.

Name: Hexagon Agility
Description:
Hexagon Agility, a business of Hexagon Composites, has spent six decades driving revolutionary innovation, enabling over 100,000 vehicles to cost-effectively reduce the global carbon footprint. We're empowering fleets to meet sustainability targets while contributing to cleaner air for everyone.

No pipeline? No problem. Hexagon Agility’s Mobile Pipeline solutions bridge the gap in natural gas infrastructure. With over 2,000 modules deployed worldwide, we make transporting gaseous and renewable natural gas resources seamless—delivering energy exactly where and when it's needed.

Name: WAYON ENERGY
Description:
WAYON ENERGY TECHNOIOGY CO.LTD., belonging to Wasion Holdings Limited (stock code: HK3393), was established in September 2013 with a registered capital of 511million RMB. The production base of WAYON Energy Industrial Park is located in the national level Xiangtan Economic Development Zone, covering an area of nearly 266,666 square meters. The total area of intelligent manufacturing high standard workshops and laboratories that have been built or are under construction exceeds 100,000 square meters.
WAYON Energy currently employs more than 1,000 employees, including more than 300 R&D employees. The company's operating performance continued to grow steadily, achieving an output value of 2.145 billion RMB and operating revenue of 2 billion RMB. No less than 8% of the operating revenue is invested in technological development and innovation, with complete informatization and R&D equipment. Up to now, nearly 1 billion RMB has been invested accumulatively. WAYON Energy applies for more than 100 patents and independent intellectual property rights each year, and participates in 20 national and international technical standards.

WAYON Energy have the intelligent energy and power distribution business sectors. Its products and solutions cover: energy storage system solutions for all scenarios, high and low voltage complete equipment, primary and secondary fusion complete equipment, intelligent low-voltage components, tower energy and communication product services, EMS system applications, hydrogen production, new energy access, industrial automation, power charging and swapping, electricity sales and demand side management, etc.

Email:  sales@wayonenergy.com

Name: Remazel Engineering
Description:
We strive to support our customers in successfully navigating the challenges of the energy transition.

Remazel Engineering is a leading engineering Company which deals with the design and manufacturing of equipment for the OFFSHORE MARKET - WIND & FLOATING WIND, SUBSEA & RESEARCH, HEAVY LIFTING and OIL&GAS - as well as the production of Hot Gas Path Components for the COMBUSTION SECTOR, with specific application on GAS TURBINES .
The advanced engineering capabilities of our multiskilled Engineering team together with the expertise acquired in the offshore environment over the years, have led our Company to team up with the majors Players of the Energy market.
Our PEOPLE WELLBEING is the main pillar of our corporate value scale: TEAMWORK, RESPECT, EQUALITY, PASSION are the ingredients of a SUSTAINABLE FUTURE in our Organization. 
We are engaged in promoting an HEALTHY WORKPLACE, and we take advantage from diversity by making INCLUSIVITY a competitive advantage for our Company.

Name: Green Li-ion
Description:
Green Li-ion known as a vital contributer to energy security. Globally Green Li-ion is a developer and provider of innovative battery recycling, refining & re-manufacturing technologies, that have the potential to revolutionise the global battery materials & energy storage sector. The Company’s technologies are modular processing plants which will enable EV producers, battery recyclers and battery manufacturers to address the pressing need for greater levels of sustainability and security of supply in country.
For further information please go to the Company’s website: greenli-ion.com

Green Li-ion solves the existential risk to the precious metals industry and the environment. Our patented deep technology is Cleaner, Faster and 4x more profitable than current Lithium-Ion Battery material refining and the only technology to Re-manufacture battery cathode & anode material. 

For two decades Lithium-Ion batteries have been our preferred source of portable energy. The precious metals used to manufacture them are often mined in socially and environmentally damaging ways. The reason they are not recycled is that it is simply not economical to do so with current technology. Green Li-ion changes this by removing 1 - 3 inefficient processes and improved purity of the output making Lithium-Ion Battery rejuvenation and re-use the new reality.

Name: Xemex
Description:
Bij Xemex maken we energie slim. Al meer dan 25 jaar ontwikkelen wij technologie die energiestromen inzichtelijk, beheersbaar en duurzaam maakt. Vanuit onze vestigingen in Schoten (BE) en Rosmalen (NL) helpen we consumenten, bedrijven en energieleveranciers om hun energieverbruik te monitoren, optimaliseren en automatiseren.

Onze oplossingen – zoals het Enny Energie Management Systeem (EMS), slimme meters en de modulaire Lewiz Gateway – geven realtime inzicht in verbruik en opwekking. Ze zorgen ervoor dat apparaten automatisch worden aangestuurd op basis van zonneproductie, batterijniveau of dynamische tarieven. Zo vergroten we de zelfconsumptie en verlagen we de energiekosten.

Via ons open cloudplatform koppelen we eenvoudig met laadpalen, omvormers, batterijen, warmtepompen en andere slimme apparaten. Dit maakt het mogelijk om energie slim te sturen, zowel op woning- als wijkniveau. Onze technologie is flexibel en schaalbaar, en geschikt voor zowel residentiële als commerciële toepassingen.

Duurzaamheid, innovatie en klantgerichtheid vormen de kern van ons werk. We geloven in een toekomst waarin iedereen zijn energieverbruik begrijpt en actief bijdraagt aan een groenere wereld. Of u nu één woning beheert of een compleet energienetwerk: met Xemex heeft u altijd grip op uw energie.

Contact

Name: Gokin Solar
Description:
Founded in 2019, Gokin Solar Co., Ltd. (hereinafter referred to as "Gokin Solar") focuses on monocrystalline silicon ingots/wafers, photovoltaic modules, and photovoltaic solar farms. 

With the mission of "Bring greater benefits to humanity through solar energy," the company has strategically deployed the core links of the photovoltaic industry chain. It has built three major business segments: monocrystalline silicon ingots/wafers, photovoltaic modules, and photovoltaic solar farms. Gokin Solar exports green photovoltaic products and solutions to the global market to promote the construction of a new energy system.

Gokin Solar has established 4 major production bases and 5 major photovoltaic solar farms business development centers around the world, with a sales & marketing center located in Jiangsu. At present, our business has spread to 30 countries and regions including the United States, Germany, Italy, and Malaysia, building an efficient, professional, multi-level, and multi-channel global service network to facilitate global zero-carbon development.

Name: AndSolar Technology
Description:
We are MLPE (Module Level Power Electronics) manufacturer based in Suzhou, China.
We offer smart MLPE devices which offer more value compared to traditional shutdown and optimizer, with features such as :
- Real-time analysis of the module-level physical positioning
- Intelligent analysis of component failures & problems  
- Auto-initiate shutdown safety management in case of danger warning. 
- Module-level single-point control to minimize loss from equipment failure or O&M mishandling 
- Module-level life-cycle health tracking and quantitative asset status valuation
- One-stop full life-cycle overall system-level solution

Name: Viessmann Climate Solutions NL
Description: Opgericht in 1917 als fabrikant van verwarmingstechnologie en nu onderdeel van Carrier, zijn we vandaag de dag een van 's werelds toonaangevende leveranciers van efficiënte oplossingen voor het klimaat (verwarming, water en luchtkwaliteit) en duurzame energie. Leefruimtes creëren voor toekomstige generaties - dat is de verantwoordelijkheid die we elke dag samen met onze partners op ons nemen.

Name: JibFlex
Description:
JibFlex is a patented flexible lifting solution used across multiple industries — from offshore wind and renewable energy to maritime, onshore industrial sites, and oil & gas.
Designed for safe, manual handling in confined or hard-to-reach areas, JibFlex enables efficient lifting without the need for electricity or hydraulics.

Name: Vilion Battery Energy Storage
Description:
Vilion is a comprehensive energy service high-tech enterprise integrating R&D, production, sales and service of battery energy storage related products. It focuses on the C&I user side battery energy storage system integration technical services and is committed to becoming a professional technology and solution service provider to provide reliable products and technical services for enterprises.

The core members of Vilion are all from the global Top 5 battery enterprises and have more than 15 years of experience in the battery energy storage, EMS and related products and technologies. At present, Vilion has equipped with a complete professional energy storage technical team, including electrical, software, structure, safety, etc., and its products have been applied across 5 continents and more than 30 countries. 

Contact us now for more information: Contact@szweilan.com OR Miles@szweilan.com

Name: Amber Kinetics
Description:
Amber Kinetics is the industry-leader in manufacturing flywheel energy storage systems (FESS). As the only provider of long-duration FESS, Amber Kinetics extends the duration and efficiency of flywheels from minutes to hours—resulting in safe, sustainable, reliable, efficient, simple and flexible energy storage solutions. 

To date, Amber Kinetics’ fleet of installations has accumulated more than 1 million hours of run time around the world. Amber Kinetics’ industry-leading technology extends the duration and efficiency of flywheels from minutes to hours—resulting in safe, sustainable and reliable energy storage. Amber Kinetics offers a wide range of applications, including load shifting, demand charge reduction, peak shaving, frequency regulation, renewable firming and spinning reserve.

Name: DIALLD BIO ENERGY HOLDING
Description:
DIALLD BIO ENERGY HOLDING es un grupo empresarial internacional dedicado al desarrollo e implementación de tecnologías sostenibles que convierten residuos, aguas residuales y humedad atmosférica en energía renovable y agua potable, sin generar emisiones contaminantes.

Combinamos innovación, sostenibilidad y compromiso social para ofrecer soluciones reales frente a la crisis hídrica, energética y ambiental. Nuestras tecnologías cumplen con los más altos estándares europeos y se adaptan a las normativas de cada región en salud, seguridad y medio ambiente.

Impulsamos proyectos globales como el Programa Internacional “Agua para la Vida”, en alianza con OIVA – Organización Internacional Valoramos el Ambiente, gobiernos, ONGs y organismos multilaterales. Lideramos soluciones como LUNA | Agua del Aire, enfocadas en comunidades vulnerables y zonas con escasez hídrica.

En DIALLD creemos que la sostenibilidad no es una opción, sino un deber colectivo. Regenerar el planeta es posible, si actuamos con tecnología, ética y visión.

 Innovación con propósito
 Agua y energía como derechos
 Economía circular aplicada
 Alianzas que multiplican impacto

Lead the Change | www.dialld.com

Name: Northvolt Poland
Description:
Hej! Welcome to Northvolt in Poland. Since 2018, Northvolt has been operating in Gdańsk to deliver the best-in-class battery modules and packs. It’s where our energy storage solutions come to life.

In 2023, we have completed the construction of Northvolt Dwa, a highly automated factory for battery systems assembly and an engineering R&D center in Gdańsk. 

Northvolt was established in 2016 in Stockholm, Sweden. Pioneering a sustainable model for battery manufacturing, the company has received $55 billion in orders from key customers, including BMW, Fluence, Scania, Volvo Cars and Volkswagen Group. The company is currently delivering batteries from its first gigafactory Northvolt Ett, in Skellefteå, Sweden and from its R&D and industrialization campus Northvolt Labs, in Västerås, Sweden, supported by over 5,000 employees in Sweden, Germany, Norway, Poland, Portugal, the US and Canada. Since 2018, the company has also been operating in Poland, where it produces battery energy storage systems. More at www.northvolt.com

Name: enson
Description:
We are PV mounting system producer.

We specialize in manufacturing structures for the photovoltaic industry, supporting EPC companies, manufacturers, and general contractors in maximizing green energy utilization. 
With extensive experience gained from European markets, we have already completed over 200 MW of projects and have 3 GW in our GK portfolio awaiting implementation.

Enson constructions have been created with the utmost care, for our own investment needs. They meet the applicable standards, guaranteeing reliability, durability and effective use for many years.

Our in-house design and R&D department allows us to respond to diverse client needs.

As part of the TDJ capital group, we work alongside other companies in the energy, industrial, and e-mobility sectors to accelerate the energy transition, leveraging our collective expertise and resources. 

Together, we form a strong entity in the green energy market.

Bringing smart, energy efficient home electronics designed for your comfort and convenience.

Name: Aegeus Technologies Ltd
Description:
Aegeus Technologies - IoT Driven Green Robotics Solution Provider

At Aegeus Technologies, our passion is harnessing robotics, AI & ML to revolutionize the O&M of solar plants. We develop cutting-edge robotic systems that maximize efficiency and minimize environmental impact. Our goal? It's simple: to translate cutting-edge technology into tangible solutions that advance the solar industry and contribute to a healthier planet, while also prioritizing humane working conditions for laborers and conserving vital resources like water. Operating and maintaining solar plants poses a significant challenge for developers as they strive to achieve projected returns on investment, enhance the lifecycle, and optimize resource utilization.

We're now on a mission to assist customers in automating their O&M operations while offering data-driven insights for predictive maintenance. Our suite of products and solutions not only streamline processes but also contribute to environmental protection.

Aegeus Technologies boasts a team of passionate experts dedicated to developing intelligent and sustainable solutions for the clean energy industry. The company is committed to providing the highest quality services and exceeding client expectations, with a unwavering focus on safety and quality.

Name: STIEBEL ELTRON UK LTD
Description:
The remarkable history of STIEBEL ELTRON's success begins with the invention and production of the first coil immersion heater in a backyard workshop in Berlin in 1924. Inspired by this feat, the company has adhered to the maxims of the founder, Dr. Theodor Stiebel, who sought to produce only innovative products of the highest quality. STIEBEL ELTRON has become one of the leading manufacturers in the fields of "Hot Water" and "Renewable Energy".

The company launched its UK operation in February 2008 at the Wirral International Business Park, headed up by managing director, Mark McManus.
  
The company is looking to build on its established track record in renewable energy products across Europe. Armed with a new range of products and services Stiebel Eltron UK is keen to drive a high profile campaign highlighting the role of heat pumps in helping the UK become greener.

A vital dimension to Stiebel Eltronâs UK operation is finding new installer partners to help further expand its fast growing heat pump business.

Name: Eurener
Description:
Eurener is a family business that was founded in Alicante in 1997, yes, we have been manufacturing and distributing photovoltaic modules all over the world for more than 25 years! 

Our headquarters are in Valencia, with an average of 300 sunny days a year, we can say that we are experts in the sun!

Since our creation, we have invested and worked to ensure that our photovoltaic modules are efficient and elegant, with high quality standards, so that they have a long life and provide clean and sustainable energy for many years to come. 

We like to say that we are more than energy, and behind all this process we have a human team, attentive and dedicated, that will make your experience with Eurener close and lasting, adapting to your needs, from delivery to method of payment. 

Reduce your carbon footprint and contribute to a cleaner and greener future with Eurener, a wise investment.

Name: ActionZero
Description:
ActionZero is an industry leader, creating and deploying groundbreaking, self-funding solutions for a zero-emissions world across industrial, enterprise and consumer global markets.

Established in 2021 following the merger of the respected Energy Services and Straightline Energy Solutions, the road to zero starts here.

We provide tailored solutions to clients to help them achieve their decarbonisation goals and reach net zero emissions. As industry leaders our team of experts draw upon decades of experience and utilise exclusive technology to deliver sustainable performance and value growth.

https://actionzero.com

Description: Ihr Partner für die richtige Technologie zur Erzeugung und Speicherung von nachhaltiger und grüner Energie. Wir entwickeln maßgeschneiderte Lösungen für Ihre Anwendung. Name: Cellfion
Description:
At Cellfion, we develop next-generation, PFAS-free membranes from nanocellulose, extracted from trees and engineered for hydrogen technologies, flow batteries, and ion-separation processes. 

Spun out from over a decade of research at KTH Royal Institute of Technology and Linköping University, our membranes are crafted using a process inspired by papermaking, enabling scalable production.

As the industry prepares for a PFAS phase-out, we offer a timely, sustainable alternative. Our work bridges material science with real-world application—driving innovation where performance, adaptability, and environmental responsibility meet.

We are based in Sweden, actively collaborating with industry and academia to build cleaner energy systems for the future.

Name: SSM Eco Stove
Description: Zhejiang Huiwenmei Stove Co., Ltd (formerly Shengzhou Stove Manufacturer, SSM) was founded in 1979. The factory has more than 40 years of experience in manufacturing stoves and has nearly 20 years of foreign sales.

Name: Senmarck Energy
Description:
SENMARCK ENERGY designs and produces hybridized battery storage systems for residential, commercial, and industrial applications, especially for heavy-duty off-grid applications. SENMARCK has served major national construction projects by providing hybridized battery storage systems that integrate with diesel generators to enhance their efficiency and reduce diesel fuel consumption. The plug-and-play hybrid systems are widely utilized in the construction, mining, and construction machinery rental sectors.

SENMARCK ENERGY is committed to integrating digital and power electronics technologies, developing clean power, and driving the green energy revolution for a net-zero and greener future. In the clean power generation sector, we help create new power systems that primarily rely on renewable energy. Additionally, we hybridize traditional diesel generators and have invented parallel power output technology to downsize and reduce diesel engines for off-grid heavy industries.

In the power rental sector, events power, crushers, cement, mining, and construction sectors, we are accelerating green energy solution adoption and helping heavy industries shift away from diesel generators. We build green, low-carbon, and intelligent power systems for all industries. SENMARCK ENERGY continues to innovate through collaboration with global partners to promote carbon neutrality.

Name: Intello Tech AMC
Description:
Intello Tech AMC is at the forefront of renewable energy technology, offering a diverse range of cutting-edge products including Zero Export modules, PV-DG Synchronization Controllers, Precision Sensors, and SCADA systems. Additionally, our comprehensive services encompass Solar Operations and Maintenance (O&M), Annual Maintenance Contracts (AMC), and One time site services.

Leveraging expertise in Solar, IoT, AI, and advanced wireless communication protocols, we are dedicated to maximizing renewable energy efficiency and optimizing operational performance.

Join us as we lead the way in revolutionizing the renewable energy landscape. Follow our page for the latest updates, insights, and advancements in the field.

Name: Acquaria Ltd
Description:
Acquaria was born with the idea of bringing the world of production and technology closer to the markets to create environmental well-being. Shorten the channel without removing Services, but by adding commitment, responsibility and credibility.

Three values that we have created in 30 years of experience in the HVAC world, covering various roles, and touching the different aspects of responsibility and added value of the managerial chain.

acquaria is founded by a pool of professionals in the HVAC business and represents a pool of production excellence.

Name: Solar One Energy
Description:
Our journey began in 2017 in Jaipur, Rajasthan. Initially, we
started as distributors of Polycab products in Rajasthan, steadily expanding our presence into Delhi
NCR, Haryana, Punjab and Uttar Pradesh by 2021.
Building on our success, we ventured into a new partnership in 2022-23 as distributors for Adani
Solar. Through dedicated efforts and a commitment to excellence, we proudly achieved the
distinction of being the largest distributor and seller of Adani Solar products in the North region
during 2023-24.
At Solar One Energy, customer satisfaction is at the heart of everything we do. We strive to provide
top-quality products and reliable service, ensuring our customers receive the best solutions for their
solar energy needs.

Name: Fossil Free Marine (a Secfuel brand)
Description:
Fossil Free Marine is a Swedish impact scale-up, on a mission to decarbonize the marine sector on a global level. We develop unique mobile infrastructure solutions that give commercial and pleasure boats access to renewable climate neutral drop-in fuels (biofuels and e-fuels) and other sustainable alternatives. We make boating sustainable. Right here, right now. 

First full scale unit deployed summer 2022, just outside Stockholm, partly funded by substantial grants from the "Climate Leap" (Klimatklivet), a Swedish government grant supporting local climate investments. 

Fossil Free Marine is now part of Secfuel AB (www.secfuel.com).

Name: Pernix Energy
Description: Our mission is to create a world where clean and infinite energy is accessible to everyone. By developing innovative technologies that harness the power of the sun, we aim to transform the way we generate and consume energy. We believe that renewable energy is not just the future—it's the present—and we strive to be at the forefront of this exciting industry.  As a leading supplier of solar photovoltaic modules, hybrid inverters, and energy storage devices, we are committed to providing reliable and sustainable energy solutions to our customers.

Name: Heliac
Description:
Founded in 2014, Heliac develops practical and scalable thermal energy solutions to support the green transition. What started with innovative solar technologies has evolved into RockStore – our main focus today – a system that stores surplus heat and renewable energy for industries and district heating.

From our base in Nivå, Denmark, our team of 15 dedicated professionals turns research into real-world applications. With RockStore, we aim to make energy storage simple, reliable, and sustainable – helping pave the way for a greener future.

Name: Vinci Technologies
Description:
At Vinci Technologies, we're dedicated to developing scientific instruments for chemists, physicists, and geologists pioneering in the energy sector. Our expertise is spread across four specialized divisions, each contributing significantly to the energy transition.

**Rocks & Fluids Division :**

- Designs instruments for precise measurements of rocks and fluids.
- Supports CO2 sequestration and hydrogen storage efforts.
- Facilitates projects in geothermal energy and analysis of abandoned wells.

**Pilot Units Division :**

- Creates prototypes to simulate chemical processes.
- Leads in innovative CO2 capture and utilization methods.
- Develops solutions for biofuels, biomaterials, and challenges related to hydrogen and ammonia.

**Ultra High Vacuum Division :**

- Develops thin film deposition systems for nanotechnology research.
- Essential for advancements in photovoltaics, OLEDs, semiconductors, and more.
- Specializes in designing and manufacturing complete ultra-high vacuum laboratories for high-tech sectors (aerospace and nuclear industries)

**Subsurface Imaging Division :**

- Enables exploration and visualization of the subsurface through seismic analysis.
- Assesses soil potentials for carbon storage and monitors for leaks, crucial for environmental protection.

**Our Mission:** 

Vinci Technologies commits to advancing scientific and technological solutions that support the energy transition. We're at the forefront of tackling environmental challenges, contributing to a sustainable future where innovation meets responsibility.

Name: PLATIO
Description:
PLATIO Solar is an unconventional, primarily outdoor energy-producing paving system, an alternative to usual pavements. Contrary to most of the nowadays applied pavements, PLATIO does not take material (such as stone, gravel, cement, or wood) and energy from nature to build the human environment, but uses the normally appearing garbage and energy. It is a double green building material as it is made of recycled plastic, which was designed to be able to integrate different types of environmentally friendly technologies, like solar panels and kinetic energy converters, which are capable of transforming the energy of human steps. Units are quite compact, there is no need to establish electrical wiring previously, as because units contain a powerline communication system, which connects automatically during the establishment, and after the completion of the electric circuit, units label themselves and create the wireless digital communication system that is able to optimize city infrastructures.

Cities need pavers – but producing a lot of recyclable waste.
Cities need more energy – cities wasting energy
Smart cities need data – people need interaction

Name: Hylium Industries, Inc.
Description:
Hylium Industries headquartered in South Korea was founded with the purpose of becoming the number one player in the industry by aiming to develop reliable hydrogen technologies. 

Guided by our mission and technology, we are becoming a leader in the Global Hydrogen Technology Industry. We want to contribute to saving our planet and believe that hydrogen is the most promising green energy source that will help us do that. 

Our Hydrogen Business Division develops creative technologies on compact hydrogen liquefaction and ultra light hydrogen storage through R&D programs supported by the Korean Government. Among our products you can also find liquid hydrogen drone power packs and mobile hydrogen refueling stations for fuel cell vehicles. 
     
Our TSB Business Division develops TED (thermoelectric device) based cooling modules and provides an eco-friendly one-stop cooling solution by combining research, analysis, design, and cost-effective procurement on the basis of accumulated know-how on R&D and Manufacturing. 

At Hylium Industries we believe that hydrogen energy has the power to change the world. We are committed to advancing this technology and making it accessible to everyone, so that together we can create a more sustainable and equitable future. 

Join us on this journey as we work to power the world with clean, efficient, and renewable hydrogen energy.

Name: HoCoSto
Description:
HoCoSto ontwikkelt, produceert en realiseert ondergrondse warmte- en koude opslag voor grootverbruikers van energie. We leveren standaard configurabele oplossingen inclusief slim energiemanagement maar ook storage-only voor systemen van derden. Door energie uit duurzame bronnen ondergronds op te slaan maken we duurzaam verwarmen en koelen mogelijk. 

Door gebruik te maken van een HoCoSto opslag ontstaat flexibiliteit in het energiesysteem. Het moment dat warmte nodig is en wordt gebruikt (vraag) wordt losgekoppeld van het moment dat duurzame warmte beschikbaar is (aanbod). Hierdoor is een HoCoSto warmteopslag ook de oplossing bij netcongestie.

Name: Summa Energy
Description:
Meriaura Energy is the new face of Savosolar. We help communities and companies to reduce CO2 emissions with clean heat and the world's most efficient solar thermal collectors.

Meriaura Energy designs and delivers large-scale solar thermal solutions to district heating producers and industry. Read more about what we do and our contribution to the global fight against climate change: www.meriauraenergy.com.

Our international team has extensive know-how and experience in solar thermal energy, district heating and industrial process heating. Our headquarters and heritage are in Finland, and we act globally to ensure the success of our customers, wherever they may be located.

After our 1st June 2023 restructuring Savosolar Oyj is now called Meriaura Group Oyj and the Savosolar solar thermal business is operated by Meriaura Energy Oy. All Meriaura Energy's investor-related material is available at www.meriauragroup.com.

Name: Meriaura Energy
Description:
Meriaura Energy is the new face of Savosolar. We help communities and companies to reduce CO2 emissions with clean heat and the world's most efficient solar thermal collectors.

Meriaura Energy designs and delivers large-scale solar thermal solutions to district heating producers and industry. Read more about what we do and our contribution to the global fight against climate change: www.meriauraenergy.com.

Our international team has extensive know-how and experience in solar thermal energy, district heating and industrial process heating. Our headquarters and heritage are in Finland, and we act globally to ensure the success of our customers, wherever they may be located.

Name: Powertech USA
Description:
Powertech USA has the market’s first end-to-end hydrogen transportation and fueling solution. We have streamlined the movement of hydrogen from production outlet to vehicle inlet by integrating high-capacity trailers, mobile refuelers, and fueling stations. 

Our purpose-built hydrogen infrastructure solutions, informed by premier testing labs and supported with wrap-around engineering services, make for an integrated solution to enable fast, reliable, and cost-effective hydrogen transport and fueling across North America. 

Powertech USA is a subsidiary of Powertech Labs, a leader in technical design, construction, and operation of compressed hydrogen fueling infrastructure solutions headquartered in British Columbia, Canada.

Name: Biocom Energy International SA
Description:
Limited liability company for the development and the promotion of new renewables energies, in particular the production and the distribution of biomass.
Biocom Energy is specialized in the recycling of vegetables waste in biofuels mainly coming from shells and stones.

Name: AIT - STEIN
Description:
AIT STEIN: empowering industrial energy transition.
Air Industrie Transition offers a wide range of solutions and equipment: 
Heat exchangers: Economisers, recuperators, recovery boilers, superheaters, SCAM refrigerants.
Combustion: Industrial burners for all types of fuel.
Flue gas treatment: Complete flue gas purification line. 
Our areas of expertise:
Heat recovery and energy recovery: Development of systems for capturing, converting and reusing residual heat from industrial processes.
Thermal equipment: Manufacture and maintenance of equipment such as heat exchangers, industrial boilers, condensers and refrigerants.
Carbon footprint reduction: Tailor-made solutions to optimise energy consumption and reduce CO₂ emissions.

STEIN
Stein Energy Boilers is a leader in the design and manufacture of recovery boilers and all-fuel boilers.

Name: 2JCP
Description:
At 2JCP, we design and manufacture complex solutions for gas-fired and clean energy. With decades of experience and a global footprint, we deliver turnkey engineering—from design and fabrication to installation and service.

Our expertise spans across:
•	Gas turbines & Energy transition technologies
•	Green hydrogen & Carbon capture
•	Modular and skid-based solutions, Piping systems & Pressure vessels
•	EPC support for energy, industrial & chemical sectors

 Looking for a reliable engineering partner for your next energy project? Let’s connect.

Name: AlphaESS UK
Description:
AlphaESS UK is the exclusive partner of AlphaESS, a global leader in advanced battery energy storage solutions. Based in Gloucestershire and serving the whole of the United Kingdom, we provide homeowners, businesses, and communities with the tools to take control of their energy future.

Our mission is simple: to make clean energy accessible, affordable, and practical for everyone. By combining world-class technology with UK-based support, AlphaESS UK empowers customers to reduce reliance on the grid, lower energy bills, and contribute to a sustainable future.

Our product portfolio covers residential, commercial, and industrial storage systems, as well as EV charging integration. From our Smile series home batteries to large-scale systems for businesses, AlphaESS solutions are designed to maximise self-consumption of renewable energy, enhance resilience, and unlock participation in grid services. Supported by AlphaCloud, our smart monitoring platform, customers can track, optimise, and even trade their stored energy with ease.

At the heart of AlphaESS UK is a strong commitment to service excellence. We work closely with our distributor and installer network, providing training, technical expertise, and customer support that ensure every system is delivered safely, efficiently, and professionally. Case studies across hospitality, commercial premises, and rural communities showcase the adaptability of our technology and the value it delivers.

As the UK accelerates towards net zero, battery storage has become an essential component of the energy transition. AlphaESS UK is proud to be at the forefront, combining global innovation with local dedication. Whether for families, businesses, or communities, we provide solutions that deliver immediate benefits and long-term peace of mind.

Together, we are powering a cleaner, more resilient future.

Name: Groupe SEGUIN
Description:
Concepteur, fabricant et distributeur d'appareils de chauffage au bois ou granulés, ainsi qu'acteur de la rénovation thermique. 
Le Groupe Seguin est composé de plusieurs marques aux diverses spécialisations et savoir-faire : Seguin, Artense, JC Bordelet, Piazzetta, Hwam, Thermolab ou encore Vulx. 
Nous intervenons exclusivement auprès d'installateur soit directement ou via des partenaires distributeurs. 
Le Groupe Seguin anime le premier réseau de revendeurs en France, et occupe une solide position à l'international avec une présence dans plus de 50 pays et de solides partenariats avec d'autres entreprises familiales européennes.

Name: agriKomp France
Description:
Le groupe agriKomp est spécialisé dans la conception, la réalisation et la maintenance d'unités de méthanisation agricole. Ses activités s'étendent sur toute l'Europe. 
Depuis 15 ans, agriKomp France est le leader sur le marché de la méthanisation agricole, avec aujourd'hui plus de 160 installations en fonctionnement !

Name: Seaqualize
Description: Seaqualize is 20-person strong, young Dutch motion compensation innovator, focusing on heavy load (~50mT-4000mT) transfers and installations for the offshore wind industry. It designs, builds and operates the worlds most sophisticated fleet of rental inline Active Full Motion (3D) Compensators, deployable in any standard heavy lift crane. We offer clients higher workability, ultimate safety, lifting control and low lifting cycle times. Seaqualize is based in the Netherlands, in Rotterdam, the Hague and Utrecht.

Name: Imperial Star Solar
Description:
Imperial Star Solar is a U.S. manufacturer trusted by developers and EPCs for IRA-compliant, American-made solar modules. With over a decade of Tier-1 manufacturing expertise and Fortune 500 partnerships, we oversee a vertically integrated supply chain—from high-quality wafers to cells and modules—across 6 GW of global capacity.

Our Houston, Texas facility is the heart of our U.S. operations, producing modules that qualify for domestic content incentives. We offer PERC and advanced modules for every project, with tailored warranties and a focus on reliability.

We build with grit and precision, growing together with transparency and respect. Proudly American and proudly independent, we empower our team to make a real difference in energy independence.

We build the modules. You build the future.
At Imperial Star, we don’t just make solar—we build confidence for the innovators shaping tomorrow’s energy landscape.

Name: Construction Innovations, LLC
Description:
The smartest eBOS in solar 

We manufacture simpler electrical systems that save time, cut labor, and reduce total installation cost. From the industry’s only direct-burial-rated trunkbus to labor-optimized string harnesses and pre-engineered kits, every product we deliver is field-tested and proven on some of the largest utility-scale solar projects in the U.S.

Formed by a group of former field electricians and engineers who know the painpoints on the job site, we created CI to make installs easier, safer, and more reliable for construction crews of any experience level.

DC Collection

AI & Data Centers

Innovate to Simplify

Name: enee.io
Description:
enee.io increases access to reliable and affordable energy by improving the life and efficiency of energy systems. 

Through plug-and-play sensors, mobile phone applications and web-based reporting, enee.io provides customers with the information they need to optimize energy usage, improve energy system health and safeguard backup power supplies.

enee.io's goal is to lead energy intelligence worldwide, helping to bridge the energy divide and support the shift to renewable power.

Name: Gebwell - puhdasta lämpöä
Description:
Maailmaa ei muuteta yksin. Eikä puheilla. Puhtaampi tulevaisuus syntyy teoilla, jotka tehdään yhdessä. Ratkaisu kerrallaan.
Meidät tunnetaan yrityksenä, jonka lämpöpumppu- ja kaukolämpötuotteista voi nauttia hyvällä omallatunnolla. 
Kuljemme edelläkävijänä, kun tulevia keskeisiä energiahaasteita ratkaistaan.

Name: ebm-papst Middle East
Description:
Welcome to the world of ventilation and drive engineering. As a worldwide innovation leader in fans and motors with over 20,000 different products, ebm-papst has the ideal solution for virtually all air technology and drive engineering tasks. If we do not have it already, our 900 R&D and sales Engineers will work with you to develop a new one. Our company maintains a highly-skilled and experienced team of professionals that is ready to tackle your most difficult air moving challenges and offer solutions that meet your needs. 

ebm-papst Middle East FZE serves the entire Middle East area. Our Middle East office is located in Dubai. From this office and warehouse we serve Bahrain, Egypt, Iraq, Jordan, Kuwait, Lebanon, Oman, Pakistan, Watar, Saudi-Arabia, Syria and U.A.E.

We serve a plethora of markets, including Agriculture, Air-conditioning and Ventilation, Appliance, Commercial Refrigeration, Heating, Industrial, Lighting, IT / Telecom, Medical, Transportation and more.

You can always count on prompt, courteous service. Customer satisfaction is our number one priority.

Name: Bennamann Ltd
Description:
Bennamann is a UK-based methane solutions provider delivering advanced technologies that convert biogas into clean, renewable biomethane. We design, manufacture, and supply biogas upgrading systems and refuelling systems that enable anaerobic digestion (AD) plant operators to maximise the value of their biogas by producing high-quality renewable fuel.

Our solutions help customers capture and upgrade methane from AD feedstocks and organic waste, creating a sustainable energy source that can power transport and industrial applications — supporting the transition to Net Zero.

Our technologies include:
•	Biomethane upgrading systems – transforming biogas into fuel-grade renewable biomethane or Bio-CNG.
•	On-site refuelling solutions – enabling efficient use of biomethane as a vehicle fuel.
•	Portable biomethane storage: A Clean, Flexible Replacement for Diesel and HVO Across All Sectors.

In partnership with industry leaders, Bennamann is helping to build a circular energy economy where waste becomes a valuable resource.

Our mission is to accelerate the global shift to clean energy by turning methane into opportunity — cutting emissions, reducing waste, and delivering economic and environmental benefits across multiple sectors including agriculture, transport, and construction.

Bennamann is based at Chynoweth Farm, St. Allen, Truro, Cornwall, United Kingdom.

Name: GELON LIB GROUP
Description:
Gelon LIB Group was set up as a manufacturer and exporter in 2003, dealing with lithium ion battery materials, equipments, production line etc. Most of the senior management staffs graduated from China's most famous electrochemical professional --CENTRAL SOUTH UNIVERSITY, from which created a lot of leaders in Chinese lithium ion battery industry . from 2003 until now, Gelon’s engineers have much experiences in the production of lithium ion battery materials, batteries and equipments, Owning a group of experienced engineers and staffs, we can bring you not only reliable products and technology, but also excellent services and real value you will expect and enjoy.

 Our preponderant products are LFP,LMO,LCO, NMC,NCA; LTO,MCMB, natural graphite,Separator ,Electrolyte& Other accessories (SBR CMC NMP PVDF,Sup-Li,Al&Ni Tabs ,and battery packs tags.,etc ) for new power lithium ion batteries.
Based on our extensive battery production experiences and battery equipments factrories,we can design and offer turn-key solution for customer, and Undertake lithium ion battery project design, construction&training
Bynow，Gelon group has successfully supplied automatic equipments for many well-known battery manufacturers,such as TESLA ,LG，SONY，ATL ......; also successfully offered turn-key projects in Bolivia, Argentina,United Kingdom,Russia,Turkey, Thailand,Indonesia,Indian,South Africa ..... .
      We have accumulated 15+ years experiences on lithium battery raw material production, battery manufacturing and equipment production. With our extensive experience and knowledge, we can provide our customers not only the premium products, but also the most professional service and technical support.

  We always dedicate ourselves to one mission: Along with our customers, Simplify Lithium ion battery solution for you

Name: LCM-Loop Charging Module
Description: We are developing a revolutionary product that enables on-the-go charging for electric vehicles without compromising their design. Our solution doubles the charging speed, allowing vehicles to charge while driving. Additionally, our product boasts the highest level of durability, ensuring long-lasting performance.

Name: Titan Wind Energy
Description: Titan Wind was founded in 2005 in Suzhou China, and listed on the Shenzhen stock exchange (China) on December 31, 2010. The company adheres to the development of wind power industry value chain upstream and downstream, and it is mainly engaged in the production and sale of wind tower, blades, turbine foundations, offshore substations and other wind power generation equipment, as well as the development and operation of wind farms. Over the years, Titan Wind has expanded globally with three production facilities in Europe including tower facility in Varde, Denmark, Surface Treatment plant in Esbjerg, Denmark, and the offshore foundation facility in Cuxhaven, Germany.

Name: Splitwaters
Description:
Splitwaters is the leading electrolyzer manufacturer and engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) company in Houston, TX, and has revolutionized the way green hydrogen production plants are built. 

With our innovative approach, we modularized the green hydrogen plants reducing the traditional stick-built construction to less than 20%. This game-changing technology not only streamlines the construction process but also significantly enhances the efficiency and cost-effectiveness of green hydrogen production. By leveraging our expertise in the field, we have positioned ourselves as a trailblazer in the industry, offering a turnkey solution that simplifies the entire project lifecycle. The modular design of Splitwaters' electrolyzers allows for faster deployment, reduced on-site labor, and improved quality control. This translates to substantial cost savings and a faster time-to-market for green hydrogen projects, making us more accessible and viable for a wider range of clients.

Name: MAHYTEC
Description:
MAHYTEC is specialized in the design and manufacture of hydrogen storage systems. Based in Dole in the Jura region and founded in 2008 by 4 research professors from the University of Franche Comté experts in materials science, MAHYTEC is an innovative company with a strong R&D potential. MAHYTEC is one of the few companies to master two hydrogen storage technologies: compressed storage with tanks capable of withstanding high pressures and solid storage via metal hydride tanks. The company demonstrates its know-how by offering innovative and proven solutions. Our hydrogen storage systems are certified for transport and distribution  and for stationary use of hydrogen.

MAHYTEC joined the HENSOLDT group in July 2021 with the ambition to multiply its production capacities and become the center of excellence for hydrogen storage.

Name: HIZENERGY
Description: HIZENERGY specializes in providing energy storage system solutions for commercial and industrial applications, with Power Conversion Systems (PCS) at its core. The company is committed to addressing the key challenges and needs associated with energy storage in these sectors. Embracing the mission of "Flexible Energy for All"， HIZENERGY aims to deliver energy storage solutions that are efficient, intelligent, safe, and reliable for its commercial and industrial clients.

Name: Gotion Germany Battery GmbH
Description:
Gotion Germany Battery GmbH, a subsidiary of Gotion High-tech, is a pivotal player in the energy solutions sector, particularly focusing on cutting-edge battery technology. The company's milestone achievement of producing the first battery product in Göttingen, Germany, marked a significant step towards localizing battery production in Europe. This endeavor was witnessed by esteemed dignitaries like Stephan Weil, Governor of Lower Saxony, and Cong Wu, Consul General of China in Hamburg, highlighting the strategic importance of this development.

 Gotion Germany Battery GmbH has forged partnerships with renowned companies such as BASF, ABB, Ebusco, and Ficosa to further enhance its battery products and technology offerings. The factory's high level of automation, with an automation rate nearing 70%, underscores its commitment to efficiency and innovation in battery production. With a planned production capacity of 20GWh and an estimated annual output value of EUR 2 billion upon full operation, Gotion Germany Battery GmbH is poised to play a key role in advancing clean energy solutions and electric vehicle technologies in Europe. The factory's focus on commercial vehicles, energy storage systems, and passenger vehicles reflects its versatility and commitment to serving diverse market needs. 

Overall, Gotion Germany Battery GmbH's dedication to "Made in Germany" battery products aligns with the company's broader mission of promoting sustainable energy practices and driving the transition towards a greener future

Name: Nordex UK & Ireland
Description: Nordex UK Ltd was established in 2002, with Nordex Energy Ireland Ltd officially launching in 2009. We currently have more than 400 colleagues working across three office locations: Manchester, Oola in County Limerick, and Cork. This is in addition to our numerous service points which cover a vast area of the region, from Inverness in the north of Scotland, to Bridgend in south Wales.

Name: Moonwatt
Description:
Moonwatt is redefining hybrid solar power with advanced sodium-ion battery energy storage solutions.

Founded in Amsterdam, we create innovative hardware and software to make solar power reliable, affordable, and available around the clock.

Our technology combines cutting-edge sodium-ion batteries with a unique product design, delivering cost-effective storage systems that turn intermittent solar into firm, dispatchable power.

We’re building a future where solar energy isn’t just clean, but consistently dependable.

Follow our journey or connect with us to learn more.

Name: POWEEND
Description:
Poweend propose une électricité éolienne à prix compétitif et stable, aux PMI comme aux grands groupes industriels.

Nous concevons et fabriquons nos éoliennes en France, avec le soutien de partenaires locaux et de fournisseurs européens, pour garantir fiabilité et performance. 
Nous maîtrisons l’ensemble de notre chaîne de valeur, de la conception à l’exploitation de nos éoliennes, en passant par le développement et le financement des parcs.

En intégrant nos éoliennes de moyenne taille (50m à la nacelle) en Zones d'Activités Economiques (ZAE), nous préservons les paysages et le cadre de vie de chacun, tout en favorisant la réindustrialisation et la création d'emplois locaux.

Name: Antec
Description:
Antec is creating the renewable future of energy. Its effective, circular and modular technology turns biowaste into valuable resources such as biogas, biofertilizer, circular fuels, clean heat and renewable electricity.   

Founded in 2014 by brothers Egil and Uno Andersen and Eirik Gundersen, the company delivers modular biogas converters at scale for farmers, industries and communities anywhere in the world. 

Antec enables a world run on renewable resources, empowering self-sustaining communities."

Name: Solectra
Description:
Welcome to Solectra by SM Solar Pvt Limited, where innovation and sustainability are at the core of our commitment to delivering cutting-edge solar energy solutions. As a leader in the industry, we import premium solar panels and manufacture state-of-the-art inverters, batteries, circuit breakers, and DC cables, all designed to meet the highest standards of quality and performance. Our mission is to power a sustainable future by providing reliable and eco-friendly products that empower individuals and communities to harness the sun’s energy.

In addition to our extensive product portfolio, our in-house capabilities allow us to offer comprehensive end-to-end EPC (Engineering, Procurement, and Construction) services. From initial concept to final installation, we ensure seamless execution of solar projects, delivering efficiency and excellence at every stage. At Solectra, we are dedicated to creating a brighter tomorrow by driving the adoption of clean, renewable energy solutions across all sectors. Join us in our journey to lead the way toward a more sustainable and solar-powered future.

VRM Energy - A Trusted Distribution Company

Name: SENMARCK ENERGY
Description:
SENMARCK ENERGY designs and produces hybridized battery storage systems for residential, commercial, and industrial applications, especially for heavy-duty off-grid applications. SENMARCK has served major national construction projects by providing hybridized battery storage systems that integrate with diesel generators to enhance their efficiency and reduce diesel fuel consumption. The plug-and-play hybrid systems are widely utilized in the construction, mining, and construction machinery rental sectors.

SENMARCK ENERGY is committed to integrating digital and power electronics technologies, developing clean power, and driving the green energy revolution for a net-zero and greener future. In the clean power generation sector, we help create new power systems that primarily rely on renewable energy. Additionally, we hybridize traditional diesel generators and have invented parallel power output technology to downsize and reduce diesel engines for off-grid heavy industries.

In the power rental sector, events power, crushers, cement, mining, and construction sectors, we are accelerating green energy solution adoption and helping heavy industries shift away from diesel generators. We build green, low-carbon, and intelligent power systems for all industries. SENMARCK ENERGY continues to innovate through collaboration with global partners to promote carbon neutrality.

Name: Tarnoc
Description:
Tarnoc’s mission is to accelerate the energy transition to sustainable heating of households. The company enables the transition from traditional gas-based heating systems to the all-electric 'Turbine Heat Pump'.

Tarnoc solves a huge problem by integrating the heat source into existing homes instead of making complex adjustments to the homes (required for traditional heat pumps and heat networks). The all-electric and high-temperature 'Turbine Heat Pump' can replace the gas boiler 1-on-1. The system operates without an outside unit and is connected to the existing heating system (radiators).

To succeed in our mission we are looking for motivated and talented people to be a part of this journey. Do you want to join our team please let us know! Check our vacancies or send an open application.

Name: I SUN GROUP
Description:
About Us :

 I Sun Solar Pvt. Ltd. is a trusted name in the solar energy industry, specialising in the design, manufacturing, and installation of high-quality solar mounting structures. Established in 2016 and headquartered in Rajkot, Gujarat, we empower clean energy transitions for residential, commercial, industrial, and utility-scale projects across India and overseas.

What We Do :

We offer end-to-end solutions including:
 Solar Mounting Structures (Rooftop, Ground, Water Pump)

Milestones & Impact :
 1.5+ GW Solar Installations Supported
 250+ Successful Projects
 Trusted by 50+ Clients Globally
