Our Vision :
To accelerate the transition to sustainable energy by delivering innovative, cost-effective, and reliable solar infrastructure solutions worldwide.

Mission :
To empower energy independence and environmental responsibility through cutting-edge solar technology and seamless project execution.

 Follow us for project updates, innovations, and insights in the solar space.

Name: Shoto
Description:
Shoto (Shuangdeng Group, Stock Code: 06960.HK) is a global leader in energy storage, specializing in three key areas: AIDC (AI Data Center) energy storage, renewable energy storage, and telecom energy storage. The company designs, manufactures, and sells lithium-ion, sodium-ion, and lead-acid batteries and integrated solutions.

With in-house capabilities in battery cell production, Energy Management Systems (EMS), and Battery Management Systems (BMS), Shoto has built a fully integrated presence across the renewable energy value chain—from cells and battery systems to system integration and smart energy operations & maintenance.

Recognized repeatedly as a Tier 1 Energy Storage Manufacturer by BloombergNEF, Shoto consistently ranks #1 worldwide in battery shipment volume for data center and telecom energy storage, delivering safe, efficient, and sustainable solutions to customers around the globally.

Name: Wattsun.net
Description:
Wattsun levert slimme energie opslagsystemen speciaal voor evenementen
Energiedistributie:
Op een evenementen terrein zullen op veel verschillende punten een elektrisch stroompunt voor handen moeten zijn. Met alleen het plaatsen van een centrale netaansluiting (transformator station) kan dus niet worden volstaan. Het terrein zal moeten worden voorzien van een slim uitgedacht stroom distributie netwerk. Door dit op een slimme wijze in te richten, kan maximale flexibiliteit van de terreinindeling en betrouwbare energievoorziening worden gecombineerd.
Energieopslag:
Bij energieopslag zou gedacht kunnen worden aan pilots met innovatieve batterijen, maar in een later stadium (over enkele jaren) zal een deel van de accucapaciteit van de elektrische auto’s van bezoekers als stroomvoorziening van het evenement gebruikt kunnen gaan worden.

Name: Green Independence
Description:
Green Independence (GI) is a pioneering company committed to accelerating the world's independence from fossil fuels by providing affordable and accessible green energy and clean water solutions.

Our groundbreaking solution, the New Artificial Leaf (NAL), is a multifunctional solar panel that harnesses three times (X3) the solar energy compared to a conventional PV panel, saves twenty times (X20) the energy required for conventional water desalination and reduces the cost of green hydrogen production to 1€/kg, making it competitive with fossil fuels.

Our mission is to address the pressing global issues of water scarcity, fossil fuel dependency, and the intermittency of renewable energy sources.

Name: Avant Garde Innovations
Description: Avant Garde Innovations is an international cleantech startup with a 'Green' heart & soul. Our passionate aim is to introduce innovative, affordable and sustainable solutions that take renewable energy self sufficiency and energy empowerment to the next level through a Distributed & Decentralized approach.

Name: Solar-LIT
Description:
Solar-LIT offers full-scenario, one-stop intelligent cleaning solutions to photovoltaic power stations.

By integrating robotic hardware, software, and comprehensive O&M services, Solar-LIT helps photovoltaic power stations to enhance energy production efficiency and reduce O&M costs, thereby effectively lowering the LCOE.

Compared to the time-consuming and labor-intensive process of truck washing or manual washing, Solar-LIT's cleaning robots can perform daily cleaning fully automatically, offering intelligent O&M that saves time, effort, and worry.

As a seasoned industry leader, Solar-LIT seamlessly integrates its mechanical design acumen with extensive O&M experience in solar power plants, continuously upgrading its offerings and propelling industry innovation. The company's proficiency in manufacturing key components in-house ensures not only swift and efficient delivery but also the agility to tailor solutions to a spectrum of unique customer requirements.

Solar-LIT's robots have been accredited by TÜV, SGS and other prestigious agencies. The reliability is also proved by convincing track records across the globe. To date, Solar-LIT has served projects of over 18 GW in regions including the Middle East, Central Asia, China, and South America.

Name: Okaya EV Charging Solutions
Description: With over 40% market share, we are India’s No. 1 Electric Vehicle Charging Solutions company. Okaya EV-CS helps individuals, medium-large fleets, and businesses  attain on site sustainable mobility through its wide range of electric chargers. Our range starts from EV Chargers for Electric 2-Wheelers and extends all the way for 4-Wheelers, and 6+Wheelers.

Name: Cavendish Hydrogen
Description: Cavendish Hydrogen is a global leader in hydrogen fueling solutions for the mobility sector. Driven by the vision to end emission from mobility, Cavendish is committed to providing safe, competitive, and reliable hydrogen fueling solutions, offering the convenience of traditional fuels but with zero emissions. With a dedicated team across offices on three continents, the company covers the entire value chain from development and production to installation, commissioning, and maintenance. Through value creation and cutting-edge technology, Cavendish is setting new standards for fueling heavy-duty vehicles with reliable hydrogen solutions. Cavendish Hydrogen ASA is listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange (CAVEN) and headquartered in Herning, Denmark.

Name: ECOTHERM Hot Water, Steam & Solar Systems
Description:
ECOTHERM - The leading brand for individual hot water, steam and solar systems for hotels, hospitals and industrial applications.

ECOTHERM produces state-of-the-art turnkey hot water, steam and solar systems as well as individual components, such as high capacity water heaters, heat exchangers, clean steam generators, electric boilers and many more. We combine all available energy sources including gas, oil, electricity, waste heat, and renewable energy sources, to design the most energy-efficient and sustainable systems. Our goal is to provide our customers with reliable and sustainable solutions that meet their individual requirements.

We work globally with our carbon-neutral headquarters and production facility in Austria, Support Centers in Dubai and México and partners in more than 30 countries worldwide.

Name: Convion
Description:
Convion offers solutions for ultra-clean and efficient power generation by fuel cells and hydrogen production by high temperature electrolysis. Solid oxide cell technology (SOC) at the heart of Convion’s systems provides the highest efficiency conversion of fuel to electricity or of steam to hydrogen. 
Convion fuel cell systems (SOFC) are continuously operating, modular power generators, which can flexibly use natural gas or biogas as a fuel and are able to operate in parallel to the power grid or independently from it. The technology is particularly suited for distributed power generation as its performance is independent of scale.
Convion electrolysers (SOE) produce hydrogen from steam with excellent energy efficiency, providing customers with competitive solution for hydrogen production. 
Modular and autonomous co-generation and hydrogen production systems operating close to where the demand is are building blocks of smart, diverse and resilient energy infrastructure.

Name: GK91 Bioeconomy Pvt Ltd
Description:
Our sister firm Varhad Capital Pvt Lts has developed a network of 550,000farmers across India through farmer producercompaniesas well as cooperatives. Our farmers alone have 2 MN tons of Agricultural residue at their disposal every year. We plan to convert this into biochar, biocoal, biogas and biohydrogen through gasification and pyrolysis. 

We are expanding our engineering team for the engineering, procurement and construction #EPC capability in-house. We will also enter the manufacturing of biocoal and biochar for our clients as well as selling it through the Gramkalyan.com platform to businesses across the world. 

We plant to produce biocoal (torrefied biomass) of 2mtpa and biochar of 2mtpa by collecting and processing 10mtpa of biomass/ agriculture residue across India.

B2R would play a vital role in aiding the Government of India's vision of making India a USD 5 trillion economy by enhancing the contribution of SMEs to about 50% of GDP from the current contribution of 29%. 

B2R Advisors is a young, dynamic fund management company. Its goal is to make Cardiac Cancer and Diabetes (CCD) free New India by enabling discerning investors to investing enterprises (MSMEs) focussed on green growth especially the CCD Free New India. The SME can benefit from the fund as well as the support available form the Government of India and its enabling policy framework. The enterprises should have a business model which is scalable enough to make an impact on the tens of millions of the beneficiary participants like farmers, artisans, small entrepreneurs and also the end consumers. 

B2R Advisors team is a unique mixture of established business houses and lead by a veteran fund manager of an international proven track record. The proposed Fund would play a critical role in supporting Green SMEs in Transportation, Energy, and Consumption ecosystem and in turn making the New India CCD free.

Name: NNG Energy
Description:
NNG Energy is a company that has been operating in Turkiye since 2008, specializing in gas turbine and gas engine services, and
providing high-quality and cost-effective aftermarket service support in the field of refurbishment. Our brand aims to continuously improve and develop its workforce by focusing on innovation and workplace safety, while also promoting the sustainable use of resources.

Name: Sigenergy Polska
Description:
Sigenergy skupia się na innowacjach w dziedzinie czystej energii i prowadzeniu świata ku bardziej ekologicznej przyszłości. Tworzymy inteligentne rozwiązania energetyczne nowej generacji poprzez integrację najnowocześniejszych technologii w zakresie energoeletroniki, oprogramowania oraz sztucznej inteligencji.

Dzięki globalnej obecności, Sigenergy umożliwiaja klientom osiągnięcie niezależności energetycznej i celów zrównoważonego rozwoju. Nasz zespół badawczo-rozwojowy, składa się z najlepszych talentów z branży energetyki odnawialnej i hi-tech, posiadających obszerną wiedzę i niezrównane osiągnięcia.

Narody promują energię odnawialną z niezwykłym zapałem i wysiłkiem. Poprzez ciągłe innowacje i rozwój, Sigenergy poświęca się staniu się najbardziej zaufanym partnerem w tej niezwykłej podróży. Razem możemy dokonać zmiany i prowadzić ku bardziej ekologicznej przyszłości.

Name: Efitherma
Description:
Efitherma is a company specialised in the manufacture of heat pumps. Our headquarters are located in Lucena (Córdoba), a strategic location in the heart of Andalusia, where we have a factory of more than 10,000 m².

With more than 25 years of experience in the sector, we continue to work on manufacturing and developing sustainable and efficient solutions that contribute to the current energy transition.

Name: LumenHaus GmbH
Description: LumenHaus strebt danach, die weltweit größte One-Stop-Plattform für grüne und intelligente Energielösungen für Zuhause und der weltweit führende Betreiber von virtuellen Kraftwerken zu werden. Unsere Vision ist es, eine Zukunft zu gestalten, in der jeder Zugang zu sauberer, erschwinglicher und zuverlässiger Energie hat. Wir treiben die Energiewende voran, indem wir eine einheitliche Plattform anbieten, die die dezentrale Erzeugung, Speicherung und Nutzung von grüner Energie ermöglicht. Unsere Plattform macht die Energiewende intelligent, effizient und ermöglicht es jedem, aktiv an der Energiewende teilzunehmen!

Name: PASSER
Description:
PASSER is a company supplying cable handling equipment for the offshore oil & gas and renewable energy industry. 
We are Norwegian based EPCI company providing complete turnkey solutions, world wide.

Name: E-Motors
Description:
A E-motors é uma empresa 100% nacional especializada em mobilidade elétrica. Atuando a 4 anos no setor, nos diferenciamos com produtos exclusivos e o desenvolvimento de tecnologia se tratando de baterias de lítio e pós-vendas multimarcas para duas ou três rodas dentro da categoria dos veículos leves e levíssimos como motos, scooters, triciclos, tuk-tuk, patinetes, skate, monociclos e bicicletas elétricas. 

A empresa atualmente está em fase de ampliação de sua capacidade de produção para aumentar a oferta de baterias de lítio para o mercado com qualidade e garantia 100% nacional, com a produção de novos packs, conversões de chumbo para lítio e recondicionamento de baterias de lítio. Além disso, tem forte atuação com peças de reposição para praticamente todas as marcas e modelos do mercado. 

Recentemente, foi inaugurado um centro de treinamento completo para a formação de profissionais qualificados e lançamos o curso livre de imersão em mobilidade elétrica certificado e em parceria da Faculdade Telos de Campinas, instituição reconhecida pelo MEC e que tem como objetivo trazer uma didática 100% prática e com uma equipe de instrutores especializados e atuantes na área. 

O curso visa atender não só pessoas físicas, mas também lojistas, concessionárias, entusiastas ou qualquer empresário que queira expandir seu negócio já existente até mesmo, empresas e indústrias que precisam capacitar sua equipe e que estão migrando sua frota para veículos elétricos.

Em 2020, a empresa participou em um dos programas de empreendedorismo e investimento mais famosos da televisão brasileira, o Shark Tank Brasil 5 temporada. Confira!!!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iBTMtUGNTqk

Name: Helix Earth
Description:
Born from our work on NASA space missions, we're applying new technologies to solve age-old problems in the HVAC industry and other commercial processes.

By 2050, CO2 emissions from air conditioning power use will reach nearly 10% of the global output - more than the entire aviation industry or passenger vehicles.

We're starting with breakthrough HVAC retrofit devices that bring unmatched efficiency and energy savings to existing air conditioning units (RTU, DOAS). By removing moisture from outside air before entering the main system, our devices can supply outside air more cost effectively than any other solution. This is a game changer for those paying utilities on commercial properties and buying equipment. Adding Helix products will be a good choice for both retrofits and replacement situations.

With many incentives and tax credits available, the Helix products may cost $0 out-of-pocket making our devices an easy and obvious addition to rooftop HVAC systems.

Name: ENJAY
Description:
We push the boundaries of recoverable energy – transforming excess heat into profit and cutting fossil CO₂ emissions.

Enjay is a cleantech company based in Malmö, Sweden, specialized in energy efficiency. The company´s first solution, Lepido, is the first in the world to offer profitable energy recovery from polluted exhaust air. The innovation enables reducing the annual emissions of CO2 by 500 million metric tons, one entire percent of the projected world-wide CO2 emissions by 2050.

Enjay’s mission is to put an end to wasting energy, because the cleanest form of energy is the one never produced.

Name: SY GREEN ENERGY
Description: SY GREEN ENERGY established in the year 2022, is the leading service provider and Project Developer for an exclusive range of domestic and commercial BIOGAS plants, Hydrogen Generation Plant, dairy farm solutions, oxygen generation plants, nitrogen generation plants, solar plants, WASTE-TO-ENERGY solutions, organic fertilizers. Our company was founded on the principle of delivering high-quality and "NATURE-FRIENDLY" solutions to our clients which interns BENEFIT our clients and mother nature. Our company has sufficient skilled engineering professionals who provide infrastructural facilities to undertake all domestic, industrial, and commercial projects related to RENEWABLE energy. Our company renders consultancy services for the preparation of projects, takes up feasibility studies, Site visits, and carries out our project implementation and awareness program on waste management. Our company provides a one-stop solution for all WASTE-TO-ENERGY projects.

Name: RTB Hydro
Description:
A RTB Hydro é uma empresa brasileira que se destaca nas indústrias de energia, papel e celulose, química, petroquímica, óleo e gás, e energias renováveis. Com atuação nacional, nosso compromisso é fornecer produtos e serviços de alta qualidade, com responsabilidade social e segurança.

Na Energia Renovável, somos líderes em sistemas hidroelétricos, fotovoltaicos, eólicos e termossolares. Contribuímos para a matriz energética nacional e viabilidade da exportação de energia, promovendo uma transição sustentável.

Na Papel e Celulose, oferecemos instalações mecânicas e elétricas, montagem de painéis, equipamentos de caldeiraria e usinagem de peças de qualidade.

Em Química, Petroquímica e Óleo e Gás, destacamos-nos na fabricação sob encomenda de equipamentos como vasos de pressão, reatores químicos, entre outros, além de serviços de manutenção de trocadores de calor.

Nossa abordagem personalizada nos permite oferecer soluções adaptadas às necessidades de nossos clientes. Com presença forte e compromisso com a qualidade, somos sua parceira confiável em todas as áreas. Junte-se a nós em busca de um futuro mais sustentável e eficiente.

Name: Ronma Solar Latam
Description:
Ronma Solar, um dos primeiros fabricantes de painéis solares na China, está principalmente envolvido na produção de células solares de silício cristalino, módulos, engenharia de sistemas fotovoltaicos, P&D de produtos de aplicação fotovoltaica, fabricação, vendas, suporte técnico, EPC e serviço pós-venda, entre outros.
Podemos oferecer Células Solares de Silício PERC Mono/Poli-cristalino e N-Type TOPCON com eficiência de até 24%+. Além disso, podemos personalizar módulos fotovoltaicos de 380-660W, incluindo módulos de células com corte completo/meio corte, módulos monofaciais e bifaciais, módulos full black e outros tipos de módulos fotovoltaicos. Além disso, podemos fornecer soluções personalizadas para clientes globais.
Nossas vantagens são as seguintes:

1. Temos armazéns em Roterdã, Dubai e outros países com estoque suficiente de painéis.
2. A capacidade de produção atual de células e módulos da Ronma Solar é de 14GW e 5GW+ respectivamente.
3. Temos mais de 10 anos de experiência em PV, com a tecnologia mais avançada e o mais alto nível de manufatura.
4. Temos escritórios de vendas no Brasil, Índia, Europa e outros lugares.
5. Temos uma equipe de engenharia experiente, controle de qualidade mais rigorosa e equipe de vendas profissional, que podem fornecer os módulos solares com melhor custo-benefício e alta eficiência, além do serviço impecável.
6. Os produtos da Ronma Solar são altamente reconhecidos por clientes da China, Índia, Europa, América do Sul, Oriente Médio e África, Sudeste Asiático, etc. Possuímos certificações CEC, TUV, BIS, CCC, CQC, CE, IEC e INMETRO.
7. Os componentes Ronma Solar são homologados na lista do Ministério da Indústria e Tecnologia da Informação da China. A lista dos dez principais fornecedores de SOEs centrais na China inclui: State Power Investment, China Huaneng, China Anneng, China Power Construction, China Energy Engineering Group, China Metallurgical Corp., China National Nuclear Corp., China Minmetals Corp.

Name: SMB Rohrleitungsbau Wildau GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Rohrleitung- und Anlagenbau
inklusiver innovativer Technik mittels 3D Scan für die passgenaue Montage.

------------------

Die Grundlage unseres Erfolges sind die langjährigen Erfahrungen unserer qualifizierten Mitarbeiter. Unserer professionellen Leistungen als Rohrleitungsbauer erfolgen auf hohem technischen Niveau- bei konsequenter Beachtung gültiger Vorschriften und Standards. 

Wir erstellen seit dem Jahr 2017 für die Planung 3-D Modelle mit eigener, hochauflösender Laser-Scan Technik.
Damit minimieren wir im Vorfeld Kollisionspunkte bei Neubauten und vor allem bei Planungen in Bestandsanlagen. Weiterhin wird eine exaktere Vorfertigung ermöglicht und die Montagezeiten auf der Baustelle optimiert. Sie erhalten auf Wunsch die 3-D Modelle der von uns ausgeführten Leistungen.
Wir sind immer bemüht, unsere Kompetenzen und Lösungen zu Ihrer vollsten Zufriedenheit und in vollem Umfang einzusetzen und Ihnen stets beste Resultate zu liefern. Sprechen Sie uns gerne auf Einzelheiten für Ihre Vorhaben an. Wir sind gerne für Sie da und informieren Sie ausführlich und erstellen ein individuelles Angebot für Sie.

Name: Eco Green Energy France
Description:
Créée en 2008 par l'entrepreneur français M. Dalibor Nikolovski, Eco Green Energy s'est rapidement imposée comme la première marque solaire française. 

Spécialisé dans les solutions photovoltaïques (PV) de pointe pour les secteurs des services publics, commerciaux, industriels et résidentiels, notre engagement envers l'innovation et la durabilité stimule nos opérations.

Basée en région Parisienne, en France, et à Shanghai, en Chine, Eco Green Energy possède une usine ultramoderne de 3GW entièrement automatisée à Jiangsu, en Chine, notre présence mondiale s'étend à travers plus de 120 distributeurs dans plus de 75 pays. Avec plus de 120 brevets et notre volonté de repousser les limites de la technologie solaire, nos modules photovoltaïques N-TOPCon à haut rendement et notre série innovante EGE Home reflètent notre engagement.

En défendant la « qualité française » dans tous ses aspects, nous offrons une qualité exceptionnelle tout en nous efforçant d’apporter une contribution significative à une terre plus verte. 

Chez Eco Green Energy, nous croyons en un avenir alimenté par une énergie propre, et notre mission est de transformer cette croyance en réalité. 

Rejoignez-nous dans notre voyage vers un monde plus vert et plus durable – car chez Eco Green Energy, la durabilité n'est pas seulement un objectif ; c'est notre mode de vie.

Name: AgroSolar Experience
Description:
Doppelte Ernte für eine zukunftsfähige Landwirtschaft. Die innovative Agri-Photovoltaik von AgroSolar Europe kombiniert auf intelligente Weise Landwirtschaft mit regenerativer Stromerzeugung. Hierfür werden Solarmodule zur Stromgewinnung so über und zwischen landwirtschaftlichen Flächen errichtet, dass diese weiterhin rentabel bewirtschaftet werden können.

Eine echte Win-win-Situation, von der nicht nur Klima und Versorgungssicherheit profitieren, sondern auch Landwirtinnen und Landwirte: Denn die „doppelte Ernte“ ermöglicht eine Diversifizierung des Einkommens und trägt damit zu einer nachhaltigen Stärkung landwirtschaftlicher Betriebe und des ländlichen Raums bei.

Name: Airis Soluciones | Energía Solar Ecuador
Description:
Somos una multinacional española dedicada al desarrollo, producción, y comercialización de productos tecnológicos.

Trabajamos para el bienestar de nuestros clientes:

Eficiencia energética en todos tus espacios!

Name: Geneverse Energy Inc.
Description: As Geneverse, our products and solutions will still power you through any emergency, just as they always have. However, our goals continue to evolve as well. Geneverse is taking measures to ensure a complete renewable energy future, striving to take our customers from a centralized energy distribution system to a decentralized and distributed self-sustainable future. As we move forward, our primary purpose is providing support via complete energy independence.

Name: Ultimati Energie Deutschland GmbH
Description:
Based in Germany, Ultimati Energie specializes in advanced and affordable renewable energy storage solutions. 

With a commitment to innovation and reliability, we strive to achieve energy independence for our customers and support Europe's carbon neutrality efforts. 

Our vision is a society where renewable energy is the norm, contributing to a sustainable and low-carbon future. 

We empower users with the knowledge and tools needed for smarter energy choices, ensuring sustainable energy is accessible to everyone.

Name: Stylux Brasil
Description:
Fundada em 2015, a Stylux é uma empresa brasileira de eficiência energética e geração de energia sustentável, dedicada a entregar soluções completas que reduzem custos, aumentam o desempenho e promovem sustentabilidade em larga escala.

Com desenvolvimento próprio de luminárias LED, produzidas em modelo O&M em unidades fabris na China e instalados em todo o território nacional, a Stylux combina tecnologia de ponta, engenharia especializada e rigor técnico para entregar resultados comprovados.

Ao longo dos últimos anos, a qualidade dos nossos projetos e produtos nos permitiu construir um portfólio robusto, atendendo:
	•	pequenas e grandes empresas,
	•	companhias nacionais e multinacionais,
	•	órgãos públicos,
	•	concessões de iluminação pública,
	•	e iniciativas estratégicas de infraestrutura urbana.

Cada entrega reforça nosso compromisso com a eficientização do parque luminotécnico brasileiro e com a construção de cidades mais inteligentes, modernas e sustentáveis.

Desde 2020, a Stylux ampliou sua atuação e estruturou quatro unidades de negócio:
	•	Iluminação LED,
	•	Geração de Energia por fontes renováveis,
	•	Iluminação Pública,
	•	Smart City e tecnologias urbanas.

Hoje, seguimos transformando energia em impacto real, levando inovação, eficiência e inteligência para projetos em todo o Brasil.

Name: CWHI (CNOOD-Wenchong Heavy Industries)
Description:
CNOOD-Wenchong Heavy Industries (CWHI), is a world leading solution provider specialising in large scale manufacturing for offshore energy, renewable energy, oil and gas applications, infrastructure and mining. 

 With over 40 years of experience, we have an extensive track record supplying complex projects globally for the energy sector.  Through the companies yards located in China, we manufacture one of the most complete product ranges worldwide and offers complete solutions for our customers. 

 More about us:

Name: Linka Energy A/S
Description:
Linka Energy is among the world's leading developers of biomass plants for agricultural, industrial and residential use. We develop reliable solutions with an efficient use of the selected biofuels within; hot water-, high pressure hot water- and steam plants.

We develop biomass plants ranging from 250 kW - 15 MW, and the primary fuels are straw, wood chips and pellets, but also more exotic fuels. In addition we offer containerized solutions, ideal as heating supply in areas without main supply or for industrial premises with no boiler room.

With 3,500 plants installed worldwide, we have become experts within development, design and construction of fully automatic high-quality systems.

Name: Celsius Energy
Description: The Earth can accumulate summer heat and reuse it in the winter, so energy can be stored from season to season. By connecting buildings to continuous renewable energy from the earth, we respond to their heating and cooling needs.

Name: SKYWORTH PV
Description:
SKYWORTH PV is committed to “Make Every Ray of Sunshine Count” and to becoming a leading global provider of distributed PV products and services. Leveraging the innovation capabilities and quality standards of the Group, we deliver end-to-end clean energy solutions including consulting, design, products, and O&M covering residential, C&I, and utility-scale scenarios.

We support customers worldwide in pursuing low-carbon, energy-independent futures through our self-developed product portfolio
and full value-chain service system. We have established a strong presence in key markets including Germany, Italy, the United Kingdom, Brazil, and Senegal.

Contact us：solar.overseas@skyworth.com

Name: Kraftanlagen Energies & Services
Description:
Kraftanlagen Energies & Services – Solutions for the future 
Kraftanlagen Energies & Services is part of the French group Bouygues SA. As a multifaceted partner for energy, industry and building services, the company shapes the future of our society. Through its state-of-the-art system technology and flexible, customised solutions, Kraftanlagen makes an important contribution to the energy transition and climate protection across the entire value chain. The company is committed to decarbonisation and sustainable projects and innovations that make our lives easier and more liveable. With more than 2,000 employees, Kraftanlagen provides a comprehensive network of services through its companies and holdings at numerous locations and undertakes both large-scale projects in the role of general contractor and individual projects.

Name: Hexagon Agility
Description:
Hexagon Agility, a business of Hexagon Composites, has spent six decades driving revolutionary innovation, enabling over 100,000 vehicles to cost-effectively reduce the global carbon footprint. We're empowering fleets to meet sustainability targets while contributing to cleaner air for everyone.

In a fast-changing world in which companies and local authorities are working to decarbonize mobility, the development of recharging technologies represents a crucial challenge. This development requires easy access to hydrogen.

As a renewable energy innovator, ROYPOW is committed to the mission of achieving energy sustainability while creating a better life for human beings.

Name: AMSC
Description: AMSC (NASDAQ: AMSC) generates the ideas, technologies and solutions that meet the world’s demand for smarter, cleaner … better energy. Through its Windtec Solutions, AMSC provides wind turbine electronic controls and systems, designs and engineering services that reduce the cost of wind energy. Through its Gridtec Solutions, AMSC provides the engineering planning services and advanced grid systems that optimize network reliability, efficiency and performance. The company’s solutions are now powering gigawatts of renewable energy globally and enhancing the performance and reliability of power networks in more than a dozen countries. Founded in 1987, AMSC (American Superconductor) is headquartered near Boston, Massachusetts with operations in Asia, Australia, Europe and North America.

Name: Kyoto Group AS
Description:
We decarbonize process heat. At scale. For Industry.
The future of industrial heat is fossil-free and it’s arriving faster than ever.

At Kyoto Group, we accelerate this shift by replacing fossil-fired boilers with Heatcube, our flexible thermal battery that delivers clean, on-demand heat to meet industrial needs.

Heatcube charges when electricity prices are low, storing energy as high-temperature heat using safe, non-toxic molten salt. It then discharges steam on demand, with a round-trip efficiency of >93%, and a lifetime performance over 25+ years.

Choose between Heat-as-a-Service (HaaS) — purchasing green steam without upfront investment, operational risk, or maintenance or Heat-as-a-Product (HaaP) to own and operate the system. Both models offer predictable pricing, long-term savings, and decarbonization.


About this page:
This LinkedIn page is for those interested in Kyoto Group and what we do. We encourage users to keep a positive tone in the comments section and will monitor and delete inappropriate comments or spam.

Name: Midea MHELIOS
Description:
MHELIOS (Midea's Smart Home Energy Management System) is the next step in Midea’s promise to build a greener planet. While focused on developing and manufacturing smart house hold appliances and energy systems, the company has been committed to its Green Strategy since 2021. Part of that strategy includes reaching peak carbon emissions by 2030 and being carbon neutral by 2060. Other steps in this commitment include green design, procurement, and manufacturing, to ensure the company’s values are inherent in its products.


About Midea
The Midea Group, based on 55 years of development, has evolved into an international tech-leading company that specializes in five major businesses including Smart Home Business, Industrial Technologies, Building Technologies, Robotics &Automation, and Digital Innovation Business. Midea now has 160,000 employees globally and 40,000 employees overseas. In 2023, Midea ranked the 278th among the Global Fortune 500, 36th among Brand Finance Tech 100.

Name: Elestor B.V.
Description:
Elestor has introduced an innovative electricity storage technology for large scale stationary applications (LDES), based on the flow battery principle. With this, the electricity storage costs (LCoS) are reduced to an absolute minimum. Low cost, abundant active materials are used, combined with a patented system design and easy to manufacture and compact cells. 
This triple cost reduction strategy enables introduction of viable business cases, which are essential to stimulate the adoption of electricity storage and thus to accelerate the energy transition. 

The technology has the potential to replace fossil power plants at GWh scale (bi-directional power plants) and has all the properties to become the equivalent in large-scale long duration electricity storage of what Lithium ion is today for mobility.

The essential difference of the Elestor technology with conventional batteries is that power (MW) and capacity (MWh) are uncoupled: The Elestor technology is 100% modular and virtually any desired power-capacity combination can be designed, enabling very cost-effective bridging of long periods during which hardly renewable electricity is generated. With a progressing dependency on intermittent energy sources (sun, wind), this property becomes increasingly distinctive, if not decisive, for the energy transition to succeed.

Another unique feature is that the Elestor technology can be integrated in hydrogen infrastructures and electrolysers, resulting in a large reduction of green hydrogen production costs. 

In a competition entered by 600 companies, Elestor is named as one of the 10 most innovative companies in The Netherlands by the Amsterdam Centre for Business Innovation (University of Amsterdam).

Fueled by a Series A investment of 30M€, in a round led by Equinor Ventures with also Vopak joining, as well as by agreements with clients strategically adopting its innovative storage technology, Elestor has embarked on an ultra-rapid growth path.

Name: Northvolt North America
Description:
Bonjour, Hej! Welcome to Northvolt in North America. From our main office in Montreal, Quebec, Canada, we are gearing up for the construction of Northvolt Six, our first project outside of Europe and Quebec's first gigafactory. 

Powered 100% by North America's most sustainable, low-carbon energy, Northvolt Six will supply 60 GWh of high-quality battery cells every year — enough to power 1 million electric cars. 

Northvolt was founded to enable the transition to a decarbonized future by establishing a sustainable battery industry. To do this, we’re pioneering a new approach to battery manufacturing rooted in a commitment to fossil-free energy, sustainable sourcing of raw materials and recycling.  

Building the world’s greenest battery is no easy task, but with passionate problem-solvers from around the world, we strive to set a new benchmark for sustainability in the battery industry. Want to join us in building a cleaner world? Find your challenge at northvolt.com/career

Name: VoltStorage
Description:
VoltStorage is an energy storage company that develops innovative products and solutions to help providers and customers maximize energy value, eliminate curtailment/waste, and bridge the energy gap through grid deferral.

The Problem
Gridlock: 
Energy consumption continues to grow globally, with demand quickly outpacing supply and overstressing power grids.

The Need
Perpetual Power:
Energy providers need long duration storage solutions to bridge renewable power availability, supplement long-term power grid upgrades, and assure non-flammable, non-degradable, long lasting assets.

The solution
VoltStorage:
We create products and technologies to ensure that energy generated is never wasted and is always available when needed - enabling the resilient and green grids of tomorrow.

VoltStorage Iron Salt Battery Vault
Ultra low-cost, non-flammable and durable battery technology
Based on well known flow battery principles, VoltStorage developed the novel and proprietary ISB technology tailored for the Long-Duration Energy Storage (LDES) segment.

Name: Pyrogreen Energy

Name: LEITWIND

Name: CellCube Energy Storage
Description:
CellCube Energy Storage is one of the world's first and largest researcher, developer, manufacturer and distributor of vanadium flow batteries. As an industry leader in the energy storage sector, it has installed vanadium flow batteries at over 140 sites globally.

The first CellCube batteries were installed in 2008 and with a decade of operational experience the technology has been proven to deliver long lasting energy storage infrastructure for deployments in a wide range of climates and heavy load applications. The technology has displayed superior operational experience in over 100 projects and has a solid track record of energy storage performance.

www.cellcube.com

Name: ESY SUNHOME
Description:
Established in 2018, ESY SUNHOME swiftly gained prominence as a leading player in the energy storage industry, specializing in lithium battery technology and Battery Management Systems (BMS). Backed by cutting-edge protection systems and a dedicated R&D team, the company earned recognition for its innovative solutions. These advancements culminated in the development of the HM series All-in-One residential Energy Storage systems, distinguished by their advanced AI functionalities and robust IP66 waterproof and dustproof ratings, ensuring unparalleled reliability and easy installation in any setting.

With branches strategically located in Sydney, Australia, Genova, Italy, and Munich, Germany, ESY SUNHOME is positioned for global expansion, with aspirations to establish a significant international presence. The company's steadfast commitment to democratizing clean energy underscores its mission, empowering communities worldwide to embrace sustainability for a brighter future.

Name: Fuel Cell Systems Ltd.
Description:
Fuel Cell Systems Ltd., a UK-based company with 15 years of expertise, specialises in fuel cell solutions and hydrogen refuelling systems. We supply tailored fuel cell solutions by leveraging global product knowledge to match our customers’ power needs for diverse applications, such as environmental monitoring, CCTV towers, wildlife filming and off-grid power for various industries.
Beyond fuel cells, we design and integrate comprehensive hydrogen systems, encompassing production, storage and innovative refuelling systems. We have successfully implemented hydrogen solutions across an array of transportation modes, including planes, trains, cars, vans, forklifts, boats and buses.
Driven by a passionate team, we take pride in contributing to a rapidly advancing technology landscape. We aim to grow our company by ensuring that our customers are our best ambassadors.

Name: Oilon
Description:
We are a Finnish family-owned energy and environmental technology company founded in 1961.
We specialize in environmental technology with a special emphasis on product research and development work.
The main focus areas of our research and development are on improving energy efficiency, decreasing emission levels, and developing new solutions using renewable energy sources.

We manufacture and sell:
• burners and combustion systems for liquid and gaseous fuels in the capacity range of 10 kW – 90 MW
• industrial heat pumps and water chillers
• ground source heat pumps.

The service activities are in an important role throughout the products' life cycle.

Our products are used e.g. in power plants, pulp and paper, process industry, waste incineration, marine applications, district heating plants, for heating and cooling large buildings and facilities, and for heating private houses.

We have production facilities in Finland, USA and China. In addition, we have sales office in Brazil and Germany as well as more than 70 resellers all over the world.

Name: ENERGYNEST
Description:
ENERGYNEST enables industrial companies to electrify process heat at or below the cost of natural gas — without adding operational or financial risk. By combining power-to-heat, thermal energy storage and continuous energy market optimization, we deliver reliable heat only when electricity is cheaper than gas. This guarantees that our customers never pay more for heat than they do today. 

This typically means:
30-70% electrification of heat demand
50% lower fuel costs vs. natural gas
Stable, reliable 24/7 heat supply
Reduced exposure to fuel price volatility and CO2 costs

You can choose how you want to implement it: Heat-as-a-Service or turnkey EPC. 

We make industrial heat cheaper, cleaner and lower-risk.

View our range of case studies: https://energy-nest.com/projects/

Does our power-to-heat solution fit your business?
- Your annual heat demand exceeds 5 GWh.
- Sufficient grid connection capacity is available (around 1 MW per 5 GWh of demand)
- Process heat or steam is required from approx. 120 °C up to and beyond 300 °C
-You are looking for a dependable, lower-cost alternative to fossil-based heat

Contact us via mail at post@energy-nest.com or directly via LinkedIn!

Name: Elcogen
Description:
Founded in 2001, Elcogen is a manufacturer of clean energy technology that delivers affordable green hydrogen and emission-free electricity. We are a European business with a proud Estonian heritage and a global customer network delivering flexible core solid oxide technology. Elcogen has its registered office in the UK, and manufacturing facilities in Estonia and Finland that have served 160 customers in 30 countries.

Elcogen develops and supplies the technology that sits at the heart of energy security and transition away from fossil fuels. We are focused on driving net-zero ambitions forward with a core, reversible technology that converts fuel sources into emission-free energy and emission-free energy into green hydrogen. Our solid oxide fuel cell (SOFC) and solid oxide electrolyser cell (SOEC) technology offers an efficient solution to green hydrogen production, reducing commercial costs so customers can deliver affordable energy solutions to meet net-zero targets.

Name: Beam Global
Description: Beam Global is a clean technology innovator which develops and manufactures sustainable infrastructure products and technologies. We operate at the nexus of clean energy and transportation with a focus on sustainable energy infrastructure, rapidly deployed and scalable EV charging solutions, safe energy storage, energy security and Smart Cities Infrastructure. With operations in the U.S., Europe and the Middle East, Beam Global develops, patents, designs, engineers and manufactures unique and advanced clean technology solutions that power transportation, provide secure sources of electricity, enable Smart City services, save time and money, and protect the environment. Beam Global is headquartered in San Diego, CA with facilities in Broadview, IL and Belgrade and Kraljevo, Serbia and Abu Dhabi, UAE. Beam Global is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol BEEM.

Name: SoliTek
Description:
At SoliTek, we do things the right way - European quality & genuine green solar energy solutions. No shortcuts. 

We deliver the full 360° solar energy package - from panels that capture the sun’s power to smart batteries both for residential and C&I segments that store and manage it efficiently.

Yes, we started with solar panels for solar power plants - and we still make them. But since 2014, we haven’t stopped innovating. Today, our panels do more than just generate energy - they’re integrated into carports, in-roof systems, facades, noise barriers, and even greenhouses. And yes, every panel that leaves our warehouse is made in the EU and powered entirely by renewable energy.

Sustainability isn't just a buzzword for us - all SoliTek products are entirely made by renewable energy, we're a net-zero company, meaning we think about the full lifecycle of our products, from production to recycling.  We want to leave our city Vilnius (and all cities across the globe) cleaner.

Our solar panels were the first in the world to earn Cradle to Cradle Gold certification, proving they meet the highest environmental and social responsibility standards. With DIBt certification for German construction compliance, Hail Class 5 resistance (tested against 5 cm hailstones), you can trust that our products aren’t just green - they’re built to last.

Name: GA Drilling
Description:
GA Drilling with its patented PLASMABIT & ANCHORBIT technology is the solution for a local and independent source of electricity, heating, clean water & food production.

We provide scalable, modular, solutions for zero-carbon emissions energy production. Geothermal energy is the only renewable source of clean & baseload energy, available 24/7/365 rain or shine.

PLASMABIT brings a significant reduction in operational time & cost savings, drilling faster, deeper, & cheaper through any material, including hard rock and steel. 

PLASMABIT’s utmost potential is to unlock ultra-deep geothermal power almost anywhere globally. This will have potential to replace all fossil fuel energy generation & a massive positive impact on climate change. 

The technology is the result of years of R&D, with registered 23+ patents, supported by a full-time team of 70+ engineers and researchers, industrial funding, investors, 20+ EU research grants and strategic technical development partnerships with drilling industry leaders. 

If you would like to be part of our team and believe “Our Values”, we would like to hear from you.

We Believe in:
Trust * Giving and receiving trust is fundamental for us.
Creativity * We always think big and seek ways which others don't.
Exceptionality * We are the best in things that matter.
Courage * Striving for success, learning from failures, & getting through anything.
Ownership * Personal accountability for our own actions & results.

We offer a fascinating and exciting opportunity for experienced professionals to continue to deliver this unique disruptive innovation to market. We seek highly professional and enthusiastic individuals with an adventurous spirit. 

Interested? Contact career@gadrilling.com or visit |www.gadrilling.com|

Name: ECOnnect Energy
Description:
At ECONNECT Energy we believe that cleaner energy should be cheap and accessible. We bridge the energy distribution gap with our marine infrastructure solutions and services for the loading and offloading of LNG, Ammonia and Carbon Capture. 

ECONNECT Energy has developed a cost-efficient system for safe transfer of LNG, ammonia and CO2 between vessels and storage tanks, bypassing the need for building excessive jetties, quays or dredge large areas. ECONNECT Energy conducted the world’s first jettyless LNG transfer at Herøya Industrial Park in October 2017, marking a new era in energy distribution.

ECONNECT Energy is rooted in the Norwegian maritime and energy tradition and builds upon decades of experience. Our core competencies are cryogenic liquids, maritime engineering and naval architecture as well as business development within the LNG, renewable fuel and carbon capture industries. With innovative technology we are committed to expanding clean, sustainable and climate-positive energy solutions globally.

Name: IDEEMATEC
Description:
IDEEMATEC is a leading supplier of high-performance solar trackers. The company offers a fullymodular tracker portfolio designed to meet the diverse technical and environmental demands ofutility-scale solar projects. With over 7 GW of trackers installed on six continents, IDEEMATEC hasproven experience and scalable solutions for projects of all sizes. 

 
The L:TEC Family, IDEEMATEC’s tracker portfolio, is based on a unified platform and shares acommon DNA. The product range comprises three different trackers: the L:TEC 1P, L:TEC 2P, andL:TEC Agri-2P, each tailored to specific applications and customer requirements. L:TEC – whichstands for Locking Technology – features a patented decoupled drive technology and several lockingmechanisms. 

IDEEMATEC's solar trackers are engineered for exceptional wind stability, capable ofwithstanding wind speeds of up to 400 kph (approximately 250 mph), ensuring reliable performanceand durability for utility-scale energy projects worldwide. The L:TEC Family now comes withpreassembled components, enabling faster installation and minimizing complexity on-site. 

 
Headquartered in Germany since 2003, IDEEMATEC is a trusted partner for a diverse range ofstakeholders, including developers, EPCs, and investors, operating in dynamic energy markets. Withsubsidiaries on all continents, IDEEMATEC ensures optimal support for its partners around the world

Name: HyAxiom, Inc.
Description:
HyAxiom, Inc. is a leading global fuel cell and hydrogen solutions provider, enabling reliable, cost-competitive and carbon-free energy sources for industrial and commercial uses.

Building upon decades of experience in fuel cell development, HyAxiom’s mission is to accelerate a sustainable energy future by delivering a full spectrum of hydrogen solutions including fuel cells for both stationary and mobility applications as well as electrolyzers for hydrogen production.  

As a core technology provider, HyAxiom is a key pillar in the Doosan Group’s hydrogen vision. HyAxiom’s PureCell, which is based on proprietary phosphoric acid fuel cell (PAFC) technology, is the only commercially operating stationary fuel cell system running solely on hydrogen, today.

Our headquarters are located in East Hartford, Connecticut and we manufacture in South Windsor, Connecticut.

Solarport is the UK’s leading provider of solar mounting systems. As a bankable and reliable supplier with many years of experience, we deliver unmatched quality, innovation, and support. 

Our products are proudly designed and manufactured in the UK, ensuring faster turnaround times, cost-effectiveness, and the ability to meet even the most complex project demands. 

With a commitment to excellence, on-time delivery, and competitive pricing, Solarport is your trusted partner in powering the future of solar energy.

We do this by developing smart solutions in the field of sustainable energy, whereby the requirement is that these products are produced and used in a sustainable manner, fully recyclable and without environmental impact.
