Name: STABL Energy
Description:
We keep the battery on! At STABL Energy, we specialise in advanced industrial battery storage systems that prioritise reliability, safety and efficiency. We are committed to optimising energy management for renewable sources, ensuring our resource-efficient systems can respond to energy demands and variations. Backed by robust R&D, our outdoor solutions meet a wide range of operational demands and offer dependable service.

The STABL Advantage: Our battery storage systems excel in critical applications, delivering reliable performance when it matters most. Our unique Modular Multilevel Converter (MMC) and proactive balancing technology ensure superior safety and efficiency. Peak shaving capabilities and thorough testing affirm consistent performance in challenging conditions.

Sustainability at STABL: We extend the lifecycle of automotive batteries, championing a circular economy, reducing waste, and preserving raw materials. This cuts down our carbon footprint significantly, saving thousands of tons of CO2 equivalent annually and reinforcing our commitment to a cleaner planet while supporting ESG objectives.

Made in Germany: Our design and engineering processes ensure our solutions exceed industry standards, prioritising performance, reliability and safety.

People & Culture: Mirroring a high-performing sports team, STABL's environment fosters trust, honesty, and mutual responsibility, creating a supportive and dynamic workplace centred on achievement and community.

Engage with the Future: Connect with us to see how STABL Energy can elevate your business sustainably. Visit stabl.com to learn about our impact, explore partnerships, and discover career opportunities.

Name: ABIHV - Associação Brasileira da Indústria do Hidrogênio Verde
Freudenberg e-Power Systems
Description:
Freudenberg e-Power Systems is one of the world's leading suppliers of emission-neutral energy systems for heavy-duty applications. With its experience and expertise in battery and fuel cell technology, the company offers tailor-made solutions, in particular combined systems, for sustainable and economical e-mobility. With over 800 employees, Freudenberg e-Power Systems supports its customers from application development through to production, commissioning and service.
 
The company is part of the global Freudenberg Group, which has four business areas: Seals and Vibration Control Technology, Nonwovens and Filtration, Household Products as well as Specialties and Others. In 2024 the Group generated sales of more than 11 billion euros and employed more than 52,000 associates in around 60 countries.

Find out more about us at www.freudenberg-eps.com

Name: ADS-TEC Energy
Description: ADS-TEC Energy has more than ten years of experience with lithium-ion technologies, storage solutions and ultra-fast charging systems, including the corresponding energy management systems. The battery-supported fast-charging technology enables electric vehicles to be charged ultra-fast, even at power-limited grid connections.  The high quality and functionality of the battery systems is due to a particularly high depth of development and in-house production. With its advanced system platforms, ADS-TEC Energy is a valuable partner for the automotive industry, OEMs, energy supply companies and charging operators.

Name: OSG Oriana India Pvt Ltd
Description:
We built OSG Oriana Group to be a catalyst in India’s solar journey solar with the belief to empower our customers by making solar affordable reliable and easy.
OSG Oriana India Group is the sustainability partner for leading Solar Panel And Solar Inverters corporates in India. Headquartered in Pune, since 2015 we are one of India’s largest suppliers of solar energy products to esteemed customers. We have a highly skilled & professional team across 4 offices for PAN India solar product supplies.
Having delved in the industry for as long as we have, we know how to leverage technology and deliver products that are relatively more efficient. This is precisely why we recommend solar panels made from Monocrystalline cells. We take a cost-optimized approach to the production and supply of our products, which is reflected immaculately in the quality exhibited by our solar energy products. Although headquartered in Pune, our services are available all across India .

Name: Sirius PV USA
Description:
Welcome to our company page! We are a manufacturer of high-quality solar panels based in the United States. Our mission is to provide reliable, durable, and efficient solar panels that meet the needs of residential, commercial, and utility scale customers.

We take pride in producing our solar panels locally, ensuring that our products meet the highest standards of quality and sustainability. Our team is made up of experienced professionals who are committed to designing and producing solar panels that offer maximum energy efficiency, durability, and reliability.

We believe that solar energy is the future, and our goal is to make it accessible to everyone. Our panels are designed to provide long-term cost savings and environmental benefits, and we are committed to making our products affordable and accessible to customers across the United States.

Thank you for visiting our page, and we invite you to learn more about our products and services.

Name: GUGLER Water Turbines GmbH
Description:
GUGLER Water Turbines GmbH is a family business and the family GUGLER has been engaged for the last three generations in the development and the supply of water turbines and equipment for small hydropower plants.

Today, GUGLER Water Turbines GmbH is an internationally active company, which provides all types of water turbines (Kaplan, Francis and Pelton turbines) and installs them in existing or new plants. We specialise in the supply of turnkey systems to our customers, including the entire electromechanical equipment for a hydropower plant.

GUGLER family has been involved in the hydropower segment since 1919. GUGLER Water Turbines currently has more than 65 employees. In addition, we can count on a wide network of manufacturing specialists in our partner companies.

Name: DENS | Dutch Energy Solutions
Description:
DENS is a high-tech development company based in Brabant, working since 2015 on technological developments in the field of battery, fuel cell and hydrozine technology. 

In the market, in-depth knowledge about these new and climate-neutral technologies is still scarce, but DENS has in recent years built up its experience and thus broad expertise both on a mechanical, electrical, chemical and software technical level. 

Thanks to this in-house R&D team, DENS can quickly respond to an ever-changing supply chain, and realise customer-specific solutions efficiently. 

Besides hydrozine generators, stationary and mobile (stand-alone) battery systems, we develop customised battery packages for OEMs for the electrification of various types of equipment.

Name: Solar Land Co.
Description:
Solar Land, led by Eng. Khalid Al-Harby is a pioneering Saudi company committed to advancing renewable energy solutions, particularly solar energy systems. 
With extensive experience in the field, Eng. Khalid and his team harness Saudi Arabia's abundant sunlight, aligning with Vision 2030 to support the Kingdom's sustainable energy future. 
Our company offers a comprehensive range of solar solutions, from design and installation to maintenance, including on-grid, off-grid, solar water pumping, and solar lighting systems. 
We are dedicated to enhancing energy efficiency, reducing carbon emissions, and fostering a clean energy future for Saudi Arabia.

Name: Loop Energy Inc.
Description:
Loop Energy is a leading hydrogen fuel cell developer and manufacturer, helping build a zero-emissions world.

Commercial vehicle manufacturers are turning to Loop Energy for our industry-leading hydrogen fuel cell solutions, featuring Loop Energy's proprietary eFlow technology, which delivers higher fuel efficiency and significantly reduces the total cost of ownership.  Loop Energy fuel cells are used in a wide variety of applications around the world, including transit buses, trucks, material handling equipment, special purpose vehicles, stationary power generation and more.

Visit us at loopenergy.com

TSX: LPEN

Name: Qwello
Description:
Headquartered in Munich, Germany, Qwello is a fast-growing, full-service builder, owner, and operator of electric vehicle charging infrastructure in major European cities. We are focused on the provision of public charging infrastructure and committed to simplifying urban e-mobility for everyone.

Qwello operates over 15,000 charge points via public concessions with local municipalities and the investment of private capital. We deliver turnkey solutions to cities — covering all elements of planning, installation, operation, and service for public charging infrastructure.

Our operations span Germany, the Netherlands, Sweden, the UK, France, Spain, and Poland. With a clear commitment to the European market, the highest ESG standards, and strong support for decarbonisation, Qwello is helping to build the urban mobility of tomorrow.

We’re a fast-growing team driven by purpose and innovation. We believe the best products are built by inclusive, diverse, and collaborative teams — and we’re always looking for people who want to shape the future of e-mobility.

 Learn more at www.qwello.eu/en
 Want to join us? Explore our team life on Instagram: @lifeatqwello

Name: Eco-Tech Ceram
Description:
More than 50% of energy is consumed in the form of heat and more than a third of the energy consumed is lost as heat (equivalent to 2450 Mt of CO2 per year). Industrialists are keen to reduce their energy consumption to improve their competitiveness and reduce their carbon footprint. 

In order to support these manufacturers in their low-carbon transition, Eco-Tech Ceram, a three-time winner of the world innovation competition, is made up of a team of 40 employees (doctors, engineers and technicians) specialising in industrial heat, energy storage, materials, automation and financing engineering. We understand the needs of industry so that we can offer turnkey technical and financial solutions. Manufacturers can now make savings from the first year without having to invest. 

Given the size of the market, Eco-Tech Ceram has surrounded itself with public (BPI, Occitanie Region, ADEME) and private (RGREEN, QAIR, JOHES) shareholders capable of supporting ETC over the long term in France and internationally. 

The energy and climate challenge is immense, and Eco-Tech Ceram intends to play a major role. To do so, it must successfully transform itself from an innovative SME into a leading ETI in its market (decarbonised energy).

Name: First Subsea
Description:
With over 30 years' experience; First Subsea are a trusted provider of subsea products for the offshore wind, oil and gas industries.

With extensive knowledge of the fixed and floating offshore wind markets, First Subsea’s expertise include Mooring Systems and Connectors, Dynamic Bend Stiffener Connectors and Cable Ancillaries, Lifting Tools and Cable Protection Systems.

Within the Oil and Gas industry First Subsea specialise in the supply of Decommissioning and Lifting Tools, Subsea Mooring Connectors and Bend Stiffener Connectors.

Name: BeePlanet Factory
Description:
At BeePlanet Factory, we offer sustainable energy storage solutions. Since our founding in 2018, we have revolutionized the market with the implementation of storage systems based on electric vehicle batteries. 

We specialize in industrial self-consumption installations, hybrid plants with photovoltaic generation and high-power charging solutions. Our commitment to the circular economy and the excellence of automotive batteries has earned the trust of large companies, institutions and SMEs.

Visit our website and explore our modular and scalable solutions.

Name: Groupe Airwell
Description:
Since 1947, the French brand Airwell, present in more than 80 countries, is one of the references in air conditioning and heating solutions. 
To find more content in English : https://www.linkedin.com/company/airwell/

Name: RelyEZ Energy Storage
Description:
RelyEZ is at the forefront of defining the future of energy, crafting superior storage solutions that inspire the next generation of renewable power systems. Our mastery extends across the entire spectrum of lithium-ion energy storage—from grid-scale projects to commercial applications, and innovative microgrids. 

Our Teams of energy experts are driven by a commitment to human-centred technology. We continuously expand our capabilities and escalate our technological advancements to create a greener, more eco-friendly future of all.

RelyEZ’s global presence is marked by four cutting-edge facilities, capable of a combined annual output of 20GWh, setting new standards in energy solution production. ensuring unparalleled resilience and efficiency, and provide the safest, most cost-efficient power solutions.

Name: Nedstack Fuel Cell Technology
Description:
Nedstack is a leading player in the PEM fuel cell industry with a strategic focus and unique trackrecord on the high-power / high-use domain. 

Mission
At Nedstack we enable the hydrogen economy by developing, realizing, verifying, applying and servicing PEM fuel cell solutions. Our products and services are superior in quality, durability, safety and reliability and are cost competitive.
Our responsibility is to be a partner to industry and a partner to society by tailoring our solutions and services to achieve optimal energy efficiency, large scale deployment of zero-emission power systems and balanced power grids.

Vision 
At Nedstack we are confident that Hydrogen will be a backbone of the future global energy system. The rise of renewables provides for an abundance of excess hydrogen making it a widely available future commodity.
There is an increasing need for electrifying such green hydrogen in both stationary and mobile applications. As this hydrogen economy matures, the market for reliable and durable solutions will emerge.
Hydrogen will power the energy transition and we at Nedstack are strongly committed to develop and industrialize our PEM-technology and -products to enable the hydrogen economy.

Name: PES Engineers Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
PES Engineers, one among the oldest and largest Engineering firms, undertakes the execution of engineering and construction projects. We, at PES Engineers, are involved in the construction of major Government and Private Hydroelectric, Nuclear and Thermal Power Plants across pan India.

PES Engineers was established by Late Shri Ravi Janardhan Choudhury, the technocrat behind Kothagudem Thermal Power Project, Lower Sileru Hydro Project, Nagarjuna Sagar (Penstocks) and Madras Atomic Project.

Incorporated in 1981, with a team of 25 technical experts pooled from various leading organizations, PES Engineers currently employs 1100 professionals to fulfil the engineering and construction needs of nationwide clients.

With constant upgradation of engineering and manufacturing technologies, PES Engineers is committed to meet clients’ needs and requirements in terms of quality, quantity and timely delivery.

We strive to maintain high standards of integrity through operation excellence powered by technology and innovation. With our highly-skilled, experienced team and proven methodologies, we are committed to serve the esteemed expectations of our clients to forge lasting relationships.

Name: Gravitricity Ltd
Description:
Gravitricity develops long-life underground technologies that help solve the problem of intermittent renewable energy by storing excess energy during periods of low demand and releasing it back when required.

Our innovative energy storage solutions include: fast-response, long-life gravity energy storage and flexible hydrogen storage which is designed to store large quantities of green hydrogen underground.

Name: Baettr
Description:
At Baettr, we are dedicated to make renewable energy and clean energy the most available and preferred energy source worldwide. Our name, Baettr, embodies our unwavering commitment to driving this transformation every day.

We cooperate with businesses within renewable energy and international OEMs operating in the wind industry. We deliver measurable value by simplifying complexity and reducing costs across our partners’ value chains and businesses.

People and collaboration are essential for Baettr. Positive change can only be brought about through collaborative effort and by imagining what we can do better. All for the ultimate beneficiaries – the people themselves.

Therefore, we stand accountable for our way of doing business, our impact on people’s lives and our global, environmental footprint. For us, it is essential when operating as a global company.

We work from a deep sense of responsibility with respect for our human and material resources. Because we believe that passing on a better place for future generations is not only profitable – it is truly enriching.

We want to be Engineering the Foundation for Future Generations.

Name: Aigen
Description:
Aigen is accelerating the transition to regenerative agriculture.

We’re launching the world’s first AI-driven, network connected robotic fleet, powered entirely by the elements. Aigen is building a future with no harmful chemicals in our food.

Backed by NEA, GFC, AgFunder, Regen.vc, and Bessemer Ventures

Name: ARIEMA
Description:
ARIEMA es una compañía tecnológica fundada en 2002. Es la empresa española más veterana del sector y la única con tecnología de electrólisis propia. ARIEMA no se limita al desarrollo tecnológico, sino que complementa su propuesta de valor con una oferta integral que abarca: 

- Equipos y sistemas de electrólisis
- Consultoría y acompañamiento al Cliente
- Formación
- Gestión de Instituciones
- Asesoría técnica en materia de inversiones en el sector

Desde su nacimiento como Spin-Off tecnológica del INTA, ARIEMA ha sido y es actor destacado en proyectos de I+D con apoyo público español y europeo.

A lo largo de su trayectoria, ARIEMA ha fabricado, instalado y puesto en marcha una quincena de sistemas electrolizadores, así como realizado multitud de instalaciones de hidrógeno para diversas aplicaciones.

Name: Nordsol
Description:
At Nordsol, we are driven by a powerful belief: that we can change the world through smart technology, entrepreneurship, and a deep-rooted commitment to sustainability.

Our world is in need of change. And we are in the middle of it. So are you. We feel a deep need to contribute to the energy transition. How about you? Together our circle of influence is bigger. Doing nothing and staying in this status quo is not an option. Let’s shape this world and its future. For ourselves and for our children. Why wait?

At Nordsol, we act today. We want to achieve social significance by enabling sustainable long-haul transport. By focusing on bio‑LNG we will have an immediate impact. Because there is a better way. With our breakthrough technology we make the most sustainable bio‑LNG possible. Plus, it offers an attractive business case. 

By sharing our bio‑LNG expertise, we bridge the gap between the worlds of waste management and transport fuels. Together with biogas producers, transport fuel suppliers, committed investors, and premier technology suppliers, we develop and build bio-LNG installations. 

We are on a path to making bio‑LNG mainstream as a clean and safe advanced biofuel. Join us in this journey and help us shape a more sustainable future. Let’s move. Now. Together.

Name: CORE Energy Recovery Solutions
Description: We are CORE – technology leader in energy recovery. Since 1994, we have been supplying people all over the world with fresh and healthy air. Around 400 employees develop and produce heat and enthalpy exchangers for the global market at four international locations: Reinsdorf (DE), Waalwijk (NL), Vancouver (CA), and Zhongshan (CN). With state-of-the-art manufacturing technologies such as laser and ultrasonic welding as well as robot-controlled systems, we meet the highest quality standards. We are pleased to welcome you on LinkedIn.

Name: JinkoSolar Europe
Description:
JinkoSolar Europe is the European arm of Jinko Solar Co., Ltd. (SSE: 688223), one of the world’s most innovative and trusted solar technology companies. With a strong commitment to enabling a sustainable future, we deliver cutting-edge photovoltaic products and smart energy solutions to meet the evolving needs of Europe’s clean energy transition.

Backed by JinkoSolar’s global scale and technical excellence, our European team
provides localized support, customized project solutions, and industry-leading
technologies, ensuring high performance, reliability, and value for our partners across the continent.

Why JinkoSolar Europe?
- Global Technology, Local Expertise: Combining world-class R&D with deep
regional experience
- Proven Performance: Over 300 GW of cumulative global module shipments,
including a significant share in the European market
- Next-Gen PV Leadership: Among the industry’s largest capacities in N-type
high-efficiency module production
- Full Vertical Integration: End-to-end control from wafers and cells to modules
- Sustainability Champion: Proud member of RE100, committed to 100%
renewable electricity usage
- ESG & Industry Engagement: Actively engaged in driving sustainability
standards across the solar industry as a member of SolarPower Europe (SPE)
and the Solar Stewardship Initiative (SSI)

Fast Facts:
- Products delivered to 200+ countries and regions
- Over 4,000 customers worldwide
- 10+ global manufacturing bases
- 2,200 + R&D professionals and 2,800+ patents
- Active contributor to global initiatives like EP100 and RE100

Name: Newtrace
Description:
Newtrace is a deep-tech OEM building end-to-end solutions across the electrolyzer value chain — to deliver the lowest capex, the most efficient hydrogen production and a simplified supply chain.

With 5 years of R&D across the alkaline water electrolysis system — starting with membrane-less electrolyzers — Newtrace developed deep system-level expertise that led to VoltaGen: one of the most advanced electrode innovations in alkaline electrolysis. It delivers high efficiency and supports flexible, high-current operations powered by renewables. Alongside VoltaGen, Newtrace continues to advance its proprietary alkaline stack.

We are proud to have served leading industrial clients such as BPCL and ONGC and are backed by top-tier investors including Peak XV, Speciale Invest, Micelio Fund and Aavishkaar Capital.

Name: SIAAC
Description:
About Siaac Group
Empowering Excellence. Moving Forward. Faster.

At Siaac, we go beyond distribution — we’re driving Africa’s clean energy transition by powering the companies that power the continent.

Formerly Iseli Energy, Siaac Group is a next-generation solar and energy storage solutions provider with a bold focus on Commercial & Industrial (C&I) deployment. We partner with EPCs, IPPs and developers to deliver intelligent, integrated energy solutions – from advanced PV and ESS systems to top-tier electrical and mounting components.

Our edge?
 Strategic stockholding across Southern Africa
 End-to-end project support – including design, financing, logistics & warranty
 Premium brands: Sigenergy, K2 Systems, NOARK, CHINT, Huawei, enerSol and more
 A trusted track record of delivering results on time, every time

Whether you’re building the next solar farm, securing storage for peak demand, or scaling an off-grid installation – Siaac is your ultimate partner in project success.

Let’s move forward. Together.

Name: Aalborg CSP A/S
Description:
Aalborg CSP A/S is a leading developer and supplier of innovative, renewable technologies with the vision Changing Energy aiming at changing the way energy is produced and stored today. We design and supply green solutions and integrated energy systems based on solar power, energy storage within power-to-X (PTXHEAT and PTXSALT), heat exchange and much more. for industries and power plants worldwide. 
Since 1988, Aalborg CSP has utilized its immense expertise within design and delivery of boilers, complex systems, renewable energy technologies and energy storage. Thereby, we have a deep understanding of individual energy needs, technology- and system integration as well as optimization with key competences such as performance modelling and system design.
Aalborg CSP A/S places strong focus on R&D activities and works both internally within the company and externally with Danish and international knowledge-based companies and institutions in continuously creating innovative and sustainable technologies. 

Aalborg CSP offers a wide variety of renewable energy solutions including high- and low temperature energy storage, solar panels, heat pumps, boilers, integrated energy systems as well as customized Power-to-X solutions. We match individual energy needs with the right systems and technologies and integrates and combines solutions to achieve synergies between both sectors and technologies. We do so in order to create optimum value for our clients, while also optimizing the utilization of the world’s energy sources aiming for a CO2 neutral future.

Headquartered in Aalborg (Denmark) and with a sales & service office in Spain, Aalborg CSP A/S has realized cost-effective green energy solutions worldwide.
 
For more information visit: www.aalborgcsp.com

Name: Yotta Energy
Description:
Yotta is the leading-edge solar storage solution. We simplify the solar storage process through decentralized, panel-level storage and optimize your energy efficiency with intelligent software.

Through our flagship product, SolarLEAF, we’ve pioneered a modular storage solution with smart thermal regulation that seamlessly integrates behind each photovoltaic (PV) panel while maximizing the life and performance of the battery. Unlike fixed storage centers, SolarLEAF allows you to expand the development of solar + storage microgrids in minutes. 

Today, the market needs a breakthrough in energy storage solutions.
Although solar+storage has risen in popularity over the last 10 years, the industry has faced challenges with producing practical batteries for energy storage. Yotta's vision is to accelerate the adoption of solar+storage by engineering a new generation of solar storage that is cost-effective and reliable, changing the face of solar energy as we know it.

Name: ACELERON
Description:
Aceleron is an innovative UK-based advanced lithium battery developer aiming to accelerate the global shift to cleaner, more renewable energy and to empower people to benefit from sustainable battery technology.

With a presence in the UK, Caribbean and East Africa, we create innovative storage technology that makes it possible to easily service lithium battery packs, to upgrade features and capabilities at will, and to avoid expensive take back and disposal costs by continuously refilling energy cells.

Our vision is to positively impact the lives of people globally. We are achieving this by continuously innovating our solutions and capabilities to provide the best lithium batteries available and the highest quality rapid testing for reuse.

Name: PotisEdge
Description:
Founded in 2015, PotisEdge is dedicated to creating a one-stop smart energy storage solution with a vision rooted in full-stack, self-developed core technology. Our independent R&D team excels in developing our own software, algorithms, system architecture, and hardware, forming the robust foundation of our company. Self-developed 4-level BMS, patented Intelligent Cell Contact System (iCCS) and highly automated production lines allow us to deliver BESS solutions efficiently, compromising high quality with cost effectiveness.

Our key focus sectors are:
- Intelligent Energy Storage Systems, covering Residential, C&I and Grid Scale Energy Storage Systems,
- Power Battery Solutions for Off-Highway and Special Purpose EV,
- Battery Solutions for Hydrogen Fuel Cells.

With a background in the automotive industry, PotisEdge applies the highest standards of quality and safety. We proudly hold IATF 16949 and ISO 26262 ASIL D certificates, which are the highest functional quality and safety in the automotive industry.

With a total Production Capacity of 31 GWh and over 180 R&D Engineers Worldwide, PotisEdge thrives to become the leader in accelerating the Global Energy Transition. 

Drive the change with us! Learn more about PotisEdge, our products and solutions on our website.

Name: Sungrow Southern Africa
Description: Sungrow Power Supply Co., Ltd. (“Sungrow”) is the world’s most bankable inverter brand with over 340 GW installed worldwide as of December 2022. Founded in 1997 by Professor Cao Renxian, Sungrow is a leader in the research and development of solar inverters with the largest dedicated R&D team in the industry and a broad product portfolio offering PV inverter solutions and energy storage systems for utility-scale, commercial & industrial, and residential applications, as well as internationally recognized floating PV plant solutions, NEV driving solutions, EV charging solutions and renewable hydrogen production systems. With a strong 25-year track record in the PV space, Sungrow products power over 150 countries worldwide.  In Southern Africa region, Sungrow had a market share of 44% in 2021, and shipped over 700MW inverters& MV stations there cumulatively. With service centers in Johannesburg, South Africa, and the latest spare inverters in-house, Sungrow Southern Africa service team deliver a 99%* Uptime Guarantee, speedy engineer response times, and full after-sales support. We aim to continue to deliver more renewable energy projects for all Southern African countries with our industry-leading solutions and world-leading services in the future.

Name: Meins
Description:
MEINS is a leading supplier of disruptive and precast solutions in the Renewable Energy, Data Center, and Mobility sectors, specializing in the supply and integration of HV substations, transformer stations, and LV panels. Our portfolio also includes energy efficiency products and green hydrogen (H₂) generation technologies.

With over 8,5 GW installed in projects across more than 34 countries, MEINS combines innovation, engineering excellence, and global reach to drive the energy and digital transition worldwide.

Name: Torus
Description: Empowering communities to become their own sustainable energy provider.

Name: Sierra Energy
Description:
Founded in 2004, Sierra Energy is a waste gasification and renewable energy company located in Davis, California. Sierra Energy strives to make waste gasification globally attainable and economically feasible. The FastOx gasifier  converts nearly any form of waste into renewable energy.

With the widespread adoption and implementation of FastOx waste gasification, Sierra Energy hopes to create jobs, protect the environment, foster energy independence, and provide revenue for local municipalities and governments.

Name: LM Wind Power - Cherbourg
Description: Ouvert en Avril 2018, le site de Cherbourg est la première usine de fabrication de pales d’éoliennes en France.

Name: Axdis Pro
Description:
AXDIS PRO distributeur B2B spécialisé dans l’efficacité énergétique : photovoltaïque, génie électrique, génie climatique, mobilité, isolation et éclairage.

Au travers de ses gammes produits, Axdis Pro vous propose d’optimiser votre énergie : de la production, à l’utilisation, en passant par la gestion de votre propre énergie.

Valorisez votre savoir-faire, en apportant à vos clients une offre complète et un confort global dans le secteur du résidentiel, du tertiaire et de l’industrie.

Name: The Energy Company
Description: The Energy Company delivers intelligent energy storage and power backup for India's critical commercial and mobility infrastructure. Our smart battery packs, enhanced with predictive digital twin technology, provide unmatched reliability for EV fleets, charging hubs, and logistics operators, ensuring operational continuity in a world of energy uncertainty.

Name: DCE Solar
Description: DCE Solar serves as market leader in industrial grade solar mounting hardware and consulting. With DCE’s world-class engineering and fabrication facilities, American master craftsmen leverage more than three generations of Swiss engineering expertise to create a full catalog of superior fixed tilt mounting and tracking solutions for ground as well as fixed tilt solutions for flat roofs.

Name: Northern Power Systems
Description:
Northern Power Systems designs, manufactures, and installs wind turbines, power converters, and energy storage systems, while also providing engineering development services and technology licenses for energy applications across the global marketplace.

From our US headquarters and European offices, our commitment to performance, reliability, and cutting-edge technology has made us a global wind industry leader.  Spanning from Alaska to Sicily, our installed base of wind turbines has logged over four million kilowatt-hours of production to date.

Name: Nordex North America
Description:
As one of the world’s leading wind turbine manufacturers, the Nordex Group provides high-yield, cost-efficient solutions that support long-term, sustainable power generation across a wide range of geographical and climatic conditions.
Nordex North America serves two key markets: the United States and Canada. With renewable energy gaining momentum across the region, wind power continues to play a vital role in the energy transition. The Nordex Group has been active in North America since 2000, with its regional headquarters located in Chicago, Illinois, and a manufacturing and training hub in West Branch, Iowa.
In Canada, we’re proud to expand our presence with a new office in Montréal, Québec—a strategic move that underscores our commitment to the growing Canadian market and our desire to be closer to our partners and stakeholders. This new location enhances our ability to support local projects and contribute meaningfully to Canada’s clean energy future.
At our West Branch facility, we manufacture hubs, drivetrains, and machine houses for our advanced turbine models, including the N163. Our state-of-the-art training center offers hands-on courses for service technicians, subcontractors, and customers, using a fully refurbished Delta4000 turbine as a simulator for N149, N163, and N175 training. We also provide specialized training on our anti-icing system technology.
Across our offices and field teams, #TeamNordex in North America includes more than 600 dedicated employees working together to accelerate the energy transition.

Name: Energy Absolute PCL (EA)
Description:
Energy Absolute Public Company Limited (EA)
Thailand's first pioneer of alternative energy company, starting the Biodiesel Business, Renewable Energy, Batteries and Commercial Electric Vehicles Business to create a value chain of EV ecosystem in Thailand.
EA’s operatest the major businesses as follows:
[1] Biodiesel Business 
The Company operates a business of producing and distributing biodiesel (B100), pure glycerin, by-products, Green Diesel (GD) or Hydrogenated Vegetable Oil (HVO), Purified Glycerin, Bio-Phase Change Material (Bio-PCM) and Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF).
[2] Renewable Power Plant Business 
The Company expands its business to produce and distribute solar and wind electric power generated from renewable energy  from solar and wind, total install capacity of  664 MW.
[3] Lithium-ion battery, Commercial Electric Vehicle and EV Charging Station Business
- Lithium-ion battery Business,  the Amita Technology (Thailand) Co., Ltd. develop, manufacture, and distribute lithium-ion batteries, the capacity of 1 GWh/year
-  Commercial Electric Vehicle Business 
• Large Commercial EV , the Absolute Assembly Co., Ltd. produces and assembles a production capacity of 3,000 vehicles per year, such as E-Bus  , E-Truck,  E-Tractor and Special Industry EV etc. • Small Commercial EV ,the company conducted research and development of small Commercial EV the 1-ton electric mini truck of Thai nationality “MINE MT30” • Electric Ferries (MINE Smart Ferry) has been registered as the first Thai electric ferry and  turned around public transport along the Chao Phraya River by serve up to 250 passengers and • Electric Locomotive and Power Car (MINE Locomotive),the company has conducted research and development on electric locomotive and power car according to the SRT standard, Its service distance is in a range more than 400 kilometers. • EV Charging Station, named is “EA Anywhere” expanded its business to large-scale EV charging stations up to 360 MW

Name: GB Solar
Description:
At GB Solar, we are pioneers in the renewable energy sector, committed to driving the transition from conventional energy sources to sustainable solar power. As part of the Epoxy House Group of Industries, with over 50 years of expertise in innovative energy transmission and distribution, we embody a legacy of excellence and sustainability.
Our state-of-the-art 200 MW manufacturing facility and a 4 GW solar plant under development position us at the forefront of solar PV module production and customized solar power solutions. We specialize in providing high-quality solar solutions for a sustainable future, catering to both residential and commercial clients.
From rooftop installations to large-scale utility projects, we offer end-to-end solar EPC services, ensuring seamless integration and optimal performance. Our Topcon, Monofacial, Bifacial, and Black modules are engineered for superior efficiency and durability, meeting the diverse energy needs of our clients.
With a proven history of rooftop and large-scale solar projects, GB Solar is the trusted EPC provider for companies looking to save on energy and pursue sustainability strategies. We are dedicated to empowering industries and communities with efficient solar installations, maintenance, and long-term energy solutions.

Name: Ganesh Green Bharat Limited
Description:
Established in 1998 as a proprietary concern and now listed concern, headquartered in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India, 
Ganesh Green Bharat Limited is the visionary creation of Mr. Ketan Patel, driven by a mission to empower rural and agricultural clients and Meeting the Net Zero Emissions and be a part of Green Energy Revolution.

Our group is a technology-driven powerhouse, offering comprehensive solutions in the Manufacturing, Supply, Engineering, Installation, Testing and Commissioning of Solar PV Technologies, Water Supply, and Electrical goods and Services to various Government & PSU bodies and Industries.
Location: Near Gota Flyover, S.G. Highway, Gota, Ahmedabad, Gujarat

Name: Weheat
Description: Weheat is toonaangevend in duurzame verwarmingsoplossingen, gespecialiseerd in warmtepompen. Name: Ore Energy
Description:
Ore Energy is developing the next generation of long-duration energy storage to enable a fully renewable power system. Our iron-air battery technology stores electricity for up to 100 hours, making it possible to keep grids running through multi-day periods of low wind and sun.

Unlike conventional batteries, our systems use abundant, non-toxic materials: iron, air, and water. This makes them safe, cost-effective, and scalable without relying on scarce minerals or fragile supply chains. When charging, the battery converts rust into metallic iron. When discharging, it reverses the reaction, consuming oxygen and producing rust again. This simple, proven chemistry has the potential to deliver energy at a fraction of the cost of other storage technologies.

Founded at TU Delft in the Netherlands, Ore Energy is focused on real-world deployment. In 2025, we connected the world's first iron-air battery to the grid in Delft. This milestone demonstrated that multi-day storage can be integrated directly into modern energy systems.

As countries expand renewable generation, the challenge of balancing supply and demand is becoming urgent. We believe long-duration storage is a critical part of the solution and that it must be safe, sustainable, and affordable at scale.

Ore Energy’s mission is clear: to store renewable energy anywhere, for as long as needed, using materials that are available to everyone. By combining deep electrochemistry expertise with practical engineering, we are turning one of Earth’s most abundant resources into a cornerstone of the clean energy transition.

To learn more about our technology, deployments, and career opportunities, visit: www.oreenergy.com

Name: NOMAD Transportable Power Systems
Description:
NOMAD was founded in 2020 by KORE Power with one simple goal in mind: provide reliable energy systems that can be deployed virtually anywhere they’re needed. Mobilizing energy storage unlocks a wide variety of applications for that fixed assets simply can’t, from integrating renewables to modernizing disaster response and relief. And, with the flexibility of being grid-tied or powered by renewables like wind or solar, mobile ESS can impact energy planning virtually anywhere in the world.

Commercial businesses, utility companies, and even governmental agencies need dependable solutions to meet decarbonization goals and reduce operational costs, but the transition to fixed energy storage systems doesn’t happen overnight and isn’t always practical. That’s where NOMAD comes in.

By combining mobility with next-gen KORE Power ESS tech, NOMAD mobile energy storage systems provide a way to meet renewable energy goals quickly while fixed assets are constructed, event locations and seasonal businesses have a practical supply of short-term power, and disaster response organizations can bring power affected areas and people.

The mobile energy revolution is in motion, and NOMAD is in the driver’s seat.

Name: Proyecto Sexto Sol

Bienvenido a Proyecto Sexto Sol

Se enfoca en la recuperación y valoración de las culturas y lenguas originarias, la lucha contra la discriminación y la exclusión social, la defensa del medio ambiente y la promoción de la educación popular y la participación ciudadana. El objetivo es construir una sociedad más justa y equitativa en México, con la participación activa de los pueblos originarios y el uso de la ciencia y la tecnología para lograr este fin. El nombre "Sexto Sol" hace referencia a una concepción cíclica del tiempo en la cultura mexica, según la cual la historia se divide en eras o "soles". Este movimiento ha tenido un impacto significativo en la sociedad mexicana y ha inspirado movimientos similares en otros países de América Latina.

Name: PowerGenX
Description:
PowerGenX is transforming the way businesses power their operations—by eliminating Scope 1 emissions from traditional portable gasoline and diesel generators and replacing them with our zero-emission solutions. Designed for industries under pressure to go green, like entertainment and construction, our innovative generators not only protect the environment but also streamline on-site power management and reduce costs.

At the core of our system is a cutting-edge hydrogen fuel cell. This device generates electricity by reacting hydrogen with oxygen from the air, producing clean power, heat, and only water as a byproduct. Power everyday appliances, from tools and lighting to air conditioning and electronics, with absolutely zero-emissions.

But we don’t stop at clean power. The PowerGenX generator is an Internet of Things (IoT) device, complete with cellular connectivity for remote monitoring and data collection. Track location, usage, and maintenance effortlessly while optimizing operations and calculating ROI. Plus, our SaaS-based dashboard not only streamlines carbon accounting but also opens the door to future carbon credits.

For film and television production, our solution is a total game-changer. Traditional on-location power often means a distant, noisy diesel generator connected by hundreds of feet of cabling covered by matting that drive up equipment rental and labor costs. With PowerGenX, quiet, emissions-free power is delivered right where it’s needed, eliminating the hassle and expense of extensive cabling and setup.

At PowerGenX, we’re not just introducing a product, we’re igniting a movement toward sustainable, efficient energy solutions. Our mission is to accelerating the adoption of hydrogen fuel cell technology and making a tangible difference for both the environment and the bottom line.

Description: Wir sind spezialisiert auf die Errichtung von schlüsselfertigen Photovoltaikanlagen zur nachhaltigen und ökologischen Stromerzeugung auf Gebäudedächern und Freiflächen.

Description: PROTI-ON ENERGY is redefining India’s clean energy future with FeRON, the nation’s first iron-air hybrid battery pack for exceptional peak power delivery. Designed and developed entirely in India using no imported materials, FeRON delivers ultra-low-cost, high-energy-density storage for applications ranging from renewable energy grids to critical backup systems. Engineered to be extremely safe, end-to-end sustainable, and 100% non-toxic, FeRON represents a breakthrough in long-duration energy storage technology for the country. Alongside this innovation, we advance cutting-edge electric motor technologies, creating complete, eco-friendly energy solutions that place India at the forefront of the global energy transition.

Our operations extend across South Asia, the Middle East, and various regions in Africa, reflecting our commitment to delivering high-quality renewable energy solutions.

Description: Ob Privat- oder Gewerbekunde: Lehnen Sie sich zurück und verlassen Sie sich auf uns und unseren ganzheitlichen Ansatz: Von der Erstberatung über die Planung und den Einkauf bis hin zur Installation und Wartung. Bei uns bekommen Sie alles aus einer Hand!

Name: Neutrava
Description:
Neutrava baut die Energieinfrastruktur von morgen und macht sie für alle zugänglich.

 Unsere Vision
Eine Schweiz, in der jeder an der Energiewende teilhaben und von nachhaltiger Infrastruktur profitieren kann.

 Das Problem
Der Zugang zu Batteriespeicher-Infrastruktur war bisher wenigen vorbehalten. Gleichzeitig fehlt der Schweiz Speicherkapazität für die wachsende erneuerbare Energieproduktion.

 Unsere Lösung
Wir demokratisieren Batteriespeicher und schaffen eine Win-Win-Situation für alle:
→ Privatpersonen erhalten Zugang zu Energieinfrastruktur
→ Standortbesitzer verwerten ungenutzte Flächen wirtschaftlich
→ Das Stromnetz wird stabiler und nachhaltiger

 Full-Service Plattform
Von der Projektentwicklung über die Realisierung bis zum Betrieb – wir übernehmen alles. Transparent und professionell.

 Made in Switzerland
Höchste Qualität, Transparenz und Verlässlichkeit.

Gemeinsam gestalten wir die Energiewende.

Name: Soliseco
Description:
Soliseco offers an innovative solution to recover excess energy produced by photovoltaic panels and use it to heat sanitary water. Without requiring major modifications to existing equipment (boilers or water heaters), our solution reduces installation costs and accelerates the return on investment.

Key Benefits:

- Financial: A quick return on investment, less than 5 years, by maximizing the use of excess kWh from solar panels and utilizing existing installations.

- Environmental: Our solution reduces household CO₂ emissions by 15 to 20% while optimizing the use of renewable energy for the production of sanitary hot water.

- Technological: Functioning like a thermal battery, the solution stores solar energy in the form of heat, avoiding the high costs of electric batteries.

- Practicality: Easy and compact to install, the solution does not require any replacement of the existing heating system.

With our system, a household can cover up to 70% of its sanitary hot water needs through solar energy, thus reducing energy bills. Additionally, by recovering excess kWh, Soliseco helps to solve the issue of "photovoltaic curtailment," thereby optimizing the overall energy efficiency of solar installations.

By making solar hot water more accessible, Soliseco offers an efficient and sustainable solution tailored to the needs of modern households.

Name: Zetatech Energy Europe
Description:
Zetatech Hong Kong Investment Co., Ltd., a subsidiary of Sinotech Co., Ltd. (SSE STAR: 688737), specializes in comprehensive energy storage solutions across residential, commercial, industrial, and utility-scale applications. Sinotech is a leading innovator in the fields of environmental catalysts, energy storage batteries, hydrogen fuel cell electrocatalysts, and new energy technologies established in 2005 and publicly listed in 2021.

Beyond our core offerings, Zetatech provides complete EPC services and investment solutions for integrated photovoltaic and storage power stations. Name: TransVit Energy Inc.
Description:
TransVit Energy Inc. is a waste-to-energy (WtE) engineering firm with over 30 years of global experience designing and manufacturing modular gasification systems for municipalities, industries, and remote communities.

Our patented two-stage gasification process converts solid waste into clean energy with minimal emissions—meeting or exceeding US EPA and EU standards. With over 100 successful installations across North America, Asia, and Africa, we specialize in flexible, containerized systems ranging from 50 kg/hour to over 1,400 tons per day.

TransVit is committed to helping communities reduce landfill reliance, lower GHG emissions, and achieve energy independence through Good Combustion Practice (GCP), modular Vee-Hearth design, and integrated emission control.

Depuis 1994, FRANERGIE est implantée dans le Centre Lyonnais et rayonne sur toute la région Rhône-Alpes. Spécialiste en pompe à chaleur, en climatisation et chauffage; nous mettons tout en œuvre pour répondre au mieux à vos besoins de bien-être.

Our vision at Otto Junker Solutions is a clean and circular industry.

Name: OCEANERGY INC.
Description:
OCEANERGY has developed groundbreaking technology to harvest high altitude wind energy using kites.

Since our inception in 2012 we focus on maximum power and scaling, as well as continuous and safe operation. Achievable size and lightest structures up in the air make us different.

The result is OCEANERGY's unique K1-Kite-Power technology. It allows for operation in strongest and in lightest wind. It allows for for operation on the ocean, to power ENERGY SHIPs, and on land, to power KITE POWER WAGONs. It allows for scaling up to double and triple-digit MWs.

Both applications targets base-load green electricity 24/7 from wind power. It enables further processing into strategic commodities, such as green hydrogen and minerals.

This disruptive technology is protected by multiple patents and trade secrets. Crucial features which allow for scalability, maximum power, and reliable operation in all conditions and circumstances are proprietary.

OCEANERGY‘s K1-Kite-Power technology is a breakthrough and first of its kind ready to commercialize kite technology.

Our systems deployed on the ocean and on land are environmentally friendly.
On the ocean, there are no geopolitical dependencies.
There are no limits to the amounts of commodities harvesting and mining. 
ENERGY SHIPs follow the wind and not pre-set routes, another prerequisite for safe, continuous operation and base-load power.

OCEANERGY is the only company in the world licensed to manufacture and use its patented K1-Kite-Power technology. We are the only ones whose kite technology is scalable almost beyond any limits.

Pioneering On-Chip Multi-Gas Sensing Technology powered by AI for predictive  Battery Lifecycle Management to ensure enhanced safety, performance, and longevity.

Our platform powered by proprietary AI/ML algorithms delivers precise, AI-driven predictive analytics and advanced real-time battery protection. Our patented CMOS-based Multi-Gas Chip is engineered with thousands of sensors offering high-dimensional data and battery insights.

We're not just advancing battery safety, performance, and longevity; we're setting a new industry standard. Our innovative approach utilizes advanced gas composition data to offer predictive insights and deep analytics, ensuring fail-safe operation and protection against battery degradation. Designed for forward-thinkers and industry leaders, Vocai represents a seismic shift in battery data analytics, promising a safer, smarter, and more sustainable future.

ABOUT US

Technology for the Future
At Green Plan Energy Ltd., our primary focus is designing and installing devices that harness alternative, renewable energy sources. Additionally, we manufacture and sell components for such systems.
The Sun is the primary source of energy for all living creatures. Without it, life on Earth would not be possible. Name: Renogy SA Official
Description:
At Renogy, we’ve always believed that the future of energy is about more than just technology—it’s about empowering people to live freely and sustainably, wherever they go. Since 2010, we’ve been on a mission to make renewable energy more accessible, helping people harness the power of the sun to live independently and enjoy a life of exploration. What started as a small idea among a group of students at Louisiana State University has grown into a globally recognized leader in off-grid energy solutions. As of 2024, we’re proud to have helped our customers generate 3.2 billion kWh of green electricity—preventing 1.5 million tons of carbon dioxide emissions, the equivalent of planting 2.1 million trees.
From the very beginning, Renogy has been more than just a brand—it’s been a journey toward a brighter, more sustainable future. Imagine the freedom of exploring the world, knowing you're powered by the sun, with every adventure supported by nature’s energy. It’s about embracing a lifestyle where your energy needs are met, allowing you to live fully and comfortably in the outdoors.
As pioneers of off-grid renewable energy solutions, we’ve earned the trust of those who thrive in the open road, on the water, and in the great outdoors. Whether you’re in an RV, on a boat, or living off the grid, Renogy provides the reliable energy that makes these lifestyles not only possible, but seamless and enjoyable.
This isn’t just about solar panels or batteries—it’s about a movement toward energy independence, sustainable living, and a shared commitment to protecting the planet. By choosing Renogy, you’re becoming part of something bigger—where every solar panel brings us one step closer to a cleaner, brighter future for all.

Name: Hydrogen Refinery
Description:
Wherever there are people on our planet, three economic actions always happen:

1. We grow food
2. We need fuel
3. We create waste

Hydrogen Refinery Ltd (H2R) was set-up to enable humankind to continue with this economic activity, as we implement the historic agreement at COP28 to phase out fossil fuels. We use the waste to replace the fossil fuels used to make fertilizer to grow food and for  fuel. We do this with zero emissions and at a price that is the same or lower than the fossil fuel alternative.

H2R produces carbon negative and low-cost hydrogen or synthesis gas (syngas) from mixed waste. The technology used is the patented Plasma Electrolyser System (PES) that has been under development by the British military since 2003.
Waste such as non-recyclable plastics or municipal solid waste (MSW) is removed from the environment without the emissions associated with landfill or incineration providing a step-up in the waste hierarchy. This is possible because PES does not use a catalyst.

There are no gaseous emissions from PES, all the carbon and other impurities in the waste is captured in a carbon soot which is used as a replacement for coal ash for ‘green’ cement production, and for other carbon products. Effectively this is automatic carbon capture utilisation and storage (CCUS).

The low-cost hydrogen is used to make green ammonia for urea and ammonia nitrate fertilizers. The heat produced from PES provides the same efficiencies to the Haber-Bosch process as steam methane reforming (SMR) and is twice as efficient as hydrogen produced from water electrolysis.

The low-cost syngas is used to make methanol or drop-in fuels including synthetic marine diesel (SMD) and synthetic aviation fuel (SAF).

Name: Circular Silicon
Description:
Circular Silicon specialises in the recycling of silicon metal from the solar industry. The company recycles silicon from wafer production (so-called kerf loss) and silicon from end-of-life photovoltaic (PV) panels. Their product is metallurgical silicon with a typical quality of 99%, which is sold as powders, pellets, and lumps.
 
Silicon can be found in nearly every product in our modern world: As an alloying element in light-weight aluminum products for cars or packaging, in other metal production processes such as steel making, as a raw material for chemical products like silicones in construction, cosmetics, and electronics, or further refined to manufacture semiconductor and of course solar cells. However, silicon production is energy-intensive and uses coal as a reductant. Both lead to direct and indirect CO2 emissions. Furthermore, the current global recycling rate for silicon is close to zero.
 
We aim to establish a circular economy and to save CO2 emissions from primary production by recycling silicon waste streams.

Name: VAWT-X Energy Australia Pty Ltd
Description:
VAWT-X Energy Pty Ltd is a South Australian start-up company first established in August 2018. It’s immediate focus is on certifying and commercializing Vertical Axis Wind Turbine (VAWT)  technology with the aim of large scale manufacture for the world-wide medium scale wind sector.

To date it has completed proof of concept and owns exclusive rights to a unique 2-bladed helical VAWT design that is patented in China, UK, & USA. Rigorous and extensive simulated testing has demonstrated it will enable a quantum leap in VAWT efficiency that has until now only been achieved by the best horizontal axis wind turbines.

Private equity funding and a State Government grant has been received to facilitate the manufacture of prototypes. Testing and certification will be done in collaboration with the Flinders University of South Australia and RE Innovations LLC.

The outcome will be a reliable renewable energy generator that combines high-performance and efficiency with the simplicity of design, low noise and low visual impact.

Name: SolGrapH Inc.
Description:
SolGrapH is creating an entirely new domestic source of  high-quality and high-purity synthetic graphite, with secondary markets for its byproduct – clean hydrogen.  SolGrapH’s unique direct solar-thermal gas pyrolysis process uses concentrated sunlight to convert natural gas, biogas and/or waste gases into high-quality graphitic carbon and clean hydrogen without the use of any catalyst and without producing harmful emissions typically found in other production technologies and with distinct advantages in cost of production.

SolGrapH is a spin-out of UCLA Engineering, with our laboratory space located in the California NanoSystems Institute (CNSI). SolGrapH is a part of CNSI's Magnify startup accelerator program.

SolGrapH recently received a Fast-Track Small-Business Technology Transfer (STTR) award from the Department of Energy (DOE) to advance solar-thermal synthesis of graphite for rechargeable Lithium-ion battery anodes with application to electric vehicles, energy grid storage, and portable devices.

Magnify at CNSI/UCLA: https://magnify.cnsi.ucla.edu/

DOE STTR Project Abstract: https://pamspublic.science.energy.gov/WebPAMSExternal/Interface/Common/ViewPublicAbstract.aspx?rv=12b3208f-be23-406f-8047-30bc24b11d29&rtc=24&PRoleId=10

Name: Membravo
Description:
At Membravo, we’re transforming industrial efficiency by reducing waste and energy consumption.

Our hydrogen separation membranes recover valuable hydrogen that would otherwise be lost—addressing billions of dollars of waste and preventing hundreds of millions of tonnes of CO₂ emissions every year.

Like a high-performance filter, our membranes extract hydrogen from gas streams that are typically burned as waste, delivering lower carbon emissions and higher value for asset owners.

Impact on Existing Industries
Our membranes improve efficiency, reduce costs, and lower emissions in industries that rely on hydrogen, including refining, chemicals, and industrial gas production—offering a scalable solution to minimize hydrogen waste.

Expanding Market Applications
-Green & Blue Hydrogen
-Ammonia Cracking
-Natural Hydrogen
-Methane Pyrolysis
-Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF), E-Fuels & Renewable Diesel
-Semiconductor Manufacturing
-And more

Unlike conventional separation technologies, Membravo’s membranes thrive in high temperatures and harsh chemical environments—making them a cost-effective, scalable, and durable solution where others fall short.

Follow us to stay updated on our journey toward a more efficient, low-carbon future.

Name: INFRAMOBILITY-Dianba GmbH
Description:
INFRAMobility-Dianba ist ein 2019 gegründetes 50:50-Joint Venture zwischen deutschen Infrastrukturexperten und Aulton Dianba, dem chinesischen Weltmarktführer für schnelle Batteriewechsellösungen (Zeitmaximum des Wechsels für PKWs: 1-1,5 min bei einer technischen Wechselzeit von 20 Sekunden). 

Unser markenneutraler Drive-through-Batteriewechsel entkoppelt die Batteriebestückung vom -wiederaufladen, schont die Batterien durch behutsames und kontrolliertes Wiederaufladen, entlastet die Ortsnetze und sichert hohe Kundenzahlen. 20 Sekunden Batteriewechsel ist eine technologische Revolution, die viel Zeit und Kosten spart. Sie setzt auf Kundensouveränität, Subsidiarität statt Hyperkomplexität, auf Ressourcensparsamkeit durch langlebige Batterien und nachhaltiges Fahren, auf eine schnellere Mobilitätswende durch ein Netz von Stationen statt Millionen Ladesäulen.

Dieses Konzept ist eine ideale Grundlage für gewerbliche E-Flotten und eine sehr schnelle Elektrifizierung der Taxis, die damit so früh wie nötig zur 4. Säule eines CO2-freien ÖPNV
werden können. Es dient der PV-basierten Quartiersmobilität und dem bezahlbaren Autonomen Fahren.

Seit Herbst 2019 betreibt INFRADianba die erste europäische Batteriewechsel-Pilotanlage im Berliner Westhafen.

- A complete range of pin-type heat exchangers and vertical vaporizers
- Thermal engineering expertise to adapt to specific processes
- Thermal/mechanical studies and on-site manufacturing
- After-sales service for maintenance/adaptation
To the highest standards, BFF supports its customers in the energy transition with innovative solutions (hydrogen, bio-fuels, CO2, nuclear).

*France Thermique Environnement (FTE)*
Founded in 1983, FTE has been designing, installing and commissioning multi-fuel (gas, liquid) industrial burners from 1 to 50 MW for over 30 years. It offers turnkey solutions:
- Supply of burners and complete accessories (ramps, fans, controls, etc.)
- On-site delivery, installation, wiring and commissioning
- Compliance with current standards (safety, emissions, customer specifications)
- Range adaptable to all types of configuration (axial, vein, etc.)
FTE specializes in low-NOx burners and combustion optimization.

Thanks to the complementary expertise of its entities, the Galilé Group's Decarbonization segment offers tailor-made, innovative solutions to meet the challenges of energy transition in industry.

Name: JAVELIN - A Project of Reflex Marine
Description:
Reflex Marine is developing JAVELIN, an innovative anchoring solution specifically designed to meet the challenges of floating offshore wind. As the industry moves into deeper waters, traditional anchoring solutions remain costly, complex, and environmentally disruptive. Anchoring floating wind turbines at scale is particularly challenging due to the hard and varied seabed conditions found at potential floating offshore wind sites.

JAVELIN is a slender, deep-set anchoring system that secures into high-strength geological formations, offering exceptional load capacity, simplified installation, and minimal environmental impact. It is a versatile, robust, and cost-effective solution.

Under development since 2021, JAVELIN has gained UK government support and is attracting growing interest from industry developers.
Reflex Marine is a global leader in offshore safety and engineering, with over 30 years of experience.

 Learn more: www.javelinmarine.com | www.reflexmarine.com

Name: CAGE Technologies ltd
Description:
Our Business
CAGE Technologies Ltd (CTL) is an internationally recognised Technology business that offers a clean, cost-effective alternative to diesel power using a range of unique engine systems powered by hydrogen, biogas from waste and other gas fuels.  Our products are ultra-low emission generators for domestic construction markets using hydrogen and LPG and global agricultural markets using biogas from farm waste. CTL is emissions focussed yet delivers competitive performance without the cost penalties of other technologies such as fuel cells. The technology has been successfully trialled in 4 countries with 8 customers and CTL is now selling generator products globally. 

Our Products
Diesel engines are a source of emissions in terms of both CO2, particulates and NOx that damage air quality and harm human health. Yet diesel is still the primary global power source for industrial machines. CTL has developed highly innovative small LPG, hydrogen and biogas engines to directly displace diesel equivalents in industrial and agricultural applications. These engines have significant emissions benefits over their diesel counterparts. 

Our Team
The CAGE team consists of highly experienced engineers, engine designers and electrical specialists backed up by technology focussed back office. Many of the team have worked in the automotive and motorsport industry at a high level. There is a friendly, innovative and creative atmosphere in the business and a very high level of productivity stimulated by interesting work that creates new, commercial technologies designed to help solve global problems.

Name: YAAI GREEN ENERGY
Description: YAAI GREEN is a startup under the Bliss Anand group of companies specializing in sustainable energy solutions for a greener future. The company's mission is to provide innovative and Eco-friendly energy products that are both cost-effective and reliable. We mainly specialize in Anion Exchange Membrane based Water Electrolysers, Bio Compressed Gas, Waste-To-Energy Solutions and Controlled Oxidation of Solid Waste. As of now we have focused all our attention on perfecting our state-of-the -art AEM based Water Electrolysers for the production of Green Hydrogen. We have carried out extensive trials for our Lab Scale Electrolyser Module, and thereafter completed full testing of our Electrolyser Cabinet system in our Manesar,Gurugram facility. Our Lab scale Module would produce 1.7 Kilograms of Green Hydrogen per day using only Electricity and water as raw materials by the process of Electrolysis, thus emitting only Oxygen as a by product. This results in a zero carbon footprint and no greenhouse gas emissions. Our Electrolyser modules utilize inexpensive electrodes for the cell stacks as compared to highly expensive Platinum and Iridium which are used in PEM based systems. This massively helps us to reduce Capital Expenditures and the dependency on rare earth metals. Our modules also use a solid polymer membrane for ion conduction as compared to alkaline Electrolysers, thus reducing gas crossover rates and allowing for the production of highly pressurized Hydrogen. This combination of PEM and AWE technologies makes our technology the most effective, efficient and durable. Our modules are highly scalable too, allowing for Megawatt and even Gigawatt levels of production capacities in the times to come. Finally we feel that our technology can greatly reduce overall carbon emissions in a highly cost effective manner, thus providing the world with a pollution free source of energy!

Name: CleverKinetics
Description:
CleverKinetics’ aim is to enable grid stability during the energy transition by delivering the missing infrastructure layer through our proprietary flywheel energy storage systems (FESS).

As power systems transition toward inverter-based generation, the loss of synchronous inertia and ultra-fast response is becoming a structural constraint. At CleverKinetics, we are developing proprietary FESS in-house, engineered to deliver instantaneous response, inherent inertia and unlimited cycling, complementing batteries by handling high-frequency, high-cycling duties and strengthening overall system resilience.

Today, we focus on the developing our FESS platform toward an initial pilot project, addressing grid and Large Energy User applications (including data centres) where ultra-fast response, inertia and high-cycle services are increasingly critical. We are open to strategic partnerships and investment to support this development phase, aligned with grid stability, system services and the energy transition.

ArcActive’s new Fabric Bipolar Battery (FBB) technology creates high performance, low fire risk, and infinitely recyclable, battery storage that is environmentally beneficial and cost effective, with a payback period approximately roughly three times shorter than competitors.

Bu doğrultuda geliştirilen tüm teknolojiler, geniş bir kitle tarafından erişilebilir ve güvenle kullanılabilecek şekilde tasarlanmaktadır. Renlob, Global yenilikçi bir çok yenilenebilir enerji teknolojisini üretecek olup, işbirliklerine açıktır.

Name: InfigoLabs
Description:
The breakthrough in decarbonising is here.  For the hard-to-abate sector that must decarbonise economically, InfigoLabs' patented Hydrox Combustion Technology, delivers ultra-high-temperature heat with zero emissions. The Hydrox Combustion Technology can utilise multiple sources of hydrogen of different colours and different sources of electricity enabling cost-effective energy transition for the hard-to-abate sector.
InfigoLabs technology tames the explosive hydrogen–oxygen reaction to create an ultra-high-temperature steam flame with zero emissions. We’re commercialising it in a containerised unit that destroys PFAS, microplastics, dioxins, and pesticides in one cost-effective process—an unmatched global first. The same system scales up for coke-free, high-yield steam cracking of hydrocarbons using blue hydrogen, revolutionising ethylene production and extending to other industries for similar impact.

Name: ArcLive
Description:
ArcLive is the world’s first data driven marketplace that uses real time data from its sensors to underwrite products for assets across energy, insurance and carbon. 

Our technology captures live data via sensors on building performance helping owners and operators understand exactly how their buildings function day to day.

Through its custom dashboards, ArcLive turns this data into clear outcomes for its clients, identifying inefficiencies, optimising energy use, with options for on-site batteries for greater efficiency.

ArcLive’s technology has been deployed across the UK, USA, and the Middle East, working with leading organisations including the NHS, Lloyds Bank, GMCA, Bromford, and NYCHA.

Name: Fuzion Technologies

Designed for remote environments, Fuzion’s industrial-grade switches, including our flagship FTP-300, provide reliable energy for critical infrastructure like Wi-Fi hotspots, cameras, and IoT devices, all while reducing emissions. At Fuzion, we are driven by innovation and a mission to ensure that anyone and anything can connect to the internet, contributing to a more productive, sustainable, and inclusive world. Connect with Fuzion and let the power of connectivity shape the future.

Name: UFLEX S.r.l. - Renewable Energy

Unsere Leidenschaft für Automatisierung und Digitalisierung macht Ihre Immobilie smarter.

Mit unserer Hilfe erzeugen und nutzen Sie Ihren eigenen Strom optimal und machen sich auf diese Weise unabhängiger von den steigenden Kosten öffentlicher Netzbetreiber.

Lindlahr Green Consulting GmbH – mit uns reduzieren Sie Ihre Emissionen und sichern Ihren wirtschaftlichen Erfolg ab

energetica attualmente non sfruttata. L’aumento dei prezzi dell’energia e la minaccia del
cambiamento climatico obbligano l’agricoltura ad orientarsi verso modelli meno dipendenti
dai combustibili fossili e che emettano meno gas a effetto serra. Dal 2012, la vocazione di
Nenufar, una PMI francese, è quella di fornire soluzioni robuste, virtuose e redditizie per
aiutare l’allevamento ad affrontare le sfide del XXI secolo.

Name: GEVA-BOT
Description:
Founded in 2008, GEVA-BOT is a leading innovator in the field of PV modular cleaning robots. Our focus is on delivering cutting-edge, reliable, and user-friendly solutions that excel in various global climates. The company’s semi-automatic and manual cleaning systems are supplied for both SAT and FT ground-mounted solar as well as rooftop solar systems.
The GEVA-BOT Patroller semi-automatic cleaning robot is accommodating both wet and dry cleaning methods. Our wet cleaning options include a range of 1K, 2K, or 3K liter water tanks, providing flexibility to support up to four Patroller robots simultaneously.
In parallel, our GEVA-BOT telescopic manual robot boasts a similar rotating brush for high-quality cleaning and is operated by a carbon pole extending up to 8.1 meters.
Join us at GEVA-BOT as we redefine the standards of excellence in modular cleaning robotics, offering cutting-edge solutions to meet the evolving cleaning needs of solar PV modules worldwide.

Name: Geetanjali Solar Enterprise
Description:
Geetanjali Solar Enterprise, founded in 1984 and headquartered at P-14, Kasba Industrial Estate, Kolkata, West Bengal, is a pioneer in the renewable energy revolution. Renowned for its innovative approach, the company has established itself as a leader in the solar energy sector, addressing global challenges like climate change and energy sustainability.

Specializing in the design, installation, and maintenance of solar power systems for residential, commercial, and industrial applications, Geetanjali Solar offers an extensive product range. This includes solar photovoltaic power plants, wind-solar hybrid systems, solar water heaters, solar dryers, etc. Their commitment to quality is reflected in their sourcing of high-efficiency components from reputable manufacturers and employing skilled technicians for seamless installation and maintenance. This focus has earned them a stellar reputation for reliability and customer satisfaction.

Geetanjali Solar also prioritizes innovation through active research and development, constantly seeking ways to improve solar energy efficiency and accessibility. They are deeply involved in community outreach, partnering with technical education departments to organize workshops, seminars, and training sessions, promoting renewable energy awareness and entrepreneurship.

The company is equally dedicated to sustainability, implementing eco-friendly practices such as solar-powered fast charging stations for electric vehicles and minimizing waste in operations. These efforts underscore their commitment to reducing their carbon footprint while advocating for a greener future.

In conclusion, with a steadfast commitment to quality, innovation, and sustainability, the company continues to lead the renewable energy sector, inspiring others to embrace clean energy for a brighter and more sustainable future.

Name: XFlow Energy Company
Description:

XFlow offers a flexible and modular power conversion and control system for wind and hydrokinetic turbines, with the goal of allowing renewable energy system providers a plug-and-play grid connection while also reducing total system costs. 

XFlow’s innovative vertical-axis wind turbines have the potential to vastly expand the reach of wind energy by making it more cost-competitive. Our current focus is a 25 kW wind turbine for distributed applications, while larger turbines planned for future development.

At XFlow Energy, we are driven by a vision of a more sustainable future, where renewable energy sources play a central role in meeting the world's growing energy demands. Through our groundbreaking technologies we aim to accelerate the global transition to clean and affordable energy solutions.

Name: HeliosAltas
Description:
HeliosAltas is moving the world towards zero carbon energy production through its patented micro-hydro technology and distribution system. Together with our global partners Hunting Energy and Siemens, HeliosAltas will help meet the rising global demand for cost competitive zero emission energy solutions. 

**** BUSINESS SUMMARY ****

Hydropower is the oldest and most reliable form of clean energy dating back 2000 years. Today’s hydroelectric market produces 90% of the world’s renewable power and even though most suitable conventional hydropower sites have already been developed, the Earth still contains 300,000 sq. miles of rivers, streams, and canals (Science, 2018). 

This abundance of natural and man-made waterways have the potential to generate terawatts of power using micro-hydro. HeliosAltas has developed groundbreaking new micro-hydro technology designed to capture this vast renewable power source and deliver affordable, sustainable renewable energy quickly and efficiently throughout the world.

**** MICRO-HYDRO LANDSCAPE ****

The current micro-hydro landscape includes primarily smaller scale projects that utilize rivers, canals and other waterway in conjunction with small turbine generators. In most cases, water is diverted from a river or waterway and fed through a funnel, pipe, or other structure, where it passes through a turbine generator and joins the river below. Installation is typically invasive to the environment with relatively complex civil works.

Conventional hydro is even more complex with long lead time, heavy civil works, long power transmission system load, single power source, along with significant environmental impact.

**** HELIOSALTAS COMPARISON ***

No competitor can match our unique combination of performance and features. HeliosAltas units can be installed in a matter of days with no environmental impact, small footprint, with consistent 24/7 clean power. Our patented units can also operate in shallow and slow-moving water.
