Description:
BlackBox Energy Systems has patented the fast, efficient, reliable TruVolt(TM) motor with integrated, SCADA-enabled controllers and VFDs. TruVolt's heat-wicking stator design allows for superior efficiency across a wider range of loads and speeds. For industrial applications, the motor can be mounted to NEMA standard frames. It uses 80% less copper than an equivalent induction motor and is 1/2 the length and weight-- including the integrated controller and VFD. The SCADA-enabled controllers help businesses monitor and track performance and energy use to minimize lossed due to downtime and to meet current sustainability goals. 

The motor is highly efficient at low RPMs and continues to be efficient at turbine speeds. When combined with an engine, the motor generates electricity efficiently. For electric propulsion applications, our motor can provide high power and torque in a lightweight and low-volume package. Our systems can help manage a combination of energy storage and energy generation for load-shifting during peak energy consumption periods. This is beneficial for both the grid and the budget.  

Our team brings professional and educational knowledge of physics, mechanical, electrical, and software engineering, manufacturing, and marketing. We seek to harness our combined expertise to improve the environment with efficient, sustainable energy technologies.

Name: CATALess
Description:
Cataless: Enerjinin Geleceğini Depoluyoruz

Enerji ihtiyacının her geçen gün arttığı, sürdürülebilirliğin ise artık bir tercih değil zorunluluk haline geldiği günümüz dünyasında, Cataless olarak akıllı enerji depolama çözümleriyle geleceği bugünden şekillendiriyoruz. Yenilenebilir enerji kaynaklarının süreksiz doğasına karşı istikrarlı ve güvenilir çözümler sunarak, bireysel ve endüstriyel kullanıcılara kesintisiz enerji sağlamayı amaçlıyoruz.

Cataless, lityum tabanlı enerji depolama sistemleri (ESS) başta olmak üzere, mikro mobilite, endüstriyel uygulamalar, konut sistemleri ve şebeke ölçekli enerji çözümleri için yüksek verimli, güvenli ve uzun ömürlü batarya paketleri tasarlayıp üretmektedir. Mühendislik bilgi birikimimiz ve Ar-Ge yatırımlarımız sayesinde hem bugünün ihtiyaçlarına cevap veriyor hem de geleceğin enerji sistemlerine hazır çözümler geliştiriyoruz.

Akıllı batarya yönetim sistemleri (BMS), modüler mimariler ve uzaktan izleme altyapılarıyla donatılmış ürün portföyümüz; enerji yönetimini daha öngörülebilir, verimli ve ekonomik hale getiriyor. Aynı zamanda, sürdürülebilir üretim prensiplerine bağlı kalarak karbon ayak izini azaltan sistemlerimizle yeşil dönüşüme katkı sağlıyoruz.

Cataless sadece bir ürün sağlayıcısı değil, çözüm ortağınızdır. İhtiyaca özel enerji sistemleri geliştirmek, mevcut sistemlerinizi optimize etmek ve enerji bağımsızlığınızı güçlendirmek için uzman mühendislik ekibimizle yanınızdayız.

Enerjinin depolanması sadece teknik bir ihtiyaç değil, aynı zamanda ekonomik büyüme, çevresel denge ve toplumsal refah için bir zorunluluktur. Bu vizyonla hareket eden Cataless, enerjiyi daha akıllı, daha güvenli ve daha sürdürülebilir şekilde yönetmek isteyen tüm paydaşlar için geleceğin çözüm platformudur.

Cataless – Enerji burada durmaz, geleceğe akar.

Name: Danvest - 'Low loading' diesel generators
Description: Danvest BV is a technology supplier and equips conventional diesel gensets with the innovative Danvest system. Name: Li-Mithra Engineering
Description:
Li-Mithra, contraction de "Lima" (chiffre cinq) et "Mithra" (dieu solaire), est née du concept d'un système de chauffage associant une pompe à chaleur à des panneaux solaires hybrides (PVT). La pompe à chaleur permet de capter les 5 énergies entourant les panneaux : le vent, la pluie, la terre, le rayonnement thermique et lumineux du Soleil.
Grâce à son concept, le panneau solaire hybride Li-Mithra - panneau solaire photovoltaïque équipé d'un échangeur de chaleur - devient un capteur de chaleur ACTIF, capable de récupérer de l'énergie thermique quelles que soient les conditions météorologiques.
Après 5 années de recherche et développement et 4 brevets déposés, Li-Mithra Engineering équipe désormais de son système maisons individuelles, équipements sportifs, bâtiments publics et tout autre bâtiment pour assurer le chauffage des locaux, la production d'eau chaude sanitaire, le chauffage de piscine ou toutes autres applications nécessitant de l'énergie thermique à moindre coût.

Name: Tanktwo
Description:
The world's first software-defined batteries

Tanktwo changes the sustainability conversation by turning the battery industry from hardware-focused to software- and analytics-driven.

We provide the world's first data-driven, software-defined batteries to accelerate green tech solutions. Backed by 28 patents, our API-like solution delivers unprecedented scalability, reliability, safety, and cost-efficiency to support accessible, sustainable, and profitable electrification in all verticals, from defense and medical to manufacturing, transportation, and more. 

Since our software-driven solution can support battery packs of any shape and form, builders can configure the modular solution to fit their applications instead of designing equipment to accommodate a monolithic (often over-dimensioned) battery pack.

The Tanktwo Battery Operating System (TBOS) allows product builders to lower their R&D costs, shorten time to market, and promote innovation to accelerate decarbonization. Analytics helps lessen the environmental footprint of electrification by optimizing resource usage to make it truly sustainable. Meanwhile, operators can configure each cell's behaviors on the fly to meet minute-to-minute requirements with just a few clicks on the screen.

The system's ability to charge and discharge at any voltage and mix-and-match batteries of any chemistries and characteristics provides the agility to streamline inventory and mitigate the impact of supply chain fluctuations. 

Additionally, industrial companies can retrofit their fossil fuel-powered equipment with our battery solutions to reduce emissions and meet regulatory standards with minimal equipment- and user-adoption costs. Our technology enables any enterprise to jumpstart its electrification journey without the high capital investment required to purchase new equipment.

Name: TITAN, Biogas pyrolysis to green H2
Description:
TITAN will develop and validate at TRL5 the direct conversion of biogas (CO2 containing rich-CH4 feedstock) into valuable carbon materials and a H2 rich stream thanks to MicroWave (MW) Technology heated reactors. It will also consider further valorisation to power, chemicals and fuels. TITAN has the potential to produce 0.6 Mt of green H2 in 2030 to almost 4Mt per year from 2045 on, corresponding to the saving of 237 Mt CO2 by 2045.

Titan will develop a Microwave heated fluidised catalytic reactor allowing high CH4 conversion in a single pass thanks due to direct catalyst heating  and the avoidance of energy intensive gas separation will make the whole process energy positive, produce H2 and/or power at competitive cost while sequestrating Carbon leading to negative GHG emissions.
Based on circular economy concepts, the valorisation of the Carbon materials will be studied for two applications: 1/ soil amendment to enhance agriculture soil properties and 2/ production of SiC materials. The long-term storage of the carbon species and their microbiological impact when released into soils will be studied.
The scalability of the proposed MW heated reactor technology, together with a smart downstream process, will lead to low CAPEX that shall allow the deployment of small, delocalised biogas to power units as well as large biogas to H2 and or chemicals/fuels units in Europe. 
Partners : CNRS (Coord.), Microwave Tech. Consulting, Process Desing Center, Warsaw Tech. Uni., Hohenheim Uni., European Biogas Asso., ESD.

Voor installateurs is dit het moment om energieopslag aan te bieden. En natuurlijk, dat is een groot avontuur. Landport Energy wil hierbij graag helpen.

Wij richten ons op de lange termijn en wederzijds voordelige samenwerkingsverbanden met onze klanten en streven daarbij naar absolute klanttevredenheid. 

Landport Energy is een divisie binnen Landport B.V. Met 30 jaar ervaring in accu’s en batterijen toont Landport aan dat ze een krachtige, betrouwbare partner voor duurzame energieopslag is. Met het aanbieden van kleine en grote energie opslagsystemen verbreedt Landport haar horizon en richt het bedrijf zich nadrukkelijk op de toekomst. Hierin speelt duurzaamheid een steeds grotere rol.

Landport Batteries is sinds 2002 onderdeel van Louwman Group, een trots en betrokken familiebedrijf, opgericht in 1923. Als onderdeel van de Louwman familie heeft Landport een sterke en solide positie in de markt. Dit maakt dat klanten op Landport kunnen vertrouwen.

Description:
VAPEC is a company specialising in the design, construction and maintenance of industrial boiler plants. We have many decades of experience and possess unique expertise in the field of industrial heat generation.

Some of our boilers have been operating for more than 50 years. We are able to achieve these long operational lifetimes through regular inspections and appropriate maintenance, ensuring a high level of availability and reliability. We are also able to supply original spare parts for all SULZER boiler series, supporting our customers with inspections and regular servicing our experienced service personnel.

VAPEC high voltage electrode boilers are based on SULZER- technology and have been installed for decades wherever reliable carbon-free heat generation is required. Our experience is founded on nearly 1,000 units sold in Europe, America, Africa and Asia. The boilers are operated for the efficient generation of steam and hot water for district heating and in the nuclear, chemical, pharmaceutical, paper and food processing industries.

Our product range includes hot water and steam boilers with an output of 2 – 90 MW. These boilers are designed for a supply voltage of 6 – 36 kV. Their compact construction, rapid start-up times and heat generation with zero exhaust gas and noise emissions make them ideal for a wide range of applications.

Description:
Cape Advanced Engineering (Pty) Ltd has a rich engineering history as the centre of excellence in engine and fuel technology at Stellenbosch University between 1993 and 1999.  CAE was privatised in 1999 and has since provided engine development products and support services to clients such as Volkswagen South Africa (VWSA), Ford, MBSA, Sasol, Chevron and BP, and equipment development services to Transnet and de Beers.

In 2007, CAE made a shift to renewable energy and now specialises in the development, design, construction, commissioning, operation, and maintenance of unique and varied bio-gas plants. Building on CAE’s experience in the automotive industry, CAE’s bio-gas plants include in-house developed combined heat and power (CHP) generation units which are modular, containerised and achieve overall energy efficiency exceeding 85% in electricity and heating output. CAE operates several plants in Southern Africa, now operational for up to 8 years, which have set new standards in municipal waste water treatment and in agriculture, including proven crop enhancement at levels far exceeding what was thought to be possible.

CAE is motivated by the environmental benefits of waste beneficiation, water reclamation and reuse, reduced GHG emissions, renewable power, the exceptional impact achieved by it’s bio-fertiliser products created through bio-digestion, now proven to significantly accelerate soil regeneration and increase plant health and crop yields and quality.  Partnerships with progressive farmers are a key priority, towards increased farm profitability through renewable energy generation, soil regeneration, increased crop yields with lower input costs by using bio-fertiliser, also reducing the cost and carbon footprint related to synthetic fertilisers, and the minimised need for expensive and controversial agro-chemicals. Additional farm revenue from energy export and increased crop yields are a key objective of our development.

Air & Water Treatment Systems – IETS compliance, air pollution control (dust collector, scrubber, high temperature dust removal system), and odor removal systems.

Carbon Capture & ESG Advisory – Carbon credit consultation and emission reduction strategies.

We offer end-to-end solutions from design and consultancy to installation, commissioning, and after-sales support. As a listed entity in the MGTC Voluntary Carbon Market (VCM) Directory, GEE is dedicated to helping industries transition toward environmentally responsible operations.

 Decades of Experience – Trusted expertise in complex environmental challenges.

The Danish Partnership for Wave Power aims to connect and promote these individual achievements to pave the way for integration of wave power in the future energy mix.

The expectations to how fast wave energy will mature largely depend on the results of the prototype testing and the funding and policy behind to support the developments.

Name: HYNOLOGY
Description: Launched in May 2022, HYNOLOGY is based in the Grenoble area, and will manufacture the active components for fuel cells for heavy mobility, and for the production of green hydrogen by electrolysis. This project is based on the observation that, since the end of the last decade, hydrogen technology applications (fuel cells and electrolyzers) have shifted from the passenger car market to the heavy mobility and green hydrogen production markets, with a radical change in component characteristics. Product lifespan had to be multiplied by 5, becoming more important than cost or performance. What's more, global supply was no longer in line with the needs of the new applications, either in terms of quantity (very inadequate production capacity) or quality (mismatch between the products on offer and the real need). The project therefore involves setting up a production plant for electrochemical components for fuel cells and electrolyzers in the Grenoble area before 2030. Laboratory production began in early 2023 to meet the demands of the first customers, pending installation of the first pilot line, scheduled for completion before 2026.

Name: Litherm Technologies GmbH
Description:
Cement and lime are essential to modern industry. And in many cases, there’s simply no alternative. 
Cement is the backbone of global construction. Lime plays a critical role in steelmaking, chemicals, and environmental applications. But producing them comes with a cost: it requires extremely high temperatures, traditionally achieved by burning fossil fuels. As a result, cement and lime production together account for nearly 8% of global CO₂ emissions.

A large part of these emissions comes from the kilns that traditionally are fired with fossil fuels to reach the necessary temperatures. For many years, these systems were so efficient and reliable that there was little incentive to develop climate-friendly alternatives. 
But the downside is clear: they emit large amounts of CO₂, and the exhaust gas contains the CO₂ in a diluted form making carbon capturing technically challenging and cost-intensive.

Litherm has developed a fully electric kiln that eliminates the need for fuels entirely. It reaches the required high temperatures using climate-neutral electricity and it does something else that’s just as important: it simplifies how CO₂ is handled. 
The unavoidable process CO₂ doesn’t get mixed with other gases. Instead, it’s released in a concentrated stream, as a byproduct of the process itself. This makes additional CO₂ separation technology unnecessary. It’s a practical, efficient way to reduce emissions from one of the world’s most carbon-intensive industries, without changing the raw materials that manufacturers rely on today.

If you are interested in joining us on our mission to decarbonize the lime and cement industry, check out our open positions: https://www.litherm.com/jobs

Name: PHOENIX Smart Batteries
Description:
The demand for batteries in electric mobility, grid energy storage, and consumer electronics is projected to increase tenfold in the next decade. 

However, for sustainable and European batteries to be developed and utilized, certain improvements are necessary. These advancements include longer cycle life, effective detection and prevention of degradation, recyclability feasibility, and reduced cost. European batteries should prioritize safety, durability, and environmental friendliness by incorporating smart functionalities like sensor integration and self-healing capabilities. To achieve this, the next generation of batteries must integrate these functionalities into the Battery Management System (BMS), which will be responsible for triggering the required features. 

The PHOENIX project seeks to explore a range of possibilities in self-healing, sensing, and triggering. Sensors and self-healing properties will be prototyped and demonstrated in Generation 3b and 4a Li-Ion batteries as part of this initiative.

These outcomes thereby help meet the goal of BATTERY 2030+ for a competitive, sustainable European battery value chain and a more circular economy. 

This project has received funding from the European Union’s research and innovation programme Horizon Europe under the grant agreement No. 101103702 and the involvement in No. 101104022 (Battery 2030 CSA3).

Die Ziele des Verbands für nachhaltige Agri-PV sind insbesondere:

1. Rahmenbedingungen zu schaffen, die

a. eine vielfältige, wirtschaftlich sinnvolle Agri-Photovoltaik ermöglichen,

b. die ortsübliche, landwirtschaftliche Pflanzenproduktion (Photosynthese) als
 Primärnutzung weitgehend und ohne wesentliche Einschränkungen erhalten,

c. den unterschiedlichen Rahmenbedingungen bei verschiedenen Nutzungsarten wie Ackerbau, Tierproduktion, Grünlandbewirtschaftung, Obst- und Gemüseanbau sowie Sonderkulturen Rechnung tragen.

2. Eine fokussierte Interessenvertretung der Agri-Photovoltaik zu betreiben.

This solution is available for both existing and new homes and commercial buildings and can even be used in areas where ground drilling for a heat pump is not allowed.

Our solution is already being used to the full satisfaction of many residents and, especially with the current energy prices and uncertainty, delivers significant cost savings. We know better than anyone that, in addition to costs, reliability and continuity are also important for a homeowner. Our solutions are therefore ISO 9806 certified and are installed by certified installers. With a 20-year warranty, you are assured of a comfortable, warm home at the lowest possible cost.

The advantages at a glance:
 Your home gas-free!
 Applicable in existing construction and new construction
 Optimal efficiency with minimal electricity consumption
 No permit and/or soil drilling required

Name: Cryocop
Description:
Cryocop captures industrial flue gases to reduce CO2-emissions and to convert these waste streams into high quality purified products (O2, N2, liquid CO2) for circulation in industry.  This creates a unique business model: a carbon capture technology which has the potential for a return on investment per machine in 9-11 years. A solid investment for each factory without any need for subsidies. We generate revenue from the mix of cleaning emissions, the sale of industrial quality gas, and carbon credits. 

Our technology is an integration of a cryogenic carbon capture and regeneration system with an  air separation unit, which can clean post-combustion flue gas at a cost of 20-40 Euro/ton CO2. Currently we are optimising our designs in a lab-setting. 

For our next step in creating a pilot plant we are looking for investors and partnerships.

Cryocop was started as spin-off from TU Delft, UTwente TU Einhoven, Wageningen UR.

Name: Raab-Gruppe – RAAB | Kutzner + Weber | NET
Description:
Die Raab-Gruppe, mit den Marken Raab, Kutzner + Weber und NET, ist einer der führenden Anbieter für Abgastechnik für Wärmeerzeuger – von der Zuluft über die Feuerstätte, Verbindungsleitung bis zur Schornsteinmündung – für Privatgebäude und Industrieobjekte. 

Unsere Philosophie ist der „intelligente Schornstein“, ein System von intelligent aufeinander abgestimmten Komponenten, um den Schadstoffausstoß zu reduzieren und Energieeinsparungen zu realisieren. So leisten unsere Produkte einen entscheidenden Beitrag zum Umweltschutz und zum Green Deal.

Das Produktportfolio umfasst Edelstahlabgasanlagen, Schornsteinkomponenten – wie (Feinstaub-)Partikelabscheider, Zugbegrenzer, Abgasklappen, Schalldämpfer, Rauchsauger – und Anlagen zur Wärmerückgewinnung. Perfekt aufeinander abgestimmt sorgen diese für Sicherheit, Geräteeffizienz und Emissionsreduzierung. 

Die Raab-Gruppe ist der einzige Hersteller, der alle Komponenten aus einer Hand bietet.

Durch die Symbiose unserer drei Marken sind wir in der Lage, technische Systemlösungen bereitzustellen. Wir bieten unseren Kunden Realisierungen von schlüsselfertigen Großprojekten aus einer Hand. 

Alle Teile werden in Deutschland gefertigt. Das macht Raab einzigartig am Markt. 

Unter der Marke Raab werden hochwertige Edelstahlabgasanlagen für Einzelraumfeuerstätten bis hin zu industriellen Großanlagen entwickelt und produziert. 

Die Marke Kutzner + Weber ist auf abgastechnische Komponenten zur Reduzierung von Rauchgasemissionen sowie zur Schallreduzierung spezialisiert, dies umfasst Feinstaubpartikelabscheider, Zugbegrenzer, Abgasklappen, Schalldämpfer und Rauchsauger.

I nostri prodotti sono certificati da enti internazionali come TÜV, VDE e dall’Istituto di Ricerca sull’Energia Elettrica della Cina.

Le nostre attività si estendono in Asia, le Americhe, Europa, Australia e Medio Oriente. Gestiamo impianti all’avanguardia di produzione e progettazione in Cina, con una capacità di 10 GWh. Inoltre, abbiamo filiali in Hong Kong, Germania e Italia, con team di supporto tecnico locale per garantire ai nostri clienti i migliori prodotti e servizi.

Name: EME nv
Description:
EME, in full Electro Mechanic Equipment nv is a family-owned company situated in Glabbeek (Belgium). Founded in 1961 by René Vandereycken, this SME was always active in the world of electrical energy distribution and process optimization.

Our scope:
Building of custom made disconnectors and load-breaking switches. At this end we have an autonomous production department with an own design division. Each year this ISO 9001 certified business unit produces more than 1500 custom made disconnectors involving more than a 150 different models mainly intended for export.
Import and distribution of components. On the one hand for switching, measuring, supervising and protection of electrical energy, on the other hand for process optimization. This allows the EME engineers to offer the most suitable solutions on the Belgian Market like measuring transducers, voltage & current transformers, protection & measuring  relays, capacitor banks and PLC components.
Building of multi-disciplinary applications in terms of industrial energy distribution. This is the job of our power current department active on the Belgian market. Our team designs & constructs complicated protection panels or racks for distribution networks & utilities, low- and medium voltage panels and uncommon control and measuring panels required for decentralized energy production. Considering our year-long know-how in this domain we concentrate mainly on projects with high complexity and high engineering degree.

With over 30 specialist people and an optimal mix of knowledge and manpower, EME is ready to solve all your power current problems !

Name: SOLCLIV GmbH
Description:
Die erste 5° Unterkonstruktion für Leichtmodule – nachhaltig, effizient, durchdacht.

SOLCLIV steht für eine neue Generation von Montagesystemen für Leichtmodule auf Flachdächern. Unsere Lösung behebt gezielt die bekannten Schwächen bisheriger Montagemethoden – wie stehendes Wasser, mangelnden Abfluss, aufwendige Kabelführungen und fehlende Stabilität.

Unsere innovative 5°-Neigung verbessert nicht nur den Selbstreinigungseffekt und die Leistung der PV-Module, sondern erhöht auch ihre Lebensdauer. Gleichzeitig setzen wir auf 100% recyceltes PET als Rohstoffbasis – für eine klimafreundliche und zirkuläre Bauweise.

Was uns auszeichnet:
 Leichtes System (nur 1,2kg pro Modul)
 Hohe Druckfestigkeit und Formstabilität
 Integrierte Kabelführung für sichere Installation
 Brandschutzklassen C & E verfügbar
 Einfache, werkzeugarme Montage mit Positionierhilfe
 Vollständig recycelbar – Made in Germany

Mit SOLCLIV schaffen wir eine nachhaltige Alternative für die solare Zukunft.

Description:
Welcome to Stirlingversal: Pioneers in Sustainable Energy Solutions

Embark on a journey towards a greener future with Stirlingversal, a leading Swedish Greentech company. Our groundbreaking engine technology efficiently converts high-temperature unclean gases into clean electricity and thermal heat.

Powered by Innovation

At the core of our innovation lies the Stirling engine, built upon the renowned Kockums submarine Stirling engine technology. What sets us apart is our worldwide license with Kockums, enabling us to develop, market, sell, and manufacture Stirling engines for various applications, excluding defense.

Fundamentally, Lithium-Ion batteries or any other chemical-based energy storage is not practical, sustainable, or cost effective for a long-term solution. Supercap Energy is changing the way individuals, industry and utilities think about energy storage and the optimization of renewable energy resources.

Hybrid Supercapacitors are the most advanced energy storage devices in the world. Combining the qualities of capacitors with the most advanced batteries, supercapacitors have a 10X lifespan over Lithium batteries, faster charge and discharge rates and the lowest lifetime cost of energy of any energy storage device in the world. Once at scale, we are aiming for a price of just £50 per kWh.

Description:
At FlexHome.Energy, we offer energy suppliers a solution that not only allows them to offer their customers cheaper electricity but also to strengthen their competitive position and take the energy transition a big step forward. 

With our innovative swarm battery storage, we open up access for suppliers to a market that has so far been little exploited – households in apartment buildings. 

Suppliers can supply electricity from wind and sun at low prices and store it at the customer's premises when it is available, and then let it be consumed when the electricity is needed by the customer and is expensive on the market. The result: lower electricity costs for customers due to optimized purchasing conditions for energy suppliers. 

We see ourselves as an enabler for energy suppliers who offer a full-service package for making the low-voltage grid more flexible – from the balancing group to the battery storage for the housholds in apartment buildings – as a white label solution.

Name: PilotSOEL Project
Description:
The PilotSOEL project focuses on innovative upscalable and low-cost SOEL component manufacturing processes with reduced use of Critical Raw Materials (CRM) and waste recycling in the cell production processes, and increases the degree of automation in the stack assembly to reduce manufacturing cost.

The project develops a novel environmentally friendly water-based tape casting process with a reduced number of process steps for half-cell production. Innovative thin protective barrier layers deposited by ALD and PVD, together with microstructural cell optimisation, will reduce the cell resistance, improving the cell performance and durability at high current operation. 

The dense and thin coating made by PVD will improve the oxidization resistance of the interconnector, allowing the use of cheaper alloys, and ensuring a long stack lifetime. A life-cycle assessment (LCA) and a techno-economic analysis (TEA) will be performed to benchmark the developed processes in PilotSOEL with the SoA SOEL production processes.

The project aims to improve the SOEL processing MRL from MRL 4 at the beginning of the project to at least MRL 5 at the end of the project.

Project partners: Technical University of Denmark (coordinator), Elcogen AS (Estonia), Elcogen OY (Finland), Beneq (Finland), Naco Technologies (Latvia), University of Ljubljana (Slovenia).

The project is supported by the Clean Hydrogen Partnership and its members and it has received funding from the European Commission through Horizon Europe Framework Programme.

We are pioneering biomass-based adsorption technology to safely and efficiently store hydrogen. Name: Steamergy
Description:
Steamergy wurde im Jahr 2017 gegründet und verfügt über die fortschrittlichste dezentrale Technologie zur Energieerzeugung.

Das Steamergy-Heizkraftwerk stellt das wirtschaftlichste, CO2-neutrale und grundlastfähige Kraftwerk in der Strom-Wärme- bzw. Kälteversorgung dar. Insbesondere die hohe Effizienz und der geringe Wartungsaufwand zeichnen die Technologie aus.

Die Steamergy-Technologie ist nicht nur in der Lage, bestehende Atomkraftwerke zu ersetzen, sondern bietet auch eine zuverlässigere, kostengünstigere und ressourcenschonendere Alternative, die die Zukunft der Energieerzeugung nachhaltig gestaltet.

Dieser Ansatz ermöglicht die effektive Nutzung von Biomasse, Wind, Sonne und Wasserstoff, wobei nicht nur die lokale Verwertung, sondern auch die ganzheitliche Bereitstellung und Optimierung der Energieerzeugung im Fokus steht.

Name: ENDURE
Description:
ENDURE is a Clean Hydrogen Partnership funded research and innovation project in the field of alkaline water electrolysis. Its consortium is composed of highly recognized partners, including research centers, companies and a university.
The ENDURE project will result in an innovative electrolyser stack design with innovative technological components. ENDURE will yield in higher durability thanks to decreased degradation rate of alkaline electrolysis cells and stacks via electrode improvements, design and material innovation on stack level and via the development of accelerated testing procedures. By the end of the project the sub-components and the short stack of at least 5 cells will be tested, validated and demonstrated at a lab scale. 
The main objective of ENDURE is to improve the current density and stability of electrolysers bringing the performance and durability of alkaline electrolysers to a new level. The number of publicly available durability data on alkaline electrolysers is scarce; therefore, the efforts will contribute to enriching the understanding of current density and stability of electrolysers for the scientific community.
More specifically, the goal is to drastically decrease the degradation rate and increase the efficiency of alkaline cells and stacks via the development of hierarchically structured flow-engineered monolithic porous transport electrodes, via design/material improvements on stack level, and via accelerated testing procedures.

2) PyroGasifier - Gasification to produce biochar and syngas

4) PyroFine-G - Pyrolysis of gases
5) PyroFine-L - Super Critical Water gasification of Hydrocarbons

We are committed to attention to detail and best working practices. Fully conversant with all current legislation, we are able to offer a complete design process for heat recovery technology, so we can create bespoke systems to optimise performance for each individual client.

We developed a bespoke pillow plate heat exchanger for one restaurant, which protects the area around the chargrill and absorbs the wasted energy to heat hot water.

The result? There is now a DexTherm in every Nando’s in the UK.

Dext has since developed an exciting new ‘heat harvester’ called the DexThermic that sits in the restaurant’s extract air system and captures the energy lost in cooking and heating the space, in order to use it again for heating and hot water.

Name: ARES Systems
Description:
Ares Systems is building the next generation of electrolysers, engineered to make green hydrogen affordable, scalable, and truly Indian.

Born at IIT Ropar and supported by IIMA Ventures, iHub AWaDH, IIT Ropar, and IIEC Gandhinagar, Ares Systems is pioneering membrane-free electrolysis technology (AresTempoH₂) that eliminates reliance on imported membranes and rare metals like platinum and iridium.

Aligned with the National Green Hydrogen Mission and the vision of Make in India, our patent-filed AresTempoH₂ technology makes electrolysis simpler, safer, and up to 5× more cost-efficient than existing PEM or Alkaline systems.

Using abundant nickel-based proprietary electrodes, AresTempoH₂ achieves >90% efficiency (<42 kWh/kg H₂);  setting new benchmarks for indigenous, low-cost hydrogen production.

Our containerized and modular systems are designed for on-site, decentralized hydrogen generation, empowering sectors such as steel, fertilizers, cement, mobility, and energy to decarbonize affordably.

At Ares Systems, we’re not just building electrolysers — we’re building India’s confidence to lead the hydrogen age.

Name: ELDOM
Description:
Eldom créé de la lumière sans électricité à partir de la photoluminescence.
Notre objectif est de proposer des solutions de balisage nocturne entièrement autonomes. 
Notre activité se décompose en deux parties : 
Dans un premier temps, nous intervenons auprès des collectivités, des entreprises et des industriels. Nous permettons à nos clients de baliser de façon éco-responsable l'ensemble des voies douces, c'est à dire les pistes cyclables, les chemins piétonniers, les voies partagées ou encore les abribus en zone rurale dépourvus d'infrastructures électriques. 
Concernant les entreprises et industriels, nous proposons des solutions de balisage permettant la sécurité et la prévention. Que ce soit en intérieure ou extérieur nos solutions auront la capacité de sécuriser les usagers de façon complètement autonome. 

En seconde partie, nous intervenons dans le domaine de la santé et plus précisément dans les maisons de soins. Nous avons conçu un kit Confort de Nuit Luminescent, à positionner dans les chambres des patients permettant la prévention des chutes. Cette solution permet d'accompagner les patients de leur lit aux toilettes et des toilettes jusque dans leur lit en limitant au maximum le risque de chute. 
Dans le cadre d'un projet Européen, une nouvelle expérimentation à eu lieu durant l'année 2022. En effet, cette expérimentation a permis de prouver que notre solution réduit l'anxiété des patients. 
Une véritable innovation dans le domaine de la santé.

Name: Photon Solar Systems
Description:
Photon Solar Systems è un’azienda innovativa nel settore Greentech, specializzata nella progettazione e produzione di generatori solari portatili avanzati per rispondere alle sfide energetiche in situazioni di emergenza e in contesti remoti. La nostra missione è garantire una fonte di energia sicura, sostenibile e accessibile ovunque sia necessaria, riducendo al contempo la dipendenza da combustibili fossili e promuovendo la transizione verso energie rinnovabili.

I generatori Photon sono compatti, resistenti e all-in-one, racchiudendo un intero impianto fotovoltaico in una valigetta robusta e impermeabile. La loro tecnologia brevettata, dotata di solar tracking e controllo remoto, consente l’autonomia di funzionamento anche nelle condizioni più estreme, supportando operazioni di soccorso, emergenze umanitarie, e situazioni di blackout. Questo design li rende ideali anche per l’uso aziendale e domestico, offrendo un backup energetico sicuro e una soluzione ecologica che riduce l’impatto ambientale.

Grazie a continui investimenti in ricerca e sviluppo, PhotonSolarSystems offre prodotti con prestazioni superiori a quelle di molti concorrenti nel campo delle emergenze, distinguendosi per l’alta qualità, l’affidabilità e il rispetto delle esigenze di un mercato sempre più orientato verso la sostenibilità.

Name: Whspr
Description:
Whspr ontwikkelt de beste warmtepomp voor rijwoningen.

Wij zijn Hugo Huis in ’t Veld en Hans Cool, twee ingenieurs met ervaring bij energieleverancier Eneco. Wij geloven dat Nederland sneller van het gas af kan – mits er betere warmtepompen beschikbaar zijn.

Bij Whspr vinden we dat een warmtepomp voor iedereen bereikbaar moet zijn. Onze missie is helder: we maken warmtepompen zo eenvoudig dat iedereen de overstap kan maken:

- Betaalbaar
- Stil
- Eenvoudiger te installeren 

De komende tijd nemen we je mee in alles wat je moet weten over onze nieuwe warmtepomp. Zo kun jij in de zomer van 2026 als een van de eersten overstappen.

Stay tuned!

Name: Neotrafo Solutions India Private Limited
Description:
Neotrafo Solutions India Private Limited , group of Transcon Industries, operates a state-of-the-art manufacturing facility in Hyderabad, India. Transcon Industries Group is a well-established manufacturer of Transformers up to 66 kV voltage class, Switchgear, and other electrical equipment, holding ISO 9001, 14001, and 45001 certifications, with over 20 years of industry expertise. Transcon’s products are also CE, BIS, and BEE certified. The company has been recognized as one of the Best India 5000 companies and maintains a strong financial track record with a CARE Credit Rating of A-.

As part of its strategic growth initiative, Transcon has introduced Neotrafo Solutions to broaden its manufacturing capabilities in key areas such as battery energy storage applications, compact substations, and transformer solutions up to the 245 kV class. This expansion underscores Transcon’s commitment to innovation and meeting the evolving demands of the energy sector. Neotrafo Solutions also functions as the export arm of the Transcon Group, offering a diverse range of products, including Ring Main Units (RMUs) with capacities up to 33 kV, fast EV charging stations, and advanced embedded solutions. By leveraging its expertise and state-of-the-art facilities, Neotrafo is well-positioned to deliver cutting-edge energy solutions to both domestic and international markets.

Beyond its expertise in manufacturing, Neotrafo stands out as a key player in providing a full suite of engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) services for substations, with a capacity of up to 400kV. Neotrafo manages the entire lifecycle of substation projects, ensuring smooth execution from the initial design phase to the final commissioning. This comprehensive approach ensures high-quality and reliable infrastructure for clients, from concept to operation.

Neotrafo is a one-stop destination for sustainable innovative power solutions worldwide.

Name: DelHyVEHR
Description:
This 3-years project, coordinated by ENGIE Lab Crigen, the ENGIE Group's research centre on energy transition, is funded by the European Union and supported by the Clean Hydrogen Partnership with a budget of € 5M and a European contribution of € 3.7M. Additionally, this project has received CHF 840k (~€ 866k) funding from the Swiss State Secretariat for Education, Research and Innovation (SERI) and € 1.3M from UK Research and Innovation.
Liquid hydrogen usage could substantially lead to carbon reduction, particularly within heavy-duty applications such as aviation, maritime, and railroad transportation. While existing technologies have paved the way for gaseous hydrogen refuelling for light vehicles, DelHyVEHR aims at addressing the gap in liquid hydrogen distribution infrastructure.
Key objectives of the DelHyVEHR project include the development of a liquid hydrogen (LH2) high-rate refuelling station dedicated to maritime, aviation and railroad applications with delivery flowrate exceeding 5 tons per hour and zero boil-off losses. The project is expected to achieve its demonstration by end 2026. Alongside with market maturity the costs are expected to be divided by 2 by 2030. 
The DelHyVEHR consortium, comprising 13 leading partners from 4 countries across the European Union, the United Kingdom and Switzerland spans the entire value chain from component development to system demonstration and assessment. Additionally, the project benefits from the guidance of a distinguished advisory board comprised of global leaders in hydrogen end-user industries. 
With plans to complete demonstration activities by 2027, DelHyVEHR aims to commercialize its technologies by 2029, ultimately establishing 15 refuelling stations by 2030 and scaling up to 81 stations by 2040 to cater to the shipping, aviation, and railroad markets.

Name: Komunitas Startup Teknologi Energi Bersih (KSTEB)
Description:
Komunitas Startup Teknologi Energi Bersih (KSTEB) merupakan sebuah jaringan atau komunitas yang terdiri dari para pendiri perusahaan rintisan (startup) berbasis teknologi energi bersih atau clean energy. Komunitas ini bertujuan untuk mendukung inovasi dan kolaborasi di sektor energi bersih dengan menyediakan berbagai bentuk dukungan, seperti jaringan profesional, akses ke investor dan pemangku kebijakan, peningkatan kapasitas, serta platform untuk berbagi pengetahuan dan pengalaman. Berikut adalah beberapa kegiatan utama dari KSTEB:
   1.    Kolaborasi dan Networking: KSTEB memungkinkan anggotanya untuk saling berkolaborasi dan berbagi informasi, seperti tren terbaru, tantangan teknologi, atau peluang bisnis di sektor energi bersih.

   2.    Akses ke Sumber Daya dan Pembiayaan: KSTEB memfasilitasi anggotanya untuk bekerja sama dengan investor, inkubator, akselerator, institusi keuangan, dan pemangku kepentingan lainnya yang tertarik memberikan pendanaan bagi para startup cleantech di Indonesia.

   3.    Peningkatan Kapasitas: KSTEB menyediakan akses ke pelatihan dan workshop untuk membantu startup mengembangkan teknologi, menyempurnakan model bisnis, dan meningkatkan kemampuan teknis dan kepemimpinan.

   4.    Advokasi dan Dukungan Kebijakan: KSTEB juga melakukan advokasi kebijakan untuk mendukung penerapan teknologi energi bersih, bekerja sama dengan pemerintah dan organisasi terkait untuk mendorong kebijakan yang mendorong penggunaan energi bersih. 

Mari bergabung dengan Komunitas Startup Teknologi Energi Bersih (KSTEB) dan bersama, kita bisa menciptakan dampak nyata untuk masa depan yang lebih hijau!

Name: Eco Energy International, LLC
Description:
Eco Energy International is a joint venture of Bio Carbon Fuels (BCF) and Energy Technologies, Inc. (ETI), working together to develop and commercialize technologies to produce clean renewable energy from waste.  Our patented, modular, scalable technologies produce pure hydrogen at costs rivaling those of large scale facilities but without releasing greenhouse gases (CO2, CO) that traditional processes produce.  By using renewable feedstocks, this hydrogen is considered green (renewable) hydrogen that is in high demand in a growing market. These feedstocks include:
•	Municipal Solid Waste (Paper, Wood, Food Wastes, and other Organic Materials)
•	Alcohols (Methanol, Ethanol, Crude Ethanol, E95, Ethylene Glycol, Glycerol (byproduct from bio-diesel plant)),
•	Sugars, Starches (Glucose, Fructose, Starch (Corn Starch, Potato Starch), Food Wastes)
•	Methane Gases (Landfill Gas, Bio-Gas)
•	Biomass (Grass, Sawdust, Wood chips, Agricultural Waste, Corn, Potato Peels, Cellulose, Fryer Oils)
•	Animal Waste and Municipal Sewage Sludge

When applying our technologies to Municipal Solid Wastes, we produce renewable hydrogen from the biogenic (organic) materials that can be dissolved in our caustic solution and syngas from the balance of materials. This means that these materials are not land filled and producing harmful greenhouse gases. Metals and glass are separated and recycled. The net result is a Total Recycling Facility (TRF) that produces renewable energy while significantly reducing the carbon footprint and reducing dependence on landfills.

Name: Dragon Q Energy

Key Differentiators: 

•Truly Unprecedented Levels of Safety – Our hermetically sealed, argon-filled environment with five redundant safety mechanisms prevents and contains thermal runaway events.
•Underground Deployment – Buried installation shields the system from weather, flooding, dust, and tampering while remaining virtually undetectable by satellite and thermal imaging.
•Passive Geothermal Cooling – The stable underground environment dissipates heat naturally, eliminating the need for active HVAC and lowering lifetime operating costs.
•Scalable and Flexible – A modular platform that ranges from compact 2 kWh units to 0.5 MWh systems, adaptable for defense, disaster relief, telecom, and commercial markets.

Our Products:

•7.5 kWh Battery the foundation of our platform, a rugged subterranean unit engineered for safety, reliability, and long life.
•PowerPole– a modular solar + storage system that deploys quickly and adapts to diverse uses, from telecom to community power.
•BEACON– carrier-grade telecom and connectivity nodes built on our resilient battery platform.
•Large-Scale Systems – 0.25-0.5MWh subterranean batteries engineered for data centers and urban infrastructure (Concept).

Industries We Serve

Defense • Data Centers • Humanitarian Aid • Telecommunications • Commercial • Critical infrastructure • Disaster resilience 

At Dragon Q Energy, we design systems that combine  safety, durability, and efficiency to set a new standard for reliable power.

Name: GRI Reducel
Description:
REDUCEL is a Spanish, private-owned company mainly dedicated to the manufacturing of medium and big-sized parts which require very high-quality standards and very specific technologies.

REDUCEL was incorporated in 1955 and it is located in Zaragoza, Spain. The original company was created by Antonio Zamorano  and its activity was mainly related to the manufacturing of gears of all kinds (Cylindrical gear, helicoidal gears, bevel gears, worm gears, etc.) and gearboxes for different applications under its own brand name ANZA. In the nineties, wind power is highly developed in Spain and the company specializes in WTG components, specially yaw rings. In 1994, the company name is changed to REDUCEL.

Since 2023, Reducel was incorporated to GRI RENEWABLE INDUSTRIES.

The company uses very specific process and high-technology CNC machines. Some of our machines are specifically designed and built by ourselves, making them perfectly adapted to our own needs.

Since 1990, REDUCEL has accumulated many successful references in the Wind Power Sector, and has become a key supplier for some of the top WTG manufactures in the World.

REDUCEL remains committed to personal attention and the flexibility of a medium-sized company. Because of this commitment, REDUCEL can quickly change directions and give proactive answers as the requirements of our customers change.

Description:
Suomen Lämpöpumpputekniikka Oy on Oilon Group Oy:n tytäryhtiö. 

Olemme Suomen vanhin maalämpöpumppujen valmistaja 40 vuoden kokemuksella. Aloitimme maalämpöpumppujen valmistuksen jo 1980-luvun alussa. Nykyinen valikoimamme kattaa erilaiset energiatehokkaat maalämpöratkaisut omakotitaloista suuriin kiinteistöihin.

Maalämpöpumppu on erinomainen vaihtoehto kiinteistöjen lämmitykseen ja lämpimän käyttöveden tuottamiseen. Maalämpöjärjestelmällä voidaan saavuttaa jopa hiilineutraalius, kun maalämpöjärjestelmän toimintaan käytetään uusiutuvaa sähköä. Maalämpöjärjestelmällä saavutetaan tavanomaisesti 65–75 %:n säästö verrattuna alkuperäisiin lämmityskustannuksiin, joten investointi maksaa itsensä takaisin muutamassa vuodessa. Järjestelmän mitoituksen yhteydessä saadaan tarkempi, kiinteistökohtainen säästölaskelma.

Name: Blackwood Technology
Description:
Blackwood Technology is a cleantech company focusing on biomass torrefaction. Our FlashTor torrefaction is a key enabling technology to unlock the full potential of biomass. Torrefied biomass can replace fossil coal while using the existing coal infrastructure. Torrefaction will have great impact in bioenergy applications and the future production of biobased chemicals & fuels.

In energy generation, torrefaction enables the use of lower cost feedstock, reduces logistics costs, and lowers capex and opex at power stations for handling and burning biofuel. Torrefied biomass is applicable for (co-)firing in large power plants as well as for decentralized heating applications. In other markets, torrefaction creates the opportunity to accelerate the use of biomass in industrial applications and as a feedstock for large-scale gasification to produce biobased chemicals and materials.

Blackwood’s technology is the leading industrial scale torrefaction technology in the world. This technology was developed and demonstrated by Topell Energy from 2008-2014 at Topell ’s demo plant in Duiven, the Netherlands.

The team of Blackwood has extensive experience with torrefaction. All its engineers were involved in the engineering, construction, commissioning and operation of the Topell Energy demo plant.

Blackwood’s mission is to roll-out its cutting edge torrefaction technology on a global scale. In order to achieve this, the company’s strategy is based on a technology licensing model. To accelerate the deployment of FlashTor based torrefaction plants, the company is working with a partnership model.

Description:

Con más de 7 años de experiencia, nuestro equipo utiliza metodologías de vanguardia para enfrentar desafíos complejos, asegurando resultados sobresalientes para cada cliente.

Name: ETGAS
Description:
ETGAS is a waste-to-products company - we design, build, co-own and operate solid waste recycling plants with valuable products at output demonstrating circular economy principles in real life. Renewable hydrogen and bio-methanol are the main products of our focus, targeting product prices competitive with fossil analogues in no subsidy environment.

We use solid waste and residue streams as a feedstock and convert it into ultra clean synthetic gas using our proprietary gasification technology commercial since 2010. Use of low (negative) cost waste combined with efficient and unmatched capital and operational costs enable us to deliver a cost efficient waste conversion process and transfer these efficiencies to the final product price.

Our flagship plant demonstrating the whole value chain from waste to final products is located in Yorkshire, UK (WF14 0BS). We are always welcoming our future partners to visit us to find out that technologies critical for mitigating climate change and the circular economy are already operating in a commercial scale environment.

Name: Microbiogasitalia
Description:
Micro Biogas Italia produce micro-impianti biogas a partire da 25 kW elettrici, compatti, automatici, affidabili e di veloce installazione, in grado di produrre energia elettrica e calore a partire dai soli liquami e letami prodotti dagli allevamenti animali, e più in generale da biomasse di scarto.

La nostra mission nasce dalla volontà di risolvere alcuni importanti problemi che caratterizzano le aziende zootecniche e agroindustriali, puntando a creare un sistema virtuoso dove tutti ci guadagnano. Una vera economia circolare.

Intendiamo portare la sostenibilità generale delle aziende zootecniche ed agroindustriali ad un nuovo livello: con sostenibilità generale intendiamo sostenibilità ambientale, sostenibilità energetica, sostenibilità economica e sostenibilità sociale. Crediamo che la tecnologia micro-biogas sia la chiave per poter accedere a questo nuovo livello, perché le sue dimensioni ridotte permettono anche alle piccole aziende di dotarsene in autonomia, senza la necessità di realizzare grandi impianti consortili che:
⇢ costringono ad aumentare il traffico veicolare
⇢ sono altamente impattanti dal punto di vista paesaggistico
⇢ diluiscono i vantaggi economici delle piccole aziende.

I liquami, i letami e gli scarti organici vengono trattati nello stesso luogo dove vengono prodotti, così facendo i benefici sono massimi. L’utilizzo razionale di liquami, letami e scarti organici all’interno di un micro-impianto biogas ne migliora le caratteristiche ambientali ed igienico-sanitarie, ne evita la putrefazione e quindi l’emissione odorigena e di gas climalteranti, incrementa il loro potere fertilizzante, permette di produrre una quantità di energia elettrica che supera il fabbisogno dell’allevamento, rendendolo quindi energeticamente indipendente dai costi dell’elettricità e consentendogli di immettere in rete l’energia elettrica prodotta in eccesso generando un reddito aggiuntivo.

In tal modo si contribuisce a diminuire la dipendenza dai combustibili.

Name: AEROCOMPACT US
Description:

Our success story began with an innovative bracket system for mounting solar panels that reduces the amount of material required for the substructure for photovoltaic systems by a third.

Along with the mounting components, we launched a specially developed visualization and planning software that set new standards: AEROTOOL is a proprietary digital platform that allows solar systems to be planned quickly and easily, taking into account all structural requirements. Within a short time, AEROTOOL has become the world's leading platform in this market segment.

Our aerodynamically optimized PV mounting solutions are patent-protected and offer safety and mechanical stability. All products are tested according to the highest industry standards and are particularly economical.

Description:
Wir sind einer der führenden Anbieter von Biogasaufbereitungsanlagen sowie Biomethan-CNG-Tankstellen. Wasserstofftankstellen, Tanklager, Flüssiggasanlagen, Gasmischanlagen, H2- und Biomethan-Einspeiseanlagen gehören ebenfalls zu unseren Kernkompetenzen. Wir entwickeln, planen und bauen die Anlagen- und die gesamte Elektrotechnik in ganzheitlicher Betrachtung unter einem Dach.

Fordern Sie uns! Mit Ihnen gemeinsam entwickeln wir für Sie maßgeschneiderte Lösungen, vom Konzept bis zur Inbetriebnahme, alles aus einer Hand. Kompromisslos zuverlässige Technik für Ihr Projekt. Wartung und Service auf höchstem Niveau für langjährige Wirtschaftlichkeit Ihrer Anlagen mit zuverlässiger, europaweiter Ersatzteillieferung.

Mit dem Wissen und der Erfahrung eines Traditionsunternehmens im klassischen Anlagenbau haben wir uns zur Aufgabe gemacht, höchste Qualitätsstandards in allen Produktbereichen zu pflegen.

Unsere Innovationen im Bereich der erneuerbaren und regenerativen Energien sollen zur Verbesserung und Nachhaltigkeit unserer aller Lebensbedingungen beitragen. Dieses Ziel mit bester Wirtschaftlichkeit für Investition und Betrieb zu erreichen, ist das Bestreben aller unserer Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter. Unser Betrieb arbeitet dabei nahezu klimaneutral. Unsere Service-Fahrzeuge werden mit Biomethan betankt, die Gebäude werden mit Biomethan beheizt und unsere Anlagen mit 100% regenerativem Strom betrieben.

Wir freuen uns auf Sie und ihre Projekte!

Name: ROBOSUN
Description:
Güneş enerji santralleri endüstrisinde temizlik ve bakım ihtiyaçlarını karşılamak için kurulan bir firmadır.

Güneş enerji santrallerinden maksimum verimin elde edilebilmesi için her tesis işletmecisinin ihtiyaç duyduğu temizlik robotunu geliştiren ve üreten bir firma olmayı başarmıştır. AR-GE çalışmalarını Çorum bünyesinde gerçekleştirmektedir. Üretim altyapısını ise 1957 yılında kurulan GÖRMAKSAN (Görpe Makina Sanayii) bünyesinde Çorum Sanayi Sitesinde bulunan tesisinde gerçekleştirmektedir.

Name: EnBrilion
Description:
Enbrilion designs builds and deploys safe and reliable energy storage solutions for long-duration residential, commercial, industrial and utility-scale applications requiring flexible energy capacity. Enbrilion enables project developers, utilities, and commercial and industrial facility owners to make the transition to more flexible non-nickel, non-cobalt lithium storage technology that is better suited for the grid and environment.
EnBrilion aims to address the growing demand for energy storage solutions by offering cutting-edge technologies that are both efficient and affordable. Their commitment to providing cost-effective solutions aligns with the increasing need for sustainable energy sources and grid stability.
EnBrilion's focus on energy storage solutions is particularly significant considering the global transition towards renewable energy sources. As renewable energy generation becomes more prevalent, efficient energy storage systems are essential for balancing supply and demand fluctuations, ensuring grid stability, and maximizing the utilization of renewable resources.

EnBrilion and its partners embrace the entire value chain from battery raw materials through cell manufacturing, system integration and commissioning.

Unlike traditional energy storage system integrators that rely on external supply chains, EmBrilion has independently developed core components of energy storage products to maximize the overall performance of the energy storage system, which avoids the risk of quality uncertainty brought by upstream suppliers and provides customers with better and more timely product supply services.

Name: VentoStream AG
Description: VentoStream AG wants to make a decisive contribution to the sustainable and environmentally friendly energy supply of the future. Inspired by the possibilities of classical fluid mechanics and the aerodynamics of modern turbine-powered aircraft, we have spent many years developing a new type of wind turbine. The technology consists of different system units that work together to generate significantly more power than conventional propeller wind turbines.

Name: C&A Chama
Description: A C&A Chama tem como missão desenhar, desenvolver e produzir equipamentos a biomassa, tendo por base uma aposta crescente na inovação, na qualidade dos recursos físicos e humanos e na modernização dos processos, com vista ao reforço da sua competitividade. Para isso, propõe-se mobilizar um conjunto de colaboradores e parceiros focados em áreas específicas e críticas, no setor do aquecimento a biomassa.

Name: Fagor Comfort Solutions
Description:
En Fagor Comfort Solutions, nuestro propósito es sencillo pero ambicioso: transformar tu hogar en un espacio más eficiente, cómodo, sostenible y que te permita ahorrar.

Para nosotros, una solución no es solo un producto, sino una experiencia completa que incluye servicios diseñados para ofrecerte tranquilidad y valor. Desde el producto hasta su instalación, puesta en marcha, mantenimiento y garantías, nos encargamos de todo para que tú solo tengas que disfrutar.

Nuestras soluciones aportan comodidad, respetan el medio ambiente y cuidan tu economía. Con tecnologías avanzadas y sostenibles, reducimos el consumo energético y las emisiones, sin renunciar a tu bienestar.

Cada hogar y cada familia son únicas, por eso diseñamos soluciones personalizadas que se ajustan a tus necesidades específicas. Desde tecnologías híbridas y renovables hasta sistemas adaptados a cada situación, nuestras soluciones combinan eficiencia, sostenibilidad y confort.

FAGOR COMFORT SOLUTIONS es una marca de REACH THE MARKET, S.L. 
REACH THEMARKET, S.L. es un sublicenciatario de la marca Fagor para aparatos y soluciones de CONFORT

Name: ZPE Ltd
Description:
The ZPE Ltd’s  waste heat/steam to electricity harvesting system saves on your fuel and power costs. 
The AXIAL Engine harvests your process waste steam/ heat to generate electricity that can be used in multiple applications, while increasing fuel/power efficiency and reducing carbon emissions in your processing plant. 
Our energy harvesting system is easily installed by our highly trained installation team. 
One energy harvesting system provides Electrical output up to 200kWe with a return on investment of 1-3 years. Giving you increased profitability while producing approximately 1,600,000 kWe per AXIAL engine per year to your processing plant, with the added benefit of massively reducing CO2 emissions by approximately 400 ton per annum.

Name: IFT Whitecell Engineering GmbH
Description:
As an engineering and testing service provider, we focus on sustainable technologies as well as forward-looking mobility and energy systems.

We are an experienced partner for research / development, mobility, and industry – offering tailored testing and engineering services ranging from mechanical and electrical to fully integrated mechatronic systems.

With around 45 employees, in-house test bench development, and deep system expertise, we deliver solutions that stand out for their quality, speed, and flexibility. This enables our customers to bring innovations to market faster and more reliably.

At our Clausthal-Zellerfeld site, we have been working closely with the university and industry for over 35 years. With our ISO 9001:2015 and TISAX AL3 certifications, we guarantee the highest quality and security standards.

Name: Eco Power Direct
Description: We create the world's most innovative eco-friendly power solutions that enable you to live, dream and explore without limits.

Name: MATA Energy
Description:
Wir sind Mata - Lösungsanbieter für smarte Quartiersversorgung

Hinter MATA ENERGY steht ein Team aus erfahrenen Ingenieuren und Fachplanern aus dem Energiesektor. Was uns stark macht, ist die Dynamik eines wachsenden Start-ups verbunden mit einer erfahrenen Gesellschafterstruktur und dem sicheren Background etablierter Energieversorger.

Wir haben einen echten Bedarf am Markt für die sektorengekoppelte Quartiersversorgung ausgemacht und gemeinsam mit unseren strategischen Partnern H2homes sowie den Stadtwerken Osnabrück und den Stadtwerken Münster eine zielgruppenspezifische Lösungen entwickelt. Wir verstehen uns selbst als Transformationsgesellschaft für den Energiesektor. 

WAS UNS ANTREIBT
Wir haben unsere langjährige Erfahrung und unsere unterschiedlichen Fähigkeiten gebündelt, um unser gemeinsames Ziel zu verwirklichen: Die Energiewende beschleunigen! 

Um dieses Ziel zu erreichen, wollen wir regionale Energieversorgern, der Wohnungswirtschaft und Energy Communities eine regenerative, vor allem aber wirtschaftliche Quartiersversorgung ermöglichen und sie so zu Gestaltern der Energiewende machen. 

UNSER NETZWERK 
Die Energiewende beschleunigt man nicht alleine. Dafür braucht es ein Netzwerk an Partnern und Unternehmen, die gemeinsam an einem Strang ziehen. Unterstützung auf unserem Weg erhalten wir von Forschungseinrichtungen, Industrieunternehmen und Stadtwerken, die unsere Vision einer nachhaltigen Energieversorgung im Quartier teilen. 

DATENSCHUTZ
https://mata-energy.de/datenschutz/

Name: nutz die Sonne GmbH
Description: Wir verfügen über 18 Jahre Erfahrung in der Planung und Installation von PV-Anlagen. Spezialisiert sind wir auf die ganzheitliche Beratung, Konzeptionierung und Umsetzung von Projekten im Rahmen der ISO 50001 Energieauditierung von KMU

Name: North American Filtration

NAF’s cutting-edge water optimization products and solutions allow for the separation, recycling, cleaning, and purification of critical components of the manufacturing process. With its company roots in swimming, NAF also designs, manufactures, installs, and services commercial pools and spas.

Name: Trigo Energies

Trigo Energies provides Natural HVAC solutions (solar heating and ventilation) for buildings. 

Trigo Energies fournit des solutions de CVAC Naturelles (chauffage solaire et ventilation) pour les bâtiments.

Name: Hyperian

Hyperian is a technology company specializing in the development of software and hardware for the energy sector, with a strong focus on renewables.

Hyperian's mission is to empower people to create meaningful impact on the world by building a sustainable energy future.

Hyperians design, develop, and deploy the world’s most practical, cost-effective, and intelligent distributed energy resources for residential, commercial, and industrial applications.

Name: Metalúrgica Pressmatic
Description: Somos a Pressmatic, uma indústria do setor metalúrgico, que atua na prestação de serviços de caldeiraria, usinagem, montagem de subconjuntos elétricos e mecânicos. Gerar soluções para processos fabris é o nosso proposito, por isso, trabalhamos para garantir a satisfação dos clientes e o atendimento aos requisitos de partes interessadas aplicáveis, com qualidade e segurança.

Name: RENOZ Energy
Description:
RENOZ Energy is a Perth-based Battery Energy Storage Solutions provider for Residential and Commercial applications.

RENOZ Energy was founded in 2024 with a clear mission: to provide Western Australians with intelligent energy solutions that deliver exceptional performance and longevity. Our journey began when we identified a critical gap in the market – renewable energy systems that truly understand the unique challenges of the Western Australian climate and energy landscape.

Name: Sunsynk South Africa Official
Description:
Established over 20 years ago, Sunsynk has solidified its position as a prolific brand, specialising in cutting-edge solar storage solutions. Trademark protected in over 40 countries, we have earned the respect and recognition of customers globally.
At Sunsynk, we offer a diverse range of products, with our inverters and battery storage systems designed to cater to the specific needs of clients seeking both off-grid and on-grid solutions. We are renowned as global leaders in power storage and management, and we are constantly setting new benchmarks in this industry.

Name: GruEnergy
Description:
GruEnergy is a global leader and innovator of silicon anode materials for next generation lithium-ion batteries used in electric vehicles, power tools, consumer electronics, etc. 

Today we are producing high performance silicon/carbon composite anode materials to help electric vehicles achieve higher energy density and fast charging in less than 15 minutes.

We are also aggresively driving development of highly engineered silicon-dominant anode materials to revolutionize lithium-ion battery performance in the very near future. 

GruEnergy is a Silicon Valley-based silicon anode materials company with operations in both the US and Asia with future expansion plans in Europe. 

We have strong commercial relationships with some of the largest automotive OEM’s and battery cell manufacturers across the globe. 

We are leveraging advanced materials science to power the world’s transition to zero carbon emissions.

Name: Multiboxx Energy | Battery Energy Storage Solutions
Description:
The MULTIBOXX BESS Series is a battery energy storage system that can store and sell electricity, reduce electricity costs, integrate with renewable sources, and provide high power without impacting the existing grid. It is designed to fit around the current infrastructure and avoid the need for expensive and time-consuming network upgrades.

The MULTIBOXX BESS Series comes in three versions, each with different capacities and power ratings:

•  20'HC - 1MWh capacity / 400kW (Bi-directional inverter)
•  10'HC - 500kWh capacity / 250kW (Bi-directional inverter)
•  6'6"DV - 200kWh capacity / 100kW (Bi-directional inverter)

The MULTIBOXX BESS Series is compliant with the highest specifications and safety standards, suitable for the most demanding commercial environments. It is also easy to deliver and install, saving you time and money.

Name: E9 Hydrogen
Description: E9 develops modular Green Hydrogen Production Systems from 100 kW - 100 MW. Our systems are optimized for integration with renewable power sources such as wind and solar – with behind the grid capability for the lowest cost, most globally abundant and widely available clean energy resource.

Name: Airwende Umwelttechnik
Description:
Based in Germany, AIRWENDE UMWELTTECHNIK GmbH is advancing renewable energy through scientific and technological innovation, engagement in collaborations involving new energy technologies, and active participation in social initiatives focused on energy conservation, emission reduction, and environment protection technology. 

Airwende's main line of work is the development, testing, distribution, and installation of air-source heat pump products for the European market.

Name: SolarNow Photovoltaik GmbH
Description: Wir sind Ihre Photovoltaik-Spezialisten für Wien, Niederösterreich und Burgenland. Bei uns bekommen Sie schlüsselfertige Photovoltaik-Anlagen: Beratung, Planung & fachgerechte Montage - Alles aus einer Hand für Privathaushalte & Gewerbe.

Name: Oscorp Energy
Description:
We build intelligent machines that autonomously sort used batteries so they can be safely recycled.

Our first goal is to give recyclers and MRFs the confidence to accept batteries without fear of fires, contamination, or costly disruptions - because our technology makes sorting safer, smarter, and scalable.

Why it matters:
- Fewer batteries (hazardous waste) end up in landfill
- Reduced risk of fires at recycling facilities
- More critical metals recovered and reused instead of mined
- Lower recycling costs - helping keep everyday tech more affordable

By turning old batteries into new resources, we keep dangerous waste out of landfills and help create a cleaner, safer world for everyone.

Name: Shandong Energy Group
Description: Shandong Hi-Speed New Energy Group Limited engages in the investment, development, construction, operation, and management of photovoltaic power business in Mainland China. The company develops and constructs distributed photovoltaic power stations; and provides engineering, procurement, construction, and technical consultancy services for photovoltaic and wind power-related projects, and clean heat supply services, which include the production of heat through natural gas, electricity, geothermal energy, biomass energy, photovoltaic power, industrial excess heat energy, clean coal energy, river water source, etc., as well as trades in equipment related to photovoltaic power business. It also engages in the infrastructure development and operation of wind power plants and clean energy projects, as well as in the property investment business. The company was formerly known as Beijing Enterprises Clean Energy Group Limited and changed its name to Shandong Hi-Speed New Energy Group Limited in July 2022. Shandong Hi-Speed New Energy Group Limited was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Wanchai, Hong Kong.

Name: HOPE: Hydrogen Offshore Production for Europe
Description:
HOPE is building a 10MW offshore hydrogen production facility powered entirely by renewables, representing the next step toward zero-carbon transport and industry in Europe.

The project has received funding from the Ministry of Economy of Belgium (Clean Hydrogen for Clean Industry) and from the European Union – Next Generation EU and Clean Hydrogen Partnership under Grant Agreement 101111899. This partnership receives support from the European Union’s Horizon Europe Research and Innovation Programme.

Name: PowerU

The energy storage device helps to balance the load on the grid, use the grid in “Microgrid” mode, close imbalances and, if desired, become a participant in the DAM, IDM, enter the balancing market and the support services market.

Name: Guang dong Lvtopsun New Energy Co.,Ltd

Name: Zoolnasm
Description:
Founded in 2021 in Suzhou, China, Jiangsu Zoolnasm Energy Technology Co., Ltd. (“Zoolnasm”) is a pioneer in NFS sodium-ion battery technology. Leveraging our deep expertise in sodium-ion cathode materials, cell structure, and battery packs, we have secured over 140 patents and established a production capacity of 3,000 tons of cathode materials, along with a 2 GWh sodium-ion battery manufacturing facility.

We are committed to delivering green, safe, and affordable energy solutions to the world.

Name: U.T.S THERM'ECO
Description:
U.T.S vous propose de faire vos demandes de matériel pour pouvoir créer un appel d'offres auprès de nos fournisseurs partenaires.

Nous sommes convaincus que les énergies renouvelables sont l'avenir et nous sommes fiers de contribuer à leur développement.

Nous sommes à l'écoute de nos clients et nous nous engageons à leur offrir un service personnalisé et de qualité. Faites confiance à notre expertise et rejoignez notre communauté de professionnels engagés pour un avenir plus durable.

Name: Rebecchi Group
Description: Un gruppo che unisce competenze e specializzazioni diverse per un unico scopo: sviluppare soluzioni innovative nel campo della meccanica, dei sistemi, della produzione di energia e delle comunicazioni. Dalla produzione di componenti per conto terzi alla ricerca nel campo delle energie rinnovabili, Rebecchi Group si rapporta con la complessità di un mondo in continua evoluzione sfruttando tutta l’esperienza di una lunga storia aziendale.

Name: Vanaflow Energy Systems
Description:
Vanaflow Energy Systems is a dynamic and innovative company at the forefront of energy storage solutions, specializing in the design, manufacturing, and research of vanadium redox flow batteries (VRFBs). With a strong emphasis on research and development, we are committed to pushing the boundaries of energy storage technology and driving the transition towards a sustainable future.

We possess a deep understanding of vanadium redox flow battery systems and their applications across various industries. Leveraging our expertise, we develop cutting-edge technologies and proprietary solutions to enhance the performance, efficiency, and durability of VRFBs.

Dedicated to continuous innovation, we have an in-house research and development team comprised of top-tier scientists, engineers, and technicians. Our R&D efforts are focused on refining existing VRFB designs, exploring novel materials and chemistries, and optimizing battery performance.

Name: M2 Energie
Description:
M2 Energie ontwerpt en bouwt middenspanningsinstallaties en compacte trafostations voor PV, EV en BESS, inclusief engineering, levering, installatie, beheer en onderhoud. We leveren turnkey uit eigen assemblage in Nederland, met productielocatie in Emmen. Onze stations zijn geschikt voor alle Nederlandse netbeheerders, en worden opgebouwd met A-merk componenten. Offerte binnen 2 werkdagen, duidelijke doorlooptijden en standaard 5 jaar volledige garantie, met opties tot 10 jaar en 24/7 storingsdienst.
We combineren snelheid met kwaliteit, duurzame behuizingen in geopolymeer beton en praktische monitoring- en serviceopties. Of het nu gaat om een zonnepark, snellaadplein, industriële aansluiting of een containeroplossing, wij zorgen voor een nette oplevering en jaren zorgeloos bedrijf.

Wil je schakelen over je project, neem contact op of vraag direct een offerte aan via m2e.nl.

Name: Lagua solaire

Name: SolaX Power NL

GLOBAAL BEREIK
De vertrouwde wereld marktleider te zijn op het gebied van slimme energieoplossingen 

WIE WE ZIJN
Toonaangevende leverancier van zonne-energieoplossingen
Opgericht in 2012 en zijn een nationale hightechonderneming met R&D gedrevenkrachten, die R&D, productie, verkoop en service als één integreert, en sinds de oprichting zijn er meer dan 100 nationale patenten goedgekeurd, waaronder meer dan 30 uitvindingsoctrooien. SolaX-producten hebben tot nu toe meer dan 500 internationale reguliere marktcertificeringen gekregen.

SolaX Power heeft een schone en duurzame toekomst voor ogen, gedreven door zonne-energie. Als 's werelds toonaangevende leverancier van zonne-energieoplossingen en de eerste fabrikant van hybride omvormers in Azië is SolaX in tien jaar tijd uitgegroeid tot een multinational met wereldwijd ruim 2.000 medewerkers. Met het hoofdkantoor in Hangzhou, China en kantoren in Nederland, Duitsland, Groot-Brittannië, Australië, Japan en de VS verkoopt SolaX producten aan meer dan 80 landen.

Name: Biga Hydrogen GmbH
Description:
Fueling the Future with Hydrogen Solutions

Biga Hydrogen is committed to driving the Net-Zero energy transition by investing in and developing hydrogen solutions for industries worldwide. Our expertise spans across green hydrogen projects, renewable energy, and natural gas, enabling us to deliver innovative solutions that support decarbonization and energy transformation.

Our Vision

We believe that electrification, combined with the large-scale production and industrial integration of hydrogen, is the key to a sustainable and carbon-neutral economy. By providing comprehensive hydrogen solutions, we empower industries to transition towards cleaner energy sources.

Headquarters: Eschborn, near Frankfurt, Germany 
Regional Office: Istanbul, Türkiye 
Production Facility: Manisa, Türkiye 

What We Do

 Green Hydrogen Production & Infrastructure
 Industrial Hydrogen Solutions
 Hydrogen Storage & Distribution
 Renewable Energy Integration

Through our expertise and strategic investments, Biga Hydrogen is shaping a cleaner, more sustainable industrial future. Join us in leading the hydrogen revolution!

Name: Renewgy
Description: Renewgy is a professional portable power solutions provider for homes.

Name: ZOE SPAIN
Description:
Shanghai ZOE Energy Storage Technology Co., Ltd - Sucursal España

Somos una empresa líder en tecnología de almacenamiento de energía, con una sólida presencia en el mercado español. Nuestro enfoque se centra en soluciones avanzadas y sostenibles para el almacenamiento de energía, tanto a nivel residencial como comercial.

Nuestra Misión: Ofrecer soluciones energéticas inteligentes que impulsen la transición hacia un futuro más limpio y eficiente. Trabajamos incansablemente para proporcionar sistemas de almacenamiento confiables y escalables que contribuyan al desarrollo sostenible.

Nuestros Servicios:

Almacenamiento Comercial e Industrial: Colaboramos con empresas y fábricas para optimizar su consumo energético y garantizar una fuente confiable de energía.
Integración en la Red Eléctrica: Trabajamos en conjunto con proveedores de energía para estabilizar la red y facilitar la transición hacia fuentes renovables.
Nuestra Tecnología: Utilizamos tecnologías avanzadas, como baterías de iones de litio y LiFePO4, para crear sistemas de almacenamiento seguros y eficientes.

Únete a nosotros en nuestra misión de impulsar un mundo más sostenible y energéticamente inteligente. Conectemos en LinkedIn!

Name: Hyperfuel Labs
Description: At Hyperfuel, we are leading the energy transition by accelerating cutting-edge clean hydrogen production technologies. We develop industrial-scale demonstration facilities to bridge the gap between prototyping and commercialization.

Name: Oekotherm GmbH
Description:
Oekotherm – Ihr Partner für nachhaltige Wärmepumpen-Boiler
Oekotherm steht für effiziente und umweltfreundliche Warmwasserlösungen. Wir vertreiben hochwertige Wärmepumpen-Boiler an Sanitär- und Heizungsinstallateure und setzen auf erneuerbare Energien, um den Energieverbrauch zu senken und die Umwelt zu schonen. Mit innovativer Technologie und zuverlässigem Service unterstützen wir Fachbetriebe dabei, nachhaltige Heizlösungen für ihre Kunden zu realisieren.

Name: Profluxys
Description:
Bij Profluxys zetten we de toon voor de toekomst van elektrisch laden. Als spin-off van Alberic (voorheen Dekimo Kortrijk), combineren we ervaring met innovatie, wat resulteert in onze white-label laadpalen.

Onze laadoplossingen zijn volledig personaliseerbaar naar de wensen van de eindklant, van kleur en logo tot materiaal. Ontdek hoe onze laadpalen uw aanbod als installateur of charge point operator kunnen verrijken.

Name: Greenier ApS
