Name: Intercontinental Wind Energy (IWE)
Description:
Intercontinental Wind Energy (IWE). is located in the Kaohsiung Intercontinental Port Phase I Port 2. We focus on offshore foundations and floaters. Our determined goal is not only pursuing industry excellence, but more importantly, cooperating sustainability. 

Industrial team members with IWE have years of experience in welding in the oil and petrochemical industries, and we take pride in welding thick plates and special materials, which has been recognized by international well-known companies. IWE will combine the advantage of having a Kaohsiung Intercontinental Port Phase I; along with the deep-water, heavy weight quay site, wide hinterland and excellent climate conditions suitable for welding and assembly.

Name: Invason Power Solutions
Description:
Invason Power Solutions is a clean energy technology startup based in Kenya, specializing in the design and manufacturing of reliable inverters, solar installations, and electronics services. We develop energy solutions tailored for homes, businesses, agricultural operations, and off-grid communities.

Our core offering is the local production of durable, efficient, and cost-effective inverters designed to meet the energy demands and conditions across East Africa.

We also provide end-to-end solar and electronics services, including:

>Custom solar and battery system design and installation
>Inverter integration, configuration, and support
>Lithium battery supply and setup
>Smart energy management tools
>Control panel design and embedded systems

Name: I-UPS
Description:
I-UPS aims to build and demonstrate a first-of-a-kind high temperature heat pump, coupled with energy storage and steam generation. 

The project is targeting industrial heat up to 400C. A quarter of global energy demand is industrial heat with nearly 90% of this being produced by non-renewables, generating 40% of global CO2 emissions. 

I-UPS enhances system flexibility and sustainability. This initiative positions Europe as a leader in industrial heat pump solutions, promoting energy efficiency, waste heat recovery, and reduced carbon emissions in the industrial sector. 

The I-UPS project involves a consortium of five key partners from different countries, each contributing their unique expertise to achieve the project's goals. 

The project is coordinated by Kungliga Tekniska Hoegskolan (KTH) from Sweden, which is responsible for overall project management, research, and technology development. 

Enerin AS and Kyoto Group AS, both from Norway, play crucial roles in the development and validation phases of the project. Enerin AS leads the work package focused on developing and adapting the high-temperature heat pump, leveraging their expertise in advanced thermal systems. Kyoto Group AS is responsible for the validation campaign of the integrated I-UPS solution, ensuring that the system works efficiently and reliably in real-world industrial settings. 

Università degli Studi di Genova (UNIGE) from Italy and RPOW Consulting SL from Spain. UNIGE contributes to research and technology development, focusing on the optimization of heat pump components and integration strategies. Their role is vital for ensuring that the heat pump operates efficiently and can be seamlessly integrated into existing industrial processes. RPOW Consulting SL provides consulting services, supporting the techno-economic analysis and market integration strategies.

Zapewniamy kompleksowe wsparcie inwestorów – od analizy profilu zużycia energii i opracowania koncepcji technicznej, przez dobór technologii, aż po integrację z istniejącą infrastrukturą energetyczną oraz serwis. Dostarczane przez nas rozwiązania są modułowe, skalowalne i w pełni dostosowane do indywidualnych wymagań technicznych oraz specyfiki energetycznej inwestora.

Name: PYRAH2 Project
Description:
The PYRAH2 project tackles Europe’s need for sustainable and cost-effective hydrogen and carbon-based products, amid climate change and increasing energy demand. Existing hydrogen production methods — like steam methane reforming, coal gasification, and water electrolysis — depend on fossil fuels or are too costly and energy-intensive, and none recover solid carbon as a valuable coproduct.

PYRAH2 offers an integrated platform that converts biogenic waste and renewable gases into high-purity hydrogen and solid carbon through a four-stage process: autothermal gasification and syngas conditioning, syngas biomethanation, CO2 separation, and plasma-assisted methane pyrolysis. This process transforms diverse organic waste into bioproducts and carbon-negative energy carriers, surpassing current technologies.
 
The project is supported by the Clean Hydrogen Partnership and its members and co-founded by the European Union under Grant Agreement nº 101251342.

Wie das funktioniert? Unsere smarten Leuchten schalten sich automatisch ein und aus - je nachdem, in welchem Hallenabschnitt sich Menschen oder AGVs bewegen. Der Bewegungssensor zeichnet die Aktivitäten im jeweiligen Hallenbereich auf und leuchtet aktiv genutzte Bereiche gleichmäßig aus.

In jeder Leuchte befindet sich außerdem  ein Sensor, der Daten zum CO2-Gehalt in der Luft, der Frequenz der Aktivität und Einschaltzeiten je Hallenbereich sammelt.  Diese werden auf unserem interaktiven Dashboard übersichtlich zusammengestellt - so habt ihr eure Beleuchtung immer im Blick und könnt live verfolgen, wie viel ihr spart.

Name: Chargeit
Description:
Chargeit är en nytänkande leverantör av elbilsladdning i Sverige. Vi fokuserar på att skapa en hållbar framtid genom att etablera och drifta ladd-hubbar runtom i landet. Vårt mål är att göra det enkelt och tillgängligt för alla att ladda sina elbilar, oavsett var de befinner sig.

Vi erbjuder ett komplett utbud av tjänster för fastighetsägare och bostadsrättsföreningar. Genom att tillhandahålla och underhålla laddstationer säkerställer vi att våra kunder alltid har tillgång till pålitlig och effektiv laddning. Våra lösningar är skräddarsydda för att möta behoven hos varje kund, från mindre installationer till större laddinfrastrukturer.

Vår expertis sträcker sig över hela kedjan av elbilsladdning, från planering och installation till drift och underhåll. Vi använder den senaste teknologin från Parkit för att säkerställa att våra laddstationer är så effektiva och användarvänliga som möjligt. Vår kundsupport är alltid tillgänglig för att lösa eventuella problem och säkerställa en smidig användarupplevelse.

Chargeit är mer än bara en tjänsteleverantör; vi är en partner i övergången till en grönare framtid. Vi arbetar nära våra kunder för att förstå deras specifika behov och utveckla lösningar som inte bara möter dessa behov, utan också bidrar till en hållbar utveckling. Vår vision är att göra elbilsladdning lika enkelt som att tanka en konventionell bil, och att bidra till att Sverige blir ledande inom grön transport.

Med Chargeit kan du vara säker på att du får en pålitlig, effektiv och framtidssäker lösning för dina laddbehov. Vi är dedikerade till att leverera högkvalitativa tjänster och att alltid sätta våra kunders behov i första rummet. Tillsammans kan vi skapa en mer hållbar och miljövänlig framtid.

Green methanol serves as the energy carrier; it can be refueled just like diesel, allowing the use of any existing fuel station. A conversion costs only 6,000 CHF per pump. Interest is enormous from both logistics companies and fuel station operators. Incidentally, the green methanol is converted into green hydrogen in the vehicle. Using the same principle, we also build self-charging CO2-neutral gen sets and emergency power units to replace diesel-based CO2 emitters!

Unsere Technologien sind mehr als Produkte – sie sind ein aktiver Beitrag zur Wärmewende. Ob Einfamilienhaus, Quartier oder Industrieanlage: Wir bieten modulare Systemlösungen, die sich flexibel mit regenerativen Energiequellen kombinieren lassen und höchste Effizienz sowie Betriebssicherheit garantieren.

 Unsere Stärken im Überblick:
+ Wärmepumpen mit natürlichem Kältemittel R290
+ Elektrische Heizsysteme, Lüftung & Warmwasserlösungen
+ Hydrauliklösungen & Plug & Play-Container für schnelle Integration
+ Smarte Steuerung via Dimplex Home App & Masterregler
+ Serviceportal mit Remote Monitoring & bis zu 10 Jahren Garantie

 Für Planer, Architekten & Projektentwickler: Wir begleiten Sie von der ersten Idee bis zur erfolgreichen Inbetriebnahme – mit digitalen Planungstools, BIM-Integration, persönlicher Beratung und praxisnahen Schulungen im Dimplex Forum.

 Nachhaltigkeit im Fokus: Unsere Systeme nutzen die Energie aus Luft, Wasser, Erde – und sogar aus Abwasser oder industrieller Abwärme und arbeiten mit grünem Strom nahezu klimaneutral. So gestalten wir gemeinsam mit Ihnen eine lebenswerte Zukunft.

 Partnerschaftlich denken. Zukunft gestalten. Dimplex steht für echte Zusammenarbeit auf Augenhöhe – transparent, lösungsorientiert und immer mit dem Ziel, Ihr Projekt zum Erfolg zu führen.

 Standort:
Hauptstraße 71
5302 Henndorf am Wallersee
 www.dimplex.eu

Name: GALMOBILE Ltd.
Description:
A world leader in mobile water treatment solutions. GALMOBILE Ltd. is a technology development company with over 30 years of experience in advanced water treatment projects.

Its modular, fully automatic systems produce and purify drinking water directly at the point of need — independent of external power or pipelines.
GALMOBILE’s proven technology, trusted by governments and organizations worldwide, combines innovation, reliability, and speed to ensure safe water access anytime, anywhere.

Name: S-Platform

By collaborating closely with project developers and EPCs, we deliver not only top-tier renewable energy solutions and power systems but also reliable logistics support through our warehouses in key locations, including California, Texas, Georgia, and New Jersey, to ensure that our customers benefit from streamlined logistics and efficient storage services across the U.S.

At S-Platform, we take pride in our multi-faceted and customer-focused approach, aiming to contribute to the growth and success of our customers.

Name: Varmeks Heat Pumps
Description:

As part of the Solimpeks Group, we combine energy efficiency, eco-friendly solutions, and comfort—offering high-quality products for all heating and cooling needs, from residential buildings to industrial facilities.

By managing the entire process in our own production facilities, we guarantee quality all the way to the end user.

Name: Stark House
Description:
Jesteśmy producentem wiat fotowoltaicznych, które pozwalają zarabiać na przestrzeni parkingowej 

Stare japońskie przysłowie mówi: „Kto planuje na rok, ten sadzi ryż. Kto planuje na 10 lat, ten sadzi drzewa. Kto planuje na 100 lat, ten edukuje”.

W Stark House pokrywamy wszystkie 3 obszary:
 bieżącą pracę planujemy na rok do przodu – ale w biznesie rok to bardzo mało,
 na 10 lat snujemy coraz ambitniejsze plany,
 na 100 lat mamy wizję kraju, który efektywnie wykorzystuje zieloną energię, i przoduje pod tym względem.

Stark House jest jak Tesla branży OZE w Europie. 
Patrzymy w przyszłość i wyznaczamy trendy.

Elon Musk nie zastanawiał się:
 czy warto produkować samochody elektryczne,
 czy pokrycie nieba nad Ziemią Starlinkami to dobry pomysł,
 czy opłaca się zbudować rakietę kosmiczną zdolną do powtarzalnych startów,
 czy zakup 10 000 kart graficznych NVidii po 200 tys. za sztukę to dobry interes.

On wiedział, że:
 paliwa kopalne prędzej czy później się skończą,
 Internet jest podstawą, a Starlink da mu niezależność,
 koszt jednego rejsu kosmicznego to 1,5 mld $,
 AI to przyszłość i potrzebuje mocy obliczeniowych.

Musk nie zastanawia się, co jest możliwe.
On o tym decyduje.

Tak samo Artur Szenawa w 2011 roku wiedział, że energia odnawialna w Polsce to przyszłość, choć mało kto w to wierzył.

Ta przyszłość jest dzisiaj.
Stark House ją współtworzy.

Panele fotowoltaiczne nie wszędzie można stawiać. 
Nie wszędzie warto.
Ale carporty? 
Wystarczy kawałek płaskiej powierzchni.

W 2021 r. w Polsce było:
 ponad 25 500 firm zatrudniających ponad 250 osób,
 ponad 90 000 firm zatrudniających od 50 do 249 osób.

To jednak nie wszystko. 
Jest jeszcze:
 2478 gmin,
 335 miast powiatowych,
 16 miast wojewódzkich,
 425 urzędów skarbowych,
 43 oddziały ZUS,
 7500 placówek Poczty Polskiej.

Każde z nich ma parking.
Każde płaci za prąd.

Każde może zarobić 

 Chcesz wiedzieć, jak możesz zarobić na swoim parkingu?
Skontaktuj się z nami.

Name: Backyard Marketplace
Description: At Backyard Marketplace, we believe outdoor spaces should be beautiful, functional, and sustainable. As a veteran-owned business, we supply eco-friendly outdoor solutions — from solar lighting and rainwater harvesting to emergency preparedness kits — for homeowners, businesses, and government projects. Our mission is to help communities enjoy the outdoors while embracing energy efficiency and environmental responsibility.

Name: B & K Solare Zukunft
Description:
B & K Solare Zukunft GmbH ist Entwickler und Hersteller von Unterkonstruktionen jeglicher Größenordnung für Aufdach-Photovoltaikanlagen, Freiflächen-PV und Parkplatz-Solaranlagen.
Spezialisiert sind wir besonders auf aerodynamische Flachdach-PV-Montagesysteme. Mit unserem IROC System sind wir aber nicht nur auf Flachdächer fixiert. Auch für die Installation einer Photovoltaikanlage auf Trapezblechdächern, Schrägdächern, Freiflächen oder Parkplätzen haben wir für Sie die perfekte PV-Unterkonstruktion. Gerne entwickeln wir auch mit Ihnen Sonderlösungen für Ihr spezielles Dach oder Gelände.
Darüber hinaus verfügen wir über sehr viel Erfahrung im Anlagenbau. Diese Dienstleistung wird von unseren Kunden sehr geschätzt und rundet unser Angebotsspektrum ab. Wir setzen uns mit einem Mehrwert von dienstleistungsorientiertem Service und langjähriger Erfahrung im Bereich PV-Montagesysteme ab. Bei der Umsetzung steht für uns die Perfektion von durchdachten Lösungen im Vordergrund sowie die schnelle Liefer- und Reaktionszeit. Unser Team besticht durch Sympathie und ein familiäres Arbeitsklima. Dieses spiegelt sich im Umgang mit unseren Kunden wieder.

Name: Norsk Biogass AS
Description:
Norsk Biogass AS is an R&D company that develops products and services for the "waste to energy" market. Norsk Biogass is the creator of BioSep separation technology and the BioPrePlant process which specialize in pre-treatment of waste materials. BioSep is a unique, award winning technology that enables efficient separation of organic materials from plastics and various other packaging materials from the existing waste streams. The finished product from this process is high quality biomass that is suitable for Anaerobic Digestion in connection with Biogas production. Since its inception, the company has delivered single separation units and processing lines to multiple plants throughout Scandinavia. As part of the Polar Metal Group, Norsk Biogass also supplies solutions for pre-treatment of selected dry waste streams. 

Our business values and ideas are to provide first class treatment technology to customers both in the private and public sectors helping both to achieve secure operational stability and reasonable OPEX and ROI. 

We strongly believe that our technologies play a significant role within the Circular Economy and contribute towards The Green Shift.

Name: CONEXIM PHENAE Solutions
Description: PHENAE Solutions est spécialisée dans la recherche et l'origination de projets d'énergies renouvelables. Ces derniers étant toujours adossés à une opération immobilière ou foncière (location ou vente), la société a adopté en 2024 le statut d'agence immobilière pour garantir une sécurité et une couverture assurancielle supérieure aux opérations qu'elle gère. Sa division CONEXIM reprend en 2025 le développement d'une activité de transaction immobilière classique (entreprise, habitation) dans laquelle ses dirigeants cumulent en famille plus de 40 ans d'expérience, sous cette marque commerciale. PHENAE Solutions, présidée par Jean-Yves Leber, est une filiale de MULTIPLIANCE.

Name: JA Solar India
Description: Founded in 2005, JA Solar is a manufacturer of high-performance photovoltaic products. With multiple manufacturing bases and 16 sales subsidiaries around the world, the company's business covers silicon wafers, cells, modules and photovoltaic power stations. JA Solar products are available in 178 countries and regions and are used extensively in ground-mounted power plants, commercial & industrial rooftop PV systems and residential rooftop PV systems. By the end of Q1 2025, the cumulative shipment of JA Solar reached 280GW. With its advantages of continuous technological innovation, sound financial performance, and well-established global sales and service networks, JA Solar has been well received and highly recognized by customers from home and abroad. The company has been listed on Fortune China 500 and Global Top 500 New Energy Enterprises for several consecutive years.

Name: ZAPS Batteries
Description:
Zaps Batteries was founded in 2005 with the main activity of importing and trading electric batteries. Driven by our expectation of prompt and efficient service to your requests we have managed to cover a wide range of options in car, truck/heavy duty, motorcycle, boat etc. batteries. The aim of our company is the continuous development and evolution in accordance with the dictates of current technology and the requirements of modern trade, constantly incorporating new products, such as batteries for photovoltaic/wind systems, electric trucks, military tanks and vehicles, electric hoists, professional electric cleaning systems, golf carts, electric wheelchairs, electric pallet trucks, UPS, alarm systems, etc. We offer, through a wide range of products, complete solutions for professionals and individuals.

Our company has managed over the years, in a constantly developing technological sector, to live up to market expectations by thoroughly training its staff in accordance with the latest technological practices applied to all types of accumulators. Our basic philosophy is the continuous education and training of our staff, administrative and technical, with the ultimate goal of offering the most advantageous and comprehensive solution to meet your needs.

In a fairly short period of time, we managed to develop strong bonds of trust with our partners throughout Greece, leading in this way to our expansion in the Balkans and Cyprus.

The company, possessed by a high sense of responsibility, could not overlook the major issue of environmental protection. In cooperation with competent recycling companies, we contribute to the preservation of our natural wealth.

The vision and goal of our company was and remains the provision of high quality products and services, the constant upgrading of our equipment, the search for ever newer products to expand not only our range but also our activity in new markets with significant growth prospects.

Name: Bundesverband Kalte Wärmenetze e.V.
Description:
Die Zukunft der Wärme ist kalt – und kommunal.

Wir sind die bundesweite Plattform für alle, die an der Umsetzung einer zukunftsfähigen Wärmeversorgung arbeiten – praxisnah, kommunal und technologieoffen.
Unsere Mission: Die flächendeckende Realisierung kalter Wärmenetze in Deutschland.

Kalte Wärmenetze bieten als bidirektionale, erneuerbare Niedertemperatursysteme eine intelligente Antwort auf die Herausforderungen der Wärmewende. Sie ermöglichen lokale Versorgung mit Wärme und Kälte, integrieren Umwelt- und Abwärme-Energie, kombinieren Speicher und Sektorkopplung – und sie sind heute schon wirtschaftlich umsetzbar.

Unsere Zielgruppe sind die Umsetzer:innen: Kommunen, Energieversorger, Stadtwerke, Genossenschaften und Fachplaner. Für sie bauen wir ein Kompetenzzentrum, das Wissen bündelt, politische und technische Hürden adressiert, Rahmenbedingungen verbessert und konkrete Umsetzung unterstützt.

Unsere Vision ist ein Deutschland, in dem kalte Wärmenetze als Schlüsseltechnologie der Wärmewende selbstverständlich verankert sind – nicht als Ausnahme, sondern als Standard.

#Wärmewende #KalteWärmenetze #KommunaleEnergiewende #Dekarbonisierung #ZukunftWärme #EnergiewendeLokal

Name: Growatt Magyarország
Description:
A Growatt-ot 2011-ben alapította a globális fotovillamos ipar úttörőinek csoportja azzal a céllal, hogy egy zöld és fenntartható jövőt építsen. Egy évtizeden belül a vállalat rendkívüli termékminőségének és szolgáltatásainak köszönhetően gyorsan a világ vezető elosztott energiamegoldás-szolgáltatójává nőtte ki magát.

Az S&P Global Commodity Insights és a Wood Mackenzie szerint a Growatt ma már a világ első számú lakossági inverterszállítója, valamint a világ négy legnagyobb PV inverterek és tároló hibrid inverterek beszállítója közé tartozik. Ezenkívül az EUPD Research felmérései és elemzései szerint a Growatt a szoláris inverterek és az energiatárolás globális piacain a vásárlók vezető márkaként ismerték el.

Annak érdekében, hogy az ügyfeleket környezetbarát és fenntartható életmódra ösztönözze a minden forgatókönyvet átfogó dekarbonizációs eszközökkel, a vállalat széles termék- és megoldásportfóliót kínál, beleértve a fotovoltaikus invertereket, az energiatároló rendszereket, az elektromos járművek töltőit és az intelligens energiagazdálkodási megoldásokat. K+F csapata folyamatosan termék- és technológiai innovációkat hoz, hogy megváltoztassa az otthonok és a vállalkozások energiaellátását, és folyamatosan új fejlesztéseket és innovációkat vezet be az energiahatékonyság, a funkcionális biztonság és az intelligens menedzsment terén.

A mai napig családok és vállalkozások milliói használják szerte a világon a Growatt minden forgatókönyvet átfogó termékeit és megoldásait otthonaik és létesítményeik energiaellátására. Globális szervizhálózata mellett a vállalat több ezer helyi partnerrel dolgozik együtt, hogy robusztus elosztási és logisztikai hálózatokat hozzon létre, amelyek kényelmes hozzáférést biztosítanak fejlett termékportfólióihoz a globális ügyfelek számára.

Name: Amperfy
Description:
At Amperfy, we're on a mission to redefine residential energy systems by integrating all the vital energy conversion components in a smart, connected and autonomous system.

Our integrated energy systems embody the perfect fusion of cutting-edge technology and elegant design, allowing homeowners to unleash the true potential of their solar panels and battery storage. With seamless integration, our solutions enable homeowners to effortlessly tap into clean energy, embracing a greener lifestyle like never before.

But we don't stop there. We've reimagined electric vehicles as more than just transportation. Our groundbreaking approach leverages EVs as energy storage units, revolutionizing the way homeowners utilize their vehicles. By seamlessly integrating them into our systems, we unlock a new level of efficiency and affordability, transforming EVs into powerful contributors to a sustainable energy ecosystem.

Furthermore, we're paving the way for the future of energy consumption. Our systems autonomously make informed decisions based on machine learning algorithms, optimizing energy usage and balancing the grid's demands. This not only empowers homeowners to reduce their energy bills but also plays a vital role in maintaining a stable and sustainable energy infrastructure.

Join us at Amperfy as we redefine what's possible in the world of energy. Together, we can create a sustainable future, where intelligent technologies seamlessly integrate into our lives and empower homes and communities to make a positive impact on the planet.

Name: Sunsynk ES
Description:
Fundada hace más de 20 años, Sunsynk es una marca reconocida internacionalmente en inversores y almacenamiento de baterías.
Sunsynk es una marca registrada en más de 40 países y cuenta con la confianza de clientes en todo el mundo.

Los productos de Sunsynk son líderes mundiales en almacenamiento y gestión de energía.

Name: Sun Pro Energy - Fotowoltaika
Description:
Realizujemy instalacje fotowoltaiczne, farmy fotowoltaiczne, ładowarki do samochodów, kotły elektryczne, klimatyzatory, pompy ciepła  najnowszych generacji dla gospodarstw domowych, firm i rolników. Działamy w całej Polsce.
Nasze systemy fotowoltaiczne są zaprojektowane na dziesięciolecia bezawaryjnego działania – stosujemy w nich tylko najlepsze panele słoneczne, falowniki i komponenty, tak aby nasi klienci mogli się cieszyć darmowym prądem ze słońca przez pokolenia.

Elektrownie słoneczne Sun Pro Energy są realizowane kompleksowo – od profesjonalnego projektu technicznego, dostarczenie i montaż najwyższej klasy urządzeń, finansowanie instalacji fotowoltaicznej oraz przyłączenie elektrowni fotowoltaicznej do sieci.

Name: Intrinsic Power, Inc.
Description: The power grid cannot support our baseline growth, even before accounting for the electrify-everything and AI movements. Building-level energy independence is needed to support the required growth and isolate building owners from surging energy prices and ever-increasing outages.  Intrinsic Power is delivering that building-level energy independence through AI driven power management systems with energy on board.

Name: Voltmasters
Description:
Voltmasters delivers next-generation Energy Management Systems (EMS) that enable companies to turn their energy infrastructure into a strategic asset. Our EMS is the “brain” that orchestrates batteries, solar, EV chargers, loads, and grid interaction, fully automated, data-driven, and built for performance.

Designed for real-world industrial environments, the Voltmasters EMS combines forecasting, optimization algorithms, and live operational control to maximize value from every kilowatt.

Our EMS delivers:

 Smart Self-Supply Optimization
Use real-time PV production, consumption patterns, and battery capacity to minimize grid imports.

 Dynamic Price-Driven Control
Automated charging/discharging based on day-ahead and intraday electricity prices, including negative price protection.

 Advanced PV Forecasting & Curtailment
AI-enhanced forecasting and automatic PV curtailment during low or negative price events or when grid constraints require it.

 Operational Continuity & Risk Detection
Incident detection, automated alerts, performance diagnostics, and recommended actions to avoid downtime.

 Battery Intelligence
State-of-charge optimization, periodic calibrations, lifetime-aware operation, and integration with leading industrial ESS manufacturers.

 Fully Integrated Asset Control
One platform to manage batteries, solar, loads, meters, sensors, and energy KPIs, from site level to multi-site portfolios.

Our EMS runs on a powerful industrial controller and is engineered for reliability, scalability, and seamless deployment in complex industrial setups.

Voltmasters partners with businesses that want more than hardware, they want energy intelligence, cost reduction, resilience, and measurable ROI.

Name: V-TAC - Spain
Description:
V-TAC España es la filial española de V-TAC West Europe. En la industria de productos de iluminación somos uno de los líderes en el mercado europeo. 

Utilizamos tecnología LED moderna, de bajo consumo y respetuosa con el medio ambiente, y llegamos a España con nuestras baterías e inversores solares.

Estamos situados en más de 70 países y contamos con oficinas en lugares clave como Dubái, Londres, Sofía, Hong Kong e Irlanda, con una cartera de más de 4.500 productos en iluminación LED, energía solar, tecnología smart Home y electrónica avanzada.

La confianza de la que gozamos entre los profesionales queda demostrada por el hecho de que, junto a Samsung, ofrecemos más de 1.000 productos con 5 años de garantía.

Te invitamos a ver conocernos! Podrás aprender más sobre nuestros productos y sobre nosotros mismos.

Si tiene alguna pregunta, siempre estamos disponibles para ti en: vtacspain@gmail.com

Name: Sybac On Power GmbH
Description:
Die seit 2004 tätige Sybac on Power GmbH ist auf Planung, Finanzierung, Bau und Inbetriebnahme gewerblicher Photovoltaik-Freiflächen und Dachanlagen spezialisiert. Das Engineering am Hauptsitz in Kehrig (Rheinland-Pfalz) unterstützt die weltweiten Produktionskapazitäten mit 700 MWp nachhaltig erzeugtem Solarstrom. Zu den Kernkompetenzen des zum trierischen PV-Projektierer WI Energy gehörenden Tochterunternehmens zählt die komplette Prozesskette zur Errichtung von Photovoltaik-Anlagen – von der Entwicklung und Fertigung über die Qualitätssicherung bis hin zu Vertrieb und Service. Um Akzeptanz für die umweltfreundliche Generierung grünen Stroms zu erlangen, bindet Sybac die lokale Bevölkerung und unterschiedliche Interessensgruppen aufmerksam mit ein.
Weitere Informationen finden Sie unter www.sybac.com

Name: Cellgrid Energy Private Limited
Description: New-age energy storage solutions to cater the renewable grid-scale energy storage market and also power traditional EVs, heavy-loaded vehicles, home inverters, portable electronics, etc.

Name: TerraFerno Geothermal Solutions
Description: At TerraFerno, our primary objective is to improve the economics of geothermal energy and maximize the ROI for geothermal operators. To accomplish this mission, we're at the forefront of advancing geothermal downhole completions and production tools. We lead with innovation, pioneering cutting-edge flow control devices, well integrity tools, and downhole monitoring systems specifically designed for high-temperature (300C/572F) and ultra-high-temperature (500C/932F) environments. Our comprehensive solutions are crafted to meet the needs of conventional, enhanced, and advanced geothermal systems, with a primary focus on maximizing energy recovery, validating performance, addressing operational challenges, and reducing costs by facilitating the scalable implementation of improved well designs. Choose TerraFerno for groundbreaking, tailored solutions instrumental in propelling geothermal into a dominant energy source. Connect with us to explore more about our cutting-edge technologies!

Name: Econg Charger
Description:
Welcome to ECONG, the foremost B2B supplier of innovative Electric Vehicle (EV) charging solutions, catering to the unique needs of distributors, brand owners, installers, and other professionals seeking to build their EV charging businesses. As the world advances towards sustainable and environmentally friendly transportation, we are committed to providing cutting-edge EV charging products and OEM/ODM services to our partners globally.

Our extensive range of high-quality EV charging products includes residential EV chargers, commercial EV chargers, EV cables, and EV adapters. At ECONG, we understand the distinct requirements and challenges faced by our clients in the fast-growing EV market. Our solutions are designed to empower businesses and organizations to provide electric vehicle owners with convenient and reliable charging options.

Innovation, reliability, and customer satisfaction lie at the heart of our values. Our team of experienced professionals works tirelessly to source, develop, and manufacture the most advanced and efficient EV charging products available. Through continuous improvement, we stay at the forefront of the rapidly evolving EV charging landscape.

ECONG specializes in offering tailored OEM/ODM services to our business partners. Our flexible and customizable solutions enable clients to develop their own branded EV charging products, providing them with a competitive edge in the market.

At ECONG, we believe that a greener future begins by enabling businesses and organizations to deliver accessible and dependable EV charging solutions to electric vehicle owners around the world. Partner with us, and together let's pave the way for a sustainable and eco-friendly future.

Name: Arbon Cleantech
Description:
Arbon is a cleantech company with capabilities in designing and manufacturing of solar systems and related accessories. 

Currently, Arbon operates a 5 GW fully automated smart manufacturing facility for Solar PV Junction Box in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu. Through this facility, we produce our flagship Junction Box Model - ACT 9x Plus.

Junction Box in a solar panel ensures conduction of the current generated by the cells and more importantly, ensures protection of the solar module by bypassing current from a shadowed section. It uses Bypass Diodes to isolate an abnormal section of the module and ensure the remaining of the cells continue to contribute to power generation, hence also playing a critical role in the PLF efficiency of a solar power system.

We, at Arbon, understand this criticality of a Junction Box and work with latest design technologies, high quality materials and automated production processes, with high safety margins built-in. Quality Control is ensured through internal dedicated QC Lab and external third-party validation.

We have inked technical collaborations and supply agreements with some of the leading players in this field to bring to our customers the best-in-class technology and product.

Based on continuous innovation and focused R&D, our high-quality products keep raising the bar on renewable power generation – by enabling next-generation technology to optimise performance of solar energy systems.

Arbon’s technological and manufacturing leadership in solar products underscores our commitment to helping accelerate the clean energy transition.

DESIRED
Description:
DESIRED is a high-risk high-return project, focused on establishing the technological feasibility and sustainability of a novel fuel production system – the DESIRED system – for direct coprocessing of, possibly atmospheric,
CO2 and water to produce multi-carbon (C2+) energy-rich products using sunlight as primary energy source. The DESIRED system will produce C2+ solar fuels (without overlooking C1 species such as methanol or methane) by direct coprocessing of CO2 and water using novel and recyclable hybrid photo-electrocatalysts, supported on frustules or zeolites, in an innovative photoreactor design applying, for the first time, oscillatory flow principles, combined with direct light irradiation.

Name: Demir Enerji
Description:
Demir Enerji, yenilenebilir enerji kaynaklarından enerji üretimi alanında uzman kadrosuyla, yurtiçi ve yurtdışında yatırımlar yapmayı amaçlayan merkezi İstanbul‘da yer alan bir enerji şirketidir. 
40 Yıllık köklü geçmişi ile Türkiye’nin önemli gruplarından biri olan ‘Demir Grup’ bünyesinde faaliyet gösteren Demir Enerji, Sivas Demirağ Organize Sanayi Bölgesi’nde 35.000m2 kapalı alanda 2024 ikinci çeyreğinde güneş paneli üretimine başlayacaktır.
Demir Enerji, bu tesisinde yıllık 500 MW kapasiteli Fotovoltaik Güneş Paneli üretimi gerçekleştirecek ve N-Type TOPCon teknolojisini kullanılarak yüksek verimli güneş panelleri üretecektir. 
Sürdürülebilirlik kavramını istihdam sağladığı her sektörde benimsemiş olan Demir Grup bünyesinde yer alan Demir Enerji ile geleceğin enerji ihtiyaçlarına bütünleşik bir yaklaşım ile bakmakta; sadece Fotovoltaik Güneş Paneli üretimi değil, enerji depolama ve iletimine yönelik kablo üretim tesislerini hayata geçirmek için de yatırımlarını planlamaktadır.

Vizyonumuz; Teknolojik gelişmeleri yakinen takip eden, yenilikçi, akılcı ve ilkeli bir yaklaşımla yurt içi ve yurt dışında doğru zamanda, doğru yerde ve doğru projelerle yer alan lider enerji şirketi olmak.

Misyonumuz; Yenilenebilir enerji kaynaklarını kullandığımız çevre dostu yatırımlarımız ile insan ve topluma faydalı olmak, paydaşlarımız için doğru ve güvenilir yatırım fırsatları sunarken, müşterilerimiz için koşulsuz memnuniyet sağlayan bir kurum olmaktır.

Name: Biotecnogas
Description:
At BioTecnoGas, we specialize in crafting and implementing bespoke systems for the treatment of landfill biogas, transforming it into high-energy renewable natural gas-commonly referred to as biomethane.

Unmanaged methane represents a major environmental and regulatory challenge. Its high global warming potential makes it a focus of attention for governments, companies, and international bodies. Reducing its impact is no longer an option, but a necessity.
 
Without the right technology, the risks of inefficiency, economic losses and penalties increase, but with our custom-engineered solutions for biogas capture and conversion-perfected over two decades of relentless innovation and technical refinement-our clients made major strides in environmental sustainability. 

Every plant we build is fully automated and operates continuously, 24/7, under intelligent remote monitoring systems. The outcome? Premium-grade biomethane, ready for a wide range of applications, including energy generation.
With 133 high-performance combustion units and 25 installations aligned with the Kyoto Protocol, our technology has played a pivotal role in slashing nearly 21 million tons of CO₂ equivalent emissions.

Our plants span mainly across Europe (40) and South America (94) , but we also managed projects in Africa and Asia—consistently delivering positive ecological results and meeting global compliance standards through exceptional quality and efficiency.

This extensive experience across national and international markets equips us with the know-how to guide you with strategic insights. We channel this expertise into helping you explore investment avenues and make well-grounded technical choices, through detailed on-site evaluations and comprehensive theoretical studies that determine project viability.

Let us be your partner in building a cleaner, more prosperous future - contact us: biotecnogas@biotecnogas.com

Name: Talos Industry Corp.
Description:
In the aerodynamic field, different shapes have different aerodynamic characteristics.
All traditional horizontal wind turbines have the same shape and performance, indicating that the design tools and methods of traditional wind turbine have been standardized. 
All vertical wind turbines have different shapes, and their performances are completely different or huge different. It shows that the traditional design tools and methods can't be applied to vertical wind turbine. An innovative design method and tools are required.
Aerodynamic is an experimental science, all excellent design results come from the "trial-error"
Talos has two types of products. One is only one that meets the commercial standard vertical wind turbine (VAWT) in the world. More than 3000 different models vertical wind turbines installed in different geographic environment in 60 countries, such as cold area of Alaska, desert and high temperature area of Saudi Arabia, on the mountaintop top of 4000m in Tajikistan etc. 
Other product is next generation wind turbine such as Super Turbine and Air-water turbine. 
Super Turbine is a modular & combined wind turbine with very low power generation cost. Its power generation cost is less than $1 cent/kwh at average wind speed 6.5m/s wind farm. It is next generation wind turbine.
Air-Water Turbine is a dedicated compressed air turbine which can be used in the compressed air storage energy industry for peak shaving. Its cost is less than 1/5th compared to a steam turbine with the same capacity, but its comprehensive efficiency can reach 99.9% from air to air. It can be parallel-connected & consists of a big storage energy station.

Nosso compromisso é oferecer uma experiência diferenciada, garantindo excelência no atendimento e nas soluções entregues.

Somos uma empresa séria e comprometida, cientes dos desafios do mercado e das dificuldades enfrentadas por nossos clientes. Por isso, estamos sempre abertos a sugestões e críticas construtivas, buscando evoluir continuamente. Name: Ceramic-Cells
Description:
Ceramic Cells was founded by Professor Zhongliang Zhan’s team from the University of Science and Technology of China. The company focuses on the R&D and manufacturing of solid oxide electrolysis cell (SOEC) stacks for hydrogen production, aiming to develop world-class stacks with fully independent intellectual property and accelerate their industrial application.

On June 28, 2024, Ceramic Cells launched its self-developed SOEC‑CH₄ stack, based on advanced SOEC technology. The system uses biomethane, steam, and renewable electricity to produce high-purity green hydrogen and self-enriched CO₂, which can be directly used as feedstock for downstream synthesis of green fuels such as SAF and green methanol, effectively addressing the cost barrier of feedstock supply.
The process delivers 1 Nm³ of H₂ and 0.25 Nm³ of CO₂ with just 1 kWh of electricity and 0.25 Nm³ of CH₄ consumed.

Name: Sunrise CSP Pty Ltd

Our core technologies are the Big Dish solar concentrator and its complementary technologies, which include:

-  Laminated Solar Mirror Panels (SMP) that deliver high optical performance and low lifecycle costs;

-  A molten salt based solar energy storage and transport system SUMO for on-demand and time extended energy delivery; and

-  An onsite manufacturing and deployment system for Big Dish solar fields, the Factory-in-the-Field (FiF) that maximises local manufacturing and supply opportunities.

These technologies can be deployed in stand-alone or grid-integrated solar power projects, with or without storage, or hybridised with gas, oil or other fuels to deliver dispatchable power generation and industrial process heat solutions.

Name: Oiltek International Limited
Description:
Oiltek International Limited is an established integrated process technology and renewable energy solutions provider, specialises in the provision of reliable, innovative, diversified, and comprehensive range of refinery processes and engineering solutions for use across all different sectors of the vegetable oils industry value chain globally. The history of the Group can be traced back to its principal operating subsidiary, Oiltek Sdn. Bhd., which was incorporated in Malaysia on 1 December 1980.

With over 43 years of track record, Oiltek has successfully designed, built and commercialized plants in more than 33 countries across 5 continents. The Group operates three key businesses – Edible & Non-Edible Oil Refinery, Renewable Energy, and Product Sales and Trading.

For its Edible & Non-Edible Oil Refinery segment, the Group provides engineering, procurement, designing, construction and commissioning (“EPCC”) services for edible and non-edible oil refining plants, downstream specialty products and processing plants; upgrading and retrofitting of existing facilities; and turnkey inside-battery-limits (“ISBL”) and outside-battery-limits (“OSBL”) infrastructure engineering.

For the Group’s Renewable Energy segment, Oiltek provides services for renewable energy industries including EPCC of multi-feedstock biodiesel, enzymatic biodiesel, winter fuel, and palm oil mill effluent (“POME”) biogas methane recovery plants; upgrading and retrofitting of existing facilities; and turnkey ISBL and OSBL infrastructure engineering which includes environmental solutions and integration into steam and power generation.

Oiltek’s Product Sales and Trading segment generates recurring income for the Group, and its services include engineering component sales, agency and distributorship, and specialty chemical product trading.

Name: Linkz ESS
Description:
"Linkz ESS: Empowering the Future of Energy Storage Solutions"

Introduction:
In the rapidly evolving landscape of energy production and consumption, the integration of Energy Storage Systems (ESS) is becoming increasingly vital. Linkz ESS aims to be at the forefront of this transformative journey by revolutionizing how we harness and distribute energy. Our vision is to create an interconnected network of smart ESS units that not only store excess energy efficiently but also contribute to the growth of renewable energy sources. Here's an idea of how Linkz ESS can shape the future of ESS and new energy:

Key Components:

Advanced Battery Technology: Utilize cutting-edge battery technology, such as solid-state batteries, to improve energy density, charging/discharging efficiency, and overall system longevity. These innovations will enable rapid energy storage and release when needed, reducing waste and increasing overall system reliability.

Decentralized Network: Establish a decentralized network of ESS units that can be deployed at various scales - from residential homes to industrial facilities. These units will be interconnected through the Internet of Things (IoT) for real-time monitoring and control.

AI-Driven Energy Management: Implement Artificial Intelligence (AI) algorithms for predictive energy management. This technology can optimize when and how energy is stored and released, taking into account factors like weather forecasts, energy demand patterns, and market pricing.

Renewable Integration: Prioritize the integration of renewable energy sources, such as solar and wind, into the ESS network. Linkz ESS units can store excess energy generated during peak production times and release it when renewable sources are less productive, ensuring a continuous and reliable energy supply.

3. End-to-End Excellence: With annual outputs of 6,000,000 automobile batteries and 4,500,000 motorcycle batteries, our facilities prioritize innovation and sustainability.

※Global Reach, Local Impact
As a premium brand trusted by businesses and households, Neway has expanded beyond Nigeria to serve growing markets in Côte d’Ivoire, Ghana, Senegal, and Angola. By localizing production and distribution, we reduce costs, accelerate delivery, and stabilize prices while empowering communities through job creation and skill development.

※Commitment to Sustainability
Our closed-loop recycling systems recover 95% of lead from used batteries, minimizing environmental impact. Looking ahead, we aim to pioneer lithium-ion solutions and renewable energy integration, solidifying our role as Africa’s most innovative power partner.

※Join Our Journey

On June 28, 2024, Ceramic Cells launched its self-developed SOEC‑CH₄ stack, based on advanced SOEC technology. The system uses biomethane, steam, and renewable electricity to produce high-purity green hydrogen and self-enriched CO₂, which can be directly used as feedstock for downstream synthesis of green fuels such as SAF and green methanol, effectively addressing the cost barrier of feedstock supply.
The process delivers 1 Nm³ of H₂ and 0.25 Nm³ of CO₂ with just 1 kWh of electricity and 0.25 Nm³ of CH₄ consumed.

Scheint simpel und fair? Ist es auch.

Name: GridStore Energy
Description:
SolarBoost is a 2.7kWh to 8kWh battery wired in parallel under each solar panel allowing solar panels to produce more power than the lowest producing panel, unlike current solar panels. The additional power is saved in the battery rather than being wasted as heat in the lower producing panels, saving up to 15% additional power and increasing net profit by up to 31% for the price as a grid scale battery. SolarBoost requires no additional approvals or infrastructure, can be retrofitted in less than 2 mins, enables swap and go maintenance, its mesh networked controller enables real time monitoring of each individual solar panel and can start charging as soon as a string has been installed. 
SolarBoost is the only product in the world to solve the issue of negative electricity prices and solar panel power imbalances simultaneously.

Name: SISI AG
Description:
SOLESY (=SOLar Energy SYstem) ist eine Trilogie aus Solathermie, PV & Wind zur maximalen Energiegewinnung im Regenerativen Bereich.

SOLESY ist ein selbst-amortisierendes System zur maximalen Energieerzeugung von:
- Strom und
- Raumwärme (Heizen und auch Kühlen)
und ist in der Lage 100% Ihres gesamten Energiebedarfs mittels:

- Solarthermie,
- Photovoltaik und
- Wind,

abzudecken. → Und das zur Gänze CO2-Neutral! 

SOLESY heizt im Winter hocheffizient und schaltet sich im Sommer gänzlich ab. Zum ersten Mal ist die Solarthermie kontrollierbar. 
Mit wenigen Optimierungen wurden die Technologien bei SOLESY auf ihr Maximum erhöht mit dem Ziel: 
"Weniger Platz und mehr Energie!"

Damit kann die die Unabhängigkeit und der Zugang zur freien Energie auf Ihr Maximum erhöht werden. 

SOLESY kann zusätzlich den PV-Peak-Wert über den gesamten Tag aufrechterhalten und reinigt sich eigenständig und fortlaufend mit. So kann auch über die Jahre immer die meiste Energie generiert werden. 

Nach einer Laufzeit von 30 Jahren können die Verschleißteile mit einer Generalüberholung ausgetauscht werden. So wird der Wegwerfgesellschaft positiv entgegengewirkt und ein neues System sorgt für die nächsten 30 Jahre weiterhin für Unabhängigkeit. 

Haben Sie Interesse auf eine unverbindliche Leistungsberechnung? 
Dann schreiben Sie uns gerne an: info@sisiag.com

Wir freuen uns auf Ihre Berechnung.

Name: PlantyFuel
Description:
PlantyFuel is developing disruptive breakthrough technology for producing gen-2 biofuels from agricultural waste. Our process is simple, cost-effective, and significantly reduces production costs compared to existing methods - creating substantial economic value without the need for subsidies or incentives. The technology is designed for easy implementation at any scales: large industrial biorefineries producing billions of liters annually, as well as modular, farm-level systems (e.g., a 1-ton-per-day unit housed in a 40-foot container) tapping blue ocean market segments. Farmers and greenhouse operators can process their own agricultural waste on-site and convert it into renewable fuels for machinery, generators, heat, or electricity. This enhances economic and energy independence, supports sustainable agriculture, and reduces greenhouse gas emissions.

PlantyFuel is uniquely positioned to capture a share of rapidly growing multi-billion-dollar markets. The U.S. and Brazil - the two largest biofuel producers and consumers globally - are expanding mandates and incentives for advanced fuels, while the EU, India, and China are also scaling up demand. Our disruptive, lower-cost technology directly addresses these markets’ needs, offering both industrial partners and farmers a profitable, sustainable alternative to current solutions.

A collapsible, easy-to-install biogas system designed for livestock and poultry operations that:
  - Converts animal waste into clean biogas for cooking, heating, and electricity.
  - Produces biofertilizer as a byproduct for soil enrichment.

Why Biogas?
Millions of farmers across Nigeria struggle with high energy costs and poor waste management. Our biogas technology solves both problems by turning organic waste into clean cooking gas, electricity, and organic fertilizer—providing affordable, sustainable energy while reducing environmental pollution.

Join Us in Powering a Sustainable Future!
We are actively seeking financial and strategic partners to help farmers access our biogas solutions through flexible financing and investment opportunities.

Let’s work together to build a cleaner, greener, and more sustainable future for Nigeria!

Name: THERMINATOR
Description:
THERMINATOR is an ambitious Horizon Europe-funded project dedicated to transforming thermal energy management through a novel electro-thermal energy conversion technology. By integrating thermoacoustic and electrocaloric systems, we aim to reduce energy loss and enhance efficiency across various industries, paving the way for a more sustainable, low-carbon economy.

Bringing together a consortium of leading European researchers and tech innovators—GAC (France), ElectroSciences Ltd (UK), Brunel University London (UK), Karlsruhe Institute of Technology (Germany), University of Ljubljana (Slovenia), ENDEF Engineering SL (Spain), Ingenieria Especializada Obra Civil e Industrial SA (Spain), and CSEM (Switzerland)—THERMINATOR ensures world-class expertise in materials science, industrial manufacturing, and energy system integration.

Follow our journey as we push the boundaries of next-generation energy conversion ! 

This project has received funding from the European Union’s Horizon Europe programme under grant agreement No 10119283. The views and opinions expressed are however those of the authors only and do not necessarily reflect those of the European Union or European Climate, Infrastructure and Environment Executive Agency (CINEA). In short, we make ice from sunlight so they can keep vaccines safe, food fresh, and data flowing without overloading the grid.

Today’s refrigeration is stuck in the past. It is expensive, energy-hungry, and tied to strained grids.

FrostForge is redefining what cooling can be. Our grid-free system delivers sustainable cold anywhere. No electricity. No fuel. No emissions. Designed for fast deployment and easy use, it is a clean alternative to diesel and grid-powered cooling.

As temperatures rise and cooling demand soars, old solutions only add emissions and strain energy infrastructure. FrostForge offers an independent, low-carbon cooling solution for industries that can’t afford downtime, waste, or rising fuel costs.

Description:

The startup is developing an innovative Airborne Wind Energy System (AWES) that harnesses wind power at higher altitudes to enable more efficient and sustainable energy generation.By combining a kite and a rotor with a ground-based generator, the system offers a space-saving and resource-efficient alternative to conventional wind turbines. This technology enables decentralized energy supply, particularly for households and small businesses, even in locations with low ground-level wind speeds.
With a focus on easy installation and high efficiency, Airborne-Turbine contributes to the energy transition and the reduction of CO₂ emissions.

The wind turbine is an ideal solution for rural and remote farms, disaster relief and humanitarian missions, as well as emergency backup power needs. With a compact and rapidly deployable design, our system provides a reliable and sustainable energy source in even the most challenging environments.

Name: 3R Technology-WTR
Description:
3R Technology | Ozone-Driven Tire & Rubber Waste Recovery

3R Technology converts end-of-life tyres and rubber production scrap into high-purity crumb rubber through a patented ozone treatment that first loosens the bond between rubber and its steel or textile cord, allowing clean mechanical separation before devulcanisation. Whole tyres go in; wire- and fibre-free rubber chips come out—no shredding, no pyrolysis, no toxic emissions.

- Up to 75 % lower electricity use versus grinding or thermal methods, thanks to a non-thermal, ozone-enriched process

- High-purity output free of metal cord and synthetic fibres, ready for new tyre compounds (up to 30 % recycled content) and precision automotive parts
- Modular, compact plants that sit close to collection points, reducing logistics and labour costs
- Protected IP covering ozone separation and devulcanisation, securing a defensible market position. We turn a global waste liability into a premium, circular feedstock—helping manufacturers hit EU recycled-content targets while delivering attractive economics and major CO₂ savings. Investors and strategic partners are invited to explore licensing, joint deployment, or equity participation as we scale this technology worldwide.

Het MEFA–MPP (Multifunctional Power Panel)

De multifunctionele MEFA panelen zijn door de combinatie van hoge prestaties en lage kosten zeer goed inzetbaar als omgevings-, bodemwarmte- en watercollector enerzijds en als verwarmings- en/of koelpanelen anderzijds.

Name: Rockcore Brasil
Description:
A Rockcore nasceu em 2009 com o propósito de transformar a forma como o mundo produz e consome energia, oferecendo soluções fotovoltaicas mais seguras, eficientes e inteligentes. Especialistas em microinversores e tecnologias avançadas para geração distribuída, entregamos inovação em cada detalhe — do design ultrafino do PowerPad, com apenas 2 cm de espessura, à robustez dos nossos microinversores 2500W, desenvolvidos para alta performance.

Ao longo dos anos, aprimoramos nossa engenharia, acumulamos mais de 50 patentes, expandimos nossa presença global e consolidamos parcerias em mercados exigentes da Europa e da Ásia. Agora, chegamos ao Brasil para contribuir com um dos ecossistemas solares que mais cresce no mundo.

O que fazemos:
 Desenvolvemos microinversores de alta eficiência, capazes de operar com estabilidade e segurança mesmo em condições extremas.
 Oferecemos o PowerPad, nosso microinversor ultrafino que se conecta diretamente ao módulo, reduzindo cabos, eliminando o inversor na parede e levando energia direto à rede CA.
 Entregamos monitoramento inteligente via Wi-Fi/Bluetooth, com acompanhamento módulo a módulo.
 Criamos soluções para aplicações residenciais, comerciais, industriais e BIPV.
 Priorizamos segurança elétrica máxima, com proteção IP67, ampla faixa térmica e durabilidade comprovada.

Por que isso importa?
Porque a energia solar não é apenas uma tendência, ela é essencial para o futuro energético global. E o Brasil, com sua excepcional irradiação, desempenha um papel estratégico nessa transição.

A Rockcore chega para fortalecer esse movimento, trazendo ao mercado brasileiro tecnologia com padrão internacional, engenharia de alta precisão e compromisso com o desenvolvimento sustentável.

Name: Sunboy EU
Description:
Sunboy byl založen v roce 2024 po několika měsíčním vývoji inovativního řešení přístřešku pro vozidla s názvem U-PORT. Při vývoji jsme spojili několik disciplín a znalostí jako jsou design, znalost náročnosti stavebních příprav, fotovoltaiky či akumulace a reálné zkušenosti s elektromobilitou. Náš první produkt, který jsme úspěšně instalovali je model T s konstrukcí z oceli. Naše inovativní a neinvazivní řešení spočívá zejména v absenci stavebních příprav, jako je rozebírání zámkové dlažby, řezání asfaltu a zakládání betonových patek v zemi. Výjimečnost U-PORT podtrhuje patentovaná lišta U-Bar, která efektivně odvádí dešťovou vodu, a v neposlední řadě také důraz na čistou estetiku celého systému.

Sunboy was founded in 2024 after several months of developing an innovative vehicle shelter solution called U-PORT. In the development process we combined several disciplines and expertise such as design, knowledge of the complexities of building preparations, photovoltaics and storage, and real-world experience with electric mobility. Our first product that we have successfully installed is a Model T with a steel structure. Our innovative and non-invasive solution is mainly based on the absence of construction preparations such as dismantling paving, cutting asphalt and setting concrete footings in the ground. The uniqueness of the U-PORT is underlined by the patented U-Bar, which efficiently drains rainwater, and last but not least by the emphasis on the clean aesthetics of the entire system.

Name: Enexdo
Description:
Enexdo unterstützt Unternehmen auf ihrem Weg zur Elektrifizierung und Dekarbonisierung – mit dem Ansatz, grüne Energie dort zu erzeugen und zu nutzen, wo sie benötigt wird: direkt vor Ort!

Als Projektentwickler für Photovoltaik-, Speicher- und Infrastrukturprojekte planen und realisieren wir maßgeschneiderte Energielösungen für Industrie, Gewerbe und Kommunen. 

Unsere Schwerpunkte:
 Photovoltaik – Entwicklung und Bau von Aufdach- und Freiflächenanlagen.
 PPA‘s & Direktleitung – Grünstromversorgung, langfristig planbar und CO₂-neutral.
 Batteriespeicherlösungen – Peak-Shaving, Lastmanagement, atypische Netznutzung und Notstromfähigkeit.
 Energieinfrastruktur – Planung und Bau von Umspannwerken, Elektrolyseuren und sektorenübergreifenden Konzepten.

Mit intelligenter Flexibilisierung – durch Speicher, Elektrolyseure und Wärmekopplung – machen wir lokale Energiekreisläufe stabiler und effizienter. Unser Ziel ist es, die Energiewende vor Ort umzusetzen und Unternehmen zu helfen, ihre Energieversorgung langfristig grün, sicher und kosteneffizient zu gestalten.

So schaffen wir messbare Ergebnisse: niedrigere Energiekosten, höhere Versorgungssicherheit und weniger CO₂ Emissionen.

Enexdo – Energy Next Door.
Grüne Energie. Direkt. Regional. Wirtschaftlich.

Name: Echofusyon
Description:
Notre entreprise propose des modules de stockage d'énergie de 10 kWh, spécialement conçus pour des systèmes de grande envergure, modulables et performants, au service d'installations industrielles et d'infrastructures publiques. Conçus avec des composants de pointe, nos modules garantissent une fiabilité optimale, une gestion avancée de la batterie, et un contrôle thermique efficace, assurant des performances stables même dans des environnements exigeants. Leur conception permet également un entretien facilitée grâce à une capacité de remplacement à chaud, tout en étant protégé par un boîtier étanche et robuste, idéal pour une utilisation en extérieur.

En complément, nous travaillons à l'intégration de nos solutions dans des systèmes complets de stockage d'énergie, que ce soit pour des bâtiments résidentiels neufs ou des installations industrielles. Ces solutions peuvent combiner nos modules de stockage avec des panneaux solaires, offrant une transition efficace vers des énergies renouvelables. De plus, nous proposons des infrastructures personnalisées pour les projets de grande capacité, avec des bâtiments sur mesure pour maximiser le stockage, intégrer des équipements supplémentaires et s'adapter aux besoins esthétiques ou environnementaux spécifiques. Nos solutions permettent une gestion énergétique optimisée et fiable, propulsant nos clients vers l'avenir de l'énergie renouvelable.

Name: Offshore.Club Kiel
Description:

Der Offshore Club organisiert regelmäßig verschiedene Veranstaltungen, wie zum Beispiel Fachvorträge von Experten aus der Industrie, Exkursionen oder Workshops zu aktuellen Themen der Branche. Neben dem fachlichen Austausch legt der Club auch Wert auf die Pflege von Kontakten und das Networking. So werden beispielsweise in regelmäßig Treffen und gemeinsame Aktivitäten organisiert, um den Studierenden und Absolventen die Möglichkeit zu geben, sich untereinander kennenzulernen und zu vernetzen.
Dazu bietet der Offshore Club unteranderem zweimal im Jahr den Offshore Club Abend an, an denen Absolventen sowie Praxisvertreter aus der Branche ihre Erfahrungen teilen und austauschen.

Name: Powermeter
Description:
PowerMeter azienda italiana, produce smart meter per il monitoraggio dei consumi e della produzione elettrica.

La nostra azienda è specializzata nella produzione di strumenti altamente tecnologici e innovativi per la gestione dell'energia elettrica. In particolare, ci occupiamo della progettazione e della produzione di smart meter ad alta efficienza energetica, in grado di monitorare sia i consumi che la produzione di energia elettrica, garantendo un controllo preciso e costante.

L'uso degli smart meter consente di avere una visione completa e dettagliata dei consumi energetici e delle relative spese, oltre a fornire informazioni sulle emissioni di carbonio e sulla produzione di energia rinnovabile. Questo sistema è particolarmente utile per le aziende, le industrie e le amministrazioni pubbliche, in quanto permette di ridurre i costi e di attuare politiche energetiche più sostenibili.

La nostra azienda ha a cuore l'ambiente e la tutela delle risorse naturali, per questo siamo impegnati nello sviluppo di tecnologie green e sostenibili. Il nostro obiettivo è quello di contribuire alla creazione di una società più sostenibile e attenta alle esigenze del pianeta.

Siamo operativi da molti anni nel settore, e il nostro team di esperti è costantemente impegnato nella ricerca e nello sviluppo di nuove tecnologie e soluzioni innovative per la gestione dell'energia. Siamo in grado di soddisfare le esigenze dei clienti più esigenti, garantendo una grande attenzione alla qualità dei prodotti, al servizio e al supporto post-vendita.

Per maggiori informazioni sui nostri prodotti e sulle soluzioni per la gestione dell'energia, vi invitiamo a visitare il nostro sito web e a contattarci per ulteriori dettagli. Saremo felici di poter rispondere a tutte le vostre domande e di assistervi nella scelta dei prodotti più adatti alle vostra esigenze.

Name: 'mpact solar
Description:
Mpact Solar er et norsk teknologiselskap som utvikler intelligente solenergiløsninger for tungtransport og maritim sektor.
Vi kombinerer avansert thin-film solcelleteknologi, batterilagring og smart styring for å redusere energiforbruk, utslipp og driftskostnader i transportnæringen.

Vår teknologi gjør lastebiler, kjøle- og frysetransport og skip mer energieffektive, stille og bærekraftige – uten å gå på bekostning av driftssikkerhet eller kapasitet.

For lastebiler: Integrerte solcellepaneler, elektrisk kjøleaggregat og smart styringsenhet med sanntidsdata.
For maritim sektor: Solbaserte støttesystemer for elektriske og hybride fartøy.
Skybasert flåtestyring: Full kontroll på energi, temperatur og logistikk – levert som SaaS-tjeneste.

Vår misjon er å gjøre solenergi til en naturlig del av fremtidens transport, og bidra til at både transportører og samfunnet når sine klimamål.

Name: AT Agrar-Technik Int. GmbH
Description:
AT is a full service, globally operating engineering company in the oleochemical industry. Since the year 1982, we have been developing and supplying tailor-made processes for the production of biodiesel and glycerol. 

Our patented solutions set technological standards for the processing of first, second and third generation feedstocks, including vegetable oils, UCO, POME, PFAD, tallow, and other waste lipids. We process feedstocks with a free fatty acid (FFA) content ranging from 0% to 100% and achieve maximum yields of premium quality biodiesel in strict compliance with EN14214 or ASTM D6751 standards.
 
AT's in-house R&D department provides tailor-made solutions for our customers. AT's interdisciplinary team covers the full range of classical EPC services and supports our customers from process development until plant commissioning. Whether research, consulting, engineering, construction or operation is involved, for 40 years AT is your partner for innovative solutions in the biodiesel industry.

Name: Ukhozi Africa Technologies
Description:
Ukhozi Africa Technologies is a South African clean-energy innovator building the country’s first vertically integrated Vanadium Electrolyte and Vanadium Redox Flow Battery (VRFB) manufacturing hub in the Richards Bay Industrial Development Zone (RBIDZ).
Our mission is simple yet ambitious: to deliver long-duration, sustainable energy storage that powers South Africa’s industrial growth and accelerates the continent’s energy transition. By leveraging South Africa’s abundant vanadium reserves and partnering with leading global technology providers, we are creating locally manufactured battery systems that are safe, recyclable, and built to last for over 20 years.
This is more than an energy project – it’s a catalyst for green industrialisation. Through our facility, we aim to:
- Strengthen national energy security and reduce reliance on imported lithium-ion batteries and diesel generators.
- Support job creation, skills transfer, and SMME participation within KwaZulu-Natal’s emerging Energy Cluster.
- Enable the integration of renewable power into South Africa’s grid, helping industries, municipalities, and utilities achieve sustainable, reliable power.

At Ukhozi Africa Technologies, we believe Africa has everything it needs to build its own energy future – the resources, the expertise, and the will. Our vision is to position South Africa as a continental leader in vanadium-based energy storage, exporting not just technology, but impact, resilience, and opportunity.
Join us as we build the backbone of Africa’s clean-energy economy – one innovation, one partnership, and one community at a time.

Learn more: www.ukhoziafritech.co.za

Name: Webdyn Italia
Description:
Webdyn, parte del Gruppo Flexitron, è un'azienda leader nella progettazione e produzione di soluzioni IoT industriali e gateway per il mercato fotovoltaico e la gestione degli edifici. Con un impegno costante verso l'innovazione, Webdyn sviluppa tecnologie all'avanguardia che ottimizzano la gestione energetica, migliorano l'efficienza operativa e promuovono la sostenibilità, valori fondamentali per un futuro più verde.

Nel settore fotovoltaico, Webdyn si distingue per i suoi sistemi avanzati di monitoraggio e controllo che permettono una gestione efficace degli impianti solari. Le loro soluzioni IoT consentono l'acquisizione di dati in tempo reale, il monitoraggio a distanza e una manutenzione predittiva, garantendo prestazioni ottimali degli impianti fotovoltaici. Grazie alla tecnologia innovativa di Webdyn, gli operatori del settore possono massimizzare la produzione di energia, ridurre i tempi di inattività e ottimizzare l'efficienza globale del sistema.

L'impegno di Webdyn non si limita al fotovoltaico: l'azienda estende le sue soluzioni anche alla gestione intelligente degli edifici. I loro sistemi IoT offrono controllo e monitoraggio avanzato di diversi aspetti, come l'illuminazione, la ripartizione dei costi del riscaldamento e il consumo energetico, contribuendo a creare ambienti più efficienti e sostenibili.

Grazie a una presenza consolidata sul mercato e a una visione orientata all'innovazione continua, Webdyn rappresenta un pilastro fondamentale nell'adozione di soluzioni IoT per le energie rinnovabili e la gestione intelligente degli edifici. Con Webdyn, il futuro dell'energia è più efficiente, connesso e sostenibile.

Name: Falcon Flywheels
Description:
Falcon Flywheels is an early-stage startup developing flywheel energy storage for electricity grids around the world.

The rapid fluctuation of wind and solar power with demand for electricity creates a need for energy storage. Flywheels are an ancient concept, storing energy in the momentum of a spinning wheel. Add modern features like vacuum housing and magnetic bearings, and a highly efficient energy storage device can be created with a substantially longer lifetime and lower environmental impact than alternative technologies for certain applications.

Falcon Flywheels are at concept design stage and will soon be seeking seed investment. We are keen to speak to potential investors, energy storage developers that might consider choosing flywheel technology for future projects, and anyone simply fascinated by energy storage.

Falcon Flywheels Ltd is registered in England with company number 14651275 and registered office 40 Caversham Road, Reading, RG1 7EB.

Name: M-TEC Romania
Description:
Pompe de căldură și Management energetic

Cei peste 40 de ani, cele 14.000 de instalări de succes și puterea de inovare continuă constituie pilonii strategiei noastre corporative. Misiunea noastră: independența energetică prin soluțiile noastre energetice: pompe de căldură, panouri fotovoltaice, stocare în baterii, electromobilitate. Toate controlate prin sistemul nostru inovator de management energetic E-Smart.

M-TEC International, cu sediul în Austria, este o companie green-tech axată pe dezvoltarea și producția de soluții energetice complete.
Ca specialist în tehnologia de control inteligentă și în managementul energetic sustenabil, dezvoltăm soluții transversale între sisteme de:
* încălzire,
* fotovoltaice,
* stocare în baterii,
* mobilitate.

La sediu, sustenabilitate 100%
Folosim 100% energie regenerabilă la sediul M-TEC din Austria de Sus. Cu cei 250.000 kWh pe an, hidrocentrala de mici dimensiuni a companiei contribuie cel mai mult la mixul energetic al acesteia. Totodată, cei 50.000 kWh, obținuți direct din sistemul fotovoltaic, precum și cei 100.000 kWh, obținuți indirect din energia solară grație celor patru pompe de căldură, constituie o parte importantă a conceptului M-TEC.

Name: VHyTTA
Description:
The VHyTTA (Versatile Hydrogen Transfer for Transport Applications) project is a 4-year European initiative aimed at developing next-generation hydrogen refuelling infrastructure for large-scale transport. The project is funded by the European Union and supported by the Clean Hydrogen Partnership.

The Consortium brings together 20 leading partners from 7 European countries, combining expertise from hydrogen technology, aviation, maritime, rail, engineering and software development. Together, they are developing and  demonstrating -at TRL7- two multipurpose refuelling station concepts -one fixed and one mobile- for compressed gaseous hydrogen (cGH₂) and liquid hydrogen (LH₂), tailored to the needs of aviation, maritime, and rail sectors. 

By delivering these innovations, VHyTTA addresses key barriers to the widespread adoption of hydrogen and accelerates Europe’s transition to climate-neutral transport.

- Gas flares

As the world’s first company to achieve mass production of third-generation perovskite solar modules, Microquanta has successfully connected multiple "world-first" demonstration power plants to the grid.

Dedicated to the mission of "empowering carbon neutrality through advanced photovoltaic technology," the company focuses on "perovskite frontier technology research, low-carbon manufacturing of perovskite modules, and market applications." Microquanta actively participates in building centralized and distributed power stations and transforming urban energy systems.

The company continues to expand the diverse applications of perovskite photovoltaics, including near-zero energy buildings, commercial and industrial applications, smart transportation, and multi-energy complementary industrial demonstration projects.Microquanta places significant emphasis on scientific research and independent innovation, holding over 350 patents with full intellectual property rights. The company has set the world record for perovskite module PV conversion efficiency 12 times and has won the "China's Highest Efficiency Solar Cell" award in the perovskite single-junction field five times. Microquanta has also achieved the world’s first IEC61215, IEC61730, and IEC63209 product stability certifications, jointly issued by the China Quality Certification Center (CQC) and the German Association for Electrical, Electronic & Information Technologies (VDE).

U-Value: Enhancing thermal transmittance.
SHGC: Regulating solar radiation admitted through windows.
Conventional buildings suffer from the greenhouse effect, leading to excessive electricity consumption for cooling and heating. At Sky-Walls, we turn this problem into a solution. Our climate-adaptive shells protect buildings from the sun’s heat in summer and harness it for heating in winter. Name: Strategic Solutions, Inc.
Description:
Strategic Solutions, Inc. (SSI) was established in 1993 to provide solutions for mission critical systems (OT & IT) that organizations depend on for daily success. Engines of productivity are required to perform essential business activity. Legacy in name only, power derived from these engines are reliable, proven and often have infrastructure (hulls, machinery, buildings) built around them.  Unlike computer technology replacing installed engines with newer or future technology (electric, renewable power, etc.) is always more expensive, if even possible.  Inhibitors include weight/space limitations, fuel cost/availability, engineering and technical support, regulatory (EPA, CARB, IMO, ABS, etc.) to name a few.   Our historical business model is to employ or partner with true   Subject Matter Experts (SMEs) who have decades of experience on the equipment in use.  These SMEs have received the highest levels of certification with the OEM, yet recognize that identical units, with consecutive serial numbers will operate differently than the other. Experience in a variety of environments including oil fields and mines (on shore and offshore), Arctic to the desert, islands, villages, cities, boroughs and utilities with all major OEMs.  A Hybrid system using an existing powerplant with computer-controlled, precision injection of a customized mixture of flammable gas delivers better fuel economy, produces more power and reduces PM and other harmful emissions. AND reduces the TCO of the engine while extending its life. For those who believe that the only good ICE is a dead ICE, and that power should only come from a renewable power system, this technology creates a JAVONS PARADOX!

In our 30+ years in business we are proud of the work we have done and the reputation we have earned.  Our goal is to have long term partnerships with both our customers and our business partners.  These are our biggest advocates, and we'd be pleased to have them share their stories with you.

Name: ESCo2, Ltd
Description:
ESCo2, Ltd. is an Original Equipment/Design Manufacturer (OEM/ODM) based in the United Kingdom the company is dedicated to revolutionizing industrial emissions management through innovative cryogenic cooling and AI-driven emissions capture solutions., specializing in proprietary energy efficiency and environmental sustainability technologies. Founded in 2024, the company is dedicated to revolutionizing industrial emissions management through innovative cryogenic cooling and AI-driven emissions capture solutions.

At the heart of ESCo2’s offerings are the ESCo2 Converter (ESC)—a cutting-edge cryogenic refrigeration system designed to capture and repurpose greenhouse gases such as carbon dioxide (CO₂) and methane (CH₄). The ESC operates with 50% less energy than conventional systems and eliminates the use of harmful refrigerants (CFCs, HFCs, HCFCs). This proprietary technology enables ESCo2 to offer cost-effective, scalable, and sustainable solutions for industries reliant on gas processing, cooling systems, and emissions mitigation.
The ESC-THERMA System extends the application of ESCo2’s technology by efficiently liquefying natural gas, reducing reliance on large-scale LNG plants, and mitigating flaring. Additionally, ESCo2’s Emissions Mitigation Service (EMS) enables industries to convert emissions into commercially viable Reclaimed Gases (RGs), turning pollution into profit.

Name: Paradigm Fuels
Description:
Paradigm Fuels has developed a unique carbon dioxide to renewable diesel conversion process, utilising closed systems that capture all gases and thereby making the process carbon zero.

Furthermore, the renewable diesel produced from the process, when all costs are considered, can be produced at sub 20c/Litre.

The process redefines the coal industry with respect to ESG and environmental considerations.  

When applied to an agribusiness can provide carbon credits in excess of those required to make the renewable diesel carbon net zero.  i.e. a carbon net benefit.

The business model for Paradigm Fuels is that our client owns all capital, and is in charge of its operation.  Paradigm Fuels is on hand to provide consulting and project management and takes a small royalty (approx.. 3%) on fuels produced.

That’s where we come in.

Replaces UPS and reduces DG run-time

Provides zero-latency backup to safeguard critical loads

Cuts diesel and maintenance costs by up to 70%

Saves businesses ₹1.5 Cr+ over 20 years

Powered by lithium-ion batteries with a 10+ year lifespan, our systems deliver both cost savings and reliability. Whether you run a hospital, mall, cineplex, data center, or factory – Energy Gullak ensures your operations never stop.

Why choose us?

 Lower Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) than UPS/DG setups

With over 20 years of experience in enterprise power solutions, our mission is simple: help Indian businesses move from backup to payback.
