Name: Geisberger Gesellschaft für Energieoptimierung mbH
Description:
Based on the conviction that the energy of the future cannot come from conventional, finite sources, for over 20 years we have been putting all our energy into the ongoing development of our products for the use of the ever-present, environmentally friendly energy source that is biomass. Since 1999, we have been developing biogas technology and combined heat and power plants from the planning stage to market launch.

In Germany, more than five nuclear power plant equivalents have already been replaced by biomass electricity generation. The many thousands of decentralized biomass feed-in plants not only  produce and supply electricity, but also heat, thus making a decisive contribution to the energy turnaround. Biomass plants have the most favorable CO2 equivalent of all renewable energy sources and are the only form of energy sources to have a negative CO2 balance – given that both heat and electricity are used.

In addition, biomass is the only form of energy with base load capability, meaning that it supplies electricity even when the sun and wind are absent. Electricity generated with biogas can be fed into the natural gas grid after processing, so that every connection owner can use this form of energy with the best CO2 balance.

Name: Spacergy
Description:
Spacergy's Passive Radiative Cooling solution provides a booster stage to the conventional cooling system. With active and passive cooling panels in combination with Spacergy's Control System, our solution can reduce energy consumption with up to 40% compared to a conventional cooling system without this solution.

Spacergy's system also helps conventional systems withstand higher ambient temperatures. With the Spacergy system, you ensure that the cooling system can handle higher outdoor temperatures than it is currently designed for.

For new installations, the cooling system can be designed for lower ambient temperatures as our system assists with condensation on the hottest days.

Spacerys passive radiative cooling solutions are based on the principle of radiative cooling, a natural phenomenon where objects emit heat in the form of thermal radiation. Spacergy have developed passive and active solutions based on specialized materials and construction that enhances this effect, allowing us reaching temperatures lower than ambient temperature for effective cooling with less energy consumption, even under direct sunlight.   

Our active and passive panel solution is engineered to possess several key properties simultaneously

1. High reflectivity and emissivity leading to almost no heat absorption and allows efficient heat dissipation

2. Panels constructed for maximum energy transfer

3. System constructed for safe, quick and reliable installation 

By combining high solar reflectivity with high emissivity the panels achieves a net cooling effect. It absorbs very little heat from the sun and the surrounding atmosphere while efficiently radiating its own heat away. This results in the material cooling down to a temperature lower than the ambient air temperature, even under hot and sunny conditions.   

Spacergy offers both active cooling panels connected to cooling system and passive cooling panels to lower heat absorption in buildings.

Name: INOVACAT GmbH
Description:
Die INOVACAT GmbH ist ein führender Servicedienstleister im Bereich der Abgasnachbehandlung mit einem speziellen Fokus auf SCR-Katalysatorsysteme. Wir verstehen uns als Partner für BHKW-Hersteller, Motoren-Servicefirmen sowie andere Maschinen-Hersteller und -Betreiber, die eine zuverlässige und effiziente Lösung zur Reduzierung von Stickoxidemissionen benötigen.

Unser Unternehmensziel ist es, durch den Einsatz modernster Technologie und fundiertem Fachwissen maßgeschneiderte Lösungen zu bieten, die optimal in die bestehende Infrastruktur unserer Kunden integriert werden. Dabei prüfen wir sorgfältig die vorhandenen Systeme und setzen auf kompakte Katalysatorkammern, die den Bedarf an neuer Abgasverrohrung minimieren. Die neuen Lösungen werden nahtlos in bestehende 3D- oder 2D-Layouts eingepasst.

Mit einem breiten Portfolio an Katalysatoren, die auf Metallträger- oder Keramikbasis entwickelt wurden, und verschiedenen Zelligkeiten (CPSI) können wir für jedes Projekt die optimale Lösung bereitstellen. Unsere Systeme steigern die Gesamtleistung, reduzieren den AdBlue-Verbrauch und minimieren die Gefahr der Überdosierung.

INOVACAT bietet zudem maßgeschneiderte SCR-Dosier-Systeme, die Dosierungen von wenigen Millilitern bis über 100 Liter pro Stunde ermöglichen – wahlweise mit oder ohne Druckluftunterstützung. Neben der Lieferung und Integration dieser Systeme bieten wir umfassenden Service und Wartung für SCR-Systeme aller Art und Hersteller.

Durch unsere Beratung im Bereich der Lagerung und Verarbeitung von AdBlue-Tanks sowie unsere enge Zusammenarbeit mit erfahrenen Partnerfirmen bei der Installation, gewährleisten wir unseren Kunden eine nachhaltige und zukunftssichere Lösung zur Emissionsreduzierung. Unser Ziel ist es, die Umweltbelastung durch Stickoxide signifikant zu senken und unseren Kunden dabei zu helfen, gesetzliche Vorgaben effizient und kostengünstig zu erfüllen.

INOVACAT – Innovative Katalysatortechnik

Name: Green Science Inc.
Description:
Green Science Inc.’s microwave plasma torch is the most effective scientific tool that produces green hydrogen from natural gas, ammonia, and waste. It produces a substantial amount of radicals at 2,000-6,000 celsius that play a role of chemical reactions like a catalyst. 

Traditional arc plasma torch technology requires metal electrodes and a large amount of energy consumption. However, Green Science’s microwave plasma torch does not need metal electrodes and creates over 50 times larger torch flames. Thus, it dramatically reduces cost and increases throughput by eliminating the need to change metal electrodes. 

Only a few technologies in the world are known to produce clean H2 and pure carbon black. Green Science Inc.’s microwave plasma torch system is the most advanced and cost competitive technology to generate CO2 free clean H2 and carbon black. It is the central component in every clean energy application system Green Science designs.

1. Plasma Steam Methane Reforming (PSMR): Natural gas plasma reforming using steam in a microwave plasma torch system produces clean H2 without a catalyst.  

2. Natural gas cracking: Natural gas is dissociated directly by the microwave plasma torch to produce high-quality carbon black and clean H2 without any emission of CO2

3. Ammonia to green H2: Ammonia gas is dissociated directly by the microwave plasma torch to produce H2 and N2 without emission of CO2 with very low energy, namely < 4kWh/kg of H2 

4. Hybrid Microwave Plasma torch enhanced Gasification(HMPG): This unique system gasifies all kinds of burnable waste and produces syngas without any flue gases, from which clean H2 is extracted, and tail gas, mainly CO2 created in the process is recycled back into the microwave plasma reformer to produce H2 and the carbon sludge.

Mit den von Schräder entwickelten Feinstaubfiltern für Holzfeuerungen wird eine Reduktion der Staubemissionen von bis zu 90 % erreicht.

Beim Thema Energieeffizienz konzentriert sich Schräder auf Wärmerückgewinnung aus Abgasen und Abluft. Schräder-Wärmetauscher stellen die aus dem Abkühlungsprozess gewonnene Energie zur weiteren Nutzung bereit, zum Beispiel zur Raumheizung oder zur Warmwasserbereitung.

Name: Xylo Gas
Description:
Xylo Gas Oy is an innovative company with both theoretical and practical approach on renewable energy solutions. Two decades of designing, constructing, and operating thermal gasification equipment has given us the knowledge and motivation to provide a significant technological contribution in the ongoing green transition.

Our unique concept is based on integrated production of biochar and nitrogen- and tar-free synthesis gas.

Many technologies can produce biochar and heat, our technology produces biochar and tar-free syngas. Clean syngas can be used as feedstock for production of biofuels like methane, methanol and synthetic biodiesel. The gas can also be used for production of heat and power in an internal combustion engine, and substitute for natural gas and oil. The gas can be moved by pipeline from the site of production to a consumer without losses or fouling issues. 

Heat always leaks, gas does not.

We use wood waste and forestry residues as feedstock.  Only wood that is not fit for the sawmill or for paper production. We convert this residue into first category biochar and a clean synthesis gas.

Over the years we have also designed and manufactured other gasification related technologies like burners, flare systems, filters, etc. We provide consultation services related to renewable energy solutions, technical studies and calculations, CAD design and manufacturing of various customized equipment. Our team has a background in process engineering, mechanical design and energy consulting.

Description:
Bienvenue sur la page du projet MAGNOLIA ! 

Financé par le gouvernement dans le cadre du plan de Relance et du Programme d’investissements d’avenir, le projet MAGNOLIA vise à structurer sur le sol français un outil industriel de fabrication d’aimants permanents Néodyme-Fer-Bore (Nd-Fe-B), afin d’initier une filière nationale compétitive et performante, basée sur le recyclage et la valorisation des matières critiques, contribuant à la décarbonation de l’économie. 

Les aimants permanents Nd-Fe-B permettent de concevoir des moteurs électriques plus compacts, plus légers et plus efficaces, notamment pour l’automobile et les éoliennes. Or, aujourd’hui, environ 90% des aimants permanents aux terres rares sont produits en Chine qui domine l’ensemble de la chaîne de valeur, depuis l’extraction des terres rares jusqu’à leur fabrication. Ce quasi-monopole représente un risque majeur pour la France et l’Europe.

Démarré en avril 2022, MAGNOLIA regroupe 5 partenaires :
• Orano, leader mondial du traitement et du recyclage des combustibles nucléaires usés
• CEA-Liten, centre de recherche de niveau international
• Valeo, leader mondial des machines électriques pour l’automobile
• Paprec, acteur de premier plan du recyclage des déchets industriels et ménagers
• Daimantel France, société intervenant sur la collecte et la démagnétisation des aimants permanents.

Fort d’un budget de 12,3 M€, le projet MAGNOLIA travaillera sur 4 axes :
• Le développement de technologies innovantes de fabrication d’aimants frittés et leur déploiement sur des lignes de fabrication pilote et préindustrielles
• L’élaboration d’un schéma de sécurisation des approvisionnements et de production d’aimants hors Asie
• La préparation en France d’une filière de collecte, démantèlement et valorisation des moteurs électriques
• La réduction de l’impact environnemental (recyclage d’aimants, réduction des déchets de fabrication, valorisation des terres rares, écoconception des machines électriques).

Description:
New Generation Tanks develops ultra-efficient pressure tanks for the storage and transport of compressed gases and particularly for hydrogen. Made of recyclable thermoplastic composites, NGT pressure tanks have a unique fibre architecture and design with tapered ends that makes them conformable (long and thin, easy to integrate into a vehicle's floor or chassis). They are also up to 40% lighter than conventional Type 4 carbon fiber pressure tanks.  Their carbon fiber structure is welded onto the  tanks liner, which minimizes the risk of liner collapse and makes NGT pressure cylinders more durable, and with a facilitated cleaning and commissioning process. 
Improved durability, weight saving, conformability and recyclability are unique benefits that NGT brings to the market, contributing to making fuel cell vehicles more competitive and hydrogen transport's efficiency improved by a factor of 4 to 5.

Name: Highland Materials, Inc.
Description:
Highland Materials is a producer of polysilicon which is a key element in the production of efficient solar cells to generate electricity. Our proprietary process results in 90% less carbon emissions and uses less power than traditional methods and proven since 2006 in 20 million solar cells currently powering homes and businesses.

Our large 1.2 million square foot production facility to be built at Phipps Bend Industrial Park in Surgoinsville, TN will reach full production in 2027 and represents a $850 million investment. When fully operational, the company will offer more than 400 great-paying professional, technical, and operational jobs with excellent benefits. The company will also operate a Research & Development Facility in Johnson City, TN beginning in 2024.

In addition to the production of aluminum-silicon (Al-Si) alloy, the company will manufacture an aluminum alloy for casting purposes, such as molding engines for automobiles, and poly aluminum chloride, used for municipal and industrial water treatment facilities. The processes used pose no unique environmental or worker health and safety concerns.

In 2024, Highland Materials was a recipient of a $255 million tax credit granted by the Federal government through the Qualifying Advanced Energy Project Tax Credit (48C), largely focused on clean energy manufacturing projects. According to the Solar Energy Manufacturers for America (SEMA) Coalition, the Highland Materials plant is the first new commercial polysilicon plant to be built in the US since the passage of the Inflation Reduction Act in August 2022.

When fully operational, the new plant will produce enough polysilicon materials each year to provide electricity through solar cells to power 7,500,000 residential homes.

Kortom, het aantal mogelijkheden is vrijwel onbeperkt. De specialisten van LTG  zetten ze graag voor u op een rij.  

Zekerheid, service, know-how en vele jaren ervaring in LED, dat is waar LTG voor staat.
Wij leveren niet zozeer verlichtingstechniek, maar in de eerste plaats een verlichtingsoplossing. Een systeem dat naadloos aansluit bij uw eisen- en wensenpakket. Wij kunnen die garantie bieden omdat wij beschikken over eigen productiefaciliteiten, waar technici en ontwerpers zich buigen over uw specifieke lichtvraag.
Bij ons zult u nooit horen dat iets niet kan. Wij zorgen voor de gewenste lichtoplossing...

Élaboration et mise au point de produits GNC, GNL, GPL innovants, dépannage de poids-lourd GNC ou GNL sans remorquage, recyclage de réservoirs vides de GNC ou GPL, Cargaz est votre solution GNC, GNL, GPL !

Une démarche écoresponsable en phase avec son temps

Sensible à la protection de l’environnement, Cargaz réalise ses innovations à partir de bouteilles de gaz recyclées (quand cela est possible), récupérées sur des sites de déconstruction automobile. Après un passage en centre d’épreuve pour subir des contrôles de pression, les réservoirs sont sablés, nettoyés et repeints. Tous les éléments techniques de sécurité sont entièrement changés. Les bouteilles de gaz sont comme neuves et peuvent être remises dans le circuit pour 10 ans.

Name: OH4 LIMITED
Description:
OH4: Harnessing the power of water.

OH4 uses revolutionary frequency technology to restructure the water molecules in a controlled, closed-loop heating/cooling system to create a more efficient water flow without affecting the integrity of the water or its PH values. Our technology causes the water in the pipes to form extra hydrogen/oxygen bonds, which allows for a more effective heat transfer and a reduction in both energy usage and carbon output.

OH4 is the perfect retrofit solution, with an installation causing no day-to-day disruption. We are also dedicated to supporting businesses on their carbon reduction and ESG journey. With each install of OH4, we also provide an ESG readiness assessment and carbon reporting on Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions through our strategic partners at ESG Pro.

We guarantee a saving of at least 10%, but most of our clients save more than 20% off their heating, cooling and hot water bills.

Name: BOHRON / Embracing Life - Disruptive technologies to protect life from climate change.
Description:
Bohron is a Swiss start-up that develops products aimed at countering climate change and its resulting crises such as water, food, and energy scarcity that generate an increase in the cost of living, social and political instability, and mass migrations. The company is currently developing what could be considered the world's most elegant, intelligent, multifunctional, lightweight, high-performance, green, and safe solar energy system.

The product is applicable to the agriculture sector, as well as any other natural or artificial spaces such as roads, squares, parking lots, and buildings because it serves three functions: providing electrical or thermal energy, allowing plants, people, and animals to enjoy the health benefits of natural lighting, and also protecting them from any climatic excesses such as strong sun exposure, heavy rain, or hail. 

The product installs and removes quickly, works well in any weather condition and for a long time. Finally, the product contains no toxic substances and poses no risks of fire or explosions.

The product if applied to the agricultural sector, could increase crop yield and safety, stopping desertification, and enabling us to recover degraded soils to reach the goal of obtaining 14% more cultivable land by 2050. Considering the enormous numbers associated with such cultivable areas, Bohron could earn an average annual profit of 739 million euros from 2025 to 2050, assuming a market share of only 1% of such a market.

The start-up has received the technical and financial validation of some certified technology incubators and has initiated the registration of the different patents and begun the first experimental development activities.

Bohron is starting to gather the first private investments.
The founding members are entrepreneurs with about 30 years of experience in technology.

Currently, negotiations are underway with some large Brazilian companies that manage huge agricultural areas.

Više od 30 godina holding ISOPLUS grupa se razvija, proizvodi i prodaje predizolovane elemente sistema daljinskog grejanja  koji služe za snabdevanje toplotnom energijom čitavih stanbenih oblasti i svih tipova industrijskih postrojenja.
Preko  1500 zaposlenih na različitim lokacijama u Evropi čini ISOPLUS grupu jakim i pouzdanim partnerom koji može da odgovori na izazove koje pred nas postavlja rastuća međunarodna baza naših korisnika.

Od 2006 god ISOPLUS d.o.o. - Srbija poseduje proizvodnu celinu u Aleksincu iz koje najvećim delom snabdeva tržište Srbije, a po potrebi i zemalja u regionu.
U saradnji sa ostalim članicama ISOPLUS grupe tržištu možemo ponuditi predizolovane elemente daljinskog sistema grejanja (predizolovane cevi, fitinge, ventile i spojnice) i u dimenzijama do DN 1000.
Raznovrsnost našeg proizvodnog asortimana i kratki rokovi potrebni za izvođenje radova na izgradnji toplovodne mreže korišćenjem naših proizvoda rezultuje da je ometanje svakodnevnog života prilikom izgradnje toplovodnih mreža svedeno je na minimum.
U našoj proizvodnoj celini izrađujemo predizolovane elemente daljinskog sistema grejanja u dimenzijama DN 20 – DN 600 koji su pogodni za postavljanje u zemlju - kanale (opciono i izvan zemlje), a prilagodljivost najzahtevnim trasama toplovoda (gradske  sredine, različite strukture zemljišta itd.) obezbeđena je raznovrsnošću primenjivih delova i kompenzacionih elemenata.

Name: Vishal Biogas Co.
Description:
For biogas installation and commissioning:

### **Biogas Installation & Commissioning**

**Overview:**
Biogas installation and commissioning is a comprehensive process that involves setting up a biogas system designed to convert organic waste into renewable energy. This process includes the design, construction, and operational testing of a biogas system, ensuring that it functions efficiently and meets performance expectations.

**1. **Site Assessment and Design:****
   - **Site Evaluation:** Analyze the site for suitability, considering factors such as waste availability, space, and environmental impact.
   - **System Design:** Develop a tailored biogas system design that includes components such as digesters, gas storage, and piping. Ensure compliance with local regulations and standards.

**2. **Equipment Procurement and Installation:****
   - **Component Selection:** Choose high-quality equipment including anaerobic digesters, gas holders, pumps, and control systems.
   - **Installation:** Set up the equipment according to the design specifications. This includes assembling the digester, connecting piping and valves, and installing gas handling systems.

**3. **System Integration:****
   - **Electrical and Control Systems:** Install and configure electrical systems and control panels to monitor and manage the biogas process.
   - **Piping and Connections:** Connect all components, ensuring proper alignment and leak-proof seals.

**4. **Commissioning and Testing:****
   - **Initial Start-Up:** Perform a dry run of the system to check for any installation issues and to ensure all components are functioning correctly.
   - **Wet Commissioning:** Introduce feedstock to the system and begin the anaerobic digestion process. Monitor for any issues such as leaks or blockages.

Description:

Our core specialization lies in the groundbreaking field of vanadium redox flow batteries (VRB), where we are committed to advancing the research, development, and industrial-scale production of these cutting-edge energy solutions.

Our state-of-the-art facility is a testament to our dedication to excellence and innovation in the renewable energy sector. It encompasses a fully-equipped independent research and development center, dedicated to pushing the boundaries of VRB technology. We boast specialized workshops for ion-exchange membrane production, vanadium battery stack assembly, vanadium electrolyte preparation, and a comprehensive modular vanadium battery system assembly and testing workshop. This integrated approach ensures that every aspect of VRB production is meticulously managed under one roof, guaranteeing the highest standards of quality and efficiency.

At Polyflow Energy, we take pride in our portfolio of leading international patents and groundbreaking achievements. These include high-performance perfluorinated ion-exchange membranes, highly active electrodes, high-efficiency battery stacks, wide-temperature range vanadium electrolytes, and comprehensive modular systems for vanadium batteries. Our products stand out in the market, offering substantial advantages in terms of performance, durability, and environmental sustainability.

Our mission is to drive the renewable energy revolution, offering innovative and sustainable VRB energy storage solutions that cater to the growing global demand.

Name: Netzflex GmbH
Description:
Verbraucher oder Energieversorger?

Als Verbraucher kann man mit dynamischen Stromtarifen Geld sparen.
Jedoch ist man in seinem Komfort eingeschränkt.
Der Strompreis ändert sicn jede viertel Stunden. Grundlage hierfür ist der Börsenstrompreis.
Aber wer kann kochen oder andere Geräte einschalen wenn die Sonne scheint, oder nachts günstiger Strom aus Windkraftanlagen im Netz ist?

Unser Speicher nimmt Ihnen diese Arbeit ab in dem er 2-3 mal am Tag den günstigsten Strom lädt und dann im Haushalt frei gibt, wenn der Strom im Netz teuer ist.
Sie behalten Ihren Komfort und sparen Geld. 

Für Energieversorger:
unser Speicher ist netzdienlich steuerbar.
Sie laden den Speicher markt und netzdienlich.
- Reduzierung der Netzentgelte durch §14a.
- Netzentlastung durch Lastenverschiebung

Mit diesem Produkt haben vor allem Stadtwerke durch die optimale Steuerung von regionalen Erzeugungsanlagen und der damit verbundenen Reduzierung der Netzentgelte ein Alleinstellungsmerkmal.

Name: Nocterm
Description:
The Nocterm Project concerns the creation of a radiative cooling panel, which operates based on the nonlinear reflection of thermal radiation in the wavelength range corresponding to the so-called atmospheric window - that is, the infrared spectrum that most easily passes through the Earth's atmosphere.
The innovation (on a global scale) of the solution lies in the emission of energy in the form of electromagnetic waves, which are absorbed by surrounding objects. Electromagnetic waves contain energy capable of removing heat from the objects they come into contact with.
The problems the product solves are mainly related to the increasing demand for air conditioning, rising electricity prices, and global warming.
We have a Proof of Concept (PoC) confirming the effectiveness of the technology. The next steps must involve R&D work - mainly concerning the paint covering the panel, which will allow for greater efficiency, as well as the panel production process, and the construction of a commercial pilot installation. We are seeking funding of at least 0.5 million euros.
#passivecooling #greenenergy #innovation #startup #preseed

- Hohe Energiedichte für lange Laufzeiten

Name: SyncMOF Inc.
Description:
SyncMOF Corporation is gaining international attention for its development of Metal Organic Frameworks (MOFs), a state-of-the-art CO2 capture technology

Metal-Organic Frameworks (MOFs) are porous materials with versatile functionalities.
MOF, a porous material crafted from metal ions and organic ligands,
features jungle gym-like cavities.
Unlike conventional materials like zeolites and activated carbons, MOFs’ structures can be easily tailored.
This adaptability allows for the synthesis of MOFs optimized for specific applications, such as selectively capturing CO2 from the air while simplifying the regeneration process.
MOFs effectively eliminate the challenges posed by easily diffusing and mixing gases,
establishing them as a cornerstone material in the emerging era of gaseous resource utilization, replacing traditional petroleum sources.

Ecomartinique.com est LE site de référence dédié à l'éco-rénovation et à la construction durable en Martinique. Notre mission ? Accompagner les particuliers et professionnels martiniquais dans leurs projets immobiliers éco-responsables.

Forts d'une expertise locale de plus de 10 ans, nos conseillers techniques indépendants vous guident à chaque étape :

 Réaliser un diagnostic énergétique complet de votre logement
 Concevoir un programme de travaux sur-mesure et durable 
 Choisir les matériaux, équipements et systèmes les mieux adaptés au climat tropical
 Bénéficier des aides et subventions mobilisables (MaPrimeRénov', aides Anah, CEE, etc.)
 Sélectionner les entreprises RGE qualifiées pour réaliser vos travaux
 Suivre et réceptionner vos chantiers de rénovation énergétique

Sur ecomartinique.com, vous accédez à toutes les informations pour construire, rénover ou aménager un logement durable et économe en Martinique :

 Guides pratiques et tutoriels pour des éco-travaux pas-à-pas
 Annuaire des artisans et architectes éco-responsables  
 Simulation des devis, aides financières et crédits d'impôts
 Actualités et nouveautés dans l'éco-construction aux Antilles
 Retours d'expériences et témoignages de particuliers

Que vous soyez un particulier ou un professionnel du bâtiment, ecomartinique.com est la plateforme incontournable pour réussir vos projets immobiliers durables en Martinique !

Rejoignez notre communauté de passionnés et abonnez-vous à notre newsletter pour ne rien manquer de l'actualité de l'éco-rénovation et de l'éco-construction caribéenne.

O nás

Jsme česká technologická společnost specializující se na pokročilá energetická řešení pro firmy, průmysl i energetické partnery. Naším cílem je posílit energetickou bezpečnost, snížit provozní náklady a zajistit, aby vaše energetická infrastruktura byla připravena nejen na dnešní, ale i na budoucí výzvy.

Dodáváme pokročilé moderní technologie a digitalizujeme energetiku, abychom zajistili energetickou bezpečnost firem, stabilizaci síť a flexibilitu nové úrovně.

Nabízíme komplexní řešení, která propojují moderní technologie, strategické know-how, a inovace pro dlouhodobou spolehlivost a datově řízený provoz distribuční soustavy s využitím obnovitelné energie.

• Bateriová úložiště a energetická centra (IVESS) pro stabilitu a efektivní řízení spotřeby • Vlastní systém IVICS – dispečerské řízení, automatizace procesů a monitoring 24/7 • Optimalizaci energetických toků, snížení špiček a ochranu před přetoky • Rozvoj agregace flexibility a podporu energetických obchodních modelů • Kybernetickou ochranu energetických zařízení a bezpečné řízení datových toků

Využíváme evropské technologie, stavíme na odbornosti vlastního inženýrského týmu a poskytujeme projekty na klíč – od technické přípravy až po uvedení do provozu a následný dohled.

Name: TWL-Technologie GmbH
Description:
TWL Technologie GmbH – Speicherkompetenz trifft PVT-Innovation

Die TWL Technologie GmbH (Freihung/Oberpfalz) und Eckernförde – seit über 25 Jahren führend im Speichersegment für erneuerbare Energien – revolutioniert mit der PRISMA PVT RBX-Kollektorlinie die Sektorkopplung. Die Hybridtechnologie kombiniert PVT-Kollektoren (Photovoltaik + Solarthermie) mit Speicherlösungen, um Energieerträge maximal auszuschöpfen.

PVT-Innovation auf Speicher-Expertise
Als Pionier für Pufferspeicher (Ein-/Mehrfamilienhäuser, Gewerbe) setzt TWL auf Synergien:
Wärmemanagement 2.0: Die PRISMA-Kollektorwärme speist in Hocheffizienzspeicher ein, oder wird quellseitig direkt an eine Wärmepumpe angeschlossen.
Optimal für bivalente Systeme (Kombi mit Wärmepumpen).
Speicher-Know-how trifft PVT: Durch jahrzehntelange Erfahrung mit Schichtladespeichern und Hygiene-Kombisystemen entstehen ganzheitliche Energiekreisläufe.

PRISMA PVT RBX: Kernmerkmale
Dreifachnutzung: Strom (Topcon-Zellen, 450 W), Warmwasser (Abwärme der PV-Module), Umgebungswärme durch KI-optimierten Aluminium-Wärmetauscher.

Speicherkompatibilität: Perfekt abgestimmt auf TWL-Pufferspeicher und Sole-Wärmepumpen – steigert Jahresarbeitszahlen um bis zu 20 %.

Warum TWL?
Aus der Praxis: Lösungen für Handwerksbetriebe – von der Speicherdimensionierung bis zur PVT-Anlagenintegration.

Name: METHARC ApS
Description:
At Metharc we believe in a technically viable and economically sustainable future for zero carbon emission energy. We are a Danish SME working in the energy sector developing environmental and climate beneficial solutions for our energy security. 

While hydrocarbons (i.e., oil, gas, biogas) are widely acknowledged as the major source of our carbon induced climate problems, we also see them as a pathway for a solution to both our environmental and energy security. 

Our patented wellbore concept together with our patent pending processes will provide an enabling technology which combines both hydrocarbon gasification and electrochemical separation technologies for the generation of Hydrogen, together with the simultaneous capture of carbon, at source, in-situ. This technology will enable the conversion of existing wells from Oil & Gas production to Hydrogen production. In addition, it will future proof biogas production from agriculture by converting it to Hydrogen in Geothermal wellbores, enhancing the circular economy.

Our mission is to design and develop energy technologies to enable a more environmentally responsible and sustainable use of our energy resources. Maintaining energy security, while preventing carbon from entering the atmosphere, enables the global transition to cleaner energy utilisation.

Decarbonising hydrocarbon production to allow for continued access to existing, strategic national energy reserves will also facilitate the energy transition for developing countries, through enabling unlimited use of their known hydrocarbon resources in a climate beneficial manner.

Name: Arjes Mena
Description:
Today, ARJES is a worldwide leading supplier and manufacturer of exceptional double-shaft shredders with high mobility and a competitive superior range of applications. Our products ensure strong growth as well as economic success.

Since the company was founded in 2007, around 200 employees at the site in Leimbach, Thuringia have been producing trend-setting solutions for the processing of green, stem and waste wood; plastic and industrial waste; scrap metal as well as construction and mineral debris. Behind the “We” is an equally competent and committed team of experienced employees who apply their knowledge to reach a high level of sustainability.

A solution for each challenge!

We specialize in developing and manufacturing innovative, slow running double-shaft shredders with which we successfully are able to manage any field of application by running the shafts in both synchronous and asynchronous mode. Each tool shaft may be individually programmed to meet our customers’ requirements. Our shredding shafts are made of highly durable steel with excellent surface hardening protection and changing them is a fast and easy procedure thanks to our revolutionary quick-change cassette system. The possible applications of our products are as versatile as the challenges presented by the industry.

There are many good reasons why our customers choose ARJES, the most important ones:

Best price-performance ratio in the industry
Competitively superior range of applications
Revolutionary quick-change shaft system
High mobility in any situation
Innovative plug-and-play control

We offer you shredders and recycling technology around the globe via a worldwide sales network. Our international sales partners support you in all matters relating to procurement, financing, transport and service as well as all of your possible needs. Our qualified and experienced specialists guarantee a conscientious execution of all services and are available for you at any time.

Moderne Heizungsanlagen & Wärmekonzepte

Name: شركة الماريا للبناء والترميم والطاقة الشمسية
Description:
شركة الماريا للبناء والترميم والطاقة الشمسية هي شركة رائدة في مجال البناء والترميم واستخدام الطاقة الشمسية. تأسست الشركة بهدف تقديم خدمات متميزة ومبتكرة في مجالات البناء والترميم وتوفير حلول طاقة نظيفة ومستدامة.


خدماتنا:
البناء والتشييد:
تصميم وتنفيذ المشاريع الإنشائية بجودة عالية وفقًا لأعلى المعايير.
إدارة المشاريع وضمان التسليم في الوقت المحدد.
الترميم والتجديد:
تحديث وتجديد المباني والهياكل القائمة.
تطوير وتحسين البنية التحتية بأحدث التقنيات والمواد.
الطاقة الشمسية:
تصميم وتركيب أنظمة الطاقة الشمسية الفعالة.
تقديم استشارات حول الطاقة الشمسية والتحول إلى مصادر طاقة نظيفة
***الرؤية:                                                         
التميز والجودة العالية: نسعى لتقديم أعلى مستويات الجودة والتميز في كل مشروع نقوم به، مع التركيز على تلبية وتفوق توقعات عملائنا.
الابتكار والتقنيات المتقدمة: نعمل على استخدام أحدث التقنيات والمنهجيات البنائية المبتكرة لتقديم حلول فعالة ومبتكرة في جميع مشاريعنا.
الاستدامة والمسؤولية الاجتماعية: نلتزم بالاستدامة البيئية والاجتماعية في جميع جوانب أعمالنا، من خلال أن نكون الشركة شركة مرجعية ورائدة في قطاع البناء والترميم واستخدام الطاقة الشمسية في الشرق الأوسط والعالم.
 تركز رؤيتنا على تبني ممارسات بناء صديقة للبيئة والمساهمة في تحسين المجتمعات التي نعمل بها.
النمو والتوسع العالمي: نسعى لتوسيع نطاق أعمالنا والوصول إلى أسواق جديدة على مستوى العالم، مع الحفاظ على معاييرنا العالية في الجودة والاحترافية


الرسالة:                                                
تحقيق الريادة الفنية:
  تطوير مهارات وكفاءات الفريق الفني لتحقيق أعلى مستويات الجودة والابتكار في التشييد والترميم.
  توفير تدريب وتطوير مستمر للموظفين للحفاظ على الكفاءة والمهنية.   
الاستدامة والبيئة:
  تعزيز استخدام الطاقة الشمسية ومصادر الطاقة المتجددة في المشاريع لتحقيق الاستدامة البيئية.  
  تحسين الكفاءة الطاقوية والاستدامة البيئية في جميع العمليات . 

 رضا العملاء:
 توفير خدمات ممتازة تلبي احتياجات العملاء وتفوق توقعاتهم. 
 الاستماع لملاحظات العملاء وتحسين الخدمات والعمليات بناءً على تلك الملاحظات. 
الابتكار والتطوير.

If we cover just 1% of those spaces with solar, we could generate 27 GW more power. But with current carport options, it would take us over 50 years to hit that goal.

Parking lots represent a multi-billion-dollar untapped opportunity to scale solar.

Gridwave's mission: cover 1 million parking spaces with solar in the next 10 years.

Join us.

Name: YOUR FREE ENERGY SRL
Description:
The founder Marco Mastino, with many years of experience in the renewable energy sector, particularly in the last decade, focuses on the design and installation of photovoltaic systems and efficiency systems, often dealing with technological limits and high costs to obtain satisfactory results.
In May 2022, the search for a more performing product compared to current technologies in the sector begins, and above all a product that has a fair cost for an average family and for small production activities. The idea is to overcome the problem of production continuity of a photovoltaic system and the high costs of energy storage using storage batteries. Following numerous research and technical considerations, he comes to the conclusion that the best approach is to combine different technologies and optimize them with advanced electronic management systems. From these bases, an integrated energy generation system from renewable sources is developed, suitable for multiple applications in the residential and tertiary sectors, to reduce energy costs and to make pollution levels and dependence on fossil fuels more acceptable. . The project involves a photo-wind pylon, i.e. a tower with a high-efficiency wind turbine at the top with photovoltaic cells on the sides and the storage batteries and management unit inside.
In September the first projects of the system are completed, the application for an invention patent and utility model is filed and the first materials are ordered to prepare for the prototype testing phase.
On 14 November 2023, Your Free Energy Srl was established, which proposes itself at an international level to market and install the product created in all situations and scenarios, from residential homes to production activities, to port piers, to mountain huts , etc.

Die Nähe zu Verbrauchern, Installateuren, Planern und EPCs ermöglicht es uns, Feedback zu erhalten, das unsere Forschungsaktivitäten lenkt und Produkte entwickelt, die den Erwartungen verschiedener Interessengruppen entsprechen.

Unser Vertriebs- und Servicezentrum sowie Lager befindet sich im Südwesten Deutschlands in Freiburg. Mit eine 10.080 Quadratmeter Produktionsstätte in China und einem 38.000 Quadratmeter Forschungszentrum und zentralen Lager für Geschäftsleitung, Forschung und Entwicklung, Produktion und Logistik im Norden Italiens, einer flexiblen und umfassenden Produktpalette, einer günstigen und vorausschauenden strategischen Positionierung, etablierten Geschäftspartnerschaften und unserem innovativen Energiemanagementsystem positionieren wir uns erfolgreich in einem stark wachsenden Markt.

Unsere Produkte werden in der hochmodernen Produktionsanlage in Bartenstein, im Nordosten Polens, hergestellt. Wir verfügen über große Lagerflächen von über 25.000 m² in Allenstein, Warschau, Posen, Bartenstein und Gleiwitz. Dabei verwenden wir ausschließlich modernste Materialien wie Magnelis-Stahl, Glasfaserkunststoff und hochwertiges Aluminium.

Unsere interne Forschungs- und Entwicklungsabteilung arbeitet kontinuierlich daran, stets auf dem neuesten Stand der Technik zu bleiben, um unseren Kunden innovative Lösungen anzubieten. Wir garantieren umfassende Unterstützung bei der Planung und einen individuellen Ansatz für Großprojekte.

Name: ЮА Грін
Description:
Ми в UA Green віримо, що виробництво енергії не повинно бути шкідливим для нашої планети. Тому наша місія полягає в тому, щоб забезпечити європейські домогосподарства та громади доступними джерелами чистої енергії.

На початку 2023 року наша команда поставила собі за мету розробити вітрову турбіну, достатньо потужну, щоб забезпечити від 25% до 50% електроенергії, яку споживає середньостатистичне європейське домогосподарство. У той же час ми прагнули забезпечити, щоб наш продукт не залишав довготривалого впливу на навколишнє середовище і був повністю перероблений в кінці свого життєвого циклу, використовуючи найсучасніші матеріали.

З початку цього року ми відвантажили перше покоління наших вітрогенераторів клієнтам в Україні. Зараз ми продовжуємо наші дослідження та розробки, щоб забезпечити ще більш ефективні та стійкі джерела енергії для наших клієнтів.

Name: H2 GREEN ENERJİ
Description:
Firmamız, temiz enerji ve sürdürülebilir üretim teknolojileri alanında bir kuruluş olarak, Türkiye’nin ilk modüler yeşil amonyak üretim tesislerini geliştirmekte ve üretmektedir. Karbon ayak izini sıfıra indirmeyi hedefleyen yenilikçi çözümlerimiz, enerji verimliliği, çevresel sürdürülebilirlik ve ekonomik fayda arasında mükemmel bir denge sunar.

Vizyonumuz

Dünyanın enerji dönüşümüne katkı sağlayarak, endüstrinin yeşil enerji çözümlerine entegrasyonunu hızlandırmak,enerji bağımsızlığı ve ithalatı azaltıcı ihracatı artırıcı teknolojiler gelistirmek,Türkiye’yi bu alanda lider bir konuma taşımaktır.

Ürün ve Hizmetlerimiz

1. Modüler Yeşil Amonyak Üretim Tesisleri

Esnek ve ölçeklenebilir tasarımlar.

Yenilenebilir enerji kaynakları (güneş, rüzgar) ile entegre çalışma.

Endüstriyel ve tarımsal uygulamalara yönelik düşük maliyetli ve çevreci amonyak üretimi.


2. Reaktör Geliştirme ve İnovasyon

Yerli mühendislik ile optimize edilmiş, yüksek verimli reaktör tasarımları.

Hidrojen ve azot dönüşümünde yenilikçi katalizör sistemleri.

Minimum enerji tüketimiyle maksimum verim sağlayan çözümler.


3. Danışmanlık ve Teknik Destek

Yeşil amonyak üretim projelerinde kapsamlı mühendislik desteği.

Sistem kurulumu, entegrasyonu ve bakım hizmetleri.

Neden Biz?

Yenilikçi Teknoloji: Gelişmiş reaktör tasarımları ve modern üretim süreçleri.

Sürdürülebilirlik: Karbonsuz üretim süreçleriyle çevreye duyarlılık.

Maliyet Avantajı: Modüler yapılar sayesinde düşük yatırım ve işletme maliyetleri.

Deneyimli Kadro: Enerji ve kimya sektöründe uzman mühendislik ekibi.

Başarılarımız

Türkiye’de ilk kez tamamen yerli imkanlarla geliştirilen modüler yeşil amonyak reaktörünü hayata geçirerek, uluslararası standartlarda üretim teknolojileri sunuyoruz.

Na českém trhu patří k průkopníkům v agrivoltaice, pod značkou bragen AGV system nabízí celou řadu řešení pro nejrůznější využití - od sadů, přes vinice až po pěstitelské školky. Všechny své konstrukce nejenže vyvíjí, ale i vyrábí v České republice, díky spolupráci s firmou Metal Trade Comax.

Stejně jako celá branže, i Bragen rychle roste. Uvítáme konstruktéry, statiky, projektové manažery i posily pro naše montážní týmy, a to i z řad čerstvých absolventů škol. Nabízíme pestrou práci v přátelském prostředí a šanci spolupodílet se na rozvoji ryze české značky.

Description:
As residents of the Great Lakes State, we are passionate about our many beaches, ponds, and of course, lakes. Our mission is to create a more flourishing environment through continued innovation of renewable energy devices

The Oscillo Drive (O-Drive) is a device that takes any oscillating movement and converts it into a constant one-way motion. Up or down, left or right, forward or backward, the O-Drive is able to take any oscillating movement and turn it into power.  Because of the nature of the device, models of the O-Drive are able to be built at any size and for almost any application. It’s an entirely scalable, mechanical device that does not rely on any computers or electronics.

Name: VoltMotion
Description:
In Nederland groeit het gebruik van zonne-energie snel, met name bij bedrijven die veel zonnepanelen op hun daken hebben geïnstalleerd. Echter, het toenemende aanbod van zonne-energie kan het stroomnetwerk niet altijd aan, waardoor de vraag naar thuisbatterijen als energieopslagoplossing toeneemt.

Bedrijven met veel zonnepanelen kunnen nu profiteren van de voordelen van thuisbatterijen, omdat ze het overschot aan energie dat het stroomnet niet kan accepteren, kunnen opslaan voor later gebruik. Wanneer de capaciteit van het net beperkt is, kunnen thuisbatterijen ook worden ingezet om extra vermogen te leveren wanneer er een hoog energieverbruik is.

Een belangrijk voordeel van onze batterijen is dat ze lokaal in Nederland worden geproduceerd. Hierdoor zijn bedrijven minder afhankelijk van andere landen voor hun energieopslagbehoefte en dragen ze bij aan de ontwikkeling van een duurzame, lokale energie-economie.

Benieuwd wat wij voor u kunnen betekenen? Stuur ons een berichtje en wij nemen snel contact met u op.

Name: W2H2 Waste to Hydrogen
Description:
Spółka W2H2 jest startupem założonym przez naukowców Politechniki Gdańskiej oraz inżynierów specjalizujących się w budowie instalacji gazowych i odnawialnej energii. Spółka zamierza rozwijać opracowaną przez zespół Prof. dr hab. inż.  Bogusława Kusza technologię  o nazwie „Reaktor i sposób do pirolizy odpadów przemysłowych lub komunalnych, oraz do redukcji i oczyszczania gazu pirolitycznego z ciężkich węglowodorów i cząstek węgla”.

Zbudowaliśmy prototyp urządzenia i przeprowadziliśmy serię badań procesu pirolizy RDF dokumentując skład gazu pirolitycznego uzyskanego w wyniku prób. Badania laboratoryjne wykazały, że w składzie gazu pirolitycznego dominują H2 (49%), CO (18%) oraz CH4 (11%).

Na podstawie badań pola temperatur, ciśnień i sposobów przemieszczania RDF rzeczywistego reaktora oraz dzięki badaniom specjalnie opracowanego modelu numerycznego wiemy, że jest możliwe przeskalowanie obecnego prototypu reaktora do urządzenia przemysłowego o wydajności przetwarzania  minimum 150-200kg/h.

W tym celu powołaliśmy startup, na którego zostały przeniesione prawa patentowe naukowców i którego zadaniem jest doprowadzenie do komercjalizacji tej technologii.
Wdrażana przez spółkę W2H2 technologia rozwiązuje za jednym razem dwa istotne problemy związane polityką klimatyczną naszego kraju i naszej planety : problem zagospodarowania składowisk odpadów z tworzyw sztucznych bez powodowania szkodliwej emisji związków chemicznych i dwutlenku węgla  oraz pozyskanie wodoru jako paliwa przyszłości.

Name: TTS Inova – textile Erdsonde
Description:
Die textile Erdsonde von TTS Inova AG ist in Gebieten mit Grundwasservorkommen zulässig. Es besteht kein Risiko, dass bei ihrem Einbau oder durch die Sonde selbst umweltschädliche Stoffe ins Erdreich gelangen. Aufgrund der koaxialen Geometrie und der Nutzung des Grundwassers erreicht die textile Erdsonde eine höhere Effizienz als herkömmliche. 

Die neuartige textile Erdwärmesonde besteht aus einem rundgewebten Schlauch und innenliegender Abdichtung aus lebensmittelkonformem Silikon. Beim Kontakt mit dem feuchten Erdreich dehnt sich das Schlauchgewebe aus und schmiegt sich an die Bohrlochwand an. Eine Hinterfüllung mit dem üblichen Gemisch aus Zement und Bentonit ist nicht nötig. Als Wärmeträgerflüssigkeit wird Trinkwasser ohne chemische Zusätze verwendet. Dank der höheren Wärmeausbeute besteht keine Frostgefahr. 

TTS Inova liefert nicht nur die Sonde, sondern verlegt sie auch. Dazu hat das Unternehmen eine spezielles Einbauverfahren entwickelt. Die Erdsonde kann bis zu einer Tiefe von 450 m verlegt werden.

Name: FIBERLY Solar Optics
Description:
Expanding the renewable energy sector by offering a novel solution for affordable, sustainable and healthy indoor illumination.

Imagine a world where indoor lighting provided the same well-being and health benefits as being outside, at virtually no electricity costs, by employing the greatest source of energy and light at our disposal - the Sun! This is the mission FIBERLY Solaroptics aims to achieve through the development of the world's first Solar Fiber Optics Collector that uses nanostructured optical materials in it's design.

A Solar Fiber Optics Collector is an optical panel which focuses sunlight into fiber optic cables. These then route light itself into indoor spaces for direct use as illumination. This collector is installed similarly to a photovoltaic panel, be it the in the roof of your home, or of your business's infrastructure, significantly reducing your monthly illumination expenses.

Our design disrupts conventional solutions with a breakthrough innovation of using cost-efficient fresnel microlenses fabricated through roll-to-roll lithography technology. This way, the amount of resources consumed during production is greatly reduced, minimizing material consumption and fabrication cost. Our objective is to expand the available options for renewable energy solutions, by providing an affordable, sustainable and healthy product for everyone!

FIBERLY, Sun for the future.

Name: PEPPER Hydrogen project
Description:
PEPPER (Performant and Efficient Planar Proton-conducting Electrolysis Reactor) is an EU-funded research and innovation project accelerating the transition to sustainable green hydrogen production.

Green hydrogen is a key solution for decarbonising the energy system, reducing environmental harm, and fighting climate change. Yet, current production methods can’t keep pace with growing demand.

PEPPER is developing a novel electrochemical reactor based on planar proton-conducting ceramic electrolysis cells (PCCEL). Operating at 600°C, this technology integrates seamlessly with industrial waste heat, increasing efficiency while lowering energy use and emissions.

The project aims to validate core technologies, set new performance benchmarks, and deliver a roadmap for rapid scale-up, industrialisation, and commercialisation.

By making green hydrogen production more efficient and cost-effective, PEPPER supports Europe’s clean energy goals — and helps sectors like heavy transport, steel, and chemicals shift away from fossil fuels.

Name: Thermovolt Marine
Description:
ThermoVolt Marine is a marine technology venture focused on addressing one of the most overlooked stressors on ocean ecosystems: thermal pollution.

We develop a modular, ocean-deployable system that integrates three key approaches to mitigate heat stress in marine environments:

1) Detection — Smart buoy-based sensing networks that monitor localized ocean temperature anomalies in real time, making thermal pollution visible, measurable, and actionable for researchers, regulators, and maritime stakeholders.

2) Dispersion — Passive and low-energy thermal diffusers designed to reduce concentrated heat plumes from vessels and infrastructure, helping protect temperature-sensitive ecosystems such as seagrass beds, coral reefs, and marine fauna.

3) Energy Recovery — Thermoelectric systems that capture waste heat from marine operations and convert it into usable electrical power, supporting onboard systems and buoy instrumentation while reducing overall thermal discharge.

With over 1 million registered vessels in Florida alone, ThermoVolt Marine aims to bridge ocean science, engineering, and marine policy by offering scalable solutions that support ecosystem resilience amid rising global temperatures.

Our work sits at the intersection of ocean conservation, clean marine technology, and data-driven environmental stewardship, with the long-term goal of enabling healthier, more resilient oceans worldwide.

Name: 1H1 Labs Private Limited
Description:
1H1 Labs Private Limited is dedicated to the discovery of potent nanomaterials that have the prowess to address the requirements of a burgeoning Hydrogen based economy, including production, storage, consumption and other applications of Hydrogen.

The name 1H1 is inspired by the symbol of Hydrogen in the periodic table and signifies the most primitive atom in the act of Creation of matter; the remaining followed thereon. We strongly believe that the technology around Hydrogen is in its infancy and will require tremendous R&D initiatives before becoming a mainstream option for our daily needs for energy. 

Though currently in the laboratory and prototyping stage, we envisage to put together a robust engineering team to scale up the production, to meet the industry requirements for Hydrogen. Further, we look forward to build up strong tie-ups with the renewable, EPC and power trading verticals, for the actual manifestation of our productive endeavors.

We foresee quick reaping of efforts  towards decarbonization to happen only 
if the major industries with high carbon footprint embrace Hydrogen as the alternative to the current fossil fuel usage for addressing their energy needs. Fortunately, we have already begun active communications with such organizations and have been reciprocated with a warm expression of interest.

At present, we are looking at building the necessary infrastructure and manpower to propel our scientific investigations and would be interested to talk to potential investors for funding our effort. Besides, we are in constant lookout for curious, intelligent minds to contribute in scripting our success story. 

Our fundamental premise follows the straightforward scientific rationale of grasping the underlying Chemistry of the processes and manoeuvring them to reach the desired results. Our immediate manifesto is to reduce both, the CapEx and the OpEx of PEM electrolyzers, by designing novel catalysts.

Please contact communications@1h1labs.com

Name: GEFWIN Project
Description: GEFWIN aims to penetrate the Wind Energy Market with an patented automated composites manufacturing process named Rapid Tow Shearing (RTS). RTS is able to steer fibers without generating defects, drastically expanding the design potential of composite components. RTS will be implemented in the case of a small scale wind turbine blade. A design computational platform will be developed concerning the efficient interaction of design and simulation tools for the optimisation of the blade geometry. RTS will be compared with conventional processes, in the context of weight and mechanical strength performance. Sustainability assessments will be performed to evaluate RTS environmental impact.

Name: HUB Batteries French Riviera
Description:
Lancement du Hub Batterie French Riviera : Un projet industriel stratégique au cœur de la Côte d’Azur !

Et si les batteries usagées devenaient le levier d’une souveraineté énergétique locale et d’une économie circulaire ambitieuse ?

 De Toulon à Menton, nous lançons le Hub Batterie French Riviera, une initiative inédite dédiée au reconditionnement, à la réparation et à la valorisation des batteries lithium-ion issues de la mobilité, du stationnaire, et des usages industriels.

 Notre ambition :
 Transformer un déchet critique en ressource territoriale
 Créer une filière locale d’excellence autour de la seconde vie des batteries
 Réduire la dépendance aux importations de cellules neuves
 Générer des emplois qualifiés et non délocalisables
 Répondre aux objectifs de la transition énergétique et de la commande publique durable

 D’ici 2030, plus de 1,5 million de batteries seront en fin de vie rien qu’en région PACA. Notre Hub vise à en reconditionner localement plus de 90 %, avec une capacité cible de 1 000 tonnes par an.

 Porté par Point Énergie Solutions et ses partenaires, le projet s’appuie sur une double expertise :
 Une maîtrise technique de la chaîne batterie (diagnostic, BMS, assemblage, reconditionnement)
 Une vision stratégique alignée avec les politiques territoriales, l’économie circulaire et l’innovation deeptech

 Nous recherchons aujourd’hui :

Des collectivités et établissements publics souhaitant verdir leur parc batterie

Des industriels engagés dans la circularité

Des partenaires techniques, financiers et institutionnels pour co-construire ce modèle résilient

 Envie d’en savoir plus ? Échangeons !

Name: geopfalz GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Die geoPfalz GmbH & Co. KG entwickelt gemeinsam mit den Stadtwerken Schifferstadt, den Stadtwerken Speyer sowie den Kommunen Schifferstadt und Speyer das zukunftsweisende Geothermie-Projekt „Rhein-Pfalz“. 

Ziel ist es, die natürlichen geothermischen Ressourcen der Region zu erschließen – für eine klimafreundliche, versorgungssichere und dauerhaft bezahlbare Fernwärmeversorgung in der Pfalz. 

Die geopfalz GmbH & Co. KG ist eine gemeinsame Tochter der Stadtwerke Speyer GmbH und der Stadt Schifferstadt. 

Sie verantwortet die Planung, Koordination und Umsetzung der geothermischen Erkundungs- und Erschließungsmaßnahmen. Im Anschluss an die Erkundung folgt die Bohrphase, an die sich der Bau der Geothermieanlage anschließt. 

Ab 2030 ist die Auskopplung der gewonnenen Wärme in das regionale Fernwärmenetz vorgesehen. Das Projekt setzt auf Geothermie, die lokale, erneuerbare Energiequelle, um Preisstabilität zu schaffen, Klimaziele zu erreichen und die regionale Wertschöpfung zu stärken – mit der kommunalen Daseinsvorsorge als Leitgedanke.

Name: BLUENERGIA
Description:
Siamo i costruttori del FUTURO
L’obiettivo dei nostri progetti è la realizzazione di impianti capaci di ottenere grandi risultati in diverse applicazioni, con ampio incremento dell’efficienza ed una forte riduzione dei costi; ottimizzare l’utilizzo di energia raggiungendo il medesimo risultato; consumare meglio e in maniera più razionale con particolare attenzione alla qualità delle fonti utilizzate ed all’ impatto ambientale.
Il solare ha un forte impatto. Genera la tua energia pulita, proteggiti dai rialzi dei tassi e usa quei risparmi per potenziare la tua vita

BLUENERGIA ti aiuta nella scelta migliore per te, la tua famiglia o la tua azienda
Le energie rinnovabili sono fonti di energia che rispettano le risorse provenienti dal mondo naturale. Queste fonti di energia si rigenerano dopo ogni ciclo di utilizzo e per questo sono inesauribili.

L’impianto fotovoltaico consente di sfruttare l’energia solare per produrre energia elettrica, può essere sfruttato attraverso impianti tradizionali o con l’impiego di batterie per l’accumulo. A seconda delle caratteristiche dell’impianto realizzato, esso si adatta perfettamente sia alle esigenze domestiche che alle necessità industriali.

I sistemi di riscaldamento solare, invece, sono tecnologie di seconda generazione che attraverso collettori termici solari e serbatoi di accumulo, permettono di immagazzinare l’energia termica e mantenere la temperatura dell’acqua elevata per tempi più lunghi.

Name: DBQ Energy Systems B.V.
Description:
DBQ is importeur (NL / BE) van Akvaterm buffertanks en Jäspi E-Heating, afkomstig uit Finland.

BUFFERVATEN:
We leveren naadloos geïsoleerde buffervaten tot 10.000 liter, toepasbaar bij diverse energiesystemen aangaande verwarming en koeling. Onze buffertanks hebben nagenoeg geen warmteverlies door toepassing van speciale PUR isolatie, voorzien van een gesloten cel-structuur (warmteverlies: +- 1,1-1,9°C per etmaal).
Een combinatie van diverse systemen in één en dezelfde buffertank kan tot veel besparing leiden. Denk hierbij o.a. aan: extra energiebesparing, minder installatiekosten, minder plaatsingsruimte, minder warmteverlies en een betere terugverdientijd.
Zo hebben wij specifieke buffervaten voor meerdere sectoren, onder andere WTW tanks voor de melkveehouderij, uitmuntend geïsoleerde opslagtanks voor industriële warmteterugwinning, speciale tanks voor toepassing bij zonne-energie, houtvergassers, wkk installaties, e-heating en projecten met warmtepomp-systemen.

UW BUFFERVAT OP MAAT: we leveren ook maatwerk buffertanks in diverse uitvoeringen, speciaal ontworpen naar uw wensen. 

E-HEATING:
Wij zijn tegenwoordig ook importeur van Jäspi E-ketels, eveneens afkomstig uit Finland. Een leverancier met inmiddels tientallen jaren ervaring in elektrische verwarming, gespecialiseerd in hoge vermogens (31,5-1600kW).
Ontworpen middels vele jaren ervaring in het koude noordelijke klimaat.

Jäspi E-ketels worden o.a. toegepast: -als back up bij grote warmtepomp installaties -als stand alone-systeem, -aanvullend op andere apparatuur, -bij ruime eigen elektra opwekking, -bij voordelige inkoop van elektra op piekmomenten.

De producten van DBQ zijn allen afkomstig uit Finland, hierbij werkt
DBQ in nauw technisch overleg met fabrikant Akvaterm / Jäspi.

Zie ook onze website https://www.dbq.nl, waar u uitgebreide informatie vindt over de voordelen van onze systemen. Voormelde aangaande warmte opslag, warmteterugwinning, koeling en E-heating.

Bununla birlikte, dünyada yeni yeni kullanılmaya başlayan Growled teknolojisi ile endüstriyel tarım alanında da büyük başarılara da imza atmış bulunuyoruz. Description:
الشركة متخصصه في الصناعات الحديديه وتشمل الخدمات 
1- أعمدة الإنارة بجميع أنواعها( المسلوبه - الملضلعه - المدرجه - الهاي ماست - الملاعب - الديكوريه- الابراج  الهيكليه - ابراج المحمول - البلم تري )
2- الهياكل المعدنيه( الاستيل استركشر_ الجسور المعدنية- الغلايات - التنكات البترولية)
3- حوامل الكابلات  (كيبل تري- كيبل ليدر- كيبل ترنك)
4- اللوحات الكهربائيه بجميع أنواعها
5- توريد كابلات الطاقه وكشافات ألأنارة رؤية الشركة :

"شركتنا للصناعات  هي رائدة في الصناعات الحديديه ، ملتزمة بتقديم حلول صناعيه  مبتكرة وجودة عالية لعملائنا. نحن نسعى لتحقيق التميز في جميع جوانب أعمالنا وأن نصبح الشركة الأولى التي تتبادر إلى الذهن عندما يتعلق الأمر بالمشاريع الكبيرة والتحديات الصناعيه.

قيمنا :
تشتمل قيمنا على الجودة والابتكار والالتزام بالمواعيد وتحقيق رضا العملاء. نحن نضمن تنفيذ المشاريع بأعلى مستويات الجودة وفقًا للمواصفات والمعايير الدولية. نعتمد على فريق عمل مؤهل ومتخصص يتمتع بالخبرة والمهارات اللازمة لإنجاز المشاريع بنجاح.

قدراتنا :

تغطي قدراتنا جميع جوانب التصنيع ، بدءًا من التصميم الهندسي والتخطيط الأولي وصولاً إلى الإنشاء وإدارة المشروعات. نحن قادرون على تنفيذ مشاريع متنوعة وشاملة مثل المشاريع الخاصه بالصناعات الحديديه وتشمل صناعة الأعمده يجميع أشكالها وأنواعها، أبراج الكهربا المنخفض والمتوسط،أعمال الإنشأت المعدنيه(Steel Structure) . نحن ملتزمون بتقديم حلول مبتكرة واستخدام أحدث التقنيات والخامات لتحقيق الكفاءة والاستدامة.

علاقاتنا:

نحن أيضًا نركز على بناء علاقات قوية ومستدامة مع عملائنا وشركائنا. نحن نؤمن بأهمية التواصل الجيد والشفافية في جميع المراحل، ونعمل جنبًا إلى جنب مع العملاء لفهم احتياجاتهم وتحقيق رؤيتهم. نحن نسعى لتحقيق رضا العملاء الكامل وبناء علاقات طويلة الأمد مبنية على الثقة والاحترافية.

مسئولياتنا الاجتماعية و البيئية :

بالإضافة إلى ذلك، نحن نلتزم بالمسؤولية الاجتماعية والبيئية. نحن نهتم بتقديم مساهمة إيجابية في المجتمعات التي نعمل فيها، ونعمل على تقليل التأثير البيئي لمشاريعنا من خلال استخدام ممارسات تصنيع  مستدامة وتنفيذ تدابير الحفاظ على البيئة.

في شركتنا ، نهدف إلى تحقيق الريادة والتميز في الصناعات الحديدية ، وأن نكون الشركة المفضلة للعملاء والشركاء

Name: Archon GreenTech
Description:
Archon GreenTech is dedicated to addressing climate change through a multi-faceted approach that combines innovation, affordability, and environmental consciousness. With a mission to make a positive impact on the planet, the company focuses on developing cutting-edge technologies, manufacturing environmentally friendly products, and exploring alternative and renewable energy sources.

In the realm of technology, Archon GreenTech strives to create innovative solutions that contribute to sustainability. This may involve the development of energy-efficient devices, smart systems to reduce resource consumption, or advancements in recycling and waste management technologies. By emphasizing affordability, the company aims to make these innovations accessible to a broader audience, ensuring that positive environmental practices are not limited to a select few.

The manufacturing of environmentally friendly products is a key aspect of the startup's commitment to reducing its ecological footprint. From biodegradable materials to energy-efficient production processes, the company seeks to set new standards in eco-friendly manufacturing. This includes sustainable packaging solutions and a focus on the entire lifecycle of products, from sourcing materials to disposal.

Additionally, Archon GreenTech places a strong emphasis on the exploration and implementation of alternative and renewable energy sources. This may involve the development of solar, wind, or other clean energy technologies. By investing in these initiatives, the company aims to contribute to a future where reliance on fossil fuels is minimized, ultimately leading to a more sustainable and resilient energy infrastructure.

In summary, Archon GreenTech is driven by a holistic approach to combating climate change, encompassing technology, manufacturing, and energy solutions. By integrating affordability and innovation, the company aims to make a meaningful and widespread impact on the environment.

Name: Rhizome
Description:
What we do:
Rhizome contributes to the ecological bifurcation by developing the world’s greenest and most lucrative Long Duration Electricity Storage system (LDES) in the world (≥6h). Our system has the same range of Round-Trip Efficiency (RTE) as batteries or pumped storage hydropower, but it is:
-	far cheaper
-	more environmentally sustainable
-	designed to operate for 50-100 years
-	low-tech and relies on standard designs and non-critical materials, resulting in facilitated world scaling, short construction time and low-cost O&M.

Why?
-	To address the mismatch between intermittent renewable energy and the fluctuating consumption of end users by substituting gas.
-	To guarantee better and more recurring incomes from wind and solar PV farms, especially during peak productions.
-	To enable nuclear power to be more profitable with higher load factors (lower O&M costs and more production).
All this encourages greener electricity and lower prices, which leads to:
-	A drop in carbon emissions by substituting fossil fuels use.
-	Less energy precarity for end users.
-	More competitivity for industrials.
-	Reinforced energy sovereignty.
-	Relocated jobs.
-	Less debt by improved trade balance. 

How?
Compressed Air Energy Storage system (CAES) stores electricity by compressing air into pressure vessels or underground cavities with a motor. This air is then expanded to recover electricity with an alternator. 
Rhizome’s bold promises are powered by two breakthrough innovations: the first consists of a very new kind of hydro pneumatic compression system. This system enables quasi-isothermal compression with much better RTE than the 2 previous CAES generations, while sharply lowering prices. The second innovation drastically lowers the price of pressure vessels.

Who?
Impact engineers and entrepreneurs, green tech fundraising expert and the best CAES expert team from our research partner IFPEN: the leading European research institute in LDES systems.

Name: WHOLEVOLT TECHNOLOGIES PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
We are pioneering the use of quantum phenomena in next-generation magnetic semiconductors to engineer junctionless optoelectronic devices — unlocking new performance frontiers in flexibility, transparency, and indoor light harvesting.

At the core of our innovation are transparent and semitransparent flexible indoor photovoltaic (IPV) modules, capable of efficiently capturing ambient light from LED, fluorescent, and natural indoor sources.

Our mission is to free everyday electronic devices from batteries, wires, and their environmental impacts, delivering clean, reliable, aesthetic, and scalable power —  from milliwatts to hundreds of watts — through breakthrough materials and manufacturing innovation.

Starting from transparent, flexible indoor photovoltaic modules that harvest ambient light to eliminate batteries and wires, our technology roadmap extends beyond indoor photovoltaics into non-linear optoelectronics for dynamic light control; low-light imaging and sensing; neuromorphic and edge AI devices; and brain-computer interfaces (BCI). Ultimately, we advance toward magneto-optical modulators, smart surfaces,  quantum communication; spintronic optoelectronics  and secure optical networks— creating a complete platform for sustainable, intelligent, and seamlessly connected world.

Name: EURO BATTERY GROUP
Description:
Switching to clean energy isn’t just about building more solar panels or wind turbines. The real challenge is what happens after the energy is generated. Where does it go when the sun isn’t shining? How do we make sure it’s available exactly when and where people need it?

The reality is, our energy systems were built for fossil fuels—power sources you can turn on at will. Renewables, while cleaner, are intermittent. To rely on them fully, we need smarter ways to store, manage, and distribute energy.

This is where we come in.

By solving the behind-the-scenes challenges, we’re turning clean energy into a true backbone for daily life—not just a backup.

By developing smarter storage and energy management systems, we help renewables work around the clock. Whether it’s storing solar power for evening use or balancing energy across regions, our solutions make clean energy dependable, scalable, and ready for the real world.

Because the future of energy isn’t just about generation—it’s about transformation.

– Hydrogen fueling infrastructure
– Biogas and APG processing
– On-site ammonia and synfuel production
– Flare gas utilization

Based in the UAE, serving global markets.

Name: Royco Robotics
Description:
RoyCo Robotics develops carbon-neutral control automation and sensor stream for equipment involved in energy production and completion phases. Transforming industrial automation by creating machines that reliably operate in rugged environments under limited network yet remotely controlled, their units are responsible for reducing carbon hotspots and scope-3 emissions while promoting intrinsic safety of workers.  

With vertical integration of instrument data, HMI, supervisory control, remote actuations and automated monitoring intelligence – RoyCo systems can be scheduled remotely from anywhere in the world and optimized via reinforcement machine learning together with real-time telemetry feedback. Their green lite system, called the GL-24, uses a hybrid engine to automate hydro-dynamics of the flowback process while collecting accurate sand weight information and maintaining triple leak detection across the process. Additionally, their RDA60 technology is able to collect 5-sec telemetry of temperature, water, oil and gas in separators, enabling a 120x improvement in speed of decision making and real-time actionable strategy.  

RoyCo Robotics is solving field limitations with specialized hardware and software that enables precise yet safe remote actuation, energy extraction and waste management in unstructured environments, enabling vastly economical application of robotics in the energy industry. On average, just one RoyCo unit deployed for a day saves as much energy as used by an American household in a month and reduces as much C02 that would be produced by 10 cars in a day.

Our core principles:

We've completed R&D and are deploying our first pilot projects. Our systems bridge the gap between renewable energy generation and reliable power needs, reducing emissions while providing more dependable operation with lower maintenance.

De inbyggda miljösensorerna, som samlar data om omgivningen, exempelvis luftkvalitet, temperatur och ljudnivå. Med en robust och väderbeständig konstruktion är våra urbana möbler anpassade för nordiska förhållanden. De passar utmärkt i parker, stadskärnor, universitetsområden och kommersiella fastigheter, där de förbättrar både tillgänglighet och upplevelse för besökare.

Kuube-produkterna hjälper kommuner och företag att stärka sin hållbarhetsprofil och skapa mer attraktiva, smarta offentliga miljöer. Genom att investera i solcellsdrivna gatumöbler tar ni ett steg mot en smartare och mer hållbar framtid.

SmartKerb is the revolutionary new answer to the electric vehicle charging market. We have developed and patented an electric vehicle charging station designed as a street kerbstone with an innovative software app.

The zero-emission vehicle (ZEV) mandate sets out the percentage of new zero-emission cars and vans manufacturers will be required to produce each year. By 2035, 100% of new cars and vans will be sold at zero-emission, but how will this be possible when six million households are dependent on on-street parking with no access to charging points? 

SmartKerb is offering the EV infrastructure solution - an on-road parking alternative to provide property developments, local councils, and private owners with aesthetically pleasing, safe, and convenient charging stations.

We envision a network of charging points that removes the current stress and inconvenience of vehicle charging.  No more trailing cables, bulky ‘pods’, or waiting around at charging stations. 

SmartKerb is the scan, plug, and go solution ready to meet the demands of the UK’s EV charging and parking needs.

Name: VERMES SOC Technology
Description:
We provide the most efficient and clean energy technology for industries with emission-free power generation and energy storage.
Solid Oxide Fuel Cells (SOFCs) have standout qualities that make them highly attractive in the energy conversion space. 
They directly convert chemical energy into electricity via electrochemical reactions, minimizing energy losses. Electrical conversion efficiency are beyond 60%, and can reach 80–85% in co-generation setups.

Our SOFC Stacks allow a wide Fuel Flexibility:
Internal reforming allows conversion of methane and other fuels into usable hydrogen and CO within the cell. This flexible operation allows to use  hydrogen, natural gas, biogas, syngas, and even hydrocarbons.

Our most modern Solid Oxide Cells (SOC) solutions are based on our decades of fine ceramic technology and engineering knowhow. With our fuel cell and electrolysis solutions, we support industries to decarbonize.
We provide the most efficient and clean energy technology for industries with emission-free power generation and energy storage.

Name: HDsolar BH
Description:
Naše poslovanje predstavlja odgovor na važan trenutak tranzicije energetskog sektora u Bosni i Hercegovini. S obzirom na to da je zemlja potpisala sve sporazume o prelasku sa fosilnih goriva na obnovljive izvore energije do 2030. godine, te da već, prema procjenama stručnjaka, kasnimo deset godina, naša kompanija prepoznaje priliku i odgovara na izazov.

Svako ko ozbiljno razmišlja o budućnosti, bilo da je riječ o pojedincima ili kompanijama, trebao bi iskoristiti sve mogućnosti i kapacitete za ulaganje u vlastita postrojenja za proizvodnju električne energije iz obnovljivih izvora a prije svega iz zelene energije sunca. U protivnom, suočit će se s izazovom plaćanja znatno viših troškova za električnu energiju u budućnosti.

Umjesto da se oslanjamo na tradicionalne modele, mi promoviramo autonomiju i održivost kroz vlastita postrojenja za proizvodnju električne energije iz obnovljivih izvora. Shvaćamo da će budućnost donijeti tržišnu cijenu električne energije, te se pripremamo za taj trend. Naša misija je omogućiti klijentima, posebno onima s ograničenim prostorom za fotonaponske solarne panele, da iskoriste svoje nepokriveno parkiralište kao resurs za proizvodnju zelene, obnovljive električne energije.

Naša rješenja uključuju moderne konstrukcije koje natkrivaju parkirališta i istovremeno služe kao platforma za fotonaponske solarne panele. Uz to, nudimo i instalaciju punjača za električna vozila, kao i baterija za pohranu energije.

Naš cilj je pružiti klijentima mogućnost da postanu energetski neovisni, smanje troškove energije i doprinesu zaštiti okoliša.

Name: Solis Power
Description:
Solis Power is a solar thermal infrastructure company developing and manufacturing dispatchable, 24/7 baseload power systems using concentrated solar power (CSP), long-duration thermal energy storage, and integrated industrial power cycles.

Founded in 2021 by Dr. J. Chris Ford, Solis Power was created to address a core limitation of the energy transition: while renewable generation has become cost competitive, it has not reliably delivered firm, dispatchable power at infrastructure scale.

Solis Power’s platform converts intermittent solar resources into infrastructure-grade thermal assets capable of replacing fossil baseload generation for utilities, data centers, and energy-intensive industrial facilities. By integrating high-temperature solar concentration, long-duration molten-salt thermal storage, and proven power generation technologies, Solis delivers predictable performance without fuel price volatility or carbon emissions.

Solis Power is designed for institutional deployment, with standardized project governance, long-life assets, and scalable replication across global markets.

Name: TroughPower
Description:
During the coldest days of winter, Hydro-Québec's capacity is exceeded during peak hours, which is very costly for the state company and taxpayers. The solution currently proposed by Hydro-Québec is based on reducing consumption by reducing the temperature in the house. This proposal is associated by many with a reduction in comfort.
Instead of sacrificing comfort in the home, TroughPower wants to offer electricity-powered heating systems with the ability to store energy thermally ahead of need to avoid demand during peak hours.
Although the technology is applicable to several issues related to demand during peak periods, the current vision of the product is to offer an alternative to the traditional electric baseboard by offering the thermal storage capacity to heat a room during peak demand.

Was bedeutet „Intelligente Gebäudetechnik“? Für uns ist es viel mehr als eine leere Phrase, es ist ein Grundsatz. Eine Leitlinie, nach der wir unsere gesamten Arbeitsabläufe ausrichten. Technik - egal ob in Sachen Heizen, Lüften, Kühlen oder Sanitär - ist ein fest in unserer DNA verankert. Wir lieben es, uns gemeinsam mit unseren Kunden Herausforderungen zu stellen und diese mit durchdachten Lösungen zu meistern.

Manchmal heißt das auch, einen zunächst gefassten Plan nochmal anzupassen und einen mutigen Weg zu gehen. Vertrauen ist hier das Zauberwort – Vertrauen, das uns unsere Kunden nach 160 Jahren Erfahrung gerne entgegen bringen.

Wir sind immer auf der Suche nach der optimalen Zusammenstellung von Komponenten,
Systemen und Installationsmöglichkeiten – ganz individuell auf das jeweilige Projekt abgestimmt. Standard gibt es bei uns nicht, das ist unser Weg: So entsteht „Intelligente Gebäudetechnik“.

Name: Canto Systems
Description:
East Africa has long relied on imported lithium-ion batteries, which are costly, take time to deliver, and are not tailored to the region’s specific needs. 

The lack of local manufacturing makes it harder to support growing demand for clean energy, especially in electric transport, grid backup, and rural electrification.

This overdependence limits progress. High energy storage costs slow down clean transport adoption, leave off-grid communities underserved, and make local businesses less competitive. Without affordable, reliable battery solutions, East Africa risks falling behind in the global energy transition—despite having abundant renewable resources.

Canto Systems is changing this through UMESA—a project to build East Africa’s first lithium-ion battery factory in Kenya’s Rift Valley, close to a major geothermal power source.

The plant will supply batteries designed for regional needs, supporting electric mobility, grid storage, and off-grid power. By producing locally and using clean energy, we’re reducing costs, improving access, and building a more self-reliant, sustainable energy future for the region.

Specialties:Battery manufacturing, energy storage, electric mobility, off-grid power, sustainable industry.
