Name: Kinmen OPV Pioneers
Description:
Kinmen OPV Pioneers has developed a feasible & scalable approach to producing All-Polymer Non-Fullerene Flexible Semi-Transparent Organic Photovoltaic (OPV) Solar Cells by leveraging the Slot-die coating technique. The Company has also developed a mini-emulsion technique to produce conjugated polymer nanoparticles using a specific blend. This technology allows the quality of the nanoparticle ink to be maintained, which in turn has no negative effects on OPV performance. To realize high-performance transparent organic photovoltaics, the company has shifted the active-layer absorption spectrum to the infrared region by designing new low-bandgap donors and non-fullerene acceptors and reducing the invalid absorption by developing new transparent electrode materials and transforming the donor and the acceptor materials into waterborne inks. The organic photovoltaic cells developed will fulfill the requirements of low cost, high efficiency and prolonged lifetime with advantages such as lightweight, semitransparency, and mechanical flexibility.

OPVs offered by the company is a quite relevant & cost-effective technology, making them easy to deploy and use in innovative ways, such as integrating into buildings and windows, used in architectural design, wearable applications, etc. The morphology of non-fullerene acceptors (NFAs) enables the rapid progress of organic solar cells (OSCs) in power conversion efficiencies to over 18%, endowing OSCs with great potential for real-world application. These OPVs also have lower carbon emissions and are less harmful to the environment than conventional solar cells and panels because of the high-power conversion rate of the energy. The Company’s OPV solar cells have a unique competitive positioning as they have more morphological & mechanical robustness along with excellent bending resistance with better chemical & light stability. Furthermore, it is more environmentally friendly due to the use of halogen-free & waterborne technology.

Name: Primae Tech
Description:
What is the key for every person in the planet to have a great life?

Energy! If we aim a European way of life for all mankind, we need to triple existing energy sources. Simply put, it is not possible. There is not enough energy for everyone, and the need to avoid a climate disaster makes the problem even more challenging.

Pure electric “renewables” alone, such as wind, solar and EVs, will not make it happen, as they are a tiny 2% of all energy sources and very expensive, well beyond the reach of the poor communities.

So, we looked at the energy scarcity problem from a different perspective: 

The engine.

Engines convert fuel, which is 90% of world energy source, into power for transport, equipment, and electricity generation. 

The catch is that legacy engines are an obsolete, century-old technology, that convert only one third of its fuel potential into power.

Now imagine the impact we would make, right now, if we could overnight double that, converting two thirds of fuel into power. 

We have developed a new engine that do just that, doubling the available energy to run cities, factories, vehicles, ships, planes, and equipment, with added potential to reach the near impossible full efficiency that can very well triple the output of power available, using the same resources.
Power to run the world where everyone has a better life.

This new engine is designed to run on future hydrogen fuel and flexible enough to run with existing cleaner fuels, such as biofuels and natural gas.
It bridges the present to a net-zero future, speeding up energy transition with immediate economic and social benefits and yet, much lower carbon emissions.

That is our purpose, to make a better life for all humanity, while protecting our planet. 

That’s what we set up to do from day one. 

Based on fundamental research done by the University of Stanford, we developed this new engine from concept to prototype and now we are racing for serial production.

We are PRIMAE.

Name: SI PV Service GmbH
Description:
Willkommen bei SI PV Service GmbH - Ihrem Partner für die Installation von Photovoltaik-Anlagen

Über uns
Bei SI PV Service GmbH haben wir uns darauf spezialisiert, hochwertige Photovoltaik-Anlagen zu installieren, um Ihnen dabei zu helfen, saubere und nachhaltige Energie zu erzeugen. Mit langjähriger Erfahrung und einem engagierten Team von Experten sind wir stolz darauf, einer der führenden Anbieter für Photovoltaik-Installationen in Österreich und Umgebung zu sein.

Unsere Dienstleistungen umfassen:

1. Beratung und Planung
Wir bieten umfassende Beratungsdienste, um die optimale Lösung für Ihre Anforderungen zu finden. Von der Auswahl der richtigen Solarmodule bis hin zur maßgeschneiderten Planung Ihrer Anlage.

2. Installation 
Unser erfahrenes Installationsteam sorgt für eine reibungslose und effiziente Installation Ihrer Photovoltaik-Anlage.

3. Wartung und Reparatur
Ihre Zufriedenheit steht bei uns an erster Stelle deshalb bieten wir regelmäßige Wartungsdienste. Bei Bedarf stehen wir auch für Reparaturen und Notfallinterventionen bereit.

Warum Photovoltaik?

Umweltfreundlich:
Photovoltaik-Anlagen produzieren saubere, erneuerbare Energie und reduzieren die CO2-Emissionen erheblich.

Kosteneinsparungen: 
Durch die Nutzung von Solarstrom können Sie Ihre Energiekosten erheblich senken und langfristig Geld sparen.

Unabhängigkeit: 
Mit einer eigenen Solaranlage sind Sie unabhängiger von steigenden Energiepreisen und Netzausfällen.

Förderungen: 
In Österreich gibt es oft attraktive Förderprogramme und Anreize für die Installation von Photovoltaik-Anlagen.

Kontaktieren Sie uns
Wenn Sie mehr über die Vorteile von Photovoltaik erfahren möchten oder eine Beratung zur Installation Ihrer eigenen Anlage wünschen, kontaktieren Sie uns gerne. Unser Team steht Ihnen jederzeit zur Verfügung.

Wir freuen uns darauf, Ihnen bei der Nutzung der Kraft der Sonne zu helfen und gemeinsam eine nachhaltigere Zukunft zu gestalten.

Name: AMYLION
Description:
AMYLION: Bio-based innovation for gas humidification. Specializing in bio-based materials, Amylion designs and manufactures bio-based membranes, free from PFAS, made from proteins derived from whey.
Through green chemistry processes, AMYLION develops value-added materials from a biocompatible and biodegradable protein material, utilizing co-products from the agri-food industry. Among other applications, our membranes are particularly used in proton exchange membrane fuel cells (PEMFC), where controlling hydration is a key factor for efficiency, power density, and lifespan of the cells. Thanks to their selective permeability to water vapor, while being impermeable to (liquid) water and impermable to gases such as hydrogen and oxygen, our membranes are ideally suited for PEMFCs, thus optimizing their performance. In addition, we are currently in the development phase of a humidification prototype based on a flat membrane system.

Name: Matrix Power Technologies
Description:
Matrix, A Leader in Integrated Power Systems
Specializing in a wide - ranging portfolio of integrated power systems, our unwavering commitment to innovation, quality, and sustainability has propelled us to the vanguard of providing state - of - the - art power solutions for Telecom, AI Data Center, Residential, Commercial, and Industrial clients.
In the Telecom sector, Our indoor and outdoor telecom power systems, combined with embedded power and solar hybrid systems, present flexible and compact power - delivery options. The hot - swappable rectifier in our systems boasts an impressive 97% efficiency rate. Its high - density and high - reliability design make it suitable for nearly all telecom power setups. 
For AI Data Centers, Matrix's innovative Battery Backup System (BBS) is a game - changer. The BBS can be effortlessly installed within the IT cabinet, eliminating the need to occupy additional space in the data center. This not only maximizes the utilization of valuable data - center real estate but also simplifies the overall power infrastructure. The BBS comes with several advantages, including high energy efficiency, hot - pluggable capabilities for the rectifier, battery, and controller. Its simplified power architecture helps customers reduce both capital expenditure (CAPEX) and operational expenditure (OPEX). 
In the Renewable Industry, we have been consistently delivering intelligent, reliable, and cost - effective ESS products and solutions to the global market. Our offerings have significantly enhanced our standing as one of the top suppliers of Residential and Commercial & Industrial ESS systems, Ultra - fast EV Chargers, and Balcony PV & Storage Kits. Whether it's a homeowner looking to reduce their energy bills or a large - scale commercial enterprise aiming to achieve sustainability goals, Matrix's renewable - energy solutions are tailored to meet a wide spectrum of needs.

Name: Monetec
Description:
We specialize in the sector of renewable energies, focusing on the design, installation and sale of large photovoltaic systems. Originally from Germany and now also in Spain, we have deeply rooted our understanding of the local market and its regulations since 2015. So far, our partner companies have realized over 150 major projects, mainly rooftop installations, with a funding volume of 80 million euros, delivering a total capacity of 60 megawatts. Together, our own partner companies manage 80 megawatts, equivalent to the capacity of 8,000–12,000 smaller rooftop installations typically found on private homes.

Our success in Germany got us thinking bigger – globally, in fact. That's why we started Monetec GmbH, with its heart in Vienna, Austria. Stepping away from our traditional approach, we're now embracing tokenization – a modern way to finance. With Monetec, we offer digital securities via blockchain technology. This tech not only makes investing secure and transparent, but also lets everyone make a meaningful impact on green energy production and enjoy the financial rewards from various projects.

We're sidestepping the usual red tape, investing across borders into new projects faster and more smoothly than ever. This means no heavy contracts, no endless waiting for approvals and no need to get bogged down in the details. With ownership of MTC tokens, you're automatically part of all Monetec's projects. Our philosophy? – Keep it simple.

Over a three-year funding round starting in June 2024, we aim to secure an investment volume of 21 million euros through our private placement to funnel into new projects. Tokenization opens up vast, new markets and opportunities. This flexibility lets us not just invest in and manage solar power installations but also engage in cutting-edge projects, including grid operation, installation certifications, green renovations, real estate and more.

The world is full of fast and exciting developments. Be a part of this journey.

Name: Chukanov Energy LTD
Description:
Explore the World of Quantum Energy!
DiscoverDr. Kiril Chukanov was born and raised in Bulgaria. In 1963, Kiril Chukanov graduated with a Bachelor of Architecture and Civil Engineering degree from the Sofia Architectural College, located in Sofia, the capital of Bulgaria. He then studied civil engineering from 1963-1965 at the Engineering Institute in Sofia. In 1965, Kiril Chukanov went to the Engineering Institute in St. Petersburg, Russia, where he received his Master’s degree in Technology in 1969. Dr. Chukanov continued his education in Moscow, Russia, where he received his Ph.D. in thermodynamics in 1977. In the period 1969-1988, Dr. Chukanov worked in various positions – production manager, research assistant, professor at university. From 1988 to the present day, Dr. K. Chukhanov has been a professor at the University of Warsaw. Chukanov works exclusively in the field of quantum energy. In 1988-1990 in Bulgaria he funded his work in the field of quantum energy mainly through the state organization NISA (which no longer exists). During this period he received technical assistance from various persons to whom he is very grateful. In 1990, Dr. Chukanov was invited to a small company MPI based in California, USA, where he continued his research and obtained his first US patent on quantum energy. Between 1990 and 1992, Dr. Chukanov worked on his quantum free energy project at Genmark Automation in Silicon Valley. His work was supported by Genko Genov, the owner of this company.

 For a short period of time (1992-1993), Dr. Kirill Chukanov worked on the problem of cold nuclear fusion at the University of Utah. In 1993, Dr. Kirill Chukanov founded General Energy International, a company based in Salt Lake City, Utah. Later, in 1996, Dr. Chukanov founded another research company, Chukanov Quantum Energy, LLS, which exists today.

CTC soojuspumbad on osa Põhjamaade tuntud CTC brändist, mille juured ulatuvad üle 100 aasta soojuslahenduste alal.

Tõhusaid maa-, õhk-vesi ja teisi soojuspumpasid, mis võivad vähendada küttekulusid kuni 85 % võrra. 
Paindlikku ja tulevikukindlat süsteemi EnergyFlex, mis võimaldab ühendada mitmeid energiaallikaid (sh päikesepaneelid ja muud kütteallikad). 
Nutikaid juhtimisvõimalusi läbi myUplink-rakenduse, mis teeb küttesüsteemi haldamise lihtsaks ja mugavaks.

Kliendile suunatud lahendused, energiatõhusus ja keskkonnasäästlikkus on meie töö keskmes. CTC soojuspumbad aitavad luua mugavama elukeskkonna ning toetavad Eestis toimuvat rohelist energiamuutust.

Name: SonnenPlan GmbH
Description:
Die SonnenPlan GmbH mit Sitz in Zweibrücken ist ein führendes Unternehmen im Bereich der erneuerbaren Energien und der Energieeffizienz-Technologien. Seit unserer Gründung im Jahr 2005 haben wir uns darauf spezialisiert, maßgeschneiderte Lösungen für private und gewerbliche Kunden anzubieten. Unser Schwerpunkt liegt auf der Planung und Errichtung von Photovoltaikanlagen – mit und ohne Batteriespeichern – sowie dem Einbau von Wärmepumpen in Bestandsgebäuden. Auch mit konventionellen Heizkörpern.

Unser erfahrenes Team aus Ingenieuren, Technikern und festangestellten Handwerkern verfügt über umfassende Expertise und setzt modernste Technologien ein, um effiziente und nachhaltige Heizlösungen zu realisieren. Durch den Einsatz von Wärmepumpen helfen wir unseren Kunden, den Energieverbrauch zu senken und den CO2-Ausstoß zu reduzieren, was sowohl ökologisch als auch ökonomisch von Vorteil ist.

Die Zufriedenheit unserer Kunden steht für uns an erster Stelle. Das spiegelt sich auch in den zahlreichen positiven Rezensionen auf Google wider. Kunden loben unsere Professionalität, die präzise Planung und die zuverlässige Umsetzung der Projekte. Besonders hervorgehoben werden die transparente Kommunikation und unser exzellenter Kundenservice, der stets auf die individuellen Bedürfnisse eingeht.

Mit einer Vielzahl erfolgreich abgeschlossener Projekte in Zweibrücken und der umliegenden Region haben wir uns als vertrauenswürdiger Partner für die Installation von Wärmepumpen und Solarstromanlagen, auch PV-Anlagen genannt, etabliert. Die SonnenPlan GmbH steht für Qualität, Kompetenz und Kundennähe. Lassen Sie uns gemeinsam die Zukunft mit nachhaltiger und effizienter Energie gestalten.

#Nachhaltig #Regional #Sicher

Name: onRe:volt
Description:
NTW Wind Systems presents a vision of an energy-independent future, emphasizing the need for self-produced energy to reduce CO2 emissions and break free from fossil fuels. The rising costs of electricity and gas in Europe, projected to increase by 27% and 45% respectively in the latter half of 2024, highlight the urgency of this transition. Poland’s energy mix, heavily reliant on coal, results in one of the highest carbon footprints in Europe at 866 g CO2 per kWh.

With 10 million buildings in Medium Size European Country not meeting energy efficiency standards, NTW proposes comprehensive modernization solutions. These include high-efficiency energy buffers, modern storage systems like LiFePo4 batteries, and the integration of renewable energy technologies. The goal is to optimize energy use and maximize the consumption of produced energy.

A standout innovation is their wind turbine, featuring transparent, lightweight wings made from recycled PET bottles. Designed for low wind conditions prevalent in 90% of Europe, this turbine starts generating power at wind speeds as low as 1 m/s. Complementing this is a heliostat system that enhances photovoltaic panel output by up to 30%, ensuring continuous energy production even when the wind is still.

NTW’s holistic approach includes a low-emission home scheme that integrates wind turbines, solar panels on heliostats, heat pumps, and energy storage to maximize self-consumption. Their business model offers two options: a 10-year contract with monthly payments 20% lower than current bills, or an OZE loan with a 50% subsidy, reducing costs by 10% during the investment payback period.

The team behind NTW is interdisciplinary, including physicists, engineers, and designers, dedicated to achieving energy independence. The company aims to install around 12 pilot systems in various European regions to demonstrate the viability of providing a safe, green future.

With an expected 20-year lifespan, remote access capabilities, and zero dependency on grid suppliers, E-CUBE is already proving itself as a game-changing solution.

Currently being produced and deployed as a Proof of Concept (PoC) in Abuja, Nigeria, the E-CUBE system enables cross-sectoral development across agriculture, health, education, cooling, and more—tailored to community needs.

 Proudly manufactured in Nigeria, the E-CUBE system supports job creation, local innovation, and knowledge transfer. Our vision is to build a holistic energy ecosystem that empowers underserved communities while fostering economic growth.

At E-CUBE INNOVATIVE CONCEPT, in collaboration with LR GROUP we are committed to transforming power systems in emerging economies through data-driven solutions and sustainable infrastructure.

Name: ElecHydro
Description:
ElecHydro contributes to the global energy transition. We do this with a new generation of innovative electrolysers based on the Anion Exchange Membrane technology (AEM). Our goal is to develop highly efficient, fully adjustable and sustainable electrolysis systems with which green hydrogen can be produced at the lowest possible cost.

ElecHydro supplies and develops electrolysis systems based on AEM technology with the following Unique Selling Points:

    Controllability of the system from 0% to 100% This makes the system ideally suited to combine with intermittent sources such as solar and wind energy.
    Start-up speed of the system within one minute This is also important for the combination with intermittent sources such as solar and wind energy.
    Comparable or higher efficiency than comparable technologies This at both stack and system level (> 80% system efficiency)
    Low cost and fully recyclable (cradle to cradle).  We do this by making little or no use of precious metals such as iridium and platinum, a simpler stack design, and a less complex Balance of Plant (BoP).

Name: REVONIX TECHNOLOGIES PVT LTD
Description:
About Us

Revonix Technologies Pvt Ltd is a forward-thinking energy-tech company focused on designing and delivering next-generation power solutions. We specialize in advanced lithium battery pack assembly, intelligent energy storage systems, and embedded technologies aimed at enabling energy access, efficiency, and independence across India.

Our work spans across multiple sectors including residential and commercial energy storage, smart backup systems, and custom battery solutions for OEMs and technology partners. While our initial focus is on energy storage integration for solar applications, our long-term vision includes scaling into electric vehicle charging infrastructure, grid-interactive systems, and smart energy platforms.

Revonix is committed to developing modular, efficient, and AI-enabled solutions that serve the evolving needs of modern energy consumers — from homes and small businesses to industries and institutions. We are also actively investing in research and development to support innovation in battery intelligence, thermal management, and scalable power systems.

Core Areas of Work:

Lithium-based battery pack design and assembly

Renewable energy storage and backup systems

AI-integrated battery management and monitoring

EV charging infrastructure and power delivery systems (future scope)

Custom energy solutions for OEMs, startups, and integrators

Who We Serve:

Residential and commercial energy consumers

Solar installers and EPC companies

Off-grid and rural electrification partners

Electric mobility ecosystem (upcoming)

Institutions and industrial clients seeking custom energy solutions

Headquartered in Pune, Revonix Technologies is building toward a cleaner, smarter, and more energy-resilient India — without limits.

Name: 2G Station Hong Kong Limited
Description:
2G Station Hong Kong Limited was established out of our confidence from nearly 30 years of experience in the Asia Pacific power generation market, that Hong Kong, and its Central location in the heart of North and South Asia, is the perfect hub to introduce our climate-neutral renewable and hydrogen energy solutions as part of the ongoing energy transition for Hong Kong and the Asia Pacific region. 

Representing 2G Energy AG (2G) in Hong Kong, we are dedicated to leading, training, and supporting 2G's regional partner network in their efforts to provide competitive and excellent products and services to our regional customers.

2G Energy AG is one of the leading international manufacturers of gas engine power plants for the decentralized generation and supply of electricity and heat, by using CHP technology. 

Our gas engine product portfolio ranges between 20 kW and 4,500 kW electrical output, operating with natural gas, biogas as well on pure hydrogen and special gases like flare gas, syngas and LPG. Since 1995 we have commissioned over 8.000 technologically advanced and highly efficient CHP plants in over 50 countries. 

Considered as pioneers of stationary hydrogen-operated gas engines since 2008, we are the world's technology leader with over 30 units of pure 100% H2 power plants in commercial operation since 2014. 

Our H2 product line starts at 115kWel with the largest engine designed for 750kWel. All engines are fuel-flexible and can be operated on either Biogas, Natural gas or a mix of 0 to 100% Hydrogen gas. 

Further information about our H2 CHP Solutions can be found on our Website at https://www.2-g.com/en/hydrogen-chp/

Name: Greenvive
Description:
Our venture tackles rising cooling needs due to global warming and urban heat effects with a game-changing Cold Thermal Energy Storage (CTES) for room AC systems. This tech addresses cooling inefficiencies through a phase change mechanism, storing cold energy to enhance efficiency and reliability while easing grid pressure by charging off-peak. It promises notable cost savings, grid stability, and improved AC performance, benefiting AC companies with higher sales, reduced R&D costs, and broader market access.

As the world faces a potential 1.5°C temperature rise, threatening economic and health stability, our sustainable solution is timely. Targeting India as our initial market, we're tapping into its growth potential and our familiarity with local consumer behaviors. With a Serviceable Obtainable Market (SOM) of €40 million within a global Total Addressable Market (TAM) of €31.25 billion, our entry strategy includes patenting our CTES technology, licensing it to AC manufacturers, and starting with pilot projects for a wider deployment.

Distinguishing ourselves from competitors focusing on larger-scale applications, our solution is perfectly suited for residential settings, especially in hot and humid climates. Operating as a B2B enterprise, we plan to scale our product via partnerships and licensing, underpinned by ongoing market validation. Backed by support and funding from Universitat Politècnica de Catalunya's entrepreneurial body, we're set to significantly impact the cooling sector by providing an efficient, sustainable, and cost-effective alternative to conventional AC systems.

In einem neuartigen Kreislauf-Verfahren können u.a. proteinhaltige Futtergetreide effektiver genutzt und gespeicherte Inhaltsstoffe einer besseren Nutzung zugeführt werden. So reduziert das von BIOTECH ENERGY produzierte Futtermittel bei Rindern den Methanausstoß um bis zu 90 %.

– Proteinreiches Futtermittel
– Zweite Generation Bioethanol 
– Bio-Kohlendioxid, Bio-CO2

Diese BIOTECH ENERGY Konvertierungsanlage trägt somit zeitgleich und weltweit zum Klimaschutz, Ernährungssicherheit und dem Schutz der Umwelt bei. Auf die Nutzung weiterer Agrarflächen zu Lasten der Lebensmittelproduktion wird verzichtet.

Vi har nu fået bygget et lokalt værksted, som er åbent for unge, der ønsker et fællesskab og et sted at føre deres idéer ud i livet. Det hele begyndte med en simpel idé om at 3D-printe vindmøller. Vi søgte Tuborgfondet om 1.881 kr. til projektet – et beløb, der dengang føltes som rigtig mange penge. Men vi fik bevillingen, og det blev starten på en lang række fondsansøgninger.
Siden da har vi fået støtte til projekter som 3D-printede vindmøller, Drømmeværkstedet, solcellebænke, solcellesystemer, grøn ølbrygning – og meget mere. Resten af projekterne kan ses i bilaget. I alt har vi fået bevilget omkring 350.000 kr., hvilket har muliggjort mange fantastiske projekter.
Vi deltog også på Roskilde Festival med en solcelledrevet telefonoplader, hvor vi fik ladet cirka 500 telefoner op – helt gratis og med 100 % grøn strøm.
Og vi vil elske at få endnu flere unge med i Fysik Klubben – unge som os, der vil bruge fysik og teknik til at skabe en grønnere fremtid.

Name: DESIREE Project
Description:
Europe must accelerate its transition to climate neutrality by scaling up renewable hydrogen production, particularly for hard-to-abate sectors. Solid Oxide Electrolysers (SOEL) offer a high-efficiency solution but face challenges related to material degradation and high costs.

The DESIREE project addresses these challenges through a holistic, multi-level approach, advancing SOEL technologies at cell, stack and system levels. It will demonstrate a scalable, multi-stack 2x20 kW SOEL system integrating nanoparticle-infiltrated cells, enhanced stack architectures with durable TEC-gradient sealings, a modular hot box combined with a metal hydride compressor and advanced heat exchangers, advanced dynamic control strategies, and SST power electronics for optimised grid integration. These innovations aim to improve long-term durability and power density while reducing the Levelized Cost of Hydrogen, energy consumption, CAPEX and OPEX.

Circularity is embedded from the outset through the recovery of valuable materials from cells and end-of-life stacks, alongside validated accelerated-stress testing protocols to ensure reliable real-world performance. The project will validate a 40 kW SOEL system under relevant operating conditions, delivering robust performance, durability and techno-economic data. The consortium, comprising 12 partners from 6 countries, ensures a clear pathway from TRL 3 to scalable TRL 5. Aligned with the Clean Hydrogen JU, DESIREE will position the EU as a leader in next-generation electrolysis, advancing performance, sustainability and manufacturability.


The project is supported by the Clean Hydrogen Partnership and its members. Co-Funded by the European Union under Grant Agreement N° 101251323. However, the views and opinions expressed are those of the author(s) only and do not necessarily reflect those of the European Union or the Clean Hydrogen Partnership. Name: Origin21
Description: Origin21 is a retrofit solution to electric generators and transforms them in fuel efficient, low emissions machines. We do this by using a reactor technology that converts water into hydrogen-on-demand. The technology uses a remarkable cavitation science which creates a new type of hydrogen plasma fuel that not only cleans your engine as it runs, but lowers your fuel consumption by up to 50%. We are now able to replace traditional diesel generators completely using renewable energy sources such as biogas mixed with our hydrogen-on-demand. Our engines run cooler and harder and heat energy is harvested and reused to lower the hydrogen production energy requirements. The technology fits on standard engines but maximum benefit can be achieved by using an Origin21 engine. Our engines are custom built and tuned to give you the best performance with the lowest emissions. Why not ask for a pilot today. You don’t need to replace your existing diesel generators, just retrofit an Origin21 reactor to reap immediate savings.

Name: Will Nine Energy
Description:
Founded in 2008, Will Nine has continuously evolved and expanded its horizons. Initially established as a small factory specializing in photovoltaic support components, by 2010, we actively undertook various photovoltaic projects, steadily broadening our business scope. Starting in 2015, we took strategic steps to plan and establish a presence across the entire renewable energy sector.

In 2017, we solidified our position by entering into a strategic cooperation agreement with one of China’s leading photovoltaic panel manufacturers, marking a significant milestone in our industry penetration. Understanding the nuances of the renewable energy market, in 2020, we made significant investments in establishing a lithium battery energy storage production line, focusing on the production and R&D of household energy storage systems.

By 2022, responding to market demands, we initiated the research and development, as well as market positioning, of commercial energy storage products comparable to Tesla’s Megapack. Simultaneously, we partnered with prominent Chinese new energy vehicle manufacturers, offering our customers an all-encompassing new energy solution spanning from everyday living to transportation.

Our vision extends beyond becoming a leader in the field of renewable energy. It is about contributing to the protection of the global environment. Together with our clients, we strive to reduce carbon footprints, fostering a brighter, greener future.

Will Nine Energy, journeying with you towards a cleaner, greener future.

Name: Water Assisted Energy Inc (LA)
Description:
WAE | Revolutionizing Energy with Clean, On-Demand Hydrogen Solutions 

At Water Assisted Energy Inc. (WAE), we’re transforming the energy landscape with our disruptive Mini Cube technology—a compact, modular hydrogen production system delivering clean, on-demand hydrogen with unmatched efficiency and scalability.

 The WAE Mini Cube 

Compact Yet Powerful: Each cube measures just 3" x 3" with optimized 2.46” plates, producing 1 LPM baseline and scaling up to 4+ LPM per cube with adjusted voltage and amperage.
Scalable Design: 10 Mini Cubes configured in series within a compact 28" x 12" x 5" housing can deliver 40+ LPM of clean hydrogen—unprecedented output for its size.
Smart & Efficient: Advanced AI sequencing and PLC technology enable real-time optimization across 42 voltage lead points, maximizing control, efficiency, and hydrogen output.
Flexible Applications: Designed for e-bikes, electric vehicles, and industrial energy storage—scaling seamlessly to meet real-world demands.
 Why It Matters 
The WAE Mini Cube addresses critical energy infrastructure challenges:
 Grid Independence: Real-time hydrogen generation eliminates reliance on stored gas or external grid systems.
 Unmatched Scalability: From mobility solutions to industrial-scale energy production.
 Sustainable Impact: Clean, dry hydrogen production accelerates the shift toward a carbon-free future.

 Powering the Future
From e-bike range extenders to EV integrations and renewable energy storage, WAE delivers technology that scales from the smallest to the largest applications—making clean energy accessible, efficient, and impactful.

 Let’s Collaborate 
We’re partnering with manufacturers, energy leaders, and visionaries ready to redefine the future of energy.

Discover our innovative energy solutions at www.waterassistedenergy.com

#CleanEnergy #HydrogenTechnology #MiniCube #FutureOfEnergy #GreenHydrogen #MobilitySolutions #Sustainability

Name: Sentient Engines Pvt Ltd
Description:
Sentient Engines Pvt. Ltd. is a clean energy technology startup committed to revolutionising the way industrial gases are generated and consumed. We design and manufacture on-demand hydrogen and nitrogen gas generators using advanced electrolysis technologies like PEM and AEM, catering to industries, laboratories, mobility, and renewable energy applications.

Our innovative systems eliminate the need for high-pressure cylinders and centralised distribution by producing ultra-pure gases directly on-site, improving safety, efficiency, and sustainability. We serve industries and institutions across India and MENA (Middle East & North Africa) and successfully delivered our solutions including to the National Institute of Science and Technology, Oman.

We are also developing a next-generation hydrogen generator powered by scrap aluminium and water, a breakthrough technology that is also being explored by NASA and MIT. This circular approach to energy generation not only utilises waste material but also offers a cost-effective alternative to fossil fuels and conventional hydrogen production.

Sentient Engines is focused on empowering industries with scalable, eco-friendly, and smart gas solutions, helping businesses transition toward net-zero emissions. We’ve received grants, generated early revenue, and built a strong foundation of innovation and trust.

Join us as we lead the movement toward decentralised, clean energy—one generator at a time

Name: Energy Storage Technologies
Description:
At Energy Storage Technologies (EST), we are pioneering the future of energy storage with cutting-edge thermal battery solutions. Our mission is to revolutionize how energy is stored and utilized, enabling a sustainable and resilient energy future. By harnessing the power of renewable energy sources such as solar, wind, and off-peak electricity, we provide innovative thermal energy storage systems that ensure reliable power when it’s needed most.

Our Thermal Battery technology is designed to store excess heat and electricity from various sources, including concentrated solar power, wind farms, and even traditional coal or nuclear plants. This stored energy can then be released on demand to generate electricity or provide heat for industrial processes, HVAC systems, or other applications. Whether you’re looking to stabilize grid supply, reduce reliance on fossil fuels, or enhance energy efficiency, EST has the solution.

We are committed to empowering businesses and communities with sustainable energy solutions that reduce carbon footprints and contribute to a cleaner planet. With our advanced technology and a passionate team of innovators, we are leading the way toward a more secure and sustainable energy future.

Our Vision: To be at the forefront of global energy transformation by providing reliable, efficient, and scalable thermal energy storage solutions.

Our Mission: To deliver innovative thermal storage technology that enables the seamless integration of renewable energy into everyday life while reducing dependency on non-renewable resources.

At EST, we believe in innovation, sustainability, and reliability - values that drive us to continuously improve our technology and expand our impact on the world’s energy landscape.

Name: Just Energy Solutions BV
Description:
Just Energy Solutions BV, gevestigd in Waalwijk, heeft de afgelopen jaren geïnvesteerd in het ontwikkelen van de Waterbatterij. 
De Waterbatterij is een buffervat met elektrische heaters. Duurzaam opgewekte elektriciteit (van bijvoorbeeld zonnepanelen) wordt hiermee omgezet naar warmte. 
De Waterbatterij verwarmt bij voorkeur wanneer er elektriciteit 'over' is of de elektriciteitsprijs laag is. Tevens kan de Waterbatterij dienen als secundaire of tertiaire reserve bij onbalans en/of congestie. 

Deze gegenereerde warmte kan lokaal worden toegepast. Bijvoorbeeld voor ruimteverwarming of tapwater. De Waterbatterij is in vrijwel elk systeem te integreren en werkt samen met CV en warmtepomp.
 
De Waterbatterij is bij uitstek geschikt voor particulieren en bedrijven met (veel) zonnepanelen en een grote warmtebehoefte. Denk hierbij bijvoorbeeld aan SPA’s, wellnesscentra, sportverenigingen en zorginstellingen, maar ook aan wasserettes, (auto)wasstraten en vormen van procesindustrie.

Description: Our product is a solar panel cooling system that aims to solve the high cost of energy bills and the negative impact that traditional energy sources have on the environment. Name: Alphios Finergy
Description: It is an incontrovertible fact that Green Hydrogen could be a panacea for the decarbonization of many industries. With steel production contributing 7-9% of global CO₂ emissions (2.6 Gt annually), chemical manufacturing 5.8% (ammonia alone generating 500 Mt CO₂), and oil & gas operations 15% (5.1 Gt CO₂), green hydrogen offers transformative potential for these hard-to-electrify sectors. Using 55kgs of H2 for 1MT of Steel can reduce 95% of the CO2 emissions involved. However, traditional electrolysis faces significant barriers: limited round-cycle efficiency (65%), high energy consumption (55-60 kWh per kg H₂), cost parity requiring production below $50 kWh/kg, balance of plant comprising 55% of electrolyzer costs, ultrapure water accounting for 22% of expenses, and dependence on expensive platinum group and rare earth metals. Alphios addresses these challenges through five key innovations: (1) novel cell design using earth-abundant materials and recyclable catalysts, (2) mature foundation built on TRL 9 scalable, modular and stackable alkaline electrolysis technology (3) resource efficiency utilizing wastewater instead of ultrapure water to eliminate 22% of operational costs, (4) integrated carbon capture with in-situ CO₂ conversion to Syngas using pyrolysis and H+ mediation from the electrolysis system further converting into valuable electro-fuels accessing a $300 billion market, and (5) Our CAPEX is $560/KW as opposed to global CAPEX of $2780 and pyrolysis of CO2 with our catalyst is achieved under 700*C. This integrated approach delivers remarkable advantages: 70% cost reduction for green hydrogen, 75% greater throughput, and 79% lower CAPEX and can help achieve USD1/KG of Green H2.

Name: SEEEx
Description: SEEEx TECH Co., Ltd. (SEEEx TECH) was founded in 2021, locating its R&D centre in Suzhou, where it was awarded the title of Gusu Leading Enterprise. The company is an integrated electronic control supplier for hydrogen-lithium hybrid new energy systems and a solution provider for comprehensive scenarios. Oriented to the new electrified energy system, SEEEx TECH mainly provides integrated hydrogen power system solutions for hydrogen energy storage, emergency power supply, electric ships, light and heavy vehicles, high-load & long-endurance aircraft, etc. The company built the industry's first self-developed programmable integrated electronic control architecture. It provides composite drives with software and hardware integrated, covering high, medium, and low-frequency (SiC, GaN, and IGBT switching devices), as well as the integrated drive-control solution of MBD programmable secondary development control platform, which finally led to the realization of the innovation of hydrogen-lithium hybrid system from 1.0 paradigm (discrete) to 2.0 paradigm (integrated). Relied on the company's standardized hydrogen-lithium hybrid power generation module and its flexible topology combination, SEEEx TECH's products cover multiple power levels from hundred watts (air-cooled) to megawatts (water-cooled), which can meet the cost reduction need in new energy scenarios. Name: E3Mobility Inc
Description:
E3Mobility develops, manufactures, and sells ZEEC (Zero Emission EV Charging System), which is an off-grid EV charger.
Off-grid enables to disconnect to power lines provided by electricity companies and to charge EVs directly with electricity generated by solar panels. ZEEC achieves to charge EVs with 100% pure renewable energy without any mixing of power derived from thermal energy.

[Why do we do this?]
Our mission is to realize an economy that coexists with Ecology through Energy and Mobility.

Global warming and climate change issues, such as desertification and sea-level change, are threatening our lives, causing economic losses in the trillions of dollars globally. It is not only affecting humans, but is also damaging entire ecosystems through accelerating mass extinctions and devastating vegetation.

On top of that, mobility, which accounts for about 20% of total CO2 emissions, is the prominent cause of this issue, which turns out to promote EVs with the claim that "EVs are environmentally friendly because they emit zero CO2."

However, are these stereotypes really true?

As of 2023, about 70% of Japan's electricity is supplied by thermal power generation, which implies that EVs emit CO2 as long as they are charged with electricity from energy companies. Even if you use an "environmentally conscious energy company" with non-fossil certificate, the electricity supplied at night when most people charge their EVs comes from fossil fuels.

Again, as long as EVs are charged conventionally, we continue to emit CO2.

In order to resolve this dilemma of EV charging, it is indispensable to build decarbonized measures that use renewable energy. Our ZEEC (ZeroEmission EV Charger) is an innovative product that enables decarbonized mobility.

"Electric vehicles powered by renewable energy for all."
With the mission above, we will create a comfortable and prosperous future that can achieve environmental protection and economic growth by decarbonizing EVs through ZEEC.

Name: KTF Concept
Description:
At KTF Concept we (1) produce pellets based on waste from rice - rice husks, and (2) manufacture advanced pyrolytic cookstoves for smoke-free cooking.
Our clean cooking technology reduces carbon emissions and provides clean energy for our customers.
The Company is based in Bujumbura the capital city of Burundi. We plan to decentralize our production and establish 2 more production units respectively in the North and South of the Country.
We currently are implementing an EEP Grant aiming at increasing our pellet production capacity from an unstable one to 20 T per day by installing a pellet plant. A solar plant of 283 kW has already been installed for a greener production.
We have designed an efficient natural draft gasifier that has been test Tier 5 on thermal efficiency, Tier 5 on CO emissions, and Tier 3 on PM2.5. The performance tests were done at the CREEC center in Uganda. The
calorific value of pellets was measured 17,76 MJ/kg, which is comparable with wood pellets.
We have created 53 permanent and temporary jobs in total and are expanding our presence by partnering with grocery stores, supermarkets and small boutiques of the City as distributors.
The target customers are mainly the urban population of the capital city, Bujumbura, and the surrounding provinces. 
Statistics show that the capital city alone counts for 900 Tons of charcoal every day. This is an enormous quantity, given the amount of wood that has to be cut. 
The Burundian population is keen to replace charcoal in their daily routine. This subsistence product is becoming increasingly expensive, scarce and insufficient for the growing urban population.
We are offering a cooking solution that allows fast, efficient and affordable cooking comparing to cooking with charcoal, electric cookers or LPG.

Name: Vilair Motors
Description:
Hemos desarrollado motores de aire comprimido autónomo, que a través de su sistema de recuperación interno no requiere recarga y no utiliza ningún otro combustible que no sea aire. Estos motores servirán para reemplazar a todos los motores eléctricos y de combustible fósil, ya sea para uso vehicular o uso de generación de energía eléctrica. 

El uso que se le podrá dar es ilimitado, vehículos, maquinaria, bombas de agua, generadores de energía eléctrica, etc., lo más importante para generar de energía eléctrica sustentable, económica, renovable y sin contaminar.
Nuestro motor de aire comprimido:
1. Carece de suministro de energía externo y permanente. (Es Autosustentable)
2. Durante su funcionamiento genera su propia energía. (Es autónomo)
2.3. Funciona con aire a presión, o cualquier otro fluido gaseoso apropiado, dentro de un sistema herméticamente cerrado.
2.4. Por su diseño y rendimiento, es apto para reemplazar a cualquier motor de combustión fósil, gas o carbón.
2.5. No emite gases tóxicos, CO2 u otros desechos.

Name: Zhuhai Gongtong Low Carbon Technology Co., Ltd.
Description:
Zhuhai Gongtong Low Carbon Technology Co.,Ltd.  was established in 2004 and specializes in providing integrated solutions for industrial gases, clean energy utilization, and energy conservation and emission reduction.

We currently hold 34 valid patents, including 3 authorized invention patents. Two of these inventions have received National Excellent Invention Patent Awards, and 6 other invention patents are under substantive examination.

Our product portfolio includes air separation and storage/transportation systems, carbon dioxide recovery and storage/transportation systems, LNG and its related systems, as well as cryogenic liquid storage tanks.

Our complete system solutions have been exported to over 22 countries and regions. In the Belt and Road Initiative regions, we have achieved a coverage rate of 60%. So far, our CO₂ recovery systems contribute to an annual total recovery of nearly 6 million tons of carbon dioxide.

The CO₂ systems developed by our company can achieve a purity of up to 6N (99.9999%). Currently, the electronic-grade CO₂ used by TSMC in Taiwan is supplied by our systems.
GongTong Low Carbon is also the sole supplier of complete CO₂ system solutions in the Asia-Pacific region for Linde (Germany) and Air Products (USA).

In addition to industrial gas systems, GongTong Low Carbon is also actively developing new technologies, such as algae-based hydrogen production, NOx-free combustion, and supercritical CO₂ fracturing, ensuring continuous innovation and growth.

•PulseLink – a proprietary high-speed digital control bus that synchronises inverter modules as one seamless system
•SureTrip – a coordinated fault-clearing capability that drives enough current to reliably trip breakers
•Per-module MPPTs for flexible solar layouts
•Native 400V DC architecture for efficiency and cost savings
•24kW in a compact, 15kg 2U rack-mount form

Designed and built in Australia, Aspect Labs exists to meet the energy needs of today while preparing for the challenges of tomorrow.

Specialties:
Modular hybrid inverters | High-voltage energy storage | Rack-mount energy systems | Utility-grade performance | Off-grid and commercial solar | Australian innovation

Name: EcoRiego
Description:
EcoRiego es un proyecto tecnológico diseñado para optimizar el uso del agua en entornos urbanos mediante un sistema de riego inteligente. Utilizando tecnología avanzada, como sensores IoT (Internet de las Cosas) e inteligencia artificial (IA), EcoRiego permite monitorear en tiempo real las condiciones del suelo, la humedad y otros factores ambientales, para gestionar de manera eficiente el riego en parques, jardines y otros espacios urbanos.

El sistema reemplaza los métodos tradicionales de riego, que se basan en temporizadores, por un sistema autónomo y adaptativo que ajusta automáticamente el riego según las necesidades reales de las plantas y árboles. Esto no solo ayuda a reducir el consumo de agua, sino que también mejora la salud y el crecimiento de las plantas al asegurar que reciban la cantidad de agua adecuada en el momento preciso.

Además, EcoRiego se centra en la sostenibilidad, ya que su implementación contribuye al ahorro de agua, un recurso escaso y vital, especialmente en áreas urbanas con altos niveles de consumo. Al integrar esta tecnología en ciudades, se busca promover prácticas más responsables con el medio ambiente, ayudando a mitigar los efectos del cambio climático y promoviendo un futuro más verde.

El sistema está diseñado para ser escalable y adaptable, lo que permite su uso tanto en pequeños jardines urbanos como en grandes áreas públicas. EcoRiego tiene como objetivo ofrecer una solución innovadora que facilite la gestión de recursos naturales, al tiempo que fomente la creación de ciudades más sostenibles y resilientes.

Con el enfoque en la eficiencia y la sostenibilidad, EcoRiego busca ser una herramienta fundamental para los ayuntamientos y otras entidades encargadas del cuidado de los espacios urbanos, mejorando la calidad de vida de los ciudadanos y protegiendo el medio ambiente para las generaciones futuras.

Name: Integrado
Description:
Fasada fotowoltaiczna to nowoczesne rozwiązanie łączące estetykę architektury z produkcją czystej energii. Jej największą zaletą jest możliwość wykorzystania pionowych powierzchni budynku do generowania prądu, co pozwala zwiększyć autokonsumpcję energii bez zajmowania dodatkowej przestrzeni. Dzięki temu nawet obiekty w gęstej zabudowie miejskiej mogą stać się częściowo samowystarczalne energetycznie.

Kolejnym atutem jest poprawa bilansu energetycznego budynku. Moduły PV pełnią funkcję dodatkowej warstwy izolacyjnej, ograniczając przegrzewanie latem i poprawiając parametry termiczne zimą. W efekcie zmniejsza się zapotrzebowanie na energię do chłodzenia i ogrzewania, co bezpośrednio przekłada się na niższe koszty eksploatacji.

Fasady fotowoltaiczne mają również walor estetyczny. Nowoczesne moduły dostępne są w różnych kolorach, strukturach i stopniach przepuszczalności światła, dzięki czemu mogą być spójnym elementem projektu architektonicznego. Umożliwiają tworzenie elewacji o wysokich walorach wizualnych i użytkowych, a jednocześnie podkreślają proekologiczny charakter inwestycji.

Podsumowując, fasada fotowoltaiczna to połączenie ekologii, efektywności energetycznej i nowoczesnej architektury, które pozwala projektować budynki przyszłości – zrównoważone, ekonomiczne i atrakcyjne wizualnie.

Name: Veridian Sustainability Limited
Description:
The Green Planet ESG Limited is revolutionizing Nigeria's energy landscape, driving a sustainable and regenerative future. We tackle critical challenges like energy poverty, pollution, and resource scarcity by empowering individuals, businesses, and governments with innovative clean energy and circular economy solutions.

Our core offering is comprehensive renewable energy system provision and expert installation. We supply and install high-efficiency solar panels, advanced lithium batteries, inverters, and essential electrical components, ensuring reliable, affordable, and clean power for homes and businesses. Our certified technicians provide tailored design, meticulous installation, and ongoing support, drastically reducing reliance on costly, polluting fossil fuel generators.

A key differentiator is our pioneering local manufacturing of green wind turbine generators. We ingeniously repurpose car alternator and washing machine coils to produce durable, eco-friendly horizontal wind turbines. This innovative approach embodies SDG 12 (Responsible Consumption & Production) by turning waste into valuable resources, simultaneously lowering costs and fostering a robust circular economy within Nigeria. These turbines seamlessly integrate with solar setups, providing robust 24/7 power by charging battery banks for AC appliances.

Our commitment extends to holistic ESG consulting, guiding businesses and governments on sustainable strategies, carbon footprint reduction, ethical supply chain management, and green building practices. We also engage in sustainable product development, impact reporting, and community education, fostering a greener mindset across society.

We're creating vital green jobs, building local manufacturing capacity, and fostering energy independence. The Green Planet ESG is dedicated to a more resilient, prosperous, and truly sustainable Nigeria for current and future generations.

Join us in shaping a truly Green Planet.

Name: Oktosol Technologies
Description:
Oktosol bietet eine innovative Lösung zur Nutzung von Solarenergie in Form von Sattdampf für industrielle Prozesse, wie in der Lebensmittel-, Holz-, Papier- und Kunststoffproduktion. Mit einer Betriebstemperatur von 120°C bis 235°C kann der erzeugte Dampf präzise gesteuert und für verschiedenste Anwendungen eingesetzt werden, wodurch fossile Brennstoffe effizient ersetzt werden.

Dank eines einzigartigen Öffnungs- und Schließmechanismus ist Oktosol extrem widerstandsfähig gegenüber extremen Wetterbedingungen wie Sandstürmen, Hagel oder starken Winden. Die automatische Reinigung und die Vakuumtechnologie des Systems sorgen für einen nahezu verlustfreien Betrieb. Ein Oktosol bringt 40kW/h Wärme, die in den peripheren Geräten des Gesamtsystems hocheffizient genutzt werden können. Der Betrieb in diesen Kombiprozessen (Strom und Meerwasserentsalzung, Strom und Prozesswärme, Strom und Kühle, ...) führt, über eine Betriebszeit von 20 Jahren (die alle anderen Solarsysteme, wenn überhaupt, dann nur mit enormer Degradation ihrer Wirkungsgrade überleben) gerechnet in solarreichen Regionen zu folgenden Preisen:

< € 0,02 / kWh Strom
< € 0,007 / kWh Wärme
< € 0,01 / kWh Kälte
< € 0,5 / 1000 Liter destilliertes Wasser

Für die Landwirtschaft bietet Oktosol die Möglichkeit, den Boden ein zweites Mal zu nutzen. 
Auch Betreiber von Parkplätzen, Besitzer von Immobilien mit großen Dachflächen werden von der doppelten Nutzung ihrer Flächen profitieren.
In Katastrophengebieten kann das System schnell aufgestellt werden, um alle lebenswichtigen Ressourcen bereitzustellen.
Mit den Systemen von Oktosol kann sogar Wasserstoff 100% autark hergestellt werden.

Oktosol trägt nicht nur zur wirtschaftlichen Effizienz bei, sondern auch zur Förderung eines sozial und ökologisch ausgewogenen Lebensraums. Mit einer Amortisation von nur 1,5-3 Jahren und einer Lebensdauer von über 20 Jahren ist Oktosol eine kostengünstige und nachhaltige Lösung für die Energieversorgung der Zukunft.

Name: Roshana ( Novin Ofogh Company) نورگیر هوشمند خورشیدی روشنا
Description:
نورگیر هوشمند خورشیدی  روشنا سیستمی است که نور خورشید را در طول روز ردیابی و از طریق داکت نورگیر و با آینه های هوشمند  به محل هایی که از نور مستقیم خورشید در روز  بی بهره اند(مانند ساختمانها و اتاق های شمالی، سوله ها، راهروها، پارکینگ ها و…) منتقل می کند. این سیستم باعث افزایش قابل توجه نور طبیعی  واحدهای شمالی ساختمان می شود. ایده اولیه طراحی این سیستم در داخل کشور به حدود ده سال قبل باز می گردد. در این مدت ده ها مورد نورگیر هوشمند در ساختمان های مسکونی و تجاری مختلف نصب و راهاندازی شده است. سیستم فعلی تلفیقی از مجموعه سیستم های مکانیکی، الکترونیکی، نوری و کنترلی پیشرفته است که به دست جوانان توانمد کشورمان طراحی و بومی سازی شده است.

استفاده از نورگیر هوشمند خورشیدی روشنا می تواند علاوه بر اثرات آرامش بخش ناشی از نور طبیعی، مصرف انرژی الکتریکی در طول روز را به حداقل برساند و از این جهت مزایای اقتصادی زیادی در بلند مدت دارد. روشنا را می توان همراه با نورگیر های سقفی و یا حبابی نیز استفاده نمود.  این محصول در بازار با نام های آینه  آفتابگردان ، شرکت خورشید شمال و خورشید طبقاتی نیز شناخته می شود. در بخش پروژه ها می توانید پروژه های نورگیر روشنا در اصفهان و شهرهای دیگر را مشاهده فرمائید. سیستم نورگیر هوشمند خورشیدی در مرکز مالکیت معنوی  ایران به ثبت رسیده است و هرگونه کپی برداری از آرم، لوگو، طرح صنعتی و ایده آن مشمول پیگیرد های قانونی می گردد. نورگیر هوشمند خورشیدی روشنا یکی از محصولات شرکت مهندسی نوین افق می باشد.
Roshana is a suntracking system that redirect sunlight into dark rooms.
this system is localized and registered by novin ofogh company.

Name: FANDURA BV
Description:

“We besparen energie en reduceren uw CO2 uitstoot”
